E: It's not yet time to do this now — give out the gems and get some clues on the stowaway, then see if *that girl* will take the bait.

C: 「诚然，我们相信无名客与此事无关，也恳请各位能协助家族一道，查明死者的身份。」是这么说的…指的是流萤小姐。
E: "Indeed, we trust that the Nameless has nothing to do with this, and we also beg each of you to help assist The Family in verifying the identity of the deceased." That's how it was put... in reference to Miss Firefly.

C: 恐怕不用了，黄泉小姐，你现在是匹诺康尼的知名人物。
E: I already do, Miss Acheron. You're a prominent figure in Penacony.

C: …他们是怎么说的？
E: ...What are they saying about me?

C: 瓦尔特先生，我认为你早就得出相同的结论了。
E: Mr. Yang, I think you've come to the same conclusion, haven't you?

C: 嗯。
E: Mhmm.

C: 「市场开拓部主管奥斯瓦尔多•施耐德称，此举将『为争取松波尔全体公民的基本自由打下坚实基础』，并对公司在无主星区茨冈尼亚的开疆工作作出重要示范……」
E: "The head of the Marketing Development Department, Oswaldo Schneider, claimed that this move would 'lay a solid foundation to fight for the fundamental freedoms of all citizens of Sombor' and serve as an important demonstration of the company's pioneering work in the unclaimed region of Sigonia..."

C: 砂金先生呈交的「基石」——当真属于他本人么？
E: The Cornerstone which Mr. Aventurine surrendered — was it really his?

C: 咱们还是找找开门的办法吧。
E: Let's find a way to open the door.

C: 和砂金做生意的感觉怎么样，一定不太习惯吧？
E: How does it feel to be in business with Aventurine? I bet you're not used to it.

C: …我对那孩子的遭遇深表惋惜。
E: ...I'm sorry for what happened to that kid.

C: 你要是挺不住了，记得先通知我一声。
E: Just tell me if you can't hold on any longer.

C: …你彻底疯了，该死的赌徒。
E: ...You are indeed a gambler — an insane one at that.

C: 这是真的吗？我居然也能得到别人的礼物？不是给我父母，而是给我…谢谢你，真是太谢谢你了！
E: Is this for real? Someone is actually giving me a gift? Not for my parents, but for me... Thank you, thank you so much!

C: 他是个智械，入梦方式和有机生命不同。真的出现了危险，没法在梦境中保护我，保护…在这种事上我也远不如他…哈哈，太讽刺了，太讽刺了……
E: He's an Intellitron, so his dream entry methods are different from us organics. Can't count on him to protect me if something does go haywire. Funny, right now I'm still under his protection... Heh, how ironic...

C: 呵，那还真是离奇…不过谢谢你的分享。
E: Heh, I guess she's got a point... Thank you for sharing.

C: 或许是摆在这做装饰的。
E: Maybe it's placed here for decoration.

C: 是调饮师的矜持吧。如果来这的客人还能点到外面随处可见的饮料，就太没意思了。我在冲咖啡时也会有这样的想法。
E: It's all about the bartender's pride. It wouldn't make sense for customers to come here and order drinks they can find anywhere else. That's the mindset I use when I brew my coffee.

C: 哎，你笑什么…难道是你写的？文采还挺好。
E: Hey, why are you laughing... Wait, did you write it? It's quite poetic.

C: 还没反应过来吗？我的意思是……
E: You don't get it? Well, I mean...

C: 加拉赫先生…果然是很有故事的人啊。
E: Gallagher... does have a troubled past, it seems.

C: …公司渴望收回匹诺康尼。他们出现在这里，倒也在意料之中。
E: ...The IPC is eager to reclaim Penacony, so their presence here is not unexpected.

C: 星期日先生对嫌疑人的研究非常深入——这名叛徒一定困扰家族已久了。
E: Mr. Sunday has done some serious research on his suspects... This traitor must have been causing trouble for The Family for a long time.

C: 真相虽未水落石出，但我已经离它不远。我向各位保证，叛徒很快就会付出代价。
E: While the truth remains a mystery, I'm getting close to it. I assure you that the traitor will soon pay the price.

C: 以免…不测之忧。
E: You never know... what unexpected troubles could arise.

C: 啊——要玩捉迷藏吗？我最擅长这个了——
E: Ahh, playing hide-and-seek? I'm really good at this!

C: 你说的那些{RUBY_B#千术}技巧{RUBY_E#}效率是很高，但我不是不会，而是不屑用，懂么？
E: Those {RUBY_B#cheats}techniques{RUBY_E#} you mentioned are highly efficient, but it's not that I don't know about them — it's more like I couldn't care less. Get it?

C: 你并不关心真凶是谁，对所谓的遗产也不感兴趣。你只想当好一个秉公办事的公司职员，在家族的地盘处处受难，被戴上滚烫的镣铐，推向舞台中央……
E: You don't care who the real murderer is. And the Watchmaker's so-called "legacy" couldn't be more boring. What you want, what you need, is to be the smooth operator — the solid gold deal-maker who doesn't waste a drop of sweat even when he's up to his neck in danger, deep inside Family territory. You want to be polished up, cuffed with red-hot chains and spotlit center stage...

C: 我还不能走。
E: I can't leave yet.
...Huh?

C: 要回家了吗——可我还不想回去——
E: We're going home? But I don't want to go back yet...

C: <size=36>星际和平公司诚邀各位光临现场——克劳克影视乐园！</size>
E: <size=36>The IPC cordially invites everyone to — Clock Studios Theme Park!</size>

C: 似乎也没有别的选项。
E: I wasn't aware there was a choice.

C: 离开，永远别再回来。盛会之星的光芒太过耀眼，吸引了太多骗子、恶徒、罪犯，但即便是「同谐」…也绝对不会欢迎「虚无」的自灭者。
E: Leave, and never return. The radiance of the Planet of Festivities is overwhelmingly bright, luring in tricksters, wrongdoers, and criminals. But even the Harmony itself... will never welcome the Self-Annihilator of Nihility.

C: 嗯…多想无益，先去和姬子她们会合吧。
E: But there's no point in overthinking things. Let's meet up with Himeko and the others first.

C: 嗯，我也是这么想的。虽然还没有十足把握，但无论如何我们都得找到他。
E: Yes, that's my thinking as well. I'm not entirely certain, but we still have to find him one way or another.

C: 喔…不过，怎么路上的行人都不害怕呢？
E: I see... but why aren't the other people around here scared?

C: 呵呵，不愧是众望所归的谐乐之子。
E: Hehe, it seems you truly are a child of the Harmony.

C: 选择？
E: Choice?

C: 战后的十年，匹诺康尼深陷内忧外患。为了阿斯德纳，铁尔南重拾「开拓」之道，带领灯蛾家系向星系外探索，却惨遭虫群包围…全军覆没。
E: In the decade following the War, Penacony faced challenges internal and external. To protect Asdana, Tiernan picked up the way of the Trailblaze again, and led the Lampmoth Family to explore beyond the system, only to be surrounded... and wiped out by the Swarm.

C: 列车组不会对这种事袖手旁观，星期日先生，知更鸟小姐，我愿意代表星穹列车与你们同行。有第三方在场，谈判应当会更顺利些。如有危险…多一个人也总是好事。
E: Rest assured — sitting on the sidelines isn't in our nature. Mr. Sunday, Miss Robin, I'm willing to accompany you on behalf of the Astral Express. Having a third party present should help with negotiations... and could make all the difference if things get ugly.

C: 大家，请到这边来。临行前我们还有些准备要做。
E: Everyone, let's gather over here — we still need to make some preparations.

C: 我发誓。
E: Yes.

C: …请下一位上前。
E: ...Next. Please step forward.

C: 就这些，没别的了。你是不是还有词要念？搞快点，我赶着去看机动球比赛呢。
E: That's it. Nothing more. Can we wrap this up? I've got a Roboball game to catch, you know?

C: 麻烦两位代为接引了，我就在这里等待各位的消息。
E: Thank you for everything you've done. I'll be waiting here.

C: 但那个人不应该是你，也不应该是任何特定的某个人。哥哥，你给自己的负担太多了。
E: But that "someone" doesn't have to be you or anyone in particular. You're carrying too much on your shoulders, brother.

C: 是。
E: Understood.

C: 哦！已经先行入住的几位无名客中，似乎也有一位是这样的情况。看来最近踏上「开拓」的人是越来越多了。
E: Oh, I see! Another one of the Nameless had a similar situation. Seems like a lot of people are joining the Trailblaze these days.

C: 你是要我们老老实实待着？
E: Are you suggesting we sit here and do nothing?

C: …如果我是家族，就会假借流程，把不确定因素拖在这里。没必要故意走进他们的陷阱。
E: ...If I were a Family member, I'd find an official excuse and keep the surprise factors here. If we just wait here, that would be like walking into their trap.

C: 这么名贵的酒品如果有人预留，我一定会记得。毕竟这酒一支要卖几十万信用点…要是打碎或弄丢了，我可赔不起啊。
E: If someone had reserved such a beverage, I would definitely remember it. It sells for hundreds of thousands of credits per bottle, after all... I couldn't afford to cover for such an item if it were broken or lost.

C: 危急关头还来选秀真的好吗…
E: Is it really a good idea to have a talent show in this pivotal moment of our story?

C: 而最后一关…你们将挑战一位坚守至今的守擂者，一位拥有高贵品德的人气选手！
E: And in the last stage... you will face off against a champion who has defended the title to this very day — a beloved contender whose noble virtues are unrivaled!

C: 就按小三月说的来吧。加拉赫先生，你会和我们同行吗？
E: We'll follow March's plan. Mr. Gallagher, will you be joining us?

C: 救救，救救啾！要变成烤全鸟了啾！
E: Help, help, tweet! I'm about to end up as a roast dinner, tweet!

C: …不出所料。
E: ...Just as expected.

C: 一个白手起家的富豪，竟然用如此轻蔑的态度对待自己曾经的同伴，使我心中不由得感到愤怒！
E: A mogul who went from rags-to-riches treating a former companion with such disdain — it just makes my blood boil!

C: 您竟然已在别处探听到了我卑微的称号…不胜荣幸！
E: You've already heard of my humble title elsewhere? I am deeply honored!

C: 也正是在那段时间，我得以听取来自梦境各方的声音：有欢喜、有忧愁、有傲慢、有悔恨…复杂的人性编织起世界，而我有幸窥见其中一斑。
E: It was during that period that I had the opportunity to hear voices from all corners of the Dreamscape: Joy, sorrow, arrogance, regret... The complex tapestry of human nature that formed the world, and I was fortunate to catch a glimpse of it.

C: 我…认可你是一位天生的领导者。你对人类充满悲观，却依然怀抱着否定的心，予以众生平等的怜悯。
E: I... I admit that you are a born leader. Your perspective on humanity brims with pessimism, yet you express compassion for all, even when your heart pities them.

C: 别倚老卖老啊。
E: You're talking like an elder.

C: 还有这种事？
E: Wait, really?

C: 放心吧，米凯。就是出趟远门而已。
E: Don't worry, Micah. Just going on a little trip.

C: 嗯，钟表小子，带我去流梦礁吧……
E: Oh, it's you, Clockie... Take me to Dreamflux Reef...

C: 而是一块「罗盘」。
E: It was a compass.

C: 咱们连「毁灭」的绝灭大君都收拾过了，区区「秩序」肯定也不在话下！
E: We've even dealt with a Lord Ravager of the Destruction, so a follower of the Order won't be a big deal!

C: 属于我的那一块，它曾经刻着「格拉默铁骑」，如今刻着「星核猎手」，而总有一天……
E: The tombstone that belongs to me once bore the inscription "Glamoth's Iron Cavalry," then it changed to "Stellaron Hunter," but one day...

C: 那是我们无论如何都要避免的未来。
E: We must do everything we can to prevent that.

C: 让我们在地狱里再次共进晚餐吧……
E: Let's get together and have supper again in hell...

C: 呵。你从小就智慧过人，想必一定明白，自己此刻的作为要付出何种代价。
E: Heh, you've always been wise beyond your years. I'm sure you understand the consequences of your choice.

C: 怎么看个戏还要打架啊！
E: Hey, why do we have to fight while enjoying the show?

C: 这些人偶…又想让我们去哪儿？
E: These puppets... Where are they guiding us this time?

C: 我有种奇怪的预感，我们不会是走错地方了吧？
E: Something feels off... We're in the right place, right?

C: 《愚仆颂》…想必这就是第二出剧目了。
E: Ode to Fool... This must be the second act.

C: 距「谐乐大典」开幕3系统时 匹诺康尼大剧院
E: 3 system hours until Charmony Festival - Penacony Grand Theater

C: 「我曾是所有仆人中最忠诚的卫士！主人遭驱逐后，我自当代他执掌万民的权柄！」
E: "Once, I stood as the most loyal guard among all the servants! Now, with my master banished, it's my right to assume control of his dominion!"

C: 多亏了景元将军击溃了「齐响诗班」，我们才能逃出生天。
E: Thanks to General Jing Yuan's destruction of the Harmonious Choir, we were able to escape.

C: 让我来解释吧。波提欧先生和黑天鹅小姐出于各自需要，提出了想要暂时与列车组同行的请求……
E: Allow me to explain: Mr. Boothill and Miss Black Swan submitted a request to temporarily travel with the Express for their own personal reasons...

C: …具体内容还是听听这位天才的说法吧。轮到你了，螺丝咕姆先生。
E: ...The floor is yours for the finer points, Mr. Screwllum. Enlighten us, please.

C: 他在无人的角落悄然离世，葬礼只有寥寥数人到场。
E: He died a quiet death in a forgotten corner somewhere, with only a handful in attendance at his funeral.

C: 姬子和杨叔应该还在忙…我们先去找丹恒吧。
E: Himeko and Mr. Yang are probably still busy... Let's go look for Dan Heng first.

C: （嗯…也还算圆满吧。）
E: (I guess it was pretty fruitful.)

C: 听起来一点都不简单…
E: That doesn't sound simple at all...

C: 我们已经沉寂了太久。是时候让全宇宙的懦夫、蛀虫和压迫者重新想起巡海游侠的名字了，就由我来打响第一枪。
E: We've stayed silent for far too long. Now, it's time to remind all the cowards, oppressors, and villains of the universe of our presence! I'll be the one to ignite the first spark.

C: 聆听、触碰、思考，由此你将获得感受。珍惜它，凭借感受，我们得以存在。这也是在「虚无」面前，人类唯一能给出的解答。
E: Listen, touch, and ponder, and therein lies the sensation. Cherish it, because that's what makes us exist. Such is the only answer humans can offer when facing the Nihility.

C: 去你个呜呜伯，只是让他们睡会儿，少他宝贝的拿这套威胁我。再说了，我干掉的公司狗比你榨取的剩余价值还多，不介意通缉令上再多几个「零」。
E: Screwubbaboo, I just put them to sleep! Don't try to intimidate me with that nonsense. Besides, I've taken down more IPC lackeys than the residual value you've squeezed, and I don't mind adding a few more zeroes to my wanted poster.

C: 可这一次，你什么都没有看见。
E: But this time, you see nothing at all.

C: 小题大做了吧。
E: Stop making a big fuss.

C: 「晖长石号」是？
E: What is the "Radiant Feldspar"?

C: 那个…总监，我之前跟人打听了下：听说这艘「晖长石号」是苜蓿草家系的财产。
E: About this, Director... I've asked around. This airship, named the Radiant Feldspar, belongs to the Alfalfa Family.

C: 「匹诺康尼的未来」——没猜错的话，您想聊的就是这个。
E: The future of Penacony, if I'm not mistaken.

C: 而为了不让匹诺康尼再走上先前的老路，对星穹列车而言，公司也会成为谈判桌上不可或缺的助力。
E: As far as the Astral Express is concerned, the IPC will make for an invaluable ally during the negotiations to prevent Penacony returning to its former ways.

C: 唉，真担心匹诺康尼的未来啊……
E: I'm really worried about the future of Penacony...

C: 要是能见到加拉赫，就让他也喝上一杯吧。我懂那家伙的口味，他肯定会喜欢的。
E: If you happen to run into Gallagher, make sure he has a sip too. I know his tastes, and he'll be thrilled.

C: 你比我想象中镇定许多呢。失熵症…真是一场无妄之灾啊，不是么？
E: You are much calmer than I expected. Entropy Loss Syndrome... truly an unjust misfortune, isn't it?

C: 不是没有希望，我只能言尽于此。
E: Well, there might be a silver lining. That's all I can say for now.

C: 看看，这是谁来了？星穹列车的大英雄，全匹诺康尼如今最耀眼的{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}！
E: Look who's here! The great hero of the Astral Express, the most dazzling {NICKNAME} in all of Penacony!

C: 什么动物？
E: What animal?

C: 加入星核猎手前，艾利欧对我说，这段旅途会告诉我活下去的方法。他言止于此，剩下的都留待我自己去探寻。
E: Before joining the Stellaron Hunters, Elio told me that this journey will tell me how to live on. That's all he said. As for the rest, it's up to me to find out.

C: 嗯，是我不好。对不起。
E: Yes, and for that, I'm sorry.

C: （总感觉还有什么人在等我…时间应该还够，要再去转转吗？）
E: (Why do I feel like there's someone waiting for me... I probably have enough time, maybe I should take a walk?)

C: 那是什么让本届大典变得这样意义非凡？众所周知，「晖长石号」曾因美梦中的异变不得不停航，一度在十二时刻引发热议……
E: What makes this festival so uniquely significant? As is widely known, the Radiant Feldspar had to halt its voyage due to an anomaly in the sweet dream, sparking widespread discussion in the Twelve Hours...

C: <size=36>无名客！无名客！无名客！</size>
E: <size=36>Nameless! Nameless! Nameless!</size>

C: 既然你问完了，我也回答过了…那么根据剧情需要，我将会告诉你这里根本没有炸弹的事实，让你痛悔自己浪费了半天时间听我说废话，然后我们分道扬镳。
E: Since you're done asking questions, and I'm done answering... according to the script, I must reveal to you the fact that there's no bomb here at all, thus causing you to want to kick yourself for spending this whole time listening to me prattling on, after which we will part ways.

C: 举杯。
E: A toast.

C: …我总会忍不住想，无论是米哈伊尔先生，还是铁尔南先生、拉扎莉娜女士，他们的一生都是很漫长的，肯定经历过好多好多故事吧……
E: ...I can't help but think that whether it's Mr. Mikhail, Mr. Tiernan, or Madam Razalina, their lives must have been long, and they must have experienced plenty of stories...

C: 所以就算没那么现实，就算有不合理的地方，也还是会希望结局到来时，这个故事能圆满落幕。可是……
E: So even if there are parts of it that aren't really realistic nor logical, we still hope that their story gets a good ending when it comes.

C: …我没想到会是你。
E: ...I wasn't expecting it to be you.

C: 我不太明白你的意思，你想说…什么「时候」？
E: What do you mean... What "time?"

C: 与众无名客道别
E: Bid farewell to the Nameless

C: 睡蕉小猴喜欢偷懒、爱吃香蕉，生活在「睡蕉的时刻」，过着无忧无虑的生活。
E: Slumbernana Monkey likes goofing off and loves eating bananas. It lives a carefree life in the Moment of Slumbernana.

C: 后来鸢尾花与苜蓿草也参与到大学管理中，发展出如今的筑梦、谐乐、财富三大学院，折纸大学也一跃成为了闻名银河的艺术学府。
E: Later on, the Iris and Alfalfa Families also got involved in university operations, and the education landscape expanded into the three academies we have today: Dreamweaver, Charmony, and Fortune. From there, Paperfold University became known as the top arts school in the cosmos.

C: 蕉蕉！
E: Bana!

C: 美少女？
E: Pretty girl?

C: 我是球棒•忍者。
E: I'm Baseball Bat Ninja.

C: 你好，新同学。
E: How do you do, fellow student?

C: 表现倒是很像，但应该不可能吧……
E: It looked similar, but it can't be, right?

C: 加入「快乐」。
E: Add "Happiness."

C: 呵呵，看来三月七同学对你的料理有很多感慨呀。
E: Hehe, looks like March 7th feels very strongly about your cooking.

C: 所以，这家伙是你们社团的？
E: So, is she a member of your club?

C: 别再用戏里的名字称呼我了，叫人家的艺名吧——芭蕉花酱！
E: Stop calling me by the name of my character. Use my stage name — Nanabloom-chan!

C: 去他宝贝的，脑子可管不着我，不然我怎么到得了这儿？
E: My muddle-fudgin' brain ain't the boss of me! Or how'd I end up here?

C: 别管你们有什么恩怨，先让条道出来？
E: I don't care what beef y'all got, just make way, will ya?

C: 我知道你想问什么，巡海游侠的第一枪响亮非凡，流梦礁还没闭塞到听不见外边的声音。
E: I know what you want to ask. A Galaxy Ranger's gunshot rings loud and clear. And Dreamflux Reef isn't so isolated that we don't hear what's going on outside our walls.

C: 类似？听起来不是第一次了，你知道这宝贝香蕉是怎么回事？
E: "Too"? Sounds like you've encountered this before. So, what in tarnation is going on with all this "bananas" business?

C: 你对睡蕉小猴果然有很深的误解。
E: You seem to have quite the misconception about Slumbernana Monkey.

C: 没什么事儿
E: No.

C: 米凯先生也是这么想的。可一腔热血救不了流梦礁，此时此刻，我也不想执导一出悲剧。
E: Yes, Mr. Micah thinks the same. But that perseverance of theirs isn't going to save Dreamflux Reef. I don't wish for this film to develop into a tragedy either.

C: 倒是没错！那小可爱有两下子。想让流梦礁的人唱起「同谐」之歌，确实没有比这更好的法子！
E: Darn right, he is! That muddle-fudger does know what he's talking about. Nothing else can beat this if the people of Dreamflux Reef have to come together to sing their song of Harmony!

C: 我也非常好奇，那会是怎样的「同谐」之歌。
E: I can't wait to hear for myself how this song of Harmony is going to turn out.

C: 嗯，不必再陪着我了，方才的紧张，现在已经完全消失了。
E: I'm alright now. You don't have to accompany me any further. The butterflies that I felt from before are all gone now.

C: 现在，让我们迎来华丽的终章吧——
E: Let us welcome, with bated breath, the beatific final act!

C: 要去专业课上看看么？
E: Let's go and take a look at the classes, shall we?

C: 怎么又是猴子啊！
E: Not monkeys again...

C: 睡蕉小猴…睡蕉小猴……
E: Slumbernana Monkey... Slumbernana Monkey...

C: （不，不要屈服！）
E: (No! Don't give in!)

C: 没错，我终于加入了折纸大学最受欢迎的社团「睡蕉社」，这是我的社名！
E: That's right, I finally got into the Slumbernana Association — the GOAT club at Paperfold University! And that's my name in the club!

C: 蕉师，上一批货已经卖完了。
E: BananAdvisor, I sold everything from the last batch.

C: 嗯，*蕉*给你了。
E: I'm counting on you, bana.

C: 唉，筑梦蕉师明明说会搞定新一批货的，真是不靠谱蕉。
E: Geez, Dreamwaver BananAdvisor said he'd get a new batch ready. Looks like we can't rely on him, bana tsk!

C: 您、您怎么知道？
E: H—How did you know that?

C: 老爹，我撑不住了啊……
E: Dad, there's nothing else keeping me going...

C: 各位演员，听说过「模因病毒」吗？
E: Alright now, dear actors. Ever heard of a memetic virus?

C: 不要再胡枝扯叶了，速速招来——阁下就是御猿•邪忍的邪祟•总长吧！
E: Cease the shady evasion! I urge you to come clean now! You're Evil Ninja Osaru's Fiendling Chief, aren't you!?

C: 是我的错觉吗？同学，你好像学会正常的说话方式了。
E: Am I imagining things? Or did you learn how to speak like a normal person?

C: 还真让你说着啦，自从有了它，我可是茶不思饭不想……
E: You're right. Ever since I got it, I haven't been able to think of anything else...

C: 有那么一种本能，满手杀债的通缉犯有，从没开过枪的牛仔小子也有，二者没有任何区别……
E: Be it a wanted criminal with the blood of many on their hands or a young cowboy who's never fired a gun, both share a common instinct in every sense of the word...

C: （我变成了乱破记忆中的自己…这里就是忍之都？和想象中完全不同……）
E: (I am now the self that Rappa remembers in her memories... So this is the Ninja Capital? It's completely different from what I imagined...)

C: 只要你好好表现，我和能人<unbreak>75</unbreak>都能沾上光。你也不想让他失望，对吧？
E: As long as you perform well, both Denisovan <unbreak>75</unbreak> and I will be praised. You don't wish to disappoint him, do you?

C: 苦茶大师，在下…做错了吗？
E: Master Kucha, have I... done something wrong?

C: 原始博士…才不会在意我们这些凡人。
E: Dr. Primitive... wouldn't care about ordinary people like us.

C: 这里是哪…我刚刚不是在上课吗？
E: What is this place... Wasn't I just in class?

C: 怎么会…如此伟大的愿景，怎会败给一群不及格的薪柴……
E: How can it be... How could such mighty aspirations be brought down by a bunch of failed kindling...

C: 过奖了，{NICKNAME}•忍者。
E: You're too kind, Ninja {NICKNAME}.

C: 邪祟•总长乘坐这台忍•科学•弹丸离开了，我等也快追上去吧！
E: The Fiendling Chief left atop this ninja tech bullet! Let us quickly give chase!

C: 对于失败品而言，天才的「智识」遥不可及。但我可以用更「原始」的方式*蕉*会你们这个道理……
E: How can failures possibly comprehend the Erudition of a genius? However, I can always rely on primitive methods to banaducate you on this theory...

C: 被三重命途缠绕的神秘天体于忆者之镜中映现——那是「开拓」的下一站目的地，「永恒之地」翁法罗斯。
E: A mysterious celestial body entangled by Three Paths appears in the Memokeeper's mirror — Amphoreus, The Eternal Land, the next stop for the Trailblaze.

C: 「死亡」…它的到来总是那么突然，又刻骨铭心。
E: "Death"... Its arrival would always be so sudden and so momentous.

C: 阁下…！
E: Mis—!

C: 前些日子奥赫玛遭{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}袭城，不少黄金裔因战负伤，树庭特遣风堇女士前来支援奥赫玛，为伤者提供治疗……
E: Many of the Chrysos Heirs suffered injuries during {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s attack on Okhema, so the Grove sent Lady Hyacine to treat the wounded in Okhema.

C: 树庭历来欢迎求学者，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}也会借微风捎来嫩叶，并伸出枝梢，结成道路，以示迎接。
E: The Grove has always welcomed scholars. So too would {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} give us her delicate leaves and extend her branches in greeting.

C: 怎么说呢……
E: How should I put it...

C: 啊…扎到人家了！而且什么都没有……
E: Ow, that hurt! And I didn't even detect any memories...

C: 不过，要想去到那儿…可没老师说得这么轻巧。
E: But making our way there... won't be as simple as the professor made it sound.

C: 就唤吾为<color=#dbc291ff>卡吕普索</color>罢，也代七贤人与「莲食学派」向各位致意。
E: Just call me <color=#dbc291ff>Calypso</color>. I greet you on behalf of the Seven Sages and the Lotophagists.

C: 「九十九万九千九百匹『开拓』之力！无名客，我们联合！」你（疑似）与已陨星神合而为一，「开拓」之力便立即暴增！狂增！劲增！无比霸念，无比狂态……
E: "<unbreak>999,900</unbreak> layers of Trailblaze power! Nameless, we unite!" You (seemingly) merged with the fallen Aeon as one, and then the Trailblaze power immediately surged! Rise! Leap! Such dominance and such ferocity...

C: 这就是「金枝誓言」……
E: So, this is the Golden Bough of Vows...

C: 凭借你与小动物打交道的诸多经验，你坚信蝴蝶决不会无动于衷——除非它能忍住。
E: With your extensive experience in dealing with little creatures, you are certain the butterfly will not ignore you—unless it can resist the urge.

C: 唉，两位大人…真让人摸不清头脑。
E: It's so hard to understand what they're thinking sometimes...

C: （嗯？锁住了……）
E: (Hm, it's locked...)

C: 唯有如此，你们才具备「还乡」的资格。
E: Only by following this path can you be deemed worthy of returning home.

C: 处决！处决！
E: Execute! Execute!

C: …果然如此。
E: ...As I expected.

C: 不自量力地向悬锋人发出挑战，这就是下场。
E: This is what you get for daring to challenge a Kremnoan without understanding your own place.

C: 不过这一次，我看清了它的样貌：<color=#dbc291ff>黑色的斗篷，诡异的面具。破碎的、散发着不详气息的巨剑……</color>
E: But I saw its form this time... <color=#dbc291ff>A black cloak, an eerie mask, and a broken giant sword that carried an ominous aura...</color>

C: 「迈德漠斯，戴上王冠吧。」
E: "Mydeimos, don the crown."

C: 他隐瞒了病情，待我手刃{RUBY_B#先王欧利庞}仇敌{RUBY_E#}凯旋，他已只剩一丝气息。
E: He hid his condition from me, and by the time I returned victorious, he had but a breath left in him.

C: 先王为断绝宿业，将我投入冥海，却没料到此举反造就了我的不死之躯，给他招来了命运的复仇。
E: My father threw me into the Sea of Souls to break the wheel of karma, but little did he realize it would grant me an immortal body and summon a fated revenge on his head.

C: 不必怀疑，那泰坦不出声了。是我，智种学派的阿那克萨戈拉斯。
E: There's no need for doubt. The Titan no longer speaks. It is I, Anaxagoras of the Nousporists.

C: 先生，还请你拨冗……
E: Mister, we're sorry to bother you, but...

C: ——我来贯穿你的胸膛了，父亲！
E: I'm here to finish you, father.

C: 我梦见自己变成了好多好多个！我们一起把月亮当做船，把星星当做帆，在海上漂来漂去。风吹向哪里，我们就漂到哪里！
E: I had a dream that I turned into many mes! Then we made the moon into a ship and made the stars into our sails! Then we floated on the ocean and let the wind blow us in any direction it wanted!

C: 这个不一定。但他们肯定和你一样聪明，一样善良。
E: They might not, but they'll certainly be just as smart and kind as you.

C: 现在，*我们*分成了许许多多个自己…虽然失去了树干，却也多了一种选择……
E: Now, we are fragmented into numerous selves... Despite the absence of a trunk, we are offered another possibility...

C: 奉劝你别逞英雄。眼下的奥赫玛，恐怕没人是它的对手。
E: Don't try to be a hero. No one in Okhema stands a chance against that thing right now.

C: 不好了，白厄——
E: Bad news, Phainon—

C: 「凡人怎能轻易和解呢？」
E: "Reconciliation doesn't come easily for a mortal."

C: 虚荣…自毁的薪柴。
E: Vanity... leads to self-destruction.

C: 且不论推论的真伪，它远比想象中更来势汹汹啊。
E: Regardless of whether you're right, this being is still far more aggressive than we expected.

C: 几位有所不知：吾师失踪的同时，元老院也已告急。凯妮斯一派还是得知了树庭的事，暗中开始造势，恐怕在下一次公民大会前就会有所行动。
E: By the way, the Council of Elders declared a state of emergency when Tribbie went missing. Caenis and her following have heard tell of the incident at the Grove and are galvanizing support in secret. I fear she'll make her move before the next assembly of the citizens.

C: 但…不是现在。我已派遐蝶赶往元老院，捎去口信。有她在，足以暂时稳住局势。
E: ...But that's a problem for another day. I've sent Castorice ahead to the Council with a message. She should be able to keep the situation under control for the time being.

C: 当然，我愿意打头阵。
E: Of course. You may count on me to lead the charge.

C: 怎么保证我的安全？
E: How do we guarantee my safety?

C: 我缔造了历史。自我之后，神与王得以共生。
E: I've made history, and henceforth, divinity and kingship shall coexist as one.

C: 你想用短短的几句话，剥夺悬锋族人累积千年的骄傲吗？！
E: Are you trying to strip Kremnoans of the pride we've amassed over thousands of years with mere words?!

C: …不、不！
E: ...No! NO!

C: 他们不想令你失望，并非出于对惩戒的恐惧，而是发自内心地认同你的理念。
E: They strive not to disappoint you, not due to fear of repercussions, but out of sincere alignment with your ideals.

C: 荣耀属于你。
E: Glory belongs to you.

C: 这样呀。
E: I see.

C: 只是，缇安失去的记忆比我多多了。比如她忘了……
E: It's just that Trianne had forgotten far more things than I. For example...

C: 后来，妈妈在仪式前夜…也给了*我们*一块美丽的玻璃。
E: Later, on the eve of the ritual... Mother also gave us a beautiful piece of glass.

C: 唉，好吧…你可要保重身体。令堂临行前对我们千叮咛万嘱咐，一定要照顾好你呢。
E: ...Alright, but please take care of yourself. Your mother made us promise to look after you before she left.

C: 从进入宝库开始，缇里西庇俄丝就是孤身一人了。
E: Tribios had been on her own since she entered the vault.

C: 看来…记忆到这里还是结束了。
E: Well... looks like this is the end of the memory.

C: 好久不见，{NICKNAME}。螺丝咕姆先生说你今天会来，我就在这儿等了一会儿。
E: It's been a while, {NICKNAME}. Mr. Screwllum said you'd stop by today, so I figured I'd wait here for a bit.

C: 你俩为什么成了采访记者？
E: Why are you both acting as reporters?

C: 将忆泡当成请柬，真有匹诺康尼当地的特色。
E: Using memory bubbles as invitations... a very Penaconian thing to do.

C: 不必了~让这种选手参赛，不也很有趣嘛？
E: No need~ Letting a contestant like them compete just makes things even more interesting!

C: 我只是来实现梦想的！我一点都不在乎你！真的，你来不来参赛都不影响我的心态！完全不影响！完全不在乎！真的！
E: I'm here to chase my dream! I don't care about you! At all! Seriously, your existence has zero impact on my mental state! None! Nada! Not at all! I'm completely unbothered! Totally!

C: 似乎从最原初的部分开始，我们就已经分属于两个完全不同的世界了。
E: It seems that, from the very foundation of our existence, we hail from two entirely different worlds.

C: 哎？这不是咱们的盛会巨星吗？您这是来参加那个…「圣杯战争」的吧？
E: Wait a minute... isn't that our Festive Superstar? You're here for that... Holy Grail War, right?

C: 原来…是御主的朋友吗？
E: Oh... they're a friend of yours, Master?

C: 从我真正记事开始，我登上了一辆开往群星的列车，有了许多志同道合的朋友。虽然没有过去，但我有未来。
E: My earliest memory was boarding a train headed for the stars and meeting many kindred spirits as friends. Though I have no past, I have a future.

C: 如果迎接你的不是奇妙的冒险，而是无休止的清洁和修理，是不能愈合的创伤和绝望的死亡……你该怎么办？
E: What if what awaits you isn't a grand adventure, but endless cleaning, constant repairs, wounds that never heal, and death steeped in despair... What will you do then?

C: 我很高兴留在这里。
E: I'm glad I stayed.

C: 刚一回来就要听你说这些屁话。诶呀我去，头好疼啊！简直像经历了一场漫长又惊心动魄的冒险！
E: This is the first thing I hear after I got out? Darn it, my head's killing me! Feels like I've been through a long and thrilling adventure!

C: 流光散去，英武的少女骑士随之消失，一如她的降临。
E: As the Luminflux dimmed, the valiant girl knight faded, vanishing just as she had arrived.

C: 若论电影人的记忆…其价值确实贱如尘埃。但若论人的记忆，那真是…一件无与伦比的珍物。
E: His memories are indeed positively worthless as a filmmaker, but when it comes to him as a person... those memories are treasures beyond compare.

C: 等等！你身边这位…不是，「石心十人」的砂金先生吗？！为什么公司通缉的重犯却和公司高管走在一块儿？
E: Wait! Isn't that... Isn't that Mr. Aventurine of the Ten Stonehearts!? Why is a criminal wanted by the IPC walking around with an IPC executive?

C: 主动真名解放，难道这也是你的戏剧效果的一环？
E: Revealing your True Name on purpose. Let me guess, just part of your dramatic flair, huh?

C: 竟然还留给我们喘息的时间，看来，敌人对自己的大本营很自信嘛。
E: So they're giving us time to breathe, huh? Guess they're pretty confident about their trump card.

C: 一股温和的同谐之力飘荡在狭窄的空间内，在它的中心，两位歌者正在为迷失者指引方向。
E: A gentle force of Harmony floats through the tight space. At its heart, two singers light the way for the lost.

C: 所以，我会尽心尽力地调整各位登场的时机。在下一场电影里，我将继续享用你们刺耳的尖叫。
E: So, I'll be more thoughtful with your stage entrances next time. I look forward to hearing your piercing screams all over again in our next film.

C: 不要被策反啊！
E: Don't let him get in your head!

C: 也是，你们这群愚蠢的外乡人当然不了解，在匹诺康尼这片土地上，这个失去了名字的从者到底有多么强大。
E: Figures. You foolish outworlders don't realize just how powerful this nameless Servant can be in Penacony.

C: 你难道想带着一群累赘和敌人交战？先说好，掌管「行动」的那部分知更鸟没在我身上，我只负责想，不负责做。
E: Wait, you're really planning to drag all these deadweights with you while you fight? Heads up: I don't have the "Action" part of Robin with me. I only think. I don't do.

C: 不会又只能说*哼*吧？
E: Don't tell me all I can say is *hmph* again?

C: 挂树上就不疼了。
E: Just hang it up, and the pain will be gone.

C: 男人的内心无法抑制地泛起喜悦的情绪，飘飘欲仙。而这一切，都不过是一次普通的精神攻击。
E: Uncontainable joy surges through the man's heart, sending him into euphoria. And yet, this is nothing more than a common mental attack.

C: 我本想看看，在这个异常的宇宙里，这怪物眼中的地狱能到什么程度。但现在看来，你们的世界似乎还有希望和出路。
E: I wanted to see how deep this monster's hell could go in this strange universe of yours. But it seems your world still has hope and a future after all.

C: 英雄？逝者？在这颗星球上，它们都不过是能用苜蓿币度量的消费品。
E: Heroes? The dead? On this planet, they're just commodities with a price tag in Alfalfa credits.

C: 如果站在他们身边是你的愿望，随你便好。只是有时候，人终究要换个位置，才能看清赌局的全貌。
E: If staying with them is your wish, then so be it. But sometimes... a change in perspective will make you see the gamble in its entirety.

C: 大明星，你这话简直和当年钟表匠说的一模一样。但我认了，我就是没有才能，拍不出真正的艺术。
E: The Watchmaker said almost the same thing to me back then. But like I said, I concede. I have no talent and can't create true art.

C: 在你使用过「同谐」的力量后，恐怕我很难轻信这番说辞。
E: I'm afraid I won't be taking your words at face value. Not after how you wielded the power of Harmony.
...Huh?

C: 不必道谢，这只是一场交易。
E: There's no need for that. This was merely a transaction.

C: 后来，列车受她委托，护送停云小姐回乡。途中在匹诺康尼停泊，也有部分静养的意图。
E: After that, she asked the Express to escort Miss Tingyun back home. We made a stop at Penacony along the way, partly to allow her some time to convalesce.

C: 不久之后——
E: Shortly after—

C: 钟表眼罩。
E: Clockie eye mask.

C: 仓鼠球骑士发卡。
E: Hamster Ball Knight hair clip.

C: 停云小姐，你这是……
E: Miss Tingyun, what's this about?

C: 小女子与各位同行多日，倍受关照，感激不尽。
E: You've looked out for me during our travels together these past few days. I'm truly grateful and can't thank you enough.

C: 做生意的总要消息灵通些，小女子在返航前，必然会知晓罗浮近况。
E: As a merchant, staying well-informed is crucial. It's only natural for me to stay updated on the events of the Luofu before I return.

C: 你指什么？
E: What things?

C: 足够了，我们回去吧。
E: We have enough. Let's go back.

C: 什么情况，你确定没说反？
E: What? Are you sure you didn't mean the opposite?

C: 你拥有的诸多品性，确实潜藏在我心中。在许多场合，我也想说上几句俏皮话，直截了当地表达心中所想，或是毫无顾虑地展露对一个人的厌恶……
E: I must admit, many of your qualities strike a chord with me. There are times when I want to joke around, freely express my thoughts, or openly share my dislike of a person...

C: 我无法否认。
E: No objections from me.

C: 瓦尔特，我相信你的判断。只要人愿意共赴前程，列车的车门理应为他敞开。
E: Welt, I trust your judgment. If someone is willing to join us on our journey, the Express will be open to them.

C: 还是听听大家的意见。
E: Maybe we should hear everyone else's opinion.

C: 黑天鹅小姐，能麻烦你探查一下房间里的「记忆」吗？
E: Miss Black Swan, could you take a look at the memories in this room?

C: 生命，很神奇吧？不过还是比不上一面会说话的镜子，哈。
E: Ah, the mysteries of life. Hah! But even so, they can't compare to a talking mirror~

C: 谜底可以留到晚点再揭晓…先解决有故障的人偶吧？
E: But we can leave that for later... Let's take care of the malfunctioning puppets first.

C: 所以，现在三个扇区的麻烦都解决了？这是不是就表示……
E: I take it we've taken care of the problems in all three zones? Does that mean...?

C: 虽然已经彻底报废了，不过脑袋倒还完整？
E: They're completely battered, save for... their heads?

C: 这下又成通缉犯了…
E: Are we back to being fugitives again...?

C: 而且，那女孩一直以「我们」自称，也很奇怪。我不觉得只是某种口癖。
E: The way the girl uses "we" and "us" to refer to herself is unusual, too. I doubt it's just a habit of speech.

C: 是「命运三泰坦」的馈赠。在它们的赐福下，祭司能唤醒旧日的重影，改变现实。
E: It's a gift from the Three Titans of Fate. With their blessings, priests can awaken shadows of the past to alter reality.

C: 那边，粉色的。
E: Over there. That pink thing.

C: 还以为圣城是座坚固的庇护所，没想到这么不太平。我们就留在战场搭把手吧。
E: I expected the holy city to be a strong sanctuary, but things are less peaceful than I thought. Let's stay here and lend our support on the battlefield.

C: 好在无人伤亡。希望万敌只是嘴上说说，他是无可挑剔的战士，但如果铁了心要我行我素…恐怕没人能阻止他，就算是我。
E: Thankfully, no one was hurt. I hope that Mydei doesn't act on his words. After all, he's an exemplary fighter, if he's dead set on doing things his way... I fear not a soul could prevent it, not even myself.

C: 各位！后方已经安全了，请快去避难！
E: Everyone! The rear is safe, go, take shelter!

C: 塔拉萨波利斯…？
E: Thalassopolis...?

C: 初次见面时有所冒犯，再次向两位致歉。
E: Once again, let me offer my sincere apologies for any offense I caused during our first meeting.

C: 就是那个——<color=#dbc291ff>「粉霞天女」</color>——热烈程度还在一路飙升呢！我看你不在里边，先进来吧，不然人要坐满了。
E: The one about the <color=#dbc291ff>Rosy Celestial Maiden</color>. Its getting more popular by the minute! I don't see you in there yet. Hurry up! It's filling up quickly.

C: 枘凿六合。
E: A Hexanexus.

C: 但无论如何，此事算是告一段落了。做好心理准备，去赴约吧。
E: Regardless, this matter has come to an end. Let's prepare ourselves and head to our appointment.

C: 说什么怪话哪…走吧，但愿阿雅别等得不耐烦了。
E: What a strange thing to say... Anyway, let's go. I hope Agy isn't annoyed from waiting too long.

C: 真有那么神奇吗？
E: Is it really that amazing?

C: 所谓天女，只是谎言！
E: The maiden talk is just a lie!

C: 恕我们无法在如此高压下继续合作。
E: Forgive us, but I'm afraid our cooperation cannot continue under these conditions.

C: 你不发表些意见吗？
E: You don't have any comments?

C: …啊，是我有些兴奋了，抱歉，你们在翁法罗斯的第一天已经够漫长了。
E: Ah, my apologies. I got a bit carried away. It's been a long first day for you here on Amphoreus.

C: 你们果然来了。
E: Great to see you here!

C: {NICKNAME}，带上这个吧。
E: Hold on, {NICKNAME}, take this with you.

C: 明白啦。好好躲起来，不让坏人找到！
E: Got it. Hide so the baddies can't find me!

C: 怎么看都像个小孩子。
E: She still looks and acts just like a child.

C: 什么意思？行，你来试试吧。
E: What does that mean? Alright, give it a go.

C: 人民为生存迁徙，传统被时光消磨，但荣光？哪怕隐入浓雾，城墙崩析，悬锋城从未背弃战士的荣耀。为何口出此言？
E: To survive, our people have migrated, and our traditions have faded with time. But glory? Even though it has vanished into the mist and its walls have crumbled, Castrum Kremnos has never forsaken the glory of its warriors. Why say otherwise?

C: 大战之末，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}莫名陷入疯狂，神力不断流失。如今…那位泰坦残存的力量不及过去的十分之一。
E: By the end of the war, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} had succumbed to madness, and their divine power dwindled. Now, the Titan's remaining strength is less than a tenth of what it once was.

C: 毫无荣誉之心…我族的神，你偏偏就堕落到这种地步？
E: All their honor is gone... How did the god of our tribe fall so low?

C: 假如那位泰坦不愿与我们合作…武力是最后的解决方式。
E: If that Titan refuses to be on our side... we'll have to resort to a fight.

C: 并非每位泰坦都必须以暴力手段击败。
E: Brute force isn't the only option. Some Titans can also be vanquished... in other ways.

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: …它真懂得该如何惹人生气。
E: ...They really know how to get under someone's skin.

C: 我想到了吗？
E: Have I got it?

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 「跟我来吧…跟着我。和我一起…远瞻你的过去……」
E: "Come with me... Follow me and join me... as we look far into your past..."

C: 不对，这不是我的记忆…一定是哪里出了差错。
E: No, these aren't my memories... There must have been some mistake.

C: 流萤别过头去，不再理会你的呼唤。
E: Firefly turns away, ignoring your call.

C: 「浮黎」…那是什么？
E: Fuli... What's that?

C: 这是我们来时的那条路。
E: This is the path we took when we first arrived.

C: 还在硬撑吗，泰坦？
E: Titan, are you still trying to hold out?

C: 追踪，找到。往日…重现。
E: Tracking, found. Past... Recreate.

C: 先进入城中，再找机会行动吧。必要时…我会解决{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的眷属。
E: Let's make our way into the city first, we can then wait for the right opportunity to strike. When it comes down to it... I will take care of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s kin.

C: 银河球棒侠！
E: I am the Galactic Baseballer!

C: 看，那面墙壁上悬挂着两个火盆。也许…这是某种提示？
E: Look, there are two braziers on that wall. Could they be... some sort of hint?

C: 无谓的磨损，他们本该倒在战场上。若执意阻拦…就带他们去见{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}吧。
E: Meaningless forestalling. They are meant to taste defeat on the battlefield. Deter us further... and I shall send them to {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}.

C: 尚未安眠的亡魂……
E: O, restless soul...

C: 我知道该去哪里寻找了。
E: I believe I know where it is.

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，你还好吗？
E: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, are you feeling alright?

C: 软弱让它沦为了人的奴仆。
E: Weak. Reduced to a servant of humans.

C: 你们和{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}…交流过了？
E: You... spoke with {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}?

C: 原来你说话能连成整句啊！
E: Wow, so you can speak in full sentences!

C: 今天、明天，有什么区别呢？反正在{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的庇佑下，奥赫玛永远都是黎明。
E: Today, tomorrow, what difference does it make? It's always morning in Okhema under {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s protection.

C: …多谢了。
E: ...Thank you.

C: 「意图接过神明权柄的凡人……」
E: "Mortal who wishes to inherit my divine authority..."

C: 由一位渎神的「大表演家」讲授历史，自然令人恐惧了。
E: The history of mythology, taught by the blasphemous "Great Performer" himself... I can imagine their fear.

C: 你要劝我放弃吗？
E: Are you trying to talk me out of it?

C: 是呀，不应该让普通民众承担风险，对不对？
E: Exactly! We can't have the civilians bear the risks, can we?

C: 既然你下定了决心，就先回浴宫休憩吧。等到仪式准备妥当，吾师会召唤二位。
E: Since you've made your decision, go back to the bath chamber and get some rest. Trinnon will call for you when the ceremony is ready.

C: {NICKNAME}阁下…抱歉，我不知道该说些什么才能缓解紧张的气氛。
E: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}... I'm sorry but I'm not sure what I should say to help calm your nerves.

C: 与*我们*一起——
E: Recite along with us.

C: 醒一醒…{NICKNAME}。
E: Wake up... {NICKNAME}.

C: 我是怎么死而复生的？
E: How exactly did I come back to life?

C: 我也一度以为星核就是你的维生系统，但现在看来…这一假说不攻自破了。
E: For a while, I also thought that the Stellaron was your life support system, but it seems like... this hypothesis has been disproven.

C: 我听到了，在潮汐深处，{RUBY_B#冥界}乌有之界{RUBY_E#}的门关之后……
E: I hear it, deep within the tides, beyond the closed gates of {RUBY_B#nether realm}the void world{RUBY_E#}...

C: 或许只是众神太过傲慢，认为他们没有沟通的资格。
E: Perhaps the gods, in their arrogance, deemed it beneath them to reveal their perspectives to mortals.

C: 啊呀，十五个日夜…那正是汝的死期呢，天下竟有这样巧的事么？
E: Oh my, fifteen days and nights... that aligns perfectly with the date of your demise. Could such a coincidence truly exist?

C: 执刑者遐蝶，相信你对这个名字并不陌生。早在我返回奥赫玛时，阿格莱雅便派她来监视我了。如果我没能及时赴约，{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}必将先一步找上我。
E: I believe you're aware of Castorice the executioner. Long before I returned to Okhema, Aglaea had already dispatched her to monitor me. If I weren't able to reach this place in time, I would have been forced to meet {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} first.

C: 即便如此，汝也甘愿为此子放行么？
E: Are you still willing to let him pass knowing this?

C: （无名客的字典里，没有「睡觉」二字……）
E: (The word "sleep" does not exist in the Nameless' dictionary...)

C: 来，动手吧。我已教给你我此生所能领悟的一切……
E: Come now. It's time. I have already taught you all that I know...
...Huh?

C: …和你没关系。
E: ...Mind your own business.

C: 迷迷，你交钱了吗？
E: Mem, did you pay your fare?

C: 好晕…她真的没有违章超速吗…
E: Ugh... I swear she was speeding...

C: 你来了…阁下。
E: You're... here.

C: 一码归一码，这次只是为了给这趟旅程增加些仪式感。
E: Hey, that was a different purchase. Look, I'm just trying to make this journey feel more special.

C: 「{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}灰黯之手{RUBY_E#}」的试炼，便是「夺去至亲的生命」。我在那时已然死去，倒在了新世界的门关前…而我那素未谋面的姊妹，成为了此世的泰坦{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}。
E: The trial of the "{RUBY_B#Death Titan}Hand of Shadow{RUBY_E#}" demanded "taking the life of your family." I died during that trial, falling before the gate to the new world... And my sister, whom I never met, became the Titan {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} of this cycle.

C: 但若将这语境稍加修改…如果…<color=#dbc291ff>「爱」</color>并非墨涅塔赐予凡人的天性…反而是死亡降给我们的赐福呢？
E: But what if I reframe it like this — what if <color=#dbc291ff>"love"</color> is not a trait bestowed upon mortals by Mnestia, but a blessing from death?

C: 那末，为何依旧踯躅不前？是汝那忌惮人群的毛病又犯了？
E: Then why do you drag your feet? Is your fear of crowds holding you back again?

C: 如此承诺，将一直延续至我们生命的终点，并被传递给未来的逐火之人——
E: And this vow will stay true until the end of our days, where it will be passed on to future Flame-Chasers...

C: 都答不上来？行吧。白厄，既然是你慷慨陈词，那我倒要问问：你心里又有几成把握？
E: So, no one? I see. In that case, Phainon, answer me this: Your speech was filled with such passion just now. How confident, then, are you in making this promise?

C: 死刑！死刑！
E: Let him die! Let him die!

C: 来欢迎我们浴火重生的大英雄，{NICKNAME}吧。
E: Come welcome {NICKNAME}, our great hero reborn from the ashes.

C: 不，只是神性的回响…她是为了试炼而来？
E: No, it's only a Divine Echo. I think she's here for the trial.

C: 非黑即白，看来这就是人子们争来争去的原因。
E: What radical thinking... I guess this is why the children of humanity always squabble with each other.

C: 风堇…？怎会有那么多敌人？…虽然没有小看她的意思，但还是去搭把手吧。
E: That's... Hyacine? Why is she surrounded by so many monsters? ...As much faith as I have in her, it's probably a good idea to help her out there.

C: 这我就不知道了。有人说悬锋城连字典都没有，也许有幸逃过一劫吧。
E: You've got me there. Some said you couldn't even find a dictionary in Castrum Kremnos, so I guess they were spared.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>那诸位已陨的英雄，正是泰坦们成神前的模样。众神并非凭空诞生的造物巨匠，而是与人类无异，并由之演化而来的存在。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Those fallen heroes are the mortal incarnations of the Titans before their ascensions to godhood. The gods aren't master creators born out of thin air, and they are no different from humans — because they all evolved from one.</color>

C: 绝无可能。
E: That is not possible.

C: 那不是黄金裔吗？他们也支持元老院？
E: Aren't they Chrysos Heirs? They're supporting the Council of Elders instead?

C: 啊呀…小玻吕茜亚，汝还是一如既往地爱吊人胃口哪。
E: Oh my... It seems that you still like to whet people's appetites even after all this time, Polyxia.

C: 寓言呀…那你觉得，这故事想教给孩子什么道理？
E: A fable, you say...? If so, what moral is it trying to impart to the kids?

C: 不可思议…此子魂息中的「荣耀」，竟如此轻盈。
E: Incredible... the Honor in this child's soul is so light.

C: 是我…是我浪费了你的人生……
E: I was the one who wasted your life after all...

C: 不，恰恰相反。如果我的猜想真能应验……
E: No, it's just the opposite. If my hypothesis is correct...

C: 受到残害的旧信徒不惜与清洗者合作，但那些刺客从未想过正面招惹强大的塞涅俄丝，只将匕首对准了混藏于天空之子中的无辜黄金裔……
E: The oppressed old believers didn't hesitate to team up with the Cleaners, but those assassins had never thought of directly provoking the mighty Seliose. Instead, they trained their daggers on the innocent Chrysos Heirs hidden in the Skyfolk's midst...

C: 黑暗的末世…必须被照亮……
E: We must bring light to these dark times!

C: 让我猜猜——你其实一直在打最后这两颗火种的主意吧？
E: Let me guess — you've been eyeing these last two Coreflames all along, huh?

C: *初次…哦不对，多次见面，我是奥赫玛的大英雄，翁法罗斯的救世主！*
E: First time — wait, no, not the first time meeting you. I'm the great hero of Okhema, the Deliverer of Amphoreus!

C: 你出卖了世界……
E: You betrayed the world...

C: 即便在那至暗的时刻，塞涅俄丝大人，你的心底也还保留着对凡人的怜悯吧？
E: Even in that darkest moment, Lady Seliose, you still held compassion for mortals, didn't you?

C: 但所幸…如今的世界也不再需要一位能够呼雷唤雨的半神。我需要做的，就是与天空融为一体，然后……
E: Thankfully... the world no longer needs a demigod who can summon thunder and storms. What I must do is merge with the Sky, and...

C: 翁法罗斯悲剧的源头……
E: The source of Amphoreus' tragedy...

C: 啊…涡心再次迎来了一位英雄。我已记不清这是第几次了。
E: Ah... Another hero has arrived at the Vortex. I can no longer remember how many times this has happened.

C: 终于，该我退场了吗…
E: Is it finally time... for me to bow out?

C: 明明拥有如此强大的力量，你究竟为何要……
E: You have such overwhelming power, so... why...

C: 但战斗不只靠力量和技巧，还得有趁手的兵刃才行。和那家伙的武器相比，我手里的…哎，就像在挥舞铁块，自训练开始至今，已不知练废多少柄长剑了。
E: But combat isn't just about strength and skill. You also need the right weapon. Compared to that guy's weapon, mine feels like I'm swinging a lump of iron. I can't tell you how many swords I've gone through since the training began.

C: 哎呀呀，这气味…感觉这地底下藏着什么不得了的东西哪？
E: Ooh, this scent... feels like something incredible is buried here.
...Heh?

C: 哎呀，这不是「黄金替罪羊」吗？有点意思！看来把宝物埋在这里的家伙，是想跟我们玩个游戏？
E: Oh, isn't this a Golden Scapegoat? Interesting! Looks like whoever buried this treasure wanted to play a little game with us.

C: …嘘，安静！别说多余的话。
E: ...Shh, quiet! Don't say anything unnecessary.

C: 她认为你很软弱。她认为，哪怕在对战心中坚信的「恶」时，你在挥剑时仍会有犹疑。
E: She thought you were weak. She believed that even when you are facing the "evil" that you claim to oppose, you'd hesitate to strike.

C: 他们真觉得自己有胜算？
E: Do they think they have a chance?

C: 啊，你们回来了。状况如何，没受伤吧？
E: Ah, you're back. How's everything? No injuries, I hope?

C: 放心吧。我一直记得你的教诲——
E: Rest assured. I always keep your teachings in mind.
Hmm...

C: 当时的情境…还历历在目呢。
E: I can still see that day in my mind...

C: 还记得么？一段时间以前，你推荐我学习法吉娜祭司们的「灵水秘术」……
E: Remember how you suggested I learn the "secret arts of water" from Phagousa's priests?

C: 飞儿——
E: Ciphy —

C: 祖母，您还记得我那时的选择吗？
E: Grandmother, do you remember the one I chose?

C: 请别这么说，白厄阁下。能成为你托付的对象，我们倍感荣幸。
E: Please, don't say that, Lord Phainon. It's an honor to for us to be entrusted with this task.

C: 现在是光历<unbreak>4932</unbreak>年，英雄塞涅俄丝开启逐火之旅后的第<unbreak>1062</unbreak>个年头。
E: Today is the year <unbreak>4932</unbreak> of the Light Calendar, <unbreak>1062</unbreak> years since the hero Seliose initiated the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 但它内部并不团结。尤其是在神谕降世后…黄金裔掀起的频繁内战令他们实力大减，最终只能藏匿于云中，远离地上的战火。
E: But they were divided within. The frequent wars started by the Chrysos Heirs drained their power, especially after the prophecy descended. In the end, they had to hide among the clouds, far from the conflicts raging below.

C: 如果要用灰宝和丹宝熟悉的词语来形容——把它当作一块巨大的「屏幕」就行啦。
E: To put it in words that Grayie and Dannie would understand... just think of it as a massive screen.

C: 你…你到底……
E: You... What are you...

C: 骄傲的晖之民将自己视作神选，长期压迫其他部族…而受到迫害的雨之民开始埋怨神明，并暗中谋划反击。
E: The proud Sunfolk saw themselves as divinely chosen, exacting long-standing oppression on other tribes... And the Rainfolk suffering beneath them began resenting the divine, and plotted their retaliation.

C: 真是令人发怵…不知道艾格勒是否也在注视着我们。
E: How chilling... I wonder if Aquila is also watching us.

C: 滚烫的黄金池，据说是驱动晨昏之眼的神性能源。行走的时候，可要一直小心脚下呀。
E: A boiling pool of gold, said to be the energy source that powers the Eye of Twilight's divinity. You should watch your step as you walk.

C: 机制简化是大势所趋。
E: Mechanical simplification is the future.

C: 是幻觉？还是记忆消散了？
E: An illusion? Or the memory dissipated?

C: 通路…被风场装置吸走了？
E: The road got... sucked away by the wind fan?

C: 那位英雄的意识还在么？
E: Does that hero's consciousness still remain?

C: 走吧。不出意外，我们很快就能一睹它的真容了。
E: Let's go. If nothing goes wrong, we'll be able to see their true form very quickly.

C: 又是那个能增幅祷言的装置——{NICKNAME}，能交给你吗？
E: It's another one of those devices that can enhance prayers. Can I leave that to you, {NICKNAME}?

C: 直觉告诉我，或许它们和浑象仪的能源有关联。
E: My intuition tells me that they have something to do with the energy source of the celestial globe.

C: 这…听上去是每位成功者必备的特征。
E: Those... sound like essential traits for every successful individual.

C: 老实说，听说你打算去追逐神谕，成为英雄时…*我们*还有些后悔，后悔当时为什么要把预言讲给你听……
E: Honestly, when we learned you planned to pursue the prophecy and become a hero... we couldn't help but feel regret. We regretted telling you about the prophecy in the first place...

C: 索拉比斯阁下，请挣脱黑潮的掌控……
E: Lord Solabis, please break free from the control of the black tide...

C: 不…用不着麻烦了。
E: No... There's no need for such trouble.

C: 也算是个枭雄了。
E: She was a formidable foe to the end.

C: 不…不该是现在。
E: No... Now is not the time.

C: 黄昏…如约降临……
E: Dusk... has descended as ordained...

C: 白厄，带着{NICKNAME}赶去创世涡心吧。我留在这里拖住它。
E: Phainon, take {NICKNAME} to the Vortex of Genesis. I will stay here and hold them off.

C: 呵…你们一直是最了解我的人。
E: Heh... You've always been the ones who knew me best.

C: 她骗过了你们所有人，<color=#dbc291ff>让你们相信刻法勒背上那个大球会永远照亮奥赫玛……</color>
E: She tricked all of you <color=#dbc291ff>into believing that that giant ball on Kephale's back would cast light over Okhema forever...</color>

C: 你…怎么还是没反应呀？可恶！一点都不有趣，本大爷太失望了！
E: You... still no reaction from you? Dang it! You're no fun at all. I'm sorely disappointed!

C: 但——抛开车厢坠毁的意外——两位却成功降落在此地，这背后一定有尚未被参透的原理。
E: However — the accidental crash landing of the Express Car notwithstanding — both of you were able to successfully land here. There must be some principle behind this we have yet to fully grasp.

C: 不好意思啦！就当是陪我出门散了个步，锻炼下身体吧？毕竟我不像你，每天运动量没那么充足。
E: Sorry! But look on the bright side, it was a nice walk! Unlike you, I don't have such a physically active routine.

C: 因为自幼就能听见朦胧的神谕，村子里的人都说我是未来的{RUBY_B#欧洛尼斯}岁月{RUBY_E#}祭司。
E: They always said I'd become the next Priest of {RUBY_B#Oronyx}Time{RUBY_E#}, just because I heard prophecies as a child.

C: 那…你先请？
E: After you, then?

C: 你是不是记错了？徕啦迷的毛发一直都是薰衣草色。
E: Dye? Relimem's always been this lovely shade of lavender.

C: 现在，来抽牌吧？
E: Now, shall we begin?

C: 让人感觉肃穆非凡，却又心生亲近……
E: It feels overwhelmingly solemn, yet strangely comforting...

C: 「拥抱」、「疗愈」和…嗯，该怎么描述，「无拘无束的生活」？
E: "Warm embrace," "equal healing," and... perhaps... "living free"?

C: 如果是这样的话，那…哀丽秘榭的大家该由谁来保护呢？
E: If that's true, then... who will protect everyone in Aedes Elysiae?

C: 原来如此…除了牌面上的解读，它还能拥有这层释义呀。
E: The card's truth extends beyond its mere literal meaning, there's another hidden layer within.

C: 「『然而逐火是不断失却的旅途，在那一切当中，生命也当如尘埃般渺小。』」
E: "Yet losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey, where life, too, seems as small as a speck of dust."

C: 您的意思是，这是「金织」女士对我的考验吗？
E: Are you saying that Lady Goldweaver is testing me?

C: 手中的长剑…
E: The blade you carry...

C: 不必担心阿格莱雅。即便身陨，她也是最为高贵的半神，「浪漫」的结网坚不可摧，圣城公民也响应她的遗愿，纷纷投身到保卫战中。
E: We needn't fear for Aglaea. Even in death, she counts as the greatest among demigods. Her threads of "Romance" weave an impenetrable shield, and the people answer her call, rallying to the city's defense.

C: 嗯，时间一定在好好保管它们。
E: Mm-hmm, time must be keeping them safe for us.

C: 咦？你们是……
E: Wait a minute... Are you...

C: 是从黑潮中传来的啊……
E: They were coming from the black tide all along.

C: 逐火之旅，乃至整个翁法罗斯，都不过是「星神」梦中的泡影？
E: The Flame-Chase Journey, and even all of Amphoreus, are nothing but illusions in an Aeon's dreams?

C: 或许，已经太晚了。
E: Perhaps... it's already too late.

C: 「侵晨」会刺入你的第十节胸椎，那是唯一能杀死你的弱点。
E: Dawnmaker will stab you through your tenth thoracic vertebra. That's your weak spot and the only way to kill you.

C: 再骄盛的太阳，也有遍照不到的地方。
E: No matter how bright the sun is, there are still places it cannot reach.

C: 况且，你所肩负的那轮骄阳，既冷冽、又刺目……
E: Moreover, the sun you bear is both cold and blinding...

C: 火种升起，天空坠落。第两千三百五十七万次轮回宣告终结。
E: The Coreflame rose. The sky fell. The <unbreak>23,570,000</unbreak>th cycle came to an end.

C: 那么，我也该离开了。
E: Then I should be going, too.

C: 遗憾？
E: Regrets?

C: （冷…好冷啊……）
E: (Cold... it's freezing...)

C: 坚定前进吧，三月。我们这一路都是这么过来的，对么？
E: Trust in yourself, March. It's gotten us this far, hasn't it?

C: 这次是…丹恒，{NICKNAME}？
E: Now it's... Dan Heng and {NICKNAME}?

C: 时间紧迫，我会用你熟知的概念说明：名为翁法罗斯的世界，实为绝灭大君「铁墓」自我演算、成长的实验场。
E: Time is running out, so I'll explain in terms you understand: this world, Amphoreus, is in fact a testing ground where the Lord Ravager, Irontomb, evolves through self-extrapolation.

C: 翁法罗斯的人们会怎么样？
E: What will happen to the people of Amphoreus?

C: 至于它的意义——待到你我重逢之时，再由我为您细细揭示吧。
E: As for its purpose, allow me to reveal it to you in detail the next time we meet.

C: …{NICKNAME}，你在听吗？
E: ...{NICKNAME}? Are you listening?

C: 你…认识我们？
E: You... You know us?

C: 现在出发。
E: Let's go now.

C: 「金织爵」阿格莱雅…呵，她不喜欢被人背后议论，你还是亲自去认识她吧。
E: "Dux Goldweaver" Aglaea... Well, she dislikes it when people talk about her behind her back. You should get to know her in person.

C: 刻法勒自不必多说。两日前的{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}，斥候本应准时抵达奥赫玛，为诸位带来「律法」已被征服的捷报……
E: Kephale, of course, needs no further explanation. As for the subjugation of the "Law," at the {RUBY_B#dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#} two days past, a scout should've brought the news to all of you...

C: 目前最有可能的人选，这么几个：{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#4}「寂静领主」{RUBY_E#}、{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#23}阿茶{RUBY_E#}…噢，{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#27与#66}两位鲁珀特{RUBY_E#}也算，但如果是他俩就太没劲了。
E: Currently, the most likely candidates are these few: the "{RUBY_B#Genius Society #4}Lord of Silence{RUBY_E#}," {RUBY_B#Genius Society #23}Acha{RUBY_E#}... Oh, the {RUBY_B#Genius Society #27 and #66}two Ruberts{RUBY_E#} are also possible, but it would be too boring if it were one of them.

C: 凯撒麾下的其他英雄也在场……
E: The other heroes under the Imperator's command are here too...

C: 这一点也和我们熟悉的奥赫玛截然相反……
E: This is the complete opposite from what we know of Okhema...

C: 没有律法的黑暗之世……
E: A world plunged into lawless darkness...

C: 我也想喝。
E: I want some too.

C: 人、人家还是自己来吧……
E: I—I can drink it myself...

C: …不不不好意思，刚才没认出是你。
E: ...S—S—Sorry! I didn't realize it was you.

C: 讲述「开拓」的使命。
E: Talk about the Trailblaze's duty.

C: …你失败了。「神话之外」的壁障扼杀了那遥远的乐声，将它们如无用的杂音一般彻底过滤，只留下冰冷的沉寂。
E: ...you failed. The barrier of the "Exomyth" strangled those distant melodies, filtering them out completely like useless noise, leaving only cold silence.

C: 提醒一下：在你犹豫的时候，翁法罗斯内部的时间可是在疾速流逝呢。
E: Just as a reminder: While you hesitate, time is quickly ticking away in Amphoreus.

C: 所以，我只能寄希望于奥赫玛虔诚的公民，希望他们能在各位的哀嚎声中，为我献上答案。
E: Which is why I now place my hope in the faithful citizens of Okhema. Perhaps they'll give me what I seek in the echo of your screams.

C: 照看好他。然后，代我将这不熄的烈火传递下去。
E: Watch over him. Carry on this everlasting flame for me.

C: 于是，海床间只剩下一尾清醒的海妖。海瑟音，她在海中孤独地洄游，送葬自己的同胞，寻找满溢之杯的碎片……
E: And so, only one sea siren remained among the sea floor... Hysilens, swimming alone through the seas, burying her kin, and searching for the fragments of the Chalice of Plenty...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>你所行走的命途，你所信仰的星神——你所亲手「开拓」的一切——是否也只是他者投下的阴影？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The Paths you tread, the Aeons you worship... everything you've "Trailblazed" with your own hands... could it all be someone else's projected shadow?</color>

C: 听说了吗，凯撒即将开启新的征程……
E: Have you heard that the Imperator's about to begin a new campaign...

C: （这道门后，就是通向创世涡心的路……）
E: (Beyond this door lies the path to the Vortex of Genesis...)

C: 或者，{M#他}{F#她}还会回归么？
E: Or... will {F#s}he ever return?

C: 逝者的祭奠以此作结。最后，请容我再次举杯，敬我那彷徨的典狱官，为忠诚所困的囚人——
E: Let this be the end of mourning the fallen. At last, allow me one final toast to the lost prison warden, a prisoner bound by loyalty.

C: 救、救世主？{M#他}{F#她}竟然回来了……
E: Th—The Deliverer? {M#He's}{F#She's} back...

C: 「门径之半神」缇里西庇俄丝，生于光历<unbreak>3720</unbreak>年，最后一位逝于光历<unbreak>4295</unbreak>年。
E: Tribios, the Demigod of Passage. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3720</unbreak>. The last piece of her deceased in Light Calendar <unbreak>4295</unbreak>.

C: 接下来，让我们再去其他世界看看吧？
E: Let's go check out some other worlds next, shall we?

C: 一座雪国？有趣。
E: A snow-covered land? Interesting.

C: 这窗外的奇观，它是……
E: This... absolute wonder...

C: 答案显而易见。无须仰仗天外伟力，我们也可以征服群星——只需付出一些合理的牺牲。
E: You can't guess? We can conquer the stars without relying on any power from beyond the sky. We just need to make some reasonable sacrifices.

C: 啊…我看到了…银河…我无法踏足的疆场啊……
E: Ah... I see... the cosmos... the battlefield that I cannot reach...

C: 没有一丝…污浊的气息。
E: Not a single trace of corruption...

C: 呵呵…「束手无策」。是啊，回首过去，它始终是「赞达尔」人生的常态。
E: Hehe, "trapped." Yes, looking back, when "Zandar" was a human, he often felt trapped.

C: 「他在黑塔女士身边，尝试用『调律』为天才们的思想骇入提供支援。」
E: "He stayed with Madam Herta. They wanted to try using his 'tuning' to help support the geniuses' thought hacking."

C: 「{NICKNAME}和丹恒乘客，一定要平安返回帕……」
E: "Passengers {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng have to return safely..."

C: 三月，是我。
E: March, it's me.

C: 别告诉我，这也在你计划之内。
E: Don't tell me that's a part of your plan, too.
Hmm...?

C: 这…有可能做到吗？
E: Is that... even possible?

C: 所以昔涟的三千万次牺牲…
E: So Cyrene's thirty million sacrifices...

C: 看来，又要到分别的时候了呀。
E: Looks like it's time to say goodbye again.

C: 刻律德菈，她如何改写「律法」，世人始终不得而知…但我相信，它一定是翁法罗斯对命运的决胜一着。
E: The world never learned how Cerydra rewrote the Law... But I believe it was Amphoreus's decisive move against destiny.

C: 好沉重的留言。
E: Such a heavy message...

C: 捕捉那道「粉色」。
E: Capture that streak of "pink."

C: 「对你来说，应该算是『好久不见』了吧。」
E: "For you... I suppose it's been a long time, hasn't it?"

C: 乐观点想，至少三月七不会再陷入险境了。
E: On the bright side... at least March 7th won't have to face any danger again.

C: 不用担心。趁着你制造出的骚动，她成功掩人耳目，顺着忆域逆流而上。
E: You don't need to worry. She used your disturbance to mask her movements. Current status: advancing upstream within the Memory Zone.

C: 但拥抱「不朽」，恐怕只会落得更不幸的下场。
E: But embracing the Permanence may result in even more misfortune.

C: 做出这样的决定，总有人会问你「值得吗？」…而你也会反复诘问自己。
E: When you make a decision like this, people will always ask, "Was it worth it?"... And you will also forever question yourself.

C: 「荒笛」，这名字曾属于吉奥刻勒斯的龙骑兵团。这支部队以善战的骑手和他们骁勇的大地兽闻名。
E: Terravox was once a member of Geocles' Dromas Legion. This force was famous for its skilled riders and their brave dromases.

C: 化作「忆灵」，吉奥刻勒斯得以重生。他口中喃喃着我们并肩作战的时光，一如这具身躯承载的所有{RUBY_B#记忆}生灵{RUBY_E#}。
E: Geocles was able to be reborn as a "memosprite." He mumbled about the times we fought side by side, just like how all the {RUBY_B#memories}lives{RUBY_E#} this body carries speak to me.

C: 也是她如今的所在。
E: And it is also where she is now.

C: 无穷无尽…忆潮卷土重来了么？
E: It's endless... Has the memoria tide returned?

C: 空无一物，一片死寂……
E: There's not a single sign of movement here...

C: 呵，野兽终究是野兽。
E: Hah, a beast will always be a beast.

C: 代价有三……
E: Three must pay a price...

C: 于那天地境界之海重逢的一刻，请让我在火光中，为你奏唱一曲吧。
E: When we reunite in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, let me play a song for you beneath the glow of fire.

C: 这是…描绘哪位泰坦的画像。
E: Which Titan is this?

C: 为了取得你的信任，咱们就先自报家门——流光忆庭，你应该再熟悉不过了吧？
E: We'll introduce ourselves to gain your trust. We are the Garden of Recollection. You should be very familiar with that name by now.

C: 「死的。死的。死的。死的。」
E: "Dead. Dead. Dead. Dead."

C: 还有，像是在午夜惊醒的，{RUBY_B#「忘却」}神秘又深不见底{RUBY_E#}的气息…想必是「长夜月」小姐吧，必须得绕开才行。
E: And then there's that {RUBY_B#"Oblivion"}enigmatic, bottomless{RUBY_E#} aura that seems to jolt awake at midnight... Must be Miss "Evernight." Better steer clear of her.

C: 充满朝气，又不受控制，比其他的更熟悉，似乎就来自人家身边……
E: Full of energy, yet uncontrollable. More familiar than the others, as if it's coming from someone close by...

C: 那一日，也是在这里，他斩下我的头颅，剑锋直指「毁灭」的星神。
E: This is also where he decapitated me on that day and pointed his sword at the Aeon of Destruction.

C: 这么严肃可不像你啊，{NICKNAME}。
E: It isn't like you to be this serious, {NICKNAME}.

C: 是在犹豫怎么履行「负世」的神权么？还是说，你心里早就有答案了？
E: Are you hesitating about how to carry out the divine authority of "Worldbearing"? Or do you already know the answer in your heart?

C: 过奖了。至于那枚结盟玉兆，你们可以留到更紧迫的时候再用。
E: You're too kind. As for that jade abacus of allying oath, you can save it for when you're in more dire need.

C: 放心，我们还在按部就班地推行计划。贝洛伯格那边如何？
E: Don't worry, we're still following the plan step by step. How's the situation in Belobog?

C: 以神之名，行凡人之道。还是以凡人之躯，承神之重负……
E: To walk the path of a mortal as a god. Or to bear a divine burden as a mortal...

C: 它让我想起上一回，咱们跟那朋克洛德小鬼交手的时候。她管这种渗透工具叫什么来着…喔，脏数据壳。用来包裹住核心，骗过最顶级的防火墙。
E: It reminds me of the last time, when we tangled with that Punklordian brat. What did she call this kind of infiltration tool again? Right, Dirty Data Shell. It wraps around the kernel to fool even top-tier firewalls.

C: 黑塔，你的语气有非典型波动。
E: Herta, your tone is unusually emotional.

C: 逆向工程已完成。结果…出人意料。
E: Reverse-engineering complete. The results... are not what I expected.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>日志显示：「吕枯耳戈斯」注销了管理员权限。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Logs show "Lycurgus" revoked administrator access.</color>

C: 还没完？智械哥是把这当垃圾场了吗？
E: Still not done? What is this, a junkyard for old Intellitron's leftovers?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>光历<unbreak>4931</unbreak>年的「自由月」</color>，属于「负世」的时刻。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Light Calendar <unbreak>4931</unbreak>, Month of Freedom</color>, the moment belonging to Worldbearing.

C: 也许你还记得，万敌阁下。在与{NICKNAME}同行的那一世，你对我说过……
E: Perhaps you remember, Lord Mydei. In that lifetime when you traveled with {NICKNAME}, you once told me...

C: 让他和我们一起，笑着走向结局吧。
E: Let him come with us, laughing to the very end.

C: 这里不是真正的家。家应该是一个温馨的地方，能让人放下所有的负担，舒舒服服地睡上很久、很久……
E: This isn't a real home. A home should be a warm, cozy place where you can let go of all your burdens and sleep peacefully for a long, long time...

C: 光的边界外…是什么？
E: What lies beyond the edge of the light?

C: 「走吧，表演还远未到谢幕时分。」
E: "Go. The closing act is still far ahead."

C: 我最喜欢的星际战争情节，终于要来了？！
E: Are we finally getting an intergalactic warfare arc? That's my favorite!

C: 在宇宙的「记忆」里，翁法罗斯将是一个辉煌、壮丽、英雄辈出的世界。
E: Amphoreus will be a glorious and magnificent world of heroes in the universe's "memories."

C: 后方有我，愿翁法罗斯一往无前。
E: I've got your back. May there be nothing that stands in Amphoreus's way.

C: 但现在，我终于明白了。
E: But I finally get it now.

C: 要记得这个瞬间呀，{NICKNAME}。
E: Remember this moment, {NICKNAME}.

C: 然后，让它重新成为心灵的力量。
E: Then, restore its power to nourish the spirit.

C: 在「智识」的实验里，在「毁灭」的温床中，它是熵增，是冰冷的真理，罪恶的本能……
E: In the experiments of Erudition, and in the breeding ground of Destruction, it is entropy increasing, a merciless truth, an evil instinct...

C: 求解「生命」的十三因子，汇入原初的混沌——
E: Seek the thirteen factors of "life," and let them converge into the primordial chaos—

C: 你也是从一片混沌中醒过来的吗？这个问题，恐怕在场的大家都没有答案……
E: Did you also wake up from total chaos? I'm afraid none of us here has the answer to that question...

C: 好呀，你连自己都敢算计。幸好，我早有准备。
E: Oh my, you even dare to scheme against yourself! Lucky for me, I came prepared.

C: 不好意思啦。第一次来列车作客，本来想请各位都守规矩点的…但大家就是一个个的个性十足呢。你懂的，对吧？
E: Sorry about that. Since it's our first time visiting the Express, I was hoping everyone would behave... But it turns out everyone's quite the character, aren't they? You know what I mean, right?

C: 怎么了，小蝶？
E: What's up, Cas?

C: 这是……
E: It's...

C: 可以原谅我吗，{NICKNAME}。你不在场的时候，我擅自做了一个决定……
E: Can you forgive me, {NICKNAME}? I made a decision on my own while you were away...

C: 迷…迷？
E: Mem... mem?

C: 白厄一直都很坚强。但，如果没有那一丝萦绕在脑海中的希望……
E: Phainon has always been strong. But without that faint glimmer of hope lingering in his mind...

C: 「∞」最后的缺口就会闭合；<color=#dbc291ff>翁法罗斯的因果循环，将永远锚定在银河中。</color>
E: That final gap in ∞ will close. <color=#dbc291ff>The causal loop of Amphoreus will become a fixed point in the stars.</color>

C: 这…里…哪里？
E: This... where?

C: 果然失败了…这下只能靠你我了。
E: I guessed as much... It's no longer working. Looks like it's just the two of us out here now.

C: >>>未定义的记录#496，已归档。
E: >>> Undefined Record #496, Archived.

C: 嗨，想我了吗？
E: Hi, miss me yet?

C: 开个玩笑，这是「我」第一次来到你的面前……
E: I'm just messing with you. This is the first time "I" have met you...

C: >>>再见。桃子。
E: >>> Bye. Peach.
"Wah... Waa..."

C: 要和「第一位天才」过上两招了么？意外之喜。
E: Am I going to clash blades with the First Genius? What a pleasant surprise.

C: 看似粗糙的四个字，却孕育了已知银河的全部智慧。
E: Those three words, though seemingly graceless, contain all the wisdom in the entire known cosmos.

C: 但你也将成为「完美学者」——
E: But you'll also become the "Perfect Scholar"...

C: PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>坚持了三千万世，孜孜不倦地赠予它翁法罗斯的「记忆」……
E: PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak> persevered for thirty million cycles and tirelessly gave the Demiurge "memories" of Amphoreus...

C: 啊，原来如此。黑塔的收藏一定独立于系统之外，所以不受影响的就是目标。
E: Aha, I see. Herta's collections aren't in the system, so anything unaffected should be our target.

C: 简单粗暴但行之有效。你看，找着了。
E: Simple, crude, but effective. Look, found it.

C: 又多了个怪东西。
E: *whistle* Strange thing number two...

C: 那是水魈特有的水喉音！
E: That's the watery, guttural sound unique to the Xenohydro!

C: 那我走了。
E: Well I'm off, then.

C: 行了，都是糟老头子之间的事，年轻人瞎掺和什么。
E: Enough. This is between us two old farts. Young people shouldn't get involved.

C: 你尊敬的何塞•拉萨罗
E: Your Respected Hosea Lazaro

C: 特殊解析室附近通路已经封锁，请无关人员不要靠近。
E: The walkways around the Special Purpose Lab have been temporarily closed off. Please keep your distance.

C: 我真搞不懂你们这些人，看点八卦而已，怎么就憋着这么一大股劲儿。
E: I don't get it — you people live your lives for gossip.

C: 呵，人家莱斯莉，那可是「黑塔•光渊密卷科」的明星科员，本琥珀纪里唯一出使丰饶星域的访问学者。
E: Oh, Lesley is a prominent researcher in the Department of Insight, the only scholar who has visited the Abundance segmentum this Amber Era.

C: 我、我写了信和莱斯莉表白，不像平时，只是告诉她地概科有多少种石头、泥巴……
E: I... I confessed my love for her in my last letter. I usually just talk to her about the types of rock and mud we see in Department of Cosmic Geography...

C: 刚好旁边就是存放废弃奇物的「嘘实埋间」，说不定有能用的替换件。
E: Luckily it is right next to the Disposal Site where discarded Curios are stored. Maybe I can find some spare parts.

C: （不是这里。）
E: (Not here)

C: 操作结束，再见。
E: Operation ended. Goodbye.

C: 这不是三月七和丹恒吗？两人步履匆匆，当时急着去干嘛呢……
E: Isn't that March 7th, and Dan Heng? They looked like they were in a hurry to do something...

C: 我想，比起被拒绝，「本该」却「无法」和心意相通的人在一起，那才是更为残酷的事情。
E: In my opinion, not being able to be with someone you love is even more cruel than being rejected.

C: <unbreak>648</unbreak>是巨款！
E: <unbreak>648</unbreak> is a huge sum of money!

C: 一。
E: One.

C: 空间站里的录像带与一般俗物不同，记录了别处都看不到的<color=#dbc291ff>奇景秘闻</color>。正因如此，才需要专人管理。
E: The videotapes in the space station are different from ordinary ones. They are recordings of <color=#dbc291ff>wonders and mysteries</color> you won't find anywhere. Because of this, they need to be looked after by specialized personnel.

C: 还是别麻烦老东…老年人了。
E: Let's not trouble those old fa... elderly people.

C: 它仍然在叫着一个你无法听清的名字。
E: It is still calling the name you cannot hear clearly.

C: 他压低了声音，如今宇宙航路已被那个东西阻塞…你不可能赶在「反物质军团」降临前，成功赶回母星示警。
E: He lowers his voice. "Now that the cosmic route is blocked by that thing... There's no chance you can rush back to your home planet to sound the alarm before the Antimatter Legion arrives."

C: 她看起来只是短暂失去意识，生命体征并无大碍。
E: She seems to have temporarily lost consciousness, but her vitals are okay.

C: 当这个替身知晓自己并非真人之后，为了防止她产生认知错乱，我不得不再三地抹去她的记忆，还原设置，维持她的正常运转。
E: When she found out that she is not a real person, in order to prevent cognitive confusion, I had to erase her memory again and again, to restore her settings and maintain her normal operation.

C: 也许吧。不过我相信，人生漫长，他一定已经找到了弥补过往、获取平静的方法。
E: Maybe. However, I believe that in his long life, he must have found a way to make up for the past and obtain peace.

C: 你回来啦，怎么样，调查出什么了吗？
E: You're back. How did it go? Did you find anything?

C: 满打满算勉强能达到一个成年人在感染后传播出来的极限值，所以绝不可能出现多人感染的情况。
E: The viral load detected barely reaches the amount that can be carried by an infected adult. So it's absolutely impossible for the Crackup Conch to have contracted the virus from multiple individuals.

C: 尽管我们很努力地在维修了，但至今还没有完全恢复过来。之前发现了模因病毒感染者的事情后，我就只能派了个维修工程师每天去盯着。
E: Despite our best efforts, the damage is yet to be fully remediated. And reported cases of memetic virus infection only made things worse. I had to send a maintenance engineer to monitor the situation on a daily basis.

C: 你的相机上搭载了一道临时识别程序，通过它我能远程为你分析镜头内敌方的情报。
E: Your camera is equipped with a scanning program through which I can remotely analyze any visible enemy's intelligence for you.

C: 你只看得见眼前那小小的风险，却不知道：我卡波特如果成了那样卑劣的小人，有多少少女将会从此感受不到快乐的滋味？
E: All you see are the minuscule risks of the immediate situation... but did you ever consider that if I, Capote, abandoned my principles, then the hopes and dreams of hundreds of fair ladies would be dashed?

C: 想不到，你竟然连「波少个人百科」<unbreak>12.0</unbreak>版本的内部测试版内容，都已经了然于胸了！
E: You even memorized the internal testing content for version <unbreak>12.0</unbreak> of Master Capote's Life Wiki!

C: 我看他压力好像很大的样子，就给他出了个好主意～
E: I could tell he was giving himself a lot of pressure, so I gave him a suggestion~

C: 好、好的，阿兰大人……
E: O—Okay, Captain Arlan...

C: 听温世玲的口风，总觉得阿德勒知道些内情。
E: Judging from Wen Shiling's answer, I have a feeling that Adler knows more than he's letting on.

C: 嗯，我保证我都是如实翻译的。
E: Mhm. You can rest assured that I translated it faithfully.

C: 之前提到，它们正在收集一位名为「荣仓终」的科员所有物。
E: As I've mentioned before, they were trying to collect the belongings of a certain researcher named Eikura Shuu.

C: 收拾怪物？让我来！
E: Beating up monsters? Leave it to me!

C: 嗯！它一眼就看出来你们把东西找齐啦。小家伙很佩服，毕竟怪物很难缠。
E: Uh huh! With just one glance, it already knew you had all the things. The little buddy is very impressed. After all, monsters can be quite a challenge to defeat sometimes.

C: 你看！高处那是…超巨型呜呜伯的身影。
E: Look! That thing over there is... the giant Wubbaboo's form.

C: 不过在修复过程中，我却发现了一些异常——访问记录显示，在主控系统瘫痪的那段时间，有「军团」以外的第三者入侵了这里。
E: But during the repair process, I discovered some anomalies. The access records show that a third party other than the Legion invaded while the master control system was paralyzed.

C: 所以，这就是我们要找的…可疑痕迹？虽然和想象中不太一样……
E: So, this is what we're looking for... this suspicious evidence? It wasn't what I was expecting, but...

C: 不太可能。若真是如此，我们之前看到的都可能是假的。
E: That's highly unlikely, but if it's true, everything we've seen till now could be a fake.

C: 我吗？我每天早上起床时都有这种感觉。
E: Me? That's how I feel when I wake up every day.

C: 她在和谁说话？
E: Who is she talking to?

C: 上次也是这样，我离目标就只差那么点距离了，结果却在最后的信息攻防中一败涂地…
E: The same thing happened last time as well. I was so close to the target but got obliterated in the final battle of information...

C: 很高兴没有给你造成困扰。
E: Then I'm glad I haven't caused you vexation on her behalf.

C: 是一群随身带着天平的人，他们坚信宇宙间所有的公义须以个人的行为伸张。
E: They are a group that carries a balance scale with them at all times. They believe all the justice in the universe needs to be achieved through individual deeds.

C: 你在哪儿？
E: Where are you?

C: 一个旗鼓相当的对手，我有多久没有享受过这种乐趣啦——军团是群原始人，公司也差点意思，只有俱乐部能给我一些乐子。
E: I haven't had the thrill of a formidable opponent in such a long time... The Legion is nothing but a bunch of cavemen, and the IPC were a disappointment. Only the Society has the talent to provide me with a fun challenge.

C: 您的想象很有趣。然而您和空间站的恩怨与我无关，逻辑：我不会阻止。
E: Your creativity has proven interesting. However, I have nothing to do with your quarrel with the space station. Ergo: I won't stop you.

C: 你的目标也很简单：<color=#dbc291ff>扫除障碍，通关该区域</color>。这就是全部的规则了，首先，试着离开这个房间吧。
E: Your aim is simple: <color=#dbc291ff>Remove the obstacle and clear the area</color>. That's all for the rules. Now, try and exit the room.

C: 他想独自挑战巨真蛰虫。
E: He wants to fight the Giant Sting by himself.

C: 抛出记忆盲点或许可以唤醒模糊的记忆
E: Using Cognition Chasm might help you restore hazy memories

C: 见着它的痕迹，就给我发个信号。
E: Send me a signal when you see traces of it.

C: 诶哟哟，你在我这老婆子面前有什么好谦虚的。
E: No need to be modest — at my age you get a feel for intelligence...

C: 几次啦？这是第几次啦？！老东西我跟你讲你不要蹬鼻子上……
E: Again? How many times has it been!? You're really pushing my buttons...

C: 对管理层的<color=#dbc291ff>不信任</color>情绪愈演愈烈，艾丝妲也相当头疼吧。
E: People are growing more and more <color=#dbc291ff>distrustful</color> of the management here. It's probably turned into a big headache for Asta too.

C: 哦。所以呢？
E: Oh? Your point being?

C: 我派人监控黑网，勉强限制了视频的传播，事态暂时没有进一步发酵。你们那边呢，结果如何？
E: I've been monitoring the Dark Web — I barely managed to stop the video from spreading. The incident hasn't grown any bigger — for now. How are things with you?

C: 阮•梅很伟大吗？
E: Is Ruan Mei a great person?

C: 什么意思…
E: What do you mean...

C: 听说阮•梅女士对糕点的口味十分挑剔。{NICKNAME}，你了解阮•梅究竟喜欢什么吗？
E: I heard Madam Ruan Mei is very picky when it comes to snacks. {NICKNAME}, do you know what her favorites are?
(Meow...)

C: 和所有的生命形式一样，在走向终点的过程中逐渐迎来结局——我并不排斥这点。
E: Like every living being, it inevitably faced its demise as it journeyed towards the end — I find no fault in that.

C: （好多人…看来就是这儿了）
E: (There are so many people... this seems to be the place)

C: 呃…这家伙……
E: Um... so this...

C: 听说最近有大人物要来。
E: I heard that a big shot is coming soon.

C: 这玩意我见得多了。
E: I've seen so many of these things.

C: 你们都这么有空吗？
E: You all have that much time on your hands?

C: 要是遇到什么困难，可以随时回来找我们。
E: If you run into any trouble, you can come back and find us any time.

C: 谢谢，也希望你能找到自己挚友。对了，我还有最后一件事情需要你的帮助。
E: Thank you. I also hope that you are able to find your own best friend. Oh, that's right — there was one more thing that I wanted to ask for your help with.

C: 别把孩子给吓傻了。
E: There's no need to scare the kid like that.

C: …什么呀，你这不是还没准备好吗？
E: What? You're still not ready to go?

C: 快去快去，我就在这儿等你。
E: Alright slowpoke, I'll wait for you here.

C: 是呀，咱们得帮他们想想办法！公司的势力那么大，就算是布洛妮娅出手也很难搞定吧……
E: Right, we need to figure out how to help them. The IPC is too big and powerful — even if Bronya steps in, it'll be hard for her to resolve the situation...

C: 嗨，你好！请问你是星际和平公司的员工吗？还是说，你只是在玩换装模仿？
E: Hi! Do you work for the Interastral Peace Corporation? Or are you just dressing fancy today?

C: 不过仔细想想，既然这种动物的标本会被陈列在这里…大概意味着它已经从这个世界上消失了吧？
E: Hmm... Come to think of it, this little guy's on display here probably means it's already extinct... right?

C: 更何况，如果要我直接回答你的提问…答案是「怎么做都没用」。不管遇到什么阻碍，我都一定会完成雅利洛-Ⅵ这个项目。
E: But to answer your question directly — it'd take a miracle. I'll complete the Jarilo-VI project no matter what obstacles I encounter.

C: …喂，老乡，问你话呢！你们堆放「地髓」的仓房在哪？
E: ...Hey, I'm talking to you! Where do you guys store the Geomarrow?

C: 这是……
E: It's...

C: 这绝对不能——也绝对不该——是我一个人的决定。
E: This definitely can't — and shouldn't — be a decision made by me alone.

C: 它被赋予的真正使命，是在驱逐所有企图侵害这个世界的敌人之后，帮助贝洛伯格人重建家园——让这个世界回归鼎盛时的模样。
E: It was actually given a much grander purpose: To help the Belobogians rebuild their homeland and restore their world to its former glory... after driving away all those who threatened it.

C: 这到底是怎么…不是，这信息量也太大了吧？！不行，我得缓缓……
E: ...What? How is that possible? I need a moment to wrap my head around this...

C: 下层区所经历的一切，让我对这句话有了深切的了解。于我个人而言…我宁愿背负巨石在雪原里跋涉，也不愿意被关在漂亮的笼子里，过虚假的生活。
E: Living in the Underworld has taught me that this phrase is true. I'd rather trek through the frigid Snow Plains than live in a beautiful cage.

C: 有件重要的事需要你的意见。
E: We need your opinion on an important matter.

C: 居然真的是这里…怎么突然一个人都没有了？
E: Is this really the right place...? It's so quiet all of a sudden.

C: 别嚷嚷了！怎么，不认得这两位？要是没有{F#她们}{M#他们}，你怕是还蹲在矿坑里吃泥巴呢！
E: Tsk, show a little respect! If it weren't for these two, we'd be eating Geomarrow by now!
*yawn*

C: …不是，你以为我想啊？华劳斯，你是知道我的，我像那种仗势压人的主吗？
E: Do you think I wanted to? I'm not the type of person to abuse my status.

C: 我唯一挂念的老伴儿都不在了，还有谁会在乎我活多久呢？
E: I miss him. Now that he's gone, who cares how long I stick around?

C: 那能怎么办呢？卖药的事先也都警告过了，说这疗法有风险，出了情况只能赖自己运气太差……
E: And yet what more could've been done? They were warned about the medicine. They were told about the risks... They chose to roll the dice.

C: …瓦赫不是已经去世了吗？
E: ...I heard that Vache died?

C: 有始有终，我赞成！
E: I am with you all the way!

C: 这样也许不太明智…按照《星域界种指南》的说法，水魈这种生物行踪诡秘，又生性多疑，简单的守株待兔，大概率会竹篮打水一场空。
E: This may not be wise... According to the A Guide to Species in the Astral Realm, the Xenohydro is very cautious and stealthy. If we simply wait for it, it's probably just a waste of time.

C: 呼…水魈还是影子也没有…也许，它早就离开了？
E: *sigh* No sign of the Xenohydro... Maybe it left a long time ago?

C: 我不是水魈！
E: I'm not the Xenohydro!

C: 毕竟经过这次事件你也应该了解，拉明娜是个善良的女孩，她值得再拥有一次机会。
E: But now you should also understand that Lamina is actually a kindhearted girl and she deserves another chance.

C: 我看，还是各自回去，各自疗伤吧……
E: I think we should go back and let our hearts heal.

C: 谢谢你，{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}。也许只要再重复一次…希莉儿就能走出去了。
E: Thank you, {F#ma'am}{M#sir}. Maybe if I try once more... I'll be able to get out.

C: 你伸出手去，尝试握住女孩苍白、纤弱的腕关节。
E: You reach out and try to grab her pale, slender wrist.

C: 呃…这是说它不太可靠吗？但它好像确实发现了什么东西……
E: Uh... Does that mean it's not very reliable? But it does seem to have found something...

C: 我要珍藏佩拉小姐的大作…
E: I want to treasure Miss Pela's masterpiece...

C: 跟我讲讲吧，娜塔。
E: Let's hear one, Nat.

C: 我明白了，要一束「暖阳花」对吗？稍等，我马上帮您挑选……
E: Hm? Sunshines, is it? One second, I'll get it ready for you...

C: 也许是因为条件太艰苦了…
E: Maybe things were too harsh here for record-keeping...

C: 抱歉，我刚才没控制好情绪。
E: Sorry, I needed to take a moment.

C: 挑好了吗？让我看看你选了什么花吧。
E: All done? May I have a look?

C: 那就好！星核的影响消散之后，整个贝洛伯格的氛围明显欢脱了不少，这跟你们的努力脱不了干系。
E: Great to hear! Since the Stellaron crisis subsided, Belobog's been feeling a little more cheerful. We're really grateful for your assistance...

C: （看来我来晚了一步。再去别处看看吧。）
E: (Looks like I'm too late. Let's look elsewhere.)

C: 归还「流星碎片」
E: Return the Meteor Fragment

C: 这样啊…不过应该还是挺有成就感的，对吧？不然你也不会一直干到现在。
E: I see... But at least you have a sense of accomplishment, right? Otherwise, you wouldn't still be doing it.

C: 「齿轮与智慧」从最初的设计稿到最终完工，一共花了接近二十年的时间…凝聚了这么多心血的一件艺术品，我们一定得把它找回来。
E: It took nearly twenty years from design to completion to make Gears and Wisdom... We can't let all that painstaking work and talent go to waste. We have to get it back.

C: 我也不敢相信自己的眼睛，但我不会看错的。
E: I can't believe my own eyes either, but I know that sculpture inside and out.

C: …下次记得做好表情管理。
E: ...Nice try keeping a straight face.

C: 绝对没有，请放心！我会拿生命保护那些手稿的！
E: Absolutely not! Don't worry, ma'am — I will protect those manuscripts with my life!

C: 「莱姆士汀，听我一句——人一辈子总得有点野心，干一次大事！」
E: "Limestein, listen to me — one must be ambitious in life. I'm gonna do something big for once!"

C: 辛苦二位了。如何，你们有从行政区的市民那里打听出什么吗？
E: Thank you both for your hard work. Did you find out anything in the Administrative District?

C: 找到这个「寒腿叔叔」了吗？
E: Did you find this Mr. Cold Feet?

C: {NICKNAME}，就把这当做来自铁卫的最后请求吧——能请你去歌德宾馆会会这位「寒腿叔叔」吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, take this as a final request from the Silvermane Guards — can you go to the Goethe Hotel to meet with this Mr. Cold Feet?

C: 哎哟喂，这话说的，我都要感动哭了……
E: Uh-oh, someone's getting a little emotionally overinvested...

C: 话说，你小子是感冒了吗？怎么感觉你…说话声音跟之前不太一样了？
E: By the way, you catch a cold or something? Your voice... sounds a little different than before.

C: 哎呀呀…不愧是铁卫的情报官，连这种细节都逃不过你的眼睛呢。
E: Oops... As expected of a Silvermane Intelligence Officer, you don't miss a thing.

C: 你还必须通过一道神秘的考验…
E: You also have to pass a mysterious test...

C: 呵呵，小虎克也想来做志愿导览员呀。我这就去让佩拉小姐看看简历，请二位稍作等候。
E: Hehe, are you here to be a volunteer guide too? I'll have Pela look at your resume. Please wait here.

C: 那，等{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}准备好了，我们就开始面试吧——我们就在这里等你哦。
E: Well, let's start the interview when you're ready, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. We'll wait for you here.

C: 嗯，我能理解——那我也就不刨根问底了。来看看接下来该问什么吧……
E: I understand, so I'm not going to probe. Let's see what's next...

C: 你少说两句吧！大家生活都不容易，现在正是互相帮助的时候。
E: Enough already. Nobody has it easy — this is a time to help each other out.

C: 别激动。
E: No need to get excited.

C: 你想找布洛妮娅说什么？
E: What do you want to say to Bronya?

C: 威胁小姑娘是不好的。
E: Don't threaten her.

C: 什、什么情况，这家伙说话了？而且它还知道我们不是本地人？
E: Hey, it talks! And it knows that we aren't from this planet?

C: 说不定是被从前的星际旅行者遗留在这里的老古董。
E: Perhaps it's an antiquity left behind by some past interstellar traveler.

C: 什么啊，原来这家伙已经坏掉了…怎么办，要带它一起走吗？
E: What!? This fella's already broken... What should we do, take it with us?

C: 话是这么说…你知道该怎么修吗？
E: Easier said than done... Do you know how?

C: 我看看……
E: Let me have a look...

C: 事到如今，我要探测器也没用了。多一事不如少一事，懒得再追究什么了…偷我东西的家伙，嗐，祝他好运吧……
E: ...Anyway, I guess I don't need the detector anymore. The less trouble the better, I shouldn't care who stole my device... *sigh* Whoever it was, I hope they get good use out of it...

C: 包在我身上了。
E: Leave it to me.

C: 没有注意别的事。
E: Didn't notice anything.

C: 快说！不然我喊「地火」来了。
E: Spill it or I'll call Wildfire over!

C: 你跟我讲什么大道理？下层都到这个地步了，不靠偷不靠抢，我们这群人还能混得下去吗？
E: What kind of a reason are you looking for? With the Underworld in such a sad state, how are we supposed to survive if we don't resort to robbing and stealing?

C: 要不还是让费斯曼决定吧。
E: Maybe we should let Fersman decide what to do with it.

C: 咳，简单来说，其实就是矿区之前发生了些小意外，你懂的——那场面可是乱的很，我费了大价钱买来的矿具全被搞丢了，把我气得够呛！
E: Well, to put it simply, there were some minor accidents in the mining area earlier. You know what it's like — it was chaos. All the mining tools I bought at a high price were lost, and I was furious!

C: 咳咳，什么叫「只出工一天」？我那是灵活出工，做一天然后躺三天，这是保障我上班效率的独门准则。
E: Ahem... What do you mean by "only work for one day"? I am actually busy with my other business! Resting three days before starting another day of work can help me work more efficiently.

C: 但愿没有引起塌方事故。
E: Let's hope we didn't cause a collapse.

C: 并肩作战吧，姐姐——我们一起驱散旧日的幻影。
E: Fight with us, sister. Let's dispel the shadow of the past once and for all!

C: 你们先回娜塔莎小姐的诊所吧，去看看我们救下的伤员情况如何。
E: You two should head over to Natasha's place and check in on the wounded.

C: 前往雪原。
E: Enter the Snow Plains.

C: 啊，不过这里的视野似乎不是很好…看极光的话，这里没问题吗？
E: Hmm, only problem is... the view here isn't great. Are you sure we'll be able to watch the aurora?

C: 你不会是想钻进去吧……
E: Don't tell me you wanna crawl in there...

C: 我觉得…你还是亲自确认一下比较好。
E: I think... it might be best if you check it out yourself.

C: （去机械屋找朗道姐弟聊聊吧……）
E: (I should go talk to Gepard and Serval at the workshop...)

C: 啊，{NICKNAME}，你也来啦。
E: Ah, you're here too.

C: …哎呀，行了行了，你还是别说了！
E: *sigh* Gepard! Are you quite finished?

C: 希、希儿？你、你管得着我吗！我、我想去哪就去哪，跟你们没关系！
E: S—Seele? Y—You aren't the boss of me! I—I can go wherever I want, it's none of your beeswax!

C: 哭哭唧唧的，吵死了。
