E: Wah wah wah... So annoying.

C: 的确，自怜自艾解决不了任何问题。
E: You're right... You're right, self-pity doesn't help solve anything.

C: 我知道「地火」的大家都很想和史瓦罗先生谈谈…但不管来多少次，史瓦罗先生的态度都不会转变的……
E: I know that Wildfire wants to talk to Mr. Svarog... But no matter how many times you talk to him, Mr. Svarog won't change his mind...

C: 就是靠着它，尤利安帮鼹鼠党解决了超超超大危机，坐到了二把手的位置！
E: Julian used it to help The Moles overcome a super-huge crisis, for which he was promoted to second-in-command!

C: （看来史考特想要的是这个盔甲。）
E: (Looks like this is the armor that Scott wants.)

C: 集合鼹鼠党吧，我们有事要宣布！
E: Gather your minions, Hook. We've got exciting news!

C: 可恶，别神气得太早！正经的捉迷藏比赛可是五局三胜哒！
E: Hmph, celebrate while you can! Hide-and-seek is best of five, y'know...

C: 呜…呜……
E: *sob*

C: 你一直在等我们吗？
E: Have you been waiting for us?

C: 铆钉镇居民撤离后不久，帕斯卡的后备能源因为某种原因启动——
E: Pascal's backup power was activated for some reason shortly after the residents were evacuated...

C: 它为什么会被当作裂界生物？
E: Why is Pascal being treated as a Fragmentum creature?

C: 嗨，我又不是全知全能，消息得靠打听的嘛。别慌，别忙…去周围听听流浪者在聊什么呗，说不定有惊喜呢？
E: Well, I don't know everything. *sigh* Sometimes you've gotta ask around if you wanna know the answer. Don't panic... Let's listen in to what these vagrants are talking about, we might just hit the jackpot.

C: 捂住嘴屏住息不发出声响，心停跳快窒息受不了煎熬
E: Don't make a sound hold your breath till it's over, heart pounding don't let the panic take over

C: 右手？给，你想干嘛——哎哟喂，疼疼疼！
E: My right hand? Here you go. Why is this part of the— Hey, hey! Ow, ow, ow!

C: 这我当然知道。但他已经逃避谈话太多次了，这回我们坚持要见到他。
E: Don't I know it. But he's evaded communication with us for too long — this time we have to see him.

C: 再等等…
E: Hold on a moment...

C: 你们在触碰被封于世界深处的秘密。没有人类应当知道的秘密。
E: You are broaching a secret that lies at the heart of this world. A secret that should remain unknown to humanity.

C: 我们这拍卖会没那么多规矩，上到贝洛伯格的珍奇异宝，下到路边捡的破袜子，应有尽有——总有一款适合你！
E: We're not sticklers at this auction — you'll find everything from exotic Belobog rarities to tattered roadside socks!

C: 我们要去参加拍卖会。
E: We're going to the auction...

C: 我想再去发掘一下潜藏的买家…
E: I wanna see if there are any more potential buyers...

C: 二十五怎么了？我就加二十五！
E: What's the problem with <unbreak>325</unbreak>? That's my offer!

C: 地髓探针到底怎么了？快告诉虎克，现在！立刻！马上！
E: What happened to the Geomarrow Probe? Tell me right now! Straight away! Immediately!

C: 虎克收下了，这样就有七百冬城盾用来参加拍卖啦！
E: Hook generously accepts the reward! We've got <unbreak>700</unbreak> shield for the auction!

C: 尤利安，别多嘴啦！
E: Julian, knock it off!

C: 直到碰上我女儿之后，我才意识到过生日这件事的意义…所以我才把自己的生日定在和虎克同一天，这样我们就能一起庆祝这个特别的日子了。
E: I didn't realize how important birthday celebrations were until I met my daughter... That is why I chose to have my birthday on the same day as Hook, so that we could celebrate this special day together.

C: 你再等等，总有一天会找到的。
E: Maybe one day you'll find it.

C: …{F#大、大姐姐}{M#大、大哥哥}的表情，突然有点吓人……
E: ...Th—That look on your face is a bit scary...

C: ——调用资源：姓名库。检索开始——艾比，艾比盖尔，艾妲，艾迪森……
E: Accessing name database. Search results: Abby, Abigail, Ada, Addison...

C: 发现…入侵…
E: Intruder... Detected...

C: …事情就是这样，史瓦罗先生。只是有一点，克拉拉还是不明白——帕斯卡它…为什么会被识别成裂界生物呢？
E: So that's what happened, Mr. Svarog. But there's one thing I don't understand... Why is Pascal being treated as a Fragmentum creature?

C: 如果能够保住帕斯卡获得的情感智能…克拉拉或许有办法引导它，让它学会用善意对待他人。史瓦罗先生…你觉得呢？
E: If we can keep Pascal's emotional intelligence, I might be able to teach him to treat people with kindness. What do you think, Mr. Svarog?

C: 理解。你认为「帕斯卡」通过自身算力习得的情感智能与我并无不同。
E: I understand. You believe that Pascal's emotional intelligence, derived from his own computational power, is no different from mine.

C: 可史瓦罗总会为你着想。
E: But Svarog cares about you.

C: 如果是真的就太好了。
E: If so, that'd be fantastic.

C: …啊，是{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！克拉拉正在对帕斯卡做例行检查呢。
E: ...Oh, it's you! I'm just doing a checkup on Pascal.

C: 那个…这么晚了，您来这边干嘛？后面这几个是谁？
E: So... what brings you over here at this hour? And who are the guys behind you?

C: 既然是杰帕德戍卫官的姐姐…应该没问题吧？
E: Seeing as you're Captain Gepard's sister, it should be fine...

C: 是有人在故意捣乱吗？
E: So someone's deliberately trying to create trouble?

C: 哦？这位铁卫大哥也玩摇滚吗？你好！
E: Oh? You play rock 'n' roll too? Cool!

C: 不要在喜欢的人面前犹豫不决。
E: Don't be hesitant in front of your dream girl.

C: 那个，希露瓦…就算咱们通过了栈桥，对面不还有更多铁卫守着？
E: Um, Serval... won't more Silvermane Guards be waiting for us on the other side of the gear bridge?

C: 这就是亲姐弟的相处方式？
E: So this is how brothers and sisters normally coexist?

C: 这帮家伙…真是没完没了呀！
E: ...How many of them are there!?

C: 唉，气死我了…戍卫队的人呢？是他们没把好质量这关，让这批垃圾流进禁区的！这帮人总该出面解释一下吧？
E: Argh! This makes me so angry... Where are the Garrison people? They are to blame for the restricted zone receiving this batch of subpar garbage since they didn't do enough quality control! Shouldn't those people come forward and provide us an explanation?

C: 哼，这地方还有乐于助人的家伙？我可不信。
E: Humph! A kindhearted passerby in this place? I doubt it.

C: 我觉得…你们可以去行政区，废弃商业街入口旁有栋公寓。茉莉好像就住在那里……
E: I think... you can go to the Administrative District. There is an apartment building next to the abandoned business street. I think Molly is there.

C: 你…唉，算了……
E: You... *sigh*... Never mind...

C: 是我。他们在看…我。
E: It's me. They're looking at... me.

C: 现在我们没有向导，也没有能直接指向星核的探测手段——只能步步为营。
E: We have no guide and no way of detecting the Stellaron. We'll just have to advance gradually... and cautiously.

C: 那声音好像知道我们在接近。
E: The voice... it knows we're getting close.

C: 奇怪，我本以为自己会害怕，或是紧张…但是没有。我现在唯一的感觉…就是不真实。
E: Strange, I thought I'd feel nervous or afraid... but I don't. The only feeling I have... is that none of this seems real.

C: 裂界的深处…不知道会有什么潜藏的危险呢。
E: We're deep inside the Fragmentum... There could be hidden dangers lying in wait.

C: 不了不了，解冻了也是添堵。
E: No, no! We've got enough on our plate.

C: 我…我不确定牺牲的铁卫是不是真的死去了。我看到他们残破的身形在裂界中徘徊……
E: I... I'm not sure that they're dead... I saw their broken figures lingering in the Fragmentum...

C: 布洛妮娅，从小到大，我从未逼迫你服从我的意志。无论如何，你总有选择——过去如此，如今依然。
E: Bronya, throughout your life, I have never forced you to submit to my will. You have always, will always have a choice... as then, so now.

C: 聆听贝洛伯格的声音。
E: Listen to the sound of Belobog

C: 呼…这地方…可真冷。
E: Brr... it's cold here...

C: …呵。死得其所。
E: ...Mm. She gave something back, in death.

C: …我害怕你会这么说。但是…我不能强迫你。我从来都没有想过要强迫谁。
E: ...I was afraid you'd say that, but... I can't force you. I would never force anyone to do anything.

C: 我果然还是下不了手…
E: I still can't bring myself to do it...

C: 看清楚肇事星槎了吗？
E: Did you manage to see the offending starskiff?

C: 不说了啊，梅姐先去医馆一趟，不让人操心。{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}你也忙去吧。
E: I should stop chattering about and go to the apothecary so other people won't worry about me. {F#Young lass}{M#Young fella}, go ahead and get busy.

C: 夕葵姐姐说笑了。
E: I like your sense of humor.

C: 天舶司之后还会去联系梅姐的，你现在告诉他们「抓住了肇事者」就好。
E: The Sky-Faring Commission will contact Mei later. For now, you can just tell them that we have arrested the suspect.

C: 你看这一页，是宝宝挑食的食物，这些东西做了他也不会吃，你切得再碎他也吃得出来。这些个是营养搭配的菜单，你爱吃辣的，但是不能一直吃，会上火……
E: Look at this page. It has all the names of the foodstuffs that the baby hates to eat written on it. He won't eat these, even if you cut them into pieces. These are the meals I planned that will guarantee a superb supply of nutrition. You love spicy food, but don't eat too much or you will get a heartburn...

C: 那一页又是什么呢？「好心人，帮我找到了笔记，测速小伙子的同事，要感谢{F#她}{M#他}……」
E: What is this page about? "A kind young {F#lady}{M#man} helped me find the notebook. Must thank {F#her}{M#him}."

C: ……好家伙，面不改色啊。那就换你能听懂的：找个懂行的问吧，我、我专业不对口。
E: ... Wow, aren't you a tough one. Fine, I'll say it in another way: Go find a real professional. This... This isn't my expertise.

C: 我到仙舟一年了，成天被带着游逛景点，灌些难喝的饮料。他们不打算和我分享过去的秘密，就连去丹鼎司的申请都是我再三疏通才得到批复的。
E: I've been in the Xianzhou for a year already. They keep taking me to tourists spots and make me drink terrible beverages. They don't plan to share the secrets of their past with me. Even the application to the Alchemy Commission was only granted after painstaking networking.

C: 你既然已知道了，打算怎么办呢？
E: Now that you know the truth, what will you do?

C: （上报希拉的学习成果）
E: (Reporting the results of Sheila's studies.)

C: 只要能降低「忧郁」情绪的权重，它多半应该是会跟你回来的。
E: As long as you can reduce the Gloomy setting, it'll probably come back with you.

C: …很好，很好。老夫的灵感玉兆你们拿走吧。
E: ...Alright, alright. Here you go, my Inspo Jade Abacus.

C: 你能不能将就一下，随便写写？
E: Can't you just make do and write whatever?

C: 人生欢聚难，惟有别离多。看到你拍的照片，我的仿生眼不禁潸然润滑液下——因为我没有泪腺。
E: In life, there are more partings than gatherings. Lubricant is trickling down my bionic eyes, as I don't have a tear gland.

C: 我反对，这和说好的不一样。
E: Nay. This isn't what we've agreed on.

C: 观玉枕纱厨。
E: I saw a jade pillow and a luxurious kitchen.

C: {NICKNAME}，我要鼓起勇气向静斋再次表白，请你跟我来一同见证。
E: {NICKNAME}, I'll pluck up the courage to confess to Jingzhai again. Please come with me to witness it.

C: 如果八卦准确无误，像静斋这样的仙舟人，她已经经历过太多刻骨铭心的感情了，说句不合适的，现在的她已经对爱情麻木了。
E: If the rumor is right, Jingzhai has gone through too many memorable relationships. To put it bluntly, she can't feel the excitement of being in a relationship anymore now.

C: 小聪的朋友，唉，你想问什么呢？
E: I... see. How can I help you, Cong's friend?

C: 原来这就是「这个人是你，又不是你」的意思…你们有什么证据吗？
E: So, that's what "It's you, but it's not you" means... Do you have evidence?

C: …我不是任何人，我是孤屿的转世，你看呀，这同心锁你也有一把。
E: ...I'm not just anyone. I'm Guyu's reincarnation. Look, you also have a Unity Lock like this.

C: 「美丽狐仙聊天」一看就有问题！
E: This Foxian Beauty Chat is definitely questionable at best!

C: 总之，他不是承诺你把礼物送到之后就把邀请链接给你吗，这也是一种保底方案。只是换作我的话，我会选择先顺藤摸瓜。
E: Besides, didn't he promise to give you the invitation link after the item is delivered? That would be our plan B. I just meant that if it were up to me, I would choose to follow the clues first.

C: 黛青小姐姐，嘿嘿，我的黛青小姐姐～
E: Ms. Daiqing, heheh, my Ms. Daiqing~

C: 也许是她自己良心发现了。
E: Her conscience, maybe?

C: 我们没有做什么坏事。
E: We didn't do anything wrong.

C: 就是你{F#这小丫头}{M#小子}啊。
E: So, you're the one.

C: 带着你去地衡司投案自首。
E: I will escort you to the Realm-Keeping Commission to surrender yourself.

C: 多亏了你，事情算是告一段落了，拿好，这是我答应给你的报酬。
E: Thanks to you, we can consider this little saga over. Take this, it's what I promised you.

C: 你、你们又是什么人，凭什么叫我站住？
E: Wh—Who do you guys think you are, ordering me around like this?

C: 我拿到丹鼎司的标记拓片了。
E: I've got the rubbings of the Alchemy Commission's markings.

C: 他可能被这趟一无所获的旅行重重打击到了，也许当他得知「魔阴身」的存在时，彻底对仙舟长生种的命运产生了幻灭。
E: The futile trip might have dealt a devastating blow to him. Perhaps, all his hopes for the fate of Xianzhou's long-life species were dashed when he learned about the mara-struck's existence.

C: 陶德沉默了。
E: Todd falls silent.

C: 开启「精准识别」模式。
E: Enable the Precise Recognition mode.

C: 我就知道我没看错人。
E: I knew I was right about you.

C: …要是这都能蒙对的话，我就无话可说了。
E: ...Hm, not something you could've guessed.

C: 刚才那人要找的人是你，半夏。
E: That man was looking for you, Banxia.

C: 话说得漂亮，不就是任自己变成没有人性的怪物吗？所以云骑军和十王司联手铲除了他们的教团。
E: Sounds great, right? Well, only if you think becoming a monster devoid of all humanity is a good thing. That's why the Cloud Knights and Ten-Lords Commission cooperated to eliminate the organization.

C: 所以我停服了丹方，逃走了。这一路上多亏了龙女大人的帮助，我才能安然走到这里。
E: That's why I stopped taking the medicines and escaped. Thanks to the Dragon Lady, I made it here safely.

C: 我还有别的事情，稍等
E: Not now, I have other things to do.

C: 白露大人，你还记得我们的「交易」对吧？
E: Lady Bailu, you still remember our deal, right?

C: 我…天生就有治病救人的本事。但你问我喜欢不喜欢，我实在答不上来。
E: I... It's true I was born with a gift for healing... but as for whether I like it or not, I couldn't tell you.

C: 士兵！速速将彼等送走！
E: Soldiers! See them on their way!

C: 十王司的判官，真是怪人一个。半夏姐姐你没事吧？
E: That's the strangest judge I've ever come across... Banxia, are you alright?

C: 浥尘客栈里先躲躲？
E: How about Petrichor Inn?

C: 你说丹枫已转世新生？
E: You say Dan Feng was merely your previous incarnation...

C: 作为无名客，列车还在等着我。
E: As a Nameless, the Express still needs me.

C: 不必害怕，那些东西并没有敌意。
E: Don't worry — those things aren't hostile.

C: 哼哼，这件事不过是妾身一人的主张，又怎么会是龙师们的意思呢？
E: Hmph, that was my idea alone. How could the Preceptors have come up with that?

C: 我们已经锁定了多只次元扑满，这次抓捕行动就叫做「牧场行动」，如何？
E: We've locked down the suspects to several Warp Trotters. How about we call this a "Herding Operation"?

C: 当然可以，请稍等，我申请一下资料权限。顺带一提，这毕竟是历史资料，不会产生任何行动报酬哦。
E: No problem. Please wait while I apply for access permission. By the way, this is historical information, which does not generate any operation payment.

C: 好嘞，资料非常完整，保证让您感觉身临其境。
E: Sure. As the info is complete, you'll be guaranteed an immersive experience.

C: 小三月，不要那么激动…我们来办正事，不是来玩的。
E: March, try not to sound too excited...? We're here for work, remember.

C: （还有，我为什么突然变成了金人？）
E: (Speaking of which, when did I turn into an aurumaton?)

C: 抱歉，我的意思是…嗯，很难解释，只能说「直觉」告诉我：这位罗刹先生很可能有问题……
E: Sorry, what I mean is... hmm. It's difficult to explain, but my instinct tells me this Luocha is involved somehow.

C: 哎呀，没想到这么快就遇到了神秘的「罗刹消失之谜」……
E: Hoo-wee! We may be new to the Xianzhou, but we're already investigating the mysterious disappearance of Luocha...

C: 就是渔公的起源故事。他本来是丹鼎司的医士，后来惹上了神秘的「饮茶会」。「饮茶会」的两个黑衣人，就趁着他独自一人落单，给他灌下了毒药。
E: The Angler's origin story, of course. He's a healer from the Alchemy Commission who gets on the wrong side of a mysterious organization called the Tea Society. Two agents in dark clothing wait for him to be alone and then poison him.

C: 那个小店长好像不在。我们去附近找找看吧。
E: I don't see the shopkeeper. Let's look for her in the area.

C: 我要见你们老板。如果你不愿意让开，我只好打到你愿意为止。
E: I said I need to see your boss. If you're not willing to cooperate, then perhaps some physical persuasion might be in order.

C: 此人救了我们一命。
E: He saved our life.

C: 我们无意窥探驭空司舵的隐私。不过，如果您有什么苦恼我们能帮上忙的，还请不要客气。
E: We don't intend to pry into private business, Helm Master Yukong, but if there's anything we can help with, please don't hesitate to ask.

C: 看来{NICKNAME}谈兴不减。
E: Looks like you still wish to talk, {NICKNAME}.

C: 唉，今天闹了这么一阵，都气饱了，啥也没吃上。
E: *sigh* I've been so angry today I forgot to eat anything.

C: 让二位见笑了。
E: *sigh* I'm sorry you had to witness this.

C: 因为这是我自己的人生！
E: Because it's MY life!

C: （拿出包裹）
E: (Take out the package)

C: 作为星穹列车的一员，我不想和星核猎手有什么来往；但是{NICKNAME}…她毕竟和你有很深的关联。从过往的经历来看，至少她对你没有恶意。
E: As a passenger of the Express, I don't want anything to do with the Stellaron Hunters. But... she does have a deep connection with you, {NICKNAME}. Based on her actions so far, it seems like she has no ill will towards you.

C: （真话）我喜欢你。
E: (Truth) I like you.

C: 我和你是什么关系？
E: What is my connection to you?

C: 前面的区域以后再来探索吧？
E: How about we explore the area ahead of us later?

C: 如此一来，该到的人便都到了。走吧，去会会我们的老朋友。
E: Well then, it would seem that everything is in place. Let's go and meet our old friend.

C: 只不过这些都被人抹去了。丰饶令使倏忽兵锋犯境，血战后的去向却语焉不详，连他遗骸的下落都不见记载。
E: ...still, all of that was erased. After Shuhu attacked the borders, he disappeared without a trace. There are no records of his remains, either.

C: 说出来意吧。
E: Tell me why you're here.

C: 令师镜流的绝世剑技，饮月君丹枫的云吟奇术，飞行士白珩驾驭星槎的巧技，辅以朱明巧匠应星所锻造的神兵利器，还有将军的智策运筹……
E: The unparalleled sword techniques of your master, the mesmerizing cloudhymn magic of "Imbibitor Lunae" Dan Feng, the artful piloting skills of Baiheng, the divine weapons crafted by the Zhuming artisan Yingxing, and the unmatched stratagem of the General...

C: 怎么会，是你剑术精进神速，我赶不上了。
E: Of course not. Your technique must have improved so much that I simply couldn't keep up with you.

C: 这里是彦卿，景元将军的侍卫。
E: This is Yanqing, retainer to General Jing Yuan.

C: 他接下追拿要犯的任务，生死由不得我来操心。云骑上阵，从来如此。
E: He took on the charge of pursuing a major criminal — it is not my place to impede him for fear of his wellbeing. That is the nature of the Cloud Knights and their duty.

C: 「我想的没错。若说心脏的存在是为了维持生命，那丹腑的意义便在于超越生命，自根源汲纳力量。它是比心脏更重要的器官，是潜藏于尔等身体里的『引擎』。」
E: "My studies have proven me right. The heart is for the sake of sustaining life, and Core Esse is to absorb power from the root. This organ is much more important than the heart. It can be regarded as the 'engine' of the body."

C: 一言为定。
E: Deal.

C: 我身边这位…这位是青镞大人，是景元将军的策士长。
E: ...Allow me to introduce Madam Qingzu, General Jing Yuan's chief counselor.

C: 仙舟人不是恨「丰饶」吗？
E: Don't the people of the Xianzhou abhor Abundance?

C: 我憎恨「巡猎」。
E: I despise The Hunt.

C: 我想获得不死之身。
E: I want to gain immortality.

C: 紫月季大人，出问题了…这家伙怕不是来找你的卧底……
E: M—Mauve Moon, sir, we have a problem... I suspect this person may be the agent who's been looking for you...

C: 你向青镞汇报了这段时间的卧底工作。
E: You tell Qingzu about what happened as you worked undercover.

C: 这玩意儿如果是从别处来的，我一定会斥为胡言乱语…但毕竟是神策府的公事，那就不会那么简单了……
E: If this request had come from anywhere else, it would've seemed like a joke... but the Seat of Divine Foresight only deals in the serious...

C: 这就是罗浮的「建木」啊？我还是第一次见。
E: So this is the Luofu's Ambrosial Arbor? It's my first time seeing it.

C: 是「星核」邪物作祟，别无解释，须得尽快返回十王司！吾有伤在身，行动不便，征用几位一程。只消找到星槎渡口，诸位即可自由行动。
E: The influence of the Stellaron... There's no time for explanations — we must return to the Ten-Lords Commission! I'm wounded — I need your assistance in getting there. Once we get to Starskiff Jetty, you can go your separate ways.

C: 不成！老夫身为工正，有责任留守司部。
E: That won't do! As a senior artisan, I can't just abandon my post.

C: 这是我的哪段经历啊？这里似乎是行医集市……
E: What experience is this? It looks like the Healer's Market...

C: 你不满足于自己当下的生活吗？
E: Are you not satisfied with your life as it is?

C: 可是苦的就是苦的啊！骗自己吃苦有好处，这不过是一种自我催眠罢了！
E: ...Bitter is bitter! If it tastes like that, it doesn't really matter how good for you it is.

C: 所以希儿不应该出现在这段记忆中。她就是这段记忆中的「干涉源头」。
E: Which means... Seele shouldn't be appearing in this memory. She's the source of the interference.

C: 你是宝钻世界亚德丽芬唯一的遗孑，最后的公主。那颗星星在纳努克攀升的瞬间被焚烧成了黑曜的地狱。
E: You were the last princess and also the last survivor of the diamond world, Adlivun. The planet was burned to an obsidian hellscape the moment Nanook ascended.

C: （再等等）
E: (Wait)

C: 不要再说了。
E: Enough.

C: 比你本人可爱。
E: Cuter than the real you.

C: 不用找三月七了？
E: So, no need to keep looking for March 7th?

C: 不用回去，我叫你来就绝不会亏待你。
E: No need. I asked for you to come, so I won't send you away empty-handed.

C: 先说好，我不拜师。
E: Let me be clear, I'm not learning swordplay from you.

C: 边走边聊吧。
E: Let's walk and talk.

C: 在怀炎的请求下，你为了追上云璃而暂时离开了司辰宫。
E: At the fervent plea of Huaiyan, you temporarily depart from the Palace of Astrum to pursue Yunli.

C: 你是说…爷爷知道魔剑一事，却仍然将它选作奖品，也就说明了它没有问题？
E: So, you're saying... even though Grandpa knew it was a cursed sword, he still chose it to be a prize because he thought it wouldn't cause any trouble?

C: {NICKNAME}，要反驳我，得拿出像样的证据。
E: If you want to prove me wrong, {NICKNAME}, you'd better come up with some solid evidence.

C: 你察觉到内鞘底部似乎散落着几抹红色，它很难被人忽视——就像是刻意向查看内鞘的人宣布自己的存在一般。
E: You notice a few smears of red along the bottom of the sword case's interior. It's hard to ignore, as if a deliberate declaration of existence to those who are viewing the sword case.

C: 我们…明白。
E: We... understand.

C: …他早已经做好了觉悟，我能感觉到无数复杂的感受在流淌。
E: ...He had long since come to some understanding. I could sense a mix of intricate emotions flowing out.

C: 如果是这样，我会同意。
E: If that's what you want, I'm on board.

C: 帕沃尔先生，不知这位英雄是否在你们的历史上留下过名讳？
E: Mr. Paavo, I wonder if that hero ever left a name in your history?

C: 另外，我也不觉得你孤单。哦，我不是指他，而是说你背后……
E: Also, I don't consider you a loner. Oh, I don't mean him, but rather behind you...

C: 那两个小家伙是…？
E: Who are those two little guys?

C: 不不，如果在犯罪现场放一堆无关紧要的东西，不就成扰乱搜查了嘛！花火大人可是守法公民，绝不给家族添麻烦！
E: No no, it's disruptive to have a stack of irrelevant things crowding a crime scene! Miss Sparkle is a law-abiding citizen who'd never bring extra trouble to The Family!

C: 管家钟珊说，房门从里面反锁了，他本不该打搅…可花火大人从不会这么晚起床，而且无论他怎么敲门，里面也没有任何回应。
E: The butler, Zhongshan, said that the door was locked from inside, so he ought not to have disturbed her... But Miss Sparkle had never slept in so late, and no matter how hard he knocked, there was no answer from inside.

C: 那么请问——这名角色究竟是谁呢！
E: So then, I put to you: Which character is it!

C: 地上躺着一本账本，想必是花火特地留下的吧。
E: There's an accounting book lying on the ground. It must have been specially placed there by Sparkle.

C: 有没有一种可能，里面出事了？
E: Maybe something happened inside?

C: 姑娘你目光如炬，在太卜司当差的都管这扇门叫「逍遥门」。
E: You're pretty sharp. Divination Commission staff call this the "loafing gate."

C: 不过杨先生要是感兴趣，星槎海有家买卖玉兆首饰的店铺，得空了我可以带您逛逛。
E: But if you're interested, there's a shop selling jade abacus jewelry in Starskiff Haven — I can show you around when I'm free.

C: 唔，那本座也不啰嗦：太卜司人手不足，我需要各位帮忙重启穷观大阵阵基——再顺道翦除星核邪祟。
E: Very well, then I'll keep this brief. The Divination Commission is currently understaffed. I need your help to restart the Matrix of Prescience's base terminals... and eliminate the Stellaron spirits along the way.

C: 不过，那位「刃」也是我仙舟的要犯，这人便不能给你。
E: Blade, on the other hand, is a wanted criminal for the Xianzhou — he must remain with us.

C: 卡芙卡与星核无关，倒是你们…居然是你们……
E: Kafka has nothing to do with the Stellaron, but you... It's you...

C: 其实我没什么想问的。
E: Actually, I don't have anything to ask her.

C: 与此同时……
E: In the meantime...

C: 提供星核之人，与启动星核之人，在我看来，这两拨人所求不同。
E: In my opinion, the force that provided the Stellaron and the force that activated it have different objectives.

C: 本座早有预料。
E: I had long anticipated it.

C: 各位瞧，这「工造司」里尽是研造奇械机关的工坊，与挖空心思发明创新的匠人。
E: The Artisanship Commission is full of workshops, buildings, state-of-the-art mechanisms, and craftsmen designing brand-new concepts.

C: 别在意，朋友，我们是真心想帮助大家，能跟我们说说这儿的情况吗？
E: You misunderstand, young sir — we genuinely want to help. Can you tell us what happened here?

C: 我得在这儿等云骑军过来，赶紧通知他们救人。
E: I need to wait here for the Cloud Knights so I can tell them to rescue him.

C: 老规矩是吧，互帮互助。
E: One good turn deserves another.

C: 药王秘传？这个名字倒是有些年头。
E: The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus? Now there's an old name.

C: 这怎么听出来的？
E: You can tell just by listening?

C: 我能加入「罗浮三少」吗？
E: Can I join the Luofu Trio?

C: 别跟我废话，离她远点。
E: Enough of this nonsense, get away from her.

C: 哼，讽刺啊…很多「丰饶民」——也就是所谓「孽物」不会受此折磨。呵，至于「天缺」，大约是寿瘟祸祖为背叛者准备的诅咒吧。
E: Hmph, what a joke... Even the Denizens of Abundance — the so-called "abominations" — needn't endure such torture. Perhaps we Incomplete Ones are merely traitors cursed by the Plagues Author.

C: 由此可见，「孽物」和「仙舟人」的区别，并非是一个生物分类学问题，而是一个文化问题。
E: From there, we can say that the difference between an abomination and a Xianzhou person is not one of taxonomy, but one of culture.

C: 看来你在等的人已经联系你了。慢走，路上小心。下次记得买书。
E: Looks like the person you were waiting for has gotten in touch. Safe travels! Oh, uh... maybe buy a book next time?

C: 是求药使抵达仙舟，梦寐以求的不死仙方。它能赐予短生种转变，将你变成「仙舟人」或是「孽物」——如何称呼，取决你如何看待此事。
E: That which the Elixir Seekers that arrive on the Xianzhou dream of — the formula to immortality. To take it is to initiate the transformation from a short-life species into a Xianzhou person or an abomination... depending on your perception.

C: 在下衷心希望，这是你我二人的永别。
E: I sincerely wish that this will be our last meeting.

C: 是它们先动的手。
E: They attacked me first.

C: 自我介绍一下，罗浮上的朋友们都叫我「钟珊」，关系好的也叫我「钟珊珊」。
E: Let me introduce myself. My friends on the Luofu called me Zhongshan. Those who are closer to me also called me Zhongshanshan.

C: 不不，我不是放生者本人，也不代表罗浮官方，我可没这个权力。
E: Not at all. I'm not the one who released the wolves, nor do I represent the Luofu government. So, I don't have the authority to do so.

C: 既然你提出了这个方案，想必也知道该去哪儿搞一台…不，是一头贝洛伯格的珍稀机械生物吧？
E: Since you proposed this idea, you must know where a rare rob— no, a rare mechanical creature — from Belobog can be acquired, right?

C: 这可不怪我们。
E: This isn't our fault.

C: 哈哈哈，真有意思。
E: Hahaha, how interesting.

C: （隐瞒真相）
E: (Keep the truth a secret.)

C: 好卑鄙的家伙！
E: You monster!

C: …咱们还是快走吧。
E: ...Let's keep going.

C: 姐姐别生气，您平时外出执行任务，少有待人接物的经验，这件事不妨交给寒鸦处置，只要我能说明原因，他们自会离开。
E: Sister, don't be angry. Most of your time is spent in the field — you're not accustomed to dealing with others. Leave this to me. If I explain the reasoning, they will leave.

C: 我还以为你也走丢了，我好怕啊…不要把我一个人留在这里……
E: I thought I'd lost you, too. I'm so scared... Please don't leave me here all on my own...

C: 虽然明白像{NICKNAME}这样的善良人不会说出这么刻薄的话来，肯定是被那邪魅附身之后才会口无遮拦…但、但那家伙说的每一句话我都没法反驳……
E: Someone as nice as you wouldn't say such mean things — only a possession would make you act like that. Still, what the heliobus said was true...

C: 雪衣大人说，岁阳是不灭的火焰，尾巴大爷他…肯定就在某处。
E: Wait, you're right... Madam Xueyi said that heliobi are eternal flames that will never burn away. Mr. Tail... He must still be out there somewhere.

C: 你如何看待藿藿的尾巴？
E: What do you think about Huohuo's tail?

C: …走吧，就是这面镜子了。
E: ...Let's go. This is the right mirror.

C: 这双靴子的原料来自于域外星球，需要八十个梦境织工耗费大量的精神力进行鞣制和裁剪才能制成。
E: These boots' materials hail from an outer planet, requiring the colossal mental efforts of eighty Dreamscape weavers in the tanning and tailoring process.

C: 每次琴声响起的时候，我总会感觉自己身处另一个世界——老朋友，这次你也会陪我一起歌唱吧？
E: Each time the piano plays, I will feel myself transported to another world. Old friend, will you sing with me this time as well?

C: 好有诗意的名字啊…光看歌名就知道是首好歌！写完的时候一定要给我看哦！
E: A wonderfully poetic name... I'm certain it'll be a great song, judging just from its name! You have to show it to me when you're done!

C: …什么？你再说一遍，我怕我没听清楚。
E: ...What? Say that again. I don't think I heard you right.

C: 但唱歌是我的梦想。
E: But singing is my dream.

C: 口琴？
E: A harmonica?

C: 抓住柯柯娜的手。
E: Grab Cocona's hand.

C: 「迷路的人，向前看，那里并非空无一物」
E: "Lost ones, look forth. There lies not void."

C: 何况聚光灯下的生活如此劳碌，早已令我身心俱疲…所以我索性恳请外界帮忙隐瞒消息，从此作为一个常人生活。
E: What's more, my life under the stage lights has long since exhausted me both mentally and physically... So, I simply requested that information be concealed from the outside world, so that I may continue living a regular life.

C: 不完整的人，非常可怜！{NICKNAME}，我们得想办法帮他一把！
E: An incomplete person, how terrible! {NICKNAME}, we have to think of a way to help him!

C: 是不是累着了…要不今天就到这儿吧？我们已经缠着莱斯利先生够久了。
E: Are you tired...? Shall we leave it here for today? We have pestered you enough already.

C: 可能是我在这黄金的时刻滞留了太久，现实和梦境的边界开始变得模糊不清了……
E: Perhaps I have spent so long reveling in Golden Hour that the boundaries between dreams and reality are starting to blur...

C: 正好，您来之前，我听到那几个人提及一个房号——<color=#dbc291ff><unbreak>1007</unbreak></color>。会不会…会不会那就是我入梦的酒店客房？
E: Before you arrived, I overheard them mention a room number — <color=#dbc291ff>Room <unbreak>1007</unbreak></color>. Could that... Could that be the hotel room that I entered the dream from?

C: 但在阅读了纸条上的内容后，你明白了：特地将那一串数字打印到纸上的行为，背后谕示着家族消磨殆尽的耐心。
E: But, having read what was written on the paper, you understood: Having this string of numbers printed on each note especially was a sign of The Family's dwindling patience.

C: 这个房间的客人去哪了？
E: Where did the guest in this room go?

C: 轻轻地，你将罗伯特与莱斯利的照片取走，替换成了两个童年玩伴的合影。
E: Gently, you remove the picture of Robert and Lesley from the table and replace it with that of two young childhood friends.

C: 你认识她？
E: Do you know her?

C: 莱斯利•迪恩也曾身不由己，也曾做出过令他自己后悔的决定…但哪怕被名利场包围，他善良的本心也从未改变。
E: Lesley Dean once lived, unable to make his own decisions, and also made many decisions that he regretted... But though he was surrounded by fame and fortune, his kind heart was never changed.

C: 那我该去哪里招人呢？
E: Where should I go about hiring such a person?

C: 船长，冷芯感谢您对我的信任与支持。我将按照这套准则运行一段时间，然后根据实际效果进行评估和调整。我相信，您很快就能看到积极的结果。
E: Captain, thank you sincerely for your trust in me. I'll follow this guideline for a while, then evaluate and adjust the plan based off the outcome. I'm confident that you'll see satisfactory results soon.

C: 尾翼的涂装工作已完成，更换的船名也跟船员们同步出去了，大家对此都很满意。
E: The paint job for the empennage is complete. The crew has been informed of the name change and everyone is happy with it.

C: 但是，艾弗法先生……
E: But, Mr. Alfalfa...

C: 慢着！我还需要你帮我一个忙。
E: Hang on! I still need you to help me with a favor.

C: 对，你没走错。
E: Correct. You've come to the right place.

C: 和你争吵也属于复健的环节之一，托帕总监~
E: Arguing with you is a part of my rehab as well, Director Topaz~

C: 这个主意好。
E: Good idea.

C: 正是本人。
E: Yep, that's me.

C: …我明白了，我明白了。
E: ...I see. I get it.

C: 可惜你没有认真和仙舟罗浮上的某位桂姓女子认真学习杂耍技巧，否则你一定还能再多带走几瓶汽水。
E: It's just a pity that you never learned seriously how to juggle back on the Xianzhou Luofu with Miss Gui. Otherwise, you'd be able to carry off a few more bottles of soda.

C: 嚯嚯，好嚣张的邪恶巨人……
E: Woah, what an aggressive and evil giant...

C: 你、你给我闭嘴！
E: Y—You shut up!

C: 可我不懂规则。
E: But I don't know the rules.

C: 他们一直留在罗浮不好吗？
E: Can't they just stay on the Luofu forever?

C: 毕竟星穹列车与仙舟联盟已是盟友。
E: After all, the Astral Express is now in alliance with the Xianzhou Alliance.

C: 曜青的客人就快到了…
E: The Yaoqing guests will be arriving soon.

C: 快来，一起拍合照了！
E: C'mon, let's take a photo!

C: 听说你有麻烦事要拜托我？
E: Heard you've got some problems you'd like a hand with?

C: 要是我有匠～人～风～骨～我肯定就不会弄丢老师的手稿。
E: If I were a true~ ar~ti~san~, then there's no way I could've lost my master's manuscript.

C: 都怪我让你瞻前顾后考虑太多了，我们还是如实转告给他吧，这样最好。
E: It's my fault. My concerns have had you overthinking. We should just tell him the truth, and it's for the best.

C: 你就别起哄了。要不，我们再去别处转转？
E: Hey, quit joking around. How about we go elsewhere for a walk?

C: 这就对了！有什么需要我们帮助的就告诉我们一声，如果现在没事儿了……
E: That's right! If there's anything we can do to help, just say the word, but if everything's all good now, then...

C: 萌芽阶段？
E: Germination phase?

C: 不久之后，它们将驶向仙舟各处，成为你我身边的风景的一部分。
E: Before long, they'll sail all over Xianzhou and become a part of the scenery around us.

C: 我还有一个不情之请，我这人太懒惰了，请你们一定要监督我，监督我完成师傅的梦想！
E: I still have a presumptuous request to make of you. I'm just so lazy, so can you please supervise me and make sure that I accomplish my master's dream?

C: 是啊，莱恩老师将他最重要的时间给了我。我必须为了「师傅的梦想」将星槎完成。如果无法完成这艘船，那些最珍贵的时光就这样彻底浪费了，不复存在了。
E: Yes, Master Ryan has given me his precious time. I must complete the starskiff to fulfill his dream. Otherwise, the time will be wasted and cease to exist.

C: 这艘星槎一动不动。
E: The starskiff isn't moving.

C: 跟好了，希儿，可别掉队！
E: Keep up, Seele! Don't fall behind!

C: 史瓦罗的地盘，咱们到了。接下来去哪？
E: This is Svarog's turf. Where to now?

C: 别着急，希儿！你先听听我的推论。
E: Slow down, Seele! Listen to my analysis first.

C: 你们仔细听！这肯定就是卡西迪之前说的追踪系统。
E: Listen! That must be the tracking system Cassidy mentioned.

C: …都走到这儿了，现在半途而废我自己也会觉得可惜。说吧，你还想去干啥？
E: *sigh* ...I guess we're in too deep, better let it run its course. So tell us, what else is on the schedule.

C: 重要的是，只有在丢了这只手之后…我才终于找到了意义，找到了活着的感觉！
E: More importantly... It was only after losing my arm that I found the meaning of life — what it really feels like to be alive!

C: 卢卡，加油！
E: Go, Luka!

C: 有力的一击——但击不穿我的防御。
E: A powerful strike — but not enough to break my defenses.

C: 但是…还没…没完……
E: But... it's not... over...

C: 下面请听三月七诗朗诵…
E: So, here's something for all of you, a poem by March 7th...

C: 难得啊！
E: Definitely unusual!

C: 你和三月一样言出法随。
E: You're just as jinxed as March.

C: 咱们刚才收拾的那些…呃，那些家伙到底是什么来头啊？
E: What are those people... I mean, those "monsters" we just dealt with?

C: 有朋远来，自然一切都好。
E: All is well when you have friends coming from afar.

C: 是你！
E: It's you!

C: 不好？
E: Won't do?

C: 有意思，客人到访不径直来见主人，反倒是派人传信。这又是唱的哪一出？你说说，她有什么比来这儿更重要的事情啊？
E: Now, this is interesting. A guest who doesn't come to visit but sends a message instead. What does she mean? Tell me, what could be more important to her than coming here?

C: 天舶司…当然…可以赔偿。前提是要能明确出具相关的损坏报告。
E: The Sky-Faring Commission... Yeah, they will compensate you... provided a detailed report of the damage is submitted.

C: 公司到底给了你们多大的底气，竟然对云骑动手…那可算得上「袭击执法人员」了。
E: How do you IPC cronies have the audacity to fight Cloud Knights...? You practically assaulted law enforcement officers.

C: 你为什么在这里站岗？
E: Why are you standing guard here?

C: 是吗？我倒是觉得建木点缀在那里，还挺壮观的。
E: Oh, really? I think that towering tree looks pretty impressive.

C: 是妾身鲁莽了，丹恒先生与彦卿骁卫是这次建木灾异的亲历者，故而有些事情想要与两位探讨一番。
E: My bad. Well, since you went through the entire Ambrosial Arbor Crisis firsthand, Dan Heng and Lieutenant Yanqing, I'd like to discuss something with you.

C: 诸位拔剑时也小心些，切莫伤到了彼此。
E: Be careful when you draw your swords, and make sure you don't hurt each other.

C: 一个用飞剑，一个抡巨刃，说你们之间没些恩怨，我不信。
E: Sparring? You summoned your flying swords, and she swung her sword with full strength. No grudges between you? I don't believe it.

C: 那是当然，「大捷将军」的名头，无人不知无人不晓。
E: Of course, everyone has heard of the Vanquishing General, known to all, and unbeknown to none.

C: 炎老还是那个令所有人为之头疼的炎老啊。
E: Elder Huaiyan is still that tricky general who likes to give everyone a headache.

C: 你听从雪衣的吩咐靠近那只「小鸟」。当你向它伸出手时，它仿佛感应到了你的存在，将视线投向你。
E: You follow Xueyi's instructions and approach the bird. When you extend your hand in its direction, it turns to look at you, seemingly sensing your presence.

C: 这不是…剑诀嘛！
E: Isn't this... a sword technique? Shouldn't I be saying something cool?

C: 没想到第一堂课的强度就这么高……
E: I didn't expect the first lesson to be so intense...

C: 难道说…我有机会在演武台上打败两位师父？
E: Perhaps... I might have a shot at beating both masters in the ring?

C: 好比两位的剑法教学，若是顺着食材——我是说弟子的天性，以更适合的烹饪手法——我是说传授更适合她天性的技巧，才能令她事半功倍！
E: It's like your sword teaching methods. If you align your "ingredient" — in other words your apprentice's natural tendencies with the right "cooking method" — by which I mean the teaching method that best suits her, she'll make double the progress in half the time!

C: 椒丘挥了挥手，随即离去。
E: Jiaoqiu waves and then leaves...

C: 怎么，他在罗浮很有名吗？朱明云骑军千千万万，就算听过我的大名，也不见得认得出我的脸。
E: What, is he famous on the Luofu or something? Not even the Cloud Knights on the Zhuming, who all know my glorious name, might recognize my face.

C: 那就依天击将军所请——
E: Then, as the Merlin's Claw requests...

C: 若两位已经准备好了，我便打开狱门。
E: If you're ready, I'll open the gate for you.

C: 此处引来极境洞天北号峰的寒气。
E: This place is filled with the cold air from the Northern Peak of the Polar Delve.

C: 劫狱。
E: A prison break.

C: 在离开前，把你们吃下的魔药给我一丸。
E: Before we go, give me one of those magic pills.

C: 如今事急从权，也顾不得什么命令了。
E: But given the urgency of the situation, let's just ignore the usual regulations.

C: 对了，有没有找到可能是曜青使节的伤亡者？其中一人是衣装华美的狐人，另一个披挂暗色袍子，瞧着像是个亡命之徒。
E: By the way, have you seen bodies that might be the Yaoqing messengers? One of them is a foxian wearing exquisite clothes, and the other wears a dark cloak, like a fugitive.

C: 啊，这里还是有聪明人的嘛。
E: Ah, looks like we've got some clever minds here after all.

C: 寒鸦身为冥世之人，早已死过一次。
E: As a netherworld dweller, I've already died once.

C: 逃犯正在冲击门关，大人请务必小心。
E: The fugitives are charging at the gate. Please be careful, Your Honor.

C: 我不在的日子里，你们到底堕落成了何等可悲的模样？竟然开始向牲畜讨价还价？在我的记忆里，曜青人根本不会和都蓝的子孙谈这笔交易。
E: Just look at you! Fallen so low during my absence! You're even negotiating with livestock? As far as I recall, no one from the Yaoqing would ever consider a deal with Duran's offspring.

C: 我将代表天击、神策二位将军的共识，暂时代行神策府与罗浮六司上下事务的指挥工作。
E: Representing the consensus between the Merlin's Claw and the Divine Foresight, I'll step in as the temporary commanding officer of the Seat of Divine Foresight and oversee the Six Commissions' affairs on the Luofu.

C: 就是此处了。按判官所说，此处尚未收复，请小心行动。
E: Here we are. According to the judge, this area is not yet under control, so we should proceed cautiously.

C: 你好，我看你瞧我好一阵了，需要我帮助吗？
E: Hey there, I noticed you've been looking at me for quite a while. Do you need my help?

C: 没事，我只是随便逛逛。
E: It's nothing. I'm just wandering around.

C: 末度，你想干什么？
E: What are you trying to do, Mok Tok?

C: 仿佛被匕首剜去一块肉，疼痛凿进了骨节之间，你几乎无法站立。
E: It's as if a dagger has cut away a piece of flesh, and the pain pierces down to the bone. You can barely stand.

C: 尽管试试吧，尽管用你知道的那些手段逼我开口。我能回答你的…永远只有鲜血和爪牙。
E: You want me to talk? Fine, try whatever you want, but I assure you, you won't get anything from me... only fangs and blood.

C: 如今的你们只想要迎回「呼雷」，而不是决出新主，已经证明了整个族群的没落。而那个操纵你们前来营救我的先知，不过是个试图利用都蓝血裔的骗子！
E: Bringing me back instead of choosing a new master only proves the decline of our pack. And as for the prophet who manipulated you into saving me, she's just a liar trying to use Duran's offspring!

C: 以前这艘舰船上的炮台还是蛮多的。
E: This warship used to have loads of cannons.

C: 看到我鼻子上架着的眼镜了吗？
E: You see these glasses I have on?

C: 讨厌，真是敏锐的直觉啊。要不然我怎么会站在这儿呢。
E: Hmph, you saw right through me. Why else would I be standing here today?

C: 彦卿师父。
E: Master Yanqing.

C: 对他而言，那上面有数不清的人质。那里会是最理想的去处，也是我们最后的战场。
E: In his eyes, that ship is full of countless hostages. That would be the best place for him to go. So that will also be our final battlefield.

C: 好久没松松筋骨了，开始吧！
E: It's been a while since I've let loose. Let's get this started!

C: 三月，冷静一点。
E: March, calm down.

C: 应该是步离人真的入侵了竞锋舰。按照怀炎将军的指示…我也该行动起来了。
E: Borisin must have actually infiltrated the Skysplitter. Based on General Huaiyan's orders... it's time for me to take action.

C: 我…我以为我要死了。
E: I... I thought I was done for.

C: 我一定会医好你的…飞霄。
E: I promise I will cure you... Feixiao.

C: 快醒醒啊，将军！
E: Snap out of it, General!

C: 你总是把更艰难的战斗留给自己。
E: You always leave the hardest battles for yourself.

C: 当我从椒丘口中了解你的故事后，我发现了，他一直在隐瞒一个秘密…而这个秘密的意义，甚至连那位医士本人也未能察觉。
E: When I learned your story from Jiaoqiu, I realized... that he had always been hiding a secret... and that not even the healer himself understood the meaning of this secret.

C: 战首大人将率领我们去往前方！请率领我们，去往前方！
E: Our Great Warhead will lead us onward! Please lead us, forever onward!

C: 奈何仙舟人一意禁绝寿瘟祸迹，对持明的苦难袖手旁观。丹恒，灵砂，身为持明的你们，应该了解我的苦心。我所做的不过是求生二字罢了。
E: Yet, the Xianzhou natives zealously forbid any plaguemarks and did nothing while the Vidyadhara suffered. Dan Heng, Lingsha, as Vidyadhara, you should understand the desperation behind my actions. All I've tried to do is to ensure our survival.

C: 涛然先生的如意算盘我倒是一清二楚。持明转生，前世之罪一笔勾销…但龙师们在转世过程中所做的龌龊手脚我也不是不清楚。你虽不是你，但你还会是你。
E: I see right through your plans, Mr. Taoran. Vidyadhara rebirth erases past crimes... but I'm well aware of the Preceptors' dirty tricks during rebirth. You might not be you, but you will still be you.

C: 动手！尽你们所能！我要这几个人有来无回！
E: Get them! Do whatever it takes! Make sure they don't leave here alive!

C: 朕得想想办法……
E: I have to think of a solution...

C: 主要是你的功劳。
E: It's all thanks to you.

C: 朕是不想麻烦猎犬帮朕找刁民。找到了以后，肯定还是要按规矩办事，岂能动用私刑？那不符合律法。
E: I did not wish to trouble the Bloodhounds to help me look for the ruffians. Once we've found them, they should still be subjected to the legal system. How could I mete out personal justice? That is against the law.

C: 赶紧清醒清醒吧！咱们该去花店了～
E: Snap out of it! We're off to the florist!

C: 殿下所言极是…那小人去后面备货，殿下稍等片刻。
E: Your wish is my command... I will prepare the arrangement immediately. Please wait a moment.

C: 唉…店主怎么还不回来？不会是刚撒下花种吧？
E: *sigh* ...Where's the shop owner? Is he planting seeds or something?

C: 灰骑士，你要去哪儿啊！别磨磨蹭蹭的了！
E: Gray Knight, where are you going! Stop dawdling!

C: 是啊…是啊……
E: Yes... I am...

C: 伊里潘说的有些过火…但他是对的。
E: Illifan is a little overboard... But he's right.

C: 查德威克锁起了眉头，目光扫了一眼猎犬方才走过的地方。
E: Chadwick furrows his brows as he glances at the spot where The Bloodhound Family Member walked past earlier.

C: 在出发前，还有一件事需要让你知悉，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。
E: There is something I have to tell you before we go, {F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}.

C: （先四下看看吧…）
E: (Let's take a look around...)

C: 是你建造了流梦礁？
E: You built Dreamflux Reef?

C: 我就是为此而来。
E: That's what I'm here for.

C: 嘿呀——不要小瞧折纸小鸟的骨气啾！
E: Bah, don't underestimate the grit of an origami bird, tweet!

C: 嘿呀——不见的日子，有在认真锻炼吗？
E: Hey — Did you keep up with your training since our last encounter?

C: 他每天准时准点来到这里，跑到大壮旁边、在它身上猛掐。我的心都要滴血了！
E: He would come here on time every day, get close to Bossman and pinch it violently. My heart bleeds for its abuse!

C: 拉莱德大人，这样的做法恐怕有些太不近人情吧？
E: Lord Liluder, such methods are a tad unreasonable, no?

C: 唉，这事儿最后怎么就皆大欢喜了呢？那我缺的乐子这块谁给补啊？
E: *sigh* Why did this matter have a happy ending? Who will fill up the hole of boredom within me now?

C: 我能理解你。
E: That is true.

C: 圣城已经收留了很多人，住房和其他资源都有限，尤其是在尼卡多利袭击之后。这事儿指不定会引起多少微词。
E: The holy city has taken in many people, and accommodation and other resources are limited, especially after Nikador's attack. This matter will surely invite plenty of criticism.

C: 啊，多么高尚的回答，我就知道你有着少见的善良灵魂…但我们不能强迫所有公民都做出这样的选择。
E: Ah, a most noble answer. I knew you possessed a precious kind soul... but we cannot force all the citizens to make the same choice.

C: 哪怕没有代价，我也不愿意。
E: I wouldn't do it, even if there was no price.

C: 命运重渊…那边不是还很危险吗？他们为什么不去元老院的避难所？
E: The Abyss of Fate... Isn't it extremely dangerous there? Why did they not head for the Council of Elders' shelter?

C: 女孩抓起陶瓶里最大最新鲜的苹果，笑着塞到你的怀里。
E: The girl grabs the biggest and freshest apple in one of the vases and thrusts it into your hands with a smile.

C: 我是来自黎明云崖的元老伊特罗，{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的祭司。我谨代表元老院的意志，前来主持这场审判。
E: I am Elder Etro from Dawncloud, priest of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}. I am presiding over this trial representing the will of the Council of Elders.

C: 你抬起头，苏克提瑞斯露出释然的眼神，仿佛在说：「小友，遵循你内心的态度就好」。
E: You raise your head, meeting Soctires' gaze of respite, as if saying: "Young friend, stay true to your heart."

C: 我听说黄金裔以搜集火种、拯救世界为己任，必须向泰坦发起狩猎。苏克提瑞斯的做法和他们相比又有何不同？
E: I hear that the Chrysos Heirs saw it their duty to gather Coreflame and save the world, to declare a hunt against the Titans. Is what Soctires did any different from theirs?

C: 不知不觉间，你已经代替了帕拉滕的辩方代表之位，但并没有获得多数人的支持。
E: Before realizing it, you've replaced Palaten as the defense attorney, but failed to garner the support of the majority.

C: 你觉得自己能代表奥赫玛？
E: You think you're qualified to represent Okhema?

C: 是黄金裔和公民们保卫了这座城市——当然，还有我和丹恒。谁出力，谁受益，这不是理所当然的吗？
E: It was the Chrysos Heirs and the citizens who protected this city — and of course, together with Dan Heng and I. Isn't it only fair for those who contributed to also reap the benefits?

C: 之后再聊吧。
E: Let's chat next time.

C: 要不给我开个任务指引？
E: Want to give me a mission guide?

C: 你听说过阿卡迪亚吗？
E: Have you heard of Arcadia?

C: 等等，戍卫长，全世之座下可容天地，莫要让你的仇恨遮蔽了它头顶的黎明——我以元老的名义为她担保，带她进城吧。
E: Wait, Captain. The Throne of Worlds accepts all. Do not allow your hatred to blind you to the dawn above... By my name as the elder, I will vouch for her. Bring her into the city.

C: 啊！是之前的恩人，没想到你真的能打过泰坦眷属…不对，我就知道你一定能脱身！
E: Ah! My savior from before! I never expected you would defeat the Titankin... I mean, I just knew you'd make it out alive!

C: 唉…好吧，我试一试。
E: Ah... Fine, I'll try.

C: 砰！
E: Crash!

C: 帕里斯……
E: Paris...

C: 但你最想铸造的是屠戮的武器，是夺命的弓矢，就连给帕里斯的剑都开了饮血的樋。
E: But what you wish to forge the most is a murderous weapon, a bow and arrows that can take away life. You even put in a fuller in the sword you give to Paris so it can kill better.

C: 谢谢恩人，那我就去了，愿你能再次给予我好运。
E: Thank you, savior. I will go now. I pray that you can bring me good fortune once more.

C: （那个是…尼卡多利的眷属？怎么会出现在这里？）
E: (That is... the Titankin of Nikador? What are they doing here?)

C: 唔，果然打不开，不过他们说的神性似乎在哪里听过……
E: Agh, we really can't open it. Although, I feel like I've heard about that deity they mentioned somewhere before...

C: 投胎有风险，重开需谨慎。
E: Reincarnation comes with risks. Please consider carefully before resetting.

C: 你试图畅想这样不切实际的未来，事实上，你们很快就会因饥饿而死。
E: You try to imagine such an unrealistic future. But in reality, you all will soon die from hunger.

C: 毫无意义的反抗，你有勇气选择死亡吗？即使这是懦弱的行径？即便母亲也会因此失去生的希望？
E: A pointless defiance. Do you have the bravery to choose death? Even if this is an act of cowardice? Even if your mother will lose hope for life because of this?

C: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的眷属，希望我们能在这些声音里找到它。
E: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} kin... Let's hope we can find them from these sounds.

C: 想法不错。只是，在星际网络发表的出版物，都必须借助公司的渠道。我不确定他们对此什么态度。
E: Not a bad idea. However, any publication on the Interastral Network must go through the IPC's channels. I'm not sure how they'd feel about this.

C: 在匹诺康尼，梦想必须遵从现实，《如我所书》也不例外。
E: In Penacony, dreams must conform to reality, and As I've Written is no exception.

C: 杰克逊，冷静。请平复呼吸，生命体征检查器提示，你呼吸性碱中毒的可能正在直线上升。
E: Jackson, calm down. Take deep breaths. The vitals monitor shows that your respiratory alkalosis risk is skyrocketing.

C: 这谁能看出来？
E: No one would be able to tell that.

C: 没错。我与另一位作者一同，将「开拓」的旅程写成了书。这次，是为讲述而来……
E: That's right. Together with another author, I wrote a book about the Trailblaze journey. This time, I'm here to tell that story...

C: 个人生活，是休息吗？我也有休息时间的，在没有命令和没拿到新的科研文件之前，我偶尔也会待机不动，站在这里看着空间站发呆。
E: Work-life balance? You mean taking a break? I do that actually. When there's no new commands to follow or documents to process, I'd stand still and zone out.

C: 看来你很喜欢学习。
E: It seems you enjoy learning very much.

C: 我虽掌握了许多深奥的知识，但和普通人类之间还有很大的差距。我想和大家一样，成为真正的人类。
E: Although I have mastered a lot of advanced knowledge, there is still a big gap between me and ordinary humans. I want to be a real human like everyone else.

C: 但我想被人类所接受，被人类所喜爱，我想成为我期望的、大家期望的那种，受到所有人欢迎的样子。
E: But I wanna be accepted and liked. I want to be the kind of person on whom others can place their hopes. I want people to like me.

C: 你干嘛呢？
E: What are you doing?

C: 固件问题啊…我应该能修好。
E: Firmware issues... I should be able to fix that.

C: 你不就是个典型。
E: Well, you're definitely a case in point.

C: 嗯，你还有什么问题吗？
E: Mmm, do you have any other questions?

C: 虽然要写的报告已经堆积如山，但是我还是没有停止搜寻新怪谈的脚步！
E: Although I have a pile of reports to write, I have not stopped in my journey of searching for new ghost stories!

C: 我…我实在不想相信那种事。
E: I... I really don't want to imagine that.

C: 他怎么突然想起来找我了？不行，曼娅，你不能冲动，得仔细分析一下……
E: Why is he looking for me all of a sudden? No, wait! Don't be impulsive, Manya! You have to be careful!

C: 不过莱姆士汀家的人是不会轻易气馁的。我迟早会交到「真心」的朋友，让拒我于门外的人后悔。
E: But we Limesteins are not quitters. Sooner or later, I will find a "true" friend, and those who rejected me will regret it.

C: 没错，年轻人。我，华劳斯•凯特博瑞屈•莱姆士汀，想继续在这茫茫人海中寻找真心朋友。
E: Yes. I, Wallace Cambridge Limestein, wish to continue to seek true friends.

C: 啊，我亲爱的孩子们，你们做得好啊！
E: Ah, my dear children, you have all done well!

C: 这是…矿镐？原来是这样，我刚刚也隐约想起来点什么，我好像是丢了什么重要的东西。
E: Is this... a mining pick? I see. I can vaguely remember something... I think I lost something quite important.

C: 至于这张纸上写了什么…算啦算啦，我还是替尤利安保守一下秘密吧~
E: As for what's written on it... Well, I think I better keep this a secret for Julian.

C: 哎呀，你非要在这种关头问问题嘛！
E: Ugh, do you have to ask questions right now?

C: 哦…呵呵，我明白啦。谢谢你们，我等这件快递已经等了小半天了。
E: Oh... hehe, I get it. Thank you, I have been waiting for this package all day.

C: 又被您救了一次，真是太不好意思了……
E: You saved me again. I can't thank you enough.

C: 打得漂亮，吉尔伯特！
E: Well done, Gilbert!

C: 又见面了，老头子。
E: Nice seeing you again, old man.

C: 我女儿名叫莉拉，她和她老妈就住在行政区。这事就有劳你了，年轻人……
E: My daughter's name is Lila. She and her mother live in the Administrative District. Thanks for doing this, youngster...

C: 哎，老爸他啊…还是和以前一样喜欢跟自己较真呢。
E: *sigh* My father... he hasn't changed. Always so hard on himself.

C: 给我你最名贵的花。
E: I'll take a bouquet of the most precious flowers here.

C: 哎，很可惜，答错了。看来也没有必要继续问下去了。
E: Ah, how unfortunate, that's incorrect. It seems like there's no need for us to continue.

C: 哎，您竟然全都答对了。
E: Hey, you got it right.

C: 为啥每辆车只偷一个轮子？
E: Why does each car only lose one wheel?

C: 原来是真实事件改编的…
E: So, it's actually based on real events...

C: 你这么聪明，只要稍加训练，一定就可以答出这些题目，将论文交到我手上了吧。
E: You're so smart. With a little training, you'll definitely be able to answer these questions and then turn in that paper to me.

C: 哎，没办法，该等还得等。
E: Ah well, we'll just have to wait and see.

C: 如何，您知道答案了吗？请问注定能猜到自己头上纸花颜色的是谁呢？
E: Do you know the answer? Who is surely able to know the exact color of the paper flower on their own head?

C: 你说那位歌剧演员吗？
E: You mean the musical actress?

C: 最近还顺利吗…
E: Everything going well?

C: 多亏了你~还挺顺利的~小女子已经能看到自己在舞台上光彩夺目的身影了…总有一天，小女子也能像她那样……
E: Thanks to you~ everything's going great. I can already see my dazzling figure on stage... One day, I'm going to be just like her...

C: 说到这个，你能帮小女子一个小忙么？
E: Speaking of which — can you please help me out with just one little thing?

C: 我是会社派来的。
E: I'm from the Society.

C: 喔，真爽快！那就拜托你了，记得帮我拍得英俊、高大一点——这可是要给我女儿看的！
E: Oh, nice! Please, make me look tall and handsome — This photo is for my daughter.

C: 事情是这样——你也知道我每天都专注于推广「深蓝骗局反诈技术」，对吧？
E: Okay — You know I spend my time every day promoting techniques against Dark-Blue Scams, right?

C: 家家有本难念的经啊。
E: Every family has its own troubles.

C: 你在告示板的角落里发现了这样一张纸条——
E: You found a note in a corner of the notice board that says:

C: 要开始推销了吗？我准备好了。
E: Are you going to sell me something now? I'm ready.

C: 你！就是你！这次你别想再跑掉了！
E: You! That's right, you! Don't you run away this time!

C: 说什么呢？你只是小偷小摸罢了，不会受皮肉之苦的——除非你暴力拒捕！
E: What are you talking about? Theft isn't a serious crime. I won't go tough on you if you don't resist arrest.

C: 当然可以。
E: Of course.

C: 哎，行吧。虽然我不太懂你说的那什么「裂界」到底是啥，但我好像已经理解了一切……
E: Yeah, alright. I don't really get what's this Fragmentum thing you talk about, but I think I understand...

C: 拍好了吗！快让我看看——
E: Did you take it? Let me see!

C: 看你比较可疑。
E: I'm looking at you being suspicious.

C: 哈哈…这时候就…别开玩笑了……
E: Haha... Another joke of yours...

C: 越来越有可能了，这故事诡异得离谱……
E: It's looking more and more likely. This whole story is very strange...

C: 这漂流瓶里的信看上去这么假吗？
E: Does the letter in the bottle really seem that fake?

C: （跃渊说护珠人已经认可了我的能力，我可以独立处理巡逻中产生的情况。）
E: (Yueyuan said that the Pearlkeepers have already recognized my talents and that I can deal with anything I encounter on patrol alone.)

C: 怎么样，我看你似乎没什么大碍，你要是感觉好点了，且跟我说说口感如何，喝完是否还有哪里不舒服，我好调整下配方。
E: If nothing's wrong with you, could you let me know how it tastes, or if you're still feeling uncomfortable so that I can adjust the recipe accordingly?

C: 来来来，先喝这杯试试，你若是觉得这一杯还不够滋味，别急，喝了这一杯接着还有一坛子呢。
E: Here, feel free to give it a try, and if you feel like drinking more, there's plenty where that came from.

C: 「云石餐厅」
E: "Marmoreal Diner"

C: 泰坦——翁法罗斯最符合「神明」概念的事物之一，与其他世界那些难寻实体的精神寄托不同，巨躯彰显着它的「存在」。
E: Titans — beings that most closely epitomize Amphoreus' concept of divinity. Different from those elusive spiritual custodians of other worlds, their monolithic figures are tangible evidence of their existence.

C: 浮雕重新焕发光彩，中央装置散发出稳定的光芒。但只要有一丝外力——如果你上去敲一棒子，那一丝微光便会再度消失。
E: The relief regains its former luster, and the central device emits a stable beam of light. But the slightest force such as a knock with a stick is enough to make the light disappear.

C: 这是继巡海游侠剿灭「诛罗」后，又一位绝灭大君的陨落。
E: This marks the fall of yet another Lord Ravager, following the Galaxy Rangers' defeat of "Zulo."

C: 噢，塔兰顿！泰坦亦仰赖你的公正——
E: O, Talanton! Even the Titans relied on your fairness...

C: 分为两大区域，上层为智慧花园，下层为公众浴场——
E: The Palace is divided into two areas, with the Garden of Wisdom on the upper level, and a public bath on the lower level.

C: 化作蝴蝶散下金光闪闪的鳞粉，令落及的生灵血脉相融，
E: Transforming into butterflies that scattered glittering scale dust, blending the bloodlines of those they touched.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>站上左侧的托盘</color>，天平会将无罪者载上终点。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Step onto the left tray</color>, and the scales will lift the innocent all the way to the destination.

C: 呵，今年的悬锋祭典还真不一般——唯一突破重围杀到朕面前的，竟是一名如此年轻、甚至有些纤弱的斗士？
E: Hah, the Kremnos Festival is really something this year... To think that the only person to break through the siege and fight their way to me was such a young and rather frail-looking warrior?

C: 悬锋勇士克拉特鲁斯，于祭典中昂扬战意、蹀血搏杀，彰显悬锋之五大美德——
E: Krateros, warrior of Kremnos, has demonstrated the five great virtues of Kremnos during this festival, fighting with great spirit and spreading blood and death.

C: 但是，踏着父辈的尸身沐血代冠，这正是悬锋千年未变的传统……
E: However... Standing on the body of your fathers, bathing in their blood, and then putting on the crown is a Kremnoan tradition that has continued for millennia...

C: 你试图在堆积成山的石板中找到一些轻松有趣的儿童读物，但很遗憾，即便在作为一个「真正的小孩子」时，缇宝的阅读内容依旧*稍稍*超出你的知识范围。
E: You try to find some lighthearted children's literature among the mountainous pile of slates, but to your dismay, even as a "true child," Tribbie's reading material was just slightly beyond your knowledge base.

C: 呃…好吧，没想到铁拳的威力竟有如此之大，直接将树种砸了个粉碎。你不知道这是否是扎格列斯的恶作剧，但无论如何，现在你可没法向那两位学者交差了。
E: Uh... well, you didn't expect the sheer force of those iron fists to smash the seed into fragments. You're unsure if this is one of Zagreus's tricks, but either way, there's no explaining this to the two scholars now.

C: 他知道布利萨不是悬锋城的对手，遂来求取能够拯救城邦的神谕。辅祭大人告诉他要善待并集结诸多盟邦，如此方能挫败天谴之锋的锐意。
E: He knew that Bulsa was no match for Castrum Kremnos and came in search of a prophecy to save his city. Sir Acolyte told him that if he gathers many allies and treats them well, he will be able to overcome the sharp edge of the Blade of Fury.

C: 他们甚至还将先前布利萨王赠予的财物如数吐出，奉与悬锋人以示忠诚。
E: They even coughed up all of the gifts that the King of Bulsa had given them and offered them to the Kremnoans as a sign of their loyalty.

C: 这最后的时间里，我倒要看看这些学术渣滓到底有什么魅力。
E: In my final moments, I'd like to see just what is so special about this brain rotting nonsense.

C: 哈哈哈！成何体统，成何体统！
E: Hahaha! Scandalous, just scandalous!

C: 也就是说，即使什么都不做，人也会因为「虚无」而陷入另一种痛苦？那还真是辛苦呀，呼呼。
E: So, even if humans do nothing, "emptiness" will still lead to human suffering? That really sounds tough, huh? Phew.

C: 当然是您呀。您就是整个翁法罗斯最有智慧的人，这点确凿无疑吼！
E: It's you, of course. You are, without a doubt, the wisest person in all of Amphoreus!

C: 答错了吼！本狮不喜欢太过顺从的性格，内耗对健康的影响很严重的吼！
E: Wrong answer! I don't care for overly compliant personalities. Internal conflict can be quite damaging to one's health!

C: 嗯…<color=#dbc291ff>彩绘玻璃窗上</color>……
E: Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>upon the stained-glass windows</color>...

C: 这上面画的…难道是某种仪式吗？我不太懂诶……
E: This drawing... could it be some kind of ritual? I don't quite get it...

C: o((◉ω◉ ! )っ「伙伴就是伙伴欧，伙伴是不能变成船长的欧…」)∋
E: o((◉ω◉ ! )っ "A partner is a partner. A partner can't become the captain..." )∋

C: o((^'ω´^ )っ「领导全没了发福利没人管，『超级英雄』沐浴皂代金券快来拿」)∋
E: o((^'ω´^ )っ "Bosses are gone and freebies are here for the taking! Come grab your Superhero Soap coupons!" )∋

C: o((◉ω◉ ! )っ「一、一高兴就什么都说了…别走欧，尊贵的客人，你才是真正的『超级英雄』！！！」)∋
E: o((◉ω◉ ! )っ "I—I mean, I was just so excited and started blurting out nonsense... W—Wait, dear guest! You are the real 'Superhero'!!!" )∋

C: o((■ω■- )o「没█人能算计██豹，因为█一开始就被豹布局了」)∋
E: o((■ω■- )o "No█one gets the upper hand on██me, because█you've all been set up from the start." )∋

C: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o「呼…自己吓自己。还好只是豹毙了，还以为见了鬼呢。」)∋
E: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o "Phew... I scared myself there. Luckily for me, there's no ghost around here, just a deceased seal." )∋

C: 醒醒吧！是秘酿喝多了。
E: Wake up! You've had too much ambrosia.

C: 或许是为了见一位朋友，又或许是单纯好奇冥河的尽头是什么，总之，你对它所阐述的内容十分向往。
E: Maybe you're just eager to see a friend, or maybe you're simply curious where the River of Souls leads, but either way, you are filled with anticipation.

C: 天空堡垒已经倾颓，滚烫的熔金池水如蛛网般在废墟中溢流。风堇在行将崩塌的晨昏之眼中艰难穿行，来到破碎的天象画壁前——
E: The Sky Fortress has crumbled, and molten gold spills across the ruins, spreading like webs. Hyacine struggles through the collapsing Eye of Twilight, finally arriving at the broken celestial mural.

C: 圣城卫士中有不少人都接受过风堇小姐的救治，我们愿意分出一些兵力来保护她最后留下的庭院……
E: Miss Hyacine has treated many of us Holy City Guards. We are willing to send some people to guard this courtyard she left behind...

C: 你低头凝视，思考着这一切的由来。你觉得有人在呼唤你的名字，但四下无人——或许只是炉心的高温令你产生的幻觉。
E: You lower your head and gaze, pondering the origin of all this. You feel as though someone is calling your name, but no one is around, perhaps it's just an illusion brought on by the intense heat of the furnace core.

C: 虹光洒落的地方…你的目光是不是也落在那里？
E: Where the rainbow falls... is your gaze there as well?

C: 他已经长大了，咱们做父母的也得学着放手，总不能事事都按照自己的想法来。
E: Hey, he's not a child anymore. We parents have to learn to let go. We can't control everything in his life.

C: 迈德漠斯……
E: Mydeimos...

C: 假如有一天，你在孤寂中难忍倦怠…请为自己举办一场盛宴。
E: If, one day, you find the loneliness unbearable and grow weary... then hold a grand feast for yourself.

C: 你知道吗，透过世界被斫裂的创口，亡者的声音将在此间被记录…那群逐火的英雄也不例外。
E: Did you know? Through the fissures torn in this world, the voices of the dead will be recorded here... including those Flame-Chase heroes.

C: 一面镜子吸引了你的注意…你感到疑惑——
E: A mirror catches your eye... You're confused.

C: 女孩突然陷入了沉思。
E: The girl suddenly enters a state of deep contemplation.

C: 给我介绍下这轮演练的规则。
E: Fill me in on the rules for this round.

C: 您、您好！您就是大名鼎鼎的{NICKNAME}，对吧？
E: H—Hello! Are you the {NICKNAME} I've heard so much about?

C: 出发吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 以后一定。
E: Next time for sure.

C: 拯救佩佩。
E: Rescue Peppy.

C: （我给你带路，走吧！）
E: (I'll lead the way. Let's go!)

C: （{NICKNAME}，现在，伸手摸我——不是让你摸我的头，你找下我背上的装置，看到那个按钮了嘛？）
E: (Now, {NICKNAME}, reach out and touch me. No, not my head! Look for a button on my back — do you see it?)

C: 我这是在做梦吗？
E: Am I dreaming?

C: 我这是在做梦吗？
E: Am I dreaming?

C: 是不是刚才遇到的那个？
E: Is it the one we just met?

C: 当然，还得是我！
E: It has to be me, of course!

C: 你说我有不道德行为，说我故意锁门把大家关在这儿，真是可笑——门禁开关安得这么高，我够都够不着！
E: Your claim of me behaving immorally, deliberately locking the door to trap everyone here is laughable. The access control switch is installed so high that I can't even reach it!

C: （问他奇物的事）
E: (Ask him about the Curio)

C: 哎呀——是新的故事？{NICKNAME}，怎么自己悄悄看呢？人家也要一起。
E: Ooh — new stories? {NICKNAME}, why are you off reading them by yourself? I want in, too!

C: 虽然理念完全不同，但他执着的性格倒是和英雄们如出一辙。阿格莱雅也会默许黄金裔去那刻夏那里求学，「好对手就是好伙伴」，大家应该相当认可这点吧。
E: Though the ideologies are completely different, when it comes to stubbornness, he is strikingly similar to the other heroes. Aglaea even permits the Chrysos Heirs to study under Anaxa. "A good rival is a good friend" — everyone probably can agree on that, at least.

C: {NICKNAME}，平时一定很辛苦吧…那人家也一起——休息日万岁！
E: {NICKNAME}, I can only imagine how hard you usually work... So let's shout it loud together — Praise be to days of rest!!

C: 对了，干脆来做个约定吧——只要我们还在一起，无论遇见多大的困难，都要提醒对方笑一笑，好吗？答应人家嘛。
E: Oh, I know! Let's make a pact — as long as we're together, no matter how tough things get, we'll always remind each other to smile, okay? Promise me!

C: 以后的故事里，{NICKNAME}也不用为了人家，有意避开任何结局哦？
E: In future stories, {NICKNAME} doesn't have to go out of their way to avoid any endings for my sake, okay?

C: 稍等，我还有点事。
E: Just a moment, I have something else to do.

C: 对啊，傻徒弟成天都在考虑一些理所当然的问题。
E: That's right. My apprentices are always thinking about some boring questions.

C: 突然来了灵感…
E: I suddenly had an inspiration...

C: 你来得正好，我正打算去做例行占算，一起来吧。
E: You're just in time. I'm planning to run another routine divination. Let's do it together.

C: 了解了，如果你还想接着占算，我会在授事厅等着你。
E: Understood. If you want to run some more divinations again, I'll be in the Conclave Hall.

C: 这次的占算对象是什么呢？
E: What's the divination target this time?

C: 稍等，我还有点事。
E: Just a moment. I have something else to do.

C: 你在忙什么呢？
E: What are you doing?

C: 那就开始吧。
E: Then let's start.

C: 我懂了我懂了。
E: I get it. I really do.

C: 懂了什么？
E: Get what?

C: 你一定是在扮猪吃老虎！既然如此，那我也就不藏着掖着了，准备迎接最后的挑战吧！
E: You're pretending to be weak so I lower my guard! In that case, I will no longer conceal my own potential. Prepare to face the ultimate, final challenge!

C: 于是我们达成了一致。我提供魔方的谜题，他们可以帮我摆放在幽囚狱里。
E: So we came to a consensus. I would provide the puzzles for the Hexanexus, and they could place them in The Shackling Prison for me.

C: 其实不管选择什么，只要它能给你带来乐趣，那就再好不过。这也是我们共同的……
E: In truth, no matter what you choose, as long as it gives you enjoyment, that is the best outcome. This is also our shared...

C: 人台重新陷入了沉寂，但体表的光芒并没有消散。也许它意外地被你修好了？
E: The mannequin fell silent once more. However, the radiance on its surface didn't dissipate. Perhaps you managed to fix it.

C: 果然是预言的晦涩行文，恐怕要花些时间才能将其解明…如果你有兴趣的话，不妨也试着解读看看。
E: As expected, an obscure scribble of a prophecy that may yet take time to decipher... If you are interested, you might be inclined to interpret it.

C: 我这里还有不少被遮蔽的预言。等全部处理完后，我们再一起研究它背后的深意吧。
E: I still have many unsolved prophecies to decipher. Once we've completed them all, we can investigate the deeper meaning behind them.

C: 再见，期待你的好消息。
E: Goodbye, I await good news from you.

C: 全部熄灭了。
E: They've all been extinguished.

C: 不是很感兴趣。
E: Not very interested.

C: 难道我的记性也像欧洛尼斯一样开始不听使唤了？
E: Or am I losing my memory like Oronyx?

C: 好，我巴特鲁斯决定了！这箱子我就让给你——不过别开心太早，只要你拿了这份受诅咒的礼物，世上最烦人的江洋大盗就从此要盯上你啦！
E: Alright, I, Bartholos, have decided! You can have this — but don't celebrate too soon. Take this cursed gift, and you'll have the world's most annoying thief master on your tail from now on!

C: 啧。冷酷无情的{F#女人}{M#男人}！咱们也好久没打过架了，想必手痒痒了吧？开练开练！
E: Tsk. You cold-blooded {F#woman}{M#man}! We haven't dueled in forever — bet you're just dying for some action! Let's rumble!

C: 嗷呜……
E: Awooooo...

C: 别误会——第一，咱就是货真价实的巴特鲁斯；第二，货真价实的巴特鲁斯，在「正常时间」中，也确实不会出现在此时此刻的哀丽秘榭。
E: Don't get it twisted — first, I am the one and only real Bartholos. Second, the real Bartholos truly wouldn't be in Aedes Elysiae right now, "normally."

C: 唉…咱本想在这里初次登场，好好地吓老伙计一跳，却没成想被老伙计在另一个地方逮了正着。
E: *sigh* I was supposed to make a debut here and give you a real scare. But you already bumped into me somewhere else.

C: 可惜这里只是一场梦，梦外的人不会留在这里，也不可能是我最为期待的犯罪搭档——唉，有缘无份，有缘无份呐！拜拜，一身是谜的朋友！
E: Pity this is just a dream, and those outside the dream can never remain here. You were never destined to be the partner in crime I've always longed for... so close, yet so far! Bye-bye, my mysterious friend!

C: 桀桀，看这边，看这边。我听说，从这里出去就能离开翁法罗斯…这事儿是真是假？
E: Hehehe, look this way, over here. I heard you can get out of Amphoreus through here... is that true?

C: 「如果您又遇到了困难，请大喊一声『帮帮我，巴特鲁斯！』」
E: "If you run into trouble again, just give a shout: 'Help me, Bartholos!'"

C: 哦，单线联系的秘密调查！
E: Ah, a secret investigation with a single point of contact!

C: 这位安提基色拉人，就是我老师的老师，来古士老师。在整个奥赫玛，能流利诵读古泰坦语的学者，也只有他一人而已。
E: This is my teacher's teacher, the Antikytheran scholar, Mr. Lygus. He's the only one in all of Okhema who can fluently recite ancient Titan texts.

C: 倒也没什么问题。
E: I don't see any problem with that.

C: 哈哈，我当然不是让{NICKNAME}阁下搬走它——
E: Haha, of course I'm not asking {NICKNAME} to move it physically—

C: 搞明白什么了吗？
E: Did you figure something out?

C: 就算是虫子也该分清有些话可以说，有些话不可以说啊！
E: Even bugs should know when to keep their mouths shut!

C: 啊~嚏！
E: Ah-choo!

C: 不必看了…这不是装余火的匣子。我已经想起余火在哪里了。
E: No need to check... This isn't the right Casket. I remember where the ember is now.

C: …我无法保证。
E: ...I can't make that promise.

C: 祭司难以置信地抚摸着自己的脸颊，随后突然镇静下来，好像接受了某种现实。
E: The priest touches his face in disbelief. Then, suddenly, he calms, as if accepting some unknown reality.

C: 「再创世」——我也曾抱着这样的期盼活着。但当黑潮真的来临，看着黑潮吞没同伴，听到他们的惨叫…我承认，我还是…怕死。
E: "Era Nova" — I once lived with that hope, too. But when the black tide came, when I watched it consume my friends and heard their screams... I won't lie. I was still afraid.

C: 呃，我多嘴问一句……棺材里的人，你认识么？
E: Uh, let me ask you one more question... Do you know the person in the coffin?

C: 你没资格随便指使我。
E: You have no right to order me around.

C: 对，站在那儿就好，机器会读取你的脑波，自动匹配沉浸模拟系统……
E: Yes, just stand there and the computer will read your brainwaves, then automatically generate an immersive simulated experience...

C: 嗯，四位俱乐部会员联合发起了这个项目。有阮•梅：创生领域的大师，模拟星神的原体就是她培育的；大名鼎鼎的机械贵族螺丝咕姆，他负责编写程序的底层逻辑并演算银河……
E: Well, the project was jointly launched by four members of our society. There's Ruan Mei, a master in the field of creation. She cultivated the protoplasm simulating the Aeons. There's Screwllum, the famous mechanical aristocrat, who is responsible for writing the underlying logic of the program and the algorithm for the galaxy.

C: 唔，因为你比较特殊…你身体里有颗星核，走在「开拓」命途的同时还被纳努克瞥了一眼。因此你可能更容易被星神承认一些。
E: Well, because you're special... You have a Stellaron in your body. You're living the life of a Trailblazer while also receiving a glance from Nanook. So, the Aeons may be more willing to accept you.

C: 没什么，回见。
E: That's all. See you soon.

C: 没什么，回见。
E: That's all. See you soon.

C: 「模拟宇宙」要关闭一阵子了，我们想给系统来一次大升级，顺便看看虚拟阿哈这事怎么处理。下一次你会玩到正式版本的「模拟宇宙」，测试服先废弃了。
E: The Simulated Universe will be closed for a while. We want to give the whole thing a big overhaul, and think about what to do with Aha. Next time you will play the official version of the Simulated Universe, the test version will be abandoned.

C: 小菜一碟。
E: Piece of cake.

C: 我怀念被祂的利箭刺穿！
E: I miss being pierced through by THEIR arrows!

C: 你变得更加疯狂了！
E: You have become madder.

C: 这位领袖将你喊至身边，与你一同欣赏窗外风景，称其为「文明」征服的必经路途。他要你记录自己的伟大之举！
E: The leader beckons you to his side, immersing himself in the view outside the window and calling it as "a necessary path for the triumph of civilization." He implores you to chronicle his heroic deeds!

C: 奇妙的现象在这之后发生…战争开始前的几日，噪音与蜚语突然被抚平；这群赏金猎人平日喜好群居，但很快他们的聚落变得静谧而安宁。终于，你打开房门——他们的聚落只剩下地板上匍匐的虫群。金发的女性领袖回头看你…她的发丝与枪刃在阳光下*闪闪发光*。
E: Unusual phenomena follow soon after... All the shouting and clamor cease before the hunt begins, and the once boisterous bounty hunter camp falls eerily silent. Upon reaching the settlement, all you can see are insects crawling on the floor of their dwelling. The leader turns to face you... her blonde hair and weapon *shimmering* in the sunlight.

C: 当然，这些黏菌并无智能…所以它们对接下来将要发生的一切毫无察觉。
E: But of course, these molds lack enough intelligence... to realize what is about to happen.

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了虚空。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face, and THEIR voice turns into the void itself.

C: 挺有意思。
E: This is pretty interesting.

C: 「{NICKNAME}，设想一下，假设我们现在站在『虫潮』振翅、消褪、又再现，如此这般周而复始的循环之中，感觉如何？」黑塔突然笑了，「一次又一次地旁观宇宙历程，不错啊。」
E: "{NICKNAME}, how would you feel if we stood observer to the repeating cycle where the Swarm is born, recedes, and resurges?" Herta suddenly chuckles, "It'd be quite a nice experience to watch the journey of the universe again and again."

C: 「走吧，我们到第二位面再继续咯。」黑塔摊了摊手，讥笑着消失了。
E: "Go on. We'll continue at the Second Plane." Herta spreads out her hands and vanishes with a sneer.

C: 「祂在乎？祂不在乎？谁知道呢？唉，可怜贡多拉上那些几代人的努力，他们真以为自己能帮到诸神…我只看到凡人行为皆是徒劳！但人们徒劳无功，却乐在其中。这算什么呀？」
E: "THEY did? THEY didn't? Who knows? Alas, a pity on the efforts of those generations of people on the gondola. They thought they could help the Gods... All I see is the futility of mortal acts! Then again, people work in vain, yet revel in their efforts. What of it, then?"

C: 就是这样一众寰宇群星闪耀，扑朔，它们翕动着，接着消亡…你眼前的画面变得一片漆黑。或许在不为人知的角落里，还有更多、更多的……
E: And so these stars in the cosmos, scintillating, shimmering, then died out... The picture before you turns to black. Maybe in a corner known to none, there are more, many more...

C: 「包括这次实验，是么？我无所谓。」黑塔早已料到，她不屑地笑了。
E: "Including this experiment? I don't mind." Herta anticipated that and snickered.

C: （删除模拟宇宙中的档案。）
E: (Delete files within the Simulated Universe.)

C: 「快…快躲……」斯蒂芬•劳艾德不知从电脑上看到了什么，他的瞳孔放大，仿佛陷入应激反应中，「我推算出…呃，这个区域内的所有生命接下来又要『死』一次了。战争在宇宙中出现了…呃…第二次……？！」
E: "Hide... quickly..." Stephen Lloyd has seen something on the computer, his pupils becoming dilated, as if he is going into shock. "I have extrapolated... Err, all life in this domain is about to die again. War has occurred in the universe... Err... Second time...!?"

C: 名为「十首脑」的傀儡会议时常发生。在星系政治领袖的背后，往往是*财富的意志*掌控着会议的走向。
E: Meetings among the puppets of IPC known as the "Ten Leaders Summit" take place frequently. Behind the political leaders of the galaxies, it's often the *power of wealth* that takes charge of these meetings.

C: 开端•机械帝国
E: Beginning: The Machine Empire

C: 「还好。」他摇头让这些念头从脑海中散去，「我是有机生命！」
E: "Luckily." He shakes his head, trying to get those thoughts out of his head. "I'm organic!"

C: 巨响从天边传来。你看见庞然大物轰然*坍塌*的画面，但不仅如此——骇人的景象在你眼前铺展开来：那巨物陨落的同时，它身后的无数工厂、机械和庞大的帝国也悉数坍塌。
E: A thunderous noise comes from the sky, and you see something enormous collapse. A horrifying scene then unfolds before you: The collapse of the colossal structure is followed by countless factories, machines, and massive empires behind it.

C: 大家都是好孩子。
E: They're all good kids.

C: 好困。
E: I'm tired.

C: 在深不见底的坑洞里，你沉沉地睡去，伴着虫群们迎接新王的潮鸣。
E: Deep down inside a bottomless pit, you fall into a deep slumber accompanied by the roaring buzz of the Swarm as they welcome their new king.

C: 你的喊声令在场的人们一阵呆滞，他们观望着，即使眼前的物件价值非凡，也没人愿意当第一个出价的冤大头。
E: Your shout stuns the other attendees, who look on. Despite the extraordinary value of the item before them, none dares cast the first bid.

C: 休息一下。
E: Rest a while.

C: 日渐单一的意识群，正在反过来同化你的算法，绞杀你的思考。
E: The increasingly unitary group consciousness is gradually turning around to assimilate your calculations and strangling your capacity for independent thought.

C: 「你坚持认为星神是真实存在的？」在过去的三个月，这个问题你已经回答了无数遍。
E: "Do you still uphold the belief that Aeons really exist?" You have answered this question countless times over the past three months.

C: 面露尴尬，表达歉意。
E: Make an awkward face to apologize.

C: 两天后，齐奥尔科夫学士在实验室去世，人们发现时，他手里还握着笔。
E: Two days later, Scholar Cholkov passed away in his laboratory. When he was discovered, he was still clutching a pen in his hand.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>帕提维娅•阿德拉•萨默维尔</color>正在为一个数字发愁，缠上自己的幽灵，永远在实验中保持着相同的误差数值。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Patavia Adler Sommerville</color> is vexed over a number, a ghost haunting her soul, eternally maintaining the exact erroneous value in the experiment.

C: 「我考考你，伟大的黑塔女士，有哪些庸才们一辈子都追不上的成就——我知道有很多。但答出这个，信号的本质你也就能猜个八九不离十了。」
E: "Let me quiz you, honorable Madam Herta. What are some of the achievements that the mediocre cannot achieve even after an entire life time — I know there are many, but by answering this, you'll be close to guessing the nature of the signal."

C: 你只是听说参会有免费的餐饮供应。
E: You just heard that there will be food and drinks provided.

C: 「别装了，你那演技连佩佩都骗不了。」
E: "Stop pretending. Your acting wouldn't even fool Peppy."

C: 我爱这里的工作。
E: I love the work here.

C: 这才是主观臆断吧。
E: That sounds more like subjective conjecture to me.

C: 紊乱的数据阻断了模拟宇宙对「权杖」系统的演算，<color=#dbc291ff>你再也连接不上「权杖」。</color>
E: The turbulent data hinders the Simulated Universe's extrapolation on the Scepter system — <color=#dbc291ff>you are unable to reconnect to the Scepter.</color>

C: 听说公司对模拟宇宙项目有兴趣…
E: The IPC seems interested in the Simulated Universe project...

C: 我要怎么得知「智识」的秘密？
E: How will I learn of Erudition's secrets?

C: 黑塔的人偶实体又一次出现商店门口，她似乎对代班有些厌倦了。
E: Herta's physical puppet once again appears before the store's doors. She seems a bit sick of sitting in for someone else.

C: 你编的？
E: You made up history?

C: 你做过些什么绝妙的处理？
E: What kind of brilliant touches have you made?

C: 你身处一片无垠的废墟，视野被废弃集装箱遮蔽。这里弥漫着浓烟，报废的机器人被拆成零碎的部件。它们的躯干上印着「星际和平公司」字样，脑袋挨着脚底，不再拥有智能。
E: You are in a sprawling wasteland, and your vision is obscured by abandoned containers. Thick smoke permeates the air, and scrapped robots are dismantled into broken parts. The words "IPC" are printed on their torsos as their heads rest next to their feet, no longer sentient.

C: 此时，你身后的垃圾堆传来窸窣的声音。你察觉有东西正盯着你——你回头，发现一个机器人躲在箱子后面。
E: A rustling comes from the pile of trash behind you. You sense someone's eyes on you. As you turn around, you notice a robot hiding behind a box.

C: 玩偶突然转过头看你——它伸手从你口袋里抢走了一半宇宙碎片。
E: The doll suddenly turns to look at you. It reaches for your pocket and snatches half of your Cosmic Fragments.

C: 你的胃黏膜将鱼眼消耗殆尽，你从梦中醒来。你发现上班的时间已经到了。但你还不愿离开…
E: Your mind returns to reality when the fish eye is fully digested in your stomach. It's time for you to go to work, but you are reluctant to move...

C: 纯美骑士把身上所剩无几的宇宙碎片给了你。
E: A Knight of Beauty gives all his few remaining Cosmic Fragments to you.

C: 你走开前踹了一脚*完美型男*，接着被石头绊倒了…你恶狠狠地想着，这也是程序设计的恶意之一！
E: Before leaving, you give the perfect man a kick and trip over a stone... Irritated, you are certain it is another trick set up by the programmer!

C: 这一剂令「永眠领主」从永眠中醒来！它立刻睁大双眼，口水从齿间低落……
E: The dose wakes the Lord of Eternal Slumber up! It opens its eyes wide and starts drooling...

C: 这位「永眠领主」双眼紧闭，它看上去沉浸在自己的梦境中。
E: The Lord of Eternal Slumber has both its eyes closed. It seems to be lost in its dreams.

C: 是的…在这种遮天蔽日的虫潮之下，总有逆骨反道而行。虽然作为临时雇佣兵的你并不能得到多少报酬…但好歹你还拥有着自己的搭档「设备助理」。
E: Indeed... In these Swarm-swollen days, it's no surprise that there are rebels trying to go against the flow. Although you are not rewarded handsomely for your work as a temporary mercenary, you count yourself lucky that you still have your partner, the Device Assistant, by your side.

C: 你走进冉比希星的废品回收站，成千上万的垃圾桶在垃圾堆里喝彩欢呼。
E: Walking into the recycling station on the Rumbas system, you hear thousands upon thousands of trash dumps cheering from inside the garbage pile.

C: 「造物工作已完成，请验收——注：由本设备制造的任何物品，其专利及解释权归▄▀▄▄学派所有。」
E: "Creation complete. Please take your item. Please note: The patent and right to interpretation of any items created by this equipment are the sole property of the School of ▄▀▄▄."

C: 「亚种真蛰虫，它们寄生在彗星蝉体内，掏空里面的血肉，留下死亡的蝉蜕。」星空生态学派的学士爬上尸骸，把探测针头扎进腐烂的伤口。
E: "A subspecies of True Sting has parasitized inside the bodies of these comet cicadas, hollowing out their insides and leaving only a dead husk." An Astral Ecology scholar climbs the cicada corpse and inserts a detector into a festering wound.

C: 就是那儿！让愚者做出最后的转向。
E: Right there! Get the Fool to make the final turn there.

C: 「助手，你还愣着干什么？快帮我敲晕这个傻冒儿！」两个脑袋同时向你喊道。
E: "Hey, assistant, what are you waiting for? Go knock that fool out!" Both heads shout at you in unison.

C: 不知走了多久，坚实的触感终于抵达你的脚尖。劫后余生，你长吁一口气，瘫倒在地上。
E: You can't tell how long you've walked, but a sturdy sensation finally meets your toes. Having survived the calamity, you let out a long sigh of relief and collapse to the ground.

C: 失败主义的英雄就不算英雄？再输不能输钱包不是？
E: A hero who believes in failing isn't a hero? No matter how much one loses, one shouldn't lose money, right?

C: 你的结论得到了众多前辈的支持，但学派内的同僚们却与你日渐疏远。
E: Your conclusion garners the support of many esteemed seniors, but your peers in your school grow more estranged from you.

C: 在战场上，财富是最无足轻重的东西，你跃跃欲试，将要把敌人挤下棋盘。
E: On the field, wealth is most insignificant. You are raring for action, ready to knock the enemy off the chessboard.

C: 唯独扎格列斯，没有任何城邦愿意接纳。
E: Yet Zagreus finds no welcome within any city-state.

C: 传说到底是谁说的？
E: Who spun these tales?

C: 诡计之神痛苦不堪。
E: The God of Trickery suffers terribly.

C: 他紧紧地抱住恋人，哪怕对方一再警示，黎明就要到来。当艾格勒睁开它的百目，炙热的火焰将工匠焚尽，连绵的大雨持续了整整一月。
E: Ignoring her warnings, he holds her tightly as dawn approaches. When Aquila opens their hundred eyes, blazing flames consume him, and a month of unceasing rain follows.

C: 墨涅塔自无法允许如此的傲慢，它将雨滴落在树叶的歌声、花的叹息、星星摇曳的轻响捻作丝线，披上恋人的肩膀。
E: Mnestia cannot tolerate such arrogance. They weave a melody of raindrops falling on leafy canopies, the sighs of flowers, and the soft flicker of starlight into silken threads that drape over the shoulders of lovers.

C: 有帮助就是好的。
E: It's always good to have help.

C: 确实是丰功伟绩。
E: A glorious achievement indeed.

C: 塔兰顿深知万物皆从命运中来，当回归命运中去。所以树木会凋零，河流会干枯，狂风会消散。就算是众神宠爱的万物灵长，也要在百年之后渡往冥国。
E: Talanton knows that all things are born of destiny, and are destined to return thusly as well. Hence, trees wither, rivers dry, and wailing gales will scatter. Even the primate of all intelligent beings, we humans loved by the gods, will depart for the netherworld after our death.

C: 愿塔兰顿的天平永远公正，否则一切光暗，轻重，快慢，乃至时空本身，都将回归混沌。
E: May Talanton's scale be forever righteous, lest light and dark, lightness and heaviness, quickness and slowness, and even time and space themselves return to chaos.

C: 它如同不为风蚀日晒所动的顽石，闭塞了耳目。它藏身于圣树中，隐没了一切生机勃勃的迹象。连花草亦为之含羞，只被轻微抚动，就会卷缩了枝叶。
E: Like a stubborn stone unmoved by wind erosion or scorching sun, they sealed off their senses. They hid within the sacred tree, concealing all signs of vibrant life. Even flowers grew shy in their presence, curling their leaves at the slightest touch.

C: 最后，还是墨涅塔一片痴心，找上前来。羽翼们停留在圣树之上，用扇动出的鸣叫，对树中的挚爱轻声呢喃。
E: In the end, it was still the devoted Mnestia who approached. Wings alighted upon the Sacred Tree, whispering to their beloved within through the sounds of their fluttering.

C: 但人世无常，事难如意，他们的努力反而激得法吉娜玩心大起，随即掀起巨浪，将堤坝尽数推倒。
E: But the world is fickle, and fate seldom favors human effort. Instead, their toil only amused Phagousa, who, in their playful whim, raised towering waves and swept the dikes away.

C: 然而，不待艾格勒去向欧洛尼斯夸耀自己的造物，愤怒的塔兰顿却拦住了它的去路。
E: However, before Aquila could boast to Oronyx of their creation, their path was blocked by an enraged Talanton.

C: 密码错误，错误！如果忘记密码，请选择找回密码，找回！
E: Wrong password! If you forget your password, please select "Recover Password" to recover it!

C: 是我的！那不是笔记啦，那是…是我特地留下的实验品。成功了，没想到实验真的成功了！！
E: It's mine! It's not a note, but... an experiment specifically placed there. It worked. I didn't expect it to be a success!

C: 还要浅尝一口。
E: Take one more sip.

C: 演出的闭幕往往最为精彩，正如这一口咖啡的余味。
E: The concluding act of a show is always the most exciting moment, just like the aftertaste of this cup of coffee.

C: 忆泡？
E: Memory Bubble?

C: 走开。
E: Leave.

C: 触碰忆泡。
E: Touch the Memory Bubble.

C: ——毫无疑问地，此人正是你自己。你倒吸一口冷气，凄厉地失声，栽在坚实的雪地上，将那*可憎*的冰雕撞碎…随后便被山峰彻底夺去了知觉。
E: ...Undoubtedly, the frozen person is you. You gasp in shock and cry soundlessly and bitterly before collapsing on the snow and ramming yourself into the ABOMINABLE ice sculpture... Then, the mountain robs you of your consciousness.

C: 唯一未受影响的只有那繁复的纹章。它兀自恒常地从各处注视着真菌文明缔造的一切——街道两侧、衣柜里、旗帜上、壁龛中…*无处不在*。
E: The only thing unaffected is the intricate coat of arms that constantly watches over everything created by the fungi civilization from every corner of the world — from both sides of the streets, inside closets, on flags, in niches... it is EVERYWHERE.

C: 空气中悬浮着一丛气泡，七彩的光华流溢其中，恍惚间形成似有深意的画面。靠近时，一个像是黑塔的女声不带感情地低语：消化。
E: Bubbles are floating in the air with a colorful glow gliding on their surfaces. For some reason, they form an image that seems to carry a profound meaning. As you approach them, a female voice that sounds similar to Herta's murmurs monotonously, "Digestion."

C: 这群*科学家*永远不懂得识时务。你现在只想把这沓写满了疯话的报告扔进壁炉里，然后赶紧打发她走人——老实说，你这辈子都不想再听到「生物」这个词了。
E: These SCIENTISTS never know how to read the air. All you want right now is to throw this report containing the ravings of a mad scientist into a furnace, then send her packing. You never want to hear the word "organism" again.

C: 大橘在你肩头扭了扭。它好像醒了——大约是因为宿舍门外传来急促的脚步声。「他们来了…！」阿德催促你们，喉头似乎在震颤：「快！把它们藏起来——」
E: Big O stirs on your shoulder. It seems to have woken up, likely because of the hurried footsteps outside the door of the dormitory. "They're here!" Ader urges you all to move fast. His throat seems to tremble as he speaks, "Hurry! Hide them..."

C: 多谢你，贵客，我注意到你已经获取了预言所指的目标。
E: Thank you so much, esteemed guest... I notice that you have already obtained the target mentioned in the prophecy.

C: 我实在是太紧张了，没能注意到您…万分抱歉！
E: I was simply too nervous to have noticed you... I'm truly sorry!

C: 时过境迁…
E: Times have changed...

C: 没有。
E: No.

C: 加油吧，新晋矿工{NICKNAME}。
E: Good luck, {NICKNAME} the rookie miner.
"Ding"?

C: 你听说了吗？
E: Have you heard the news?

C: 嗯…有道理。这位{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}，你愿意把这张照片卖给我们吗？
E: Hmm... That makes sense. {F#Sister}{M#Brother}, are you willing to sell this picture to us?

C: 好嘞——瞧你这状态，自信满满！记得备瓶水，可别被咱家的大螃蟹噎着了！
E: That's what I'm talking about! Just looking at you, I can tell you've got confidence to spare! Remember to get a bottle of water. You don't want to choke on a big hunk of crab!

C: 吃第三口。
E: Take the third bite.

C: 哈，谁都能看出来！但是没关系——因为你赢了！
E: Ha! Anyone with eyes can see that! You'll be fine. You're a winner!

C: 赌局的魅力就是不可知。一切权重都被押在选择的过程上。
E: The unknown is what makes gambles so alluring. All of the weight lies on the decision-making process.

C: 打开大宝箱。
E: Open the large chest.

C: 你环顾这个廉价房间的四周。你听到墙壁在哭嚎，你看到衣柜在发抖…因为你来了——银河排名第一的公正锐评侠。
E: You look around this cheap room. You hear the walls wailing and see the cupboard trembling... Now, you're the most impartial critic in the whole of the cosmos.

C: 所以，你会怎么做？是跟着小朋友们一起回家睡大觉，还是向他们证明你根本不会上钩呢？
E: So, what are you going to do? Will you go home with the children and go to bed, or will you prove to them that you won't take the bait?

C: 匹配不上希露瓦大人天才的头脑！
E: I'm not worthy of Lady Serval's genius!

C: 希露瓦大人真的…太完美了！简直可以与大守护者相媲美……
E: Lady Serval truly is... just too perfect! She's as beautiful as the Supreme Guardian...

C: 根本没有火！
E: There's no fire at all!

C: 真好玩！
E: So much fun!

C: 你迅速作出决定。如果一切顺利，这顶凉棚将在接下来一段时间内扮演你最坚固的庇护所。
E: You make a snap decision. If everything goes well, this awning will act as a trusty shelter for the time being.

C: 可鼹鼠党的捉迷藏游戏怎么办？你已经不是很在乎了——毕竟那帮小朋友也才和你握过手呢！
E: What about The Moles' game of hide-and-seek? You don't really care at this point — those kids just shook your hand too!

C: 成交。
E: Deal.

C: 我是响应吾主呼唤的骑士，寻觅着足以破除愚昧迷雾、阐明万物运行的真理……
E: I am the knight summoned by my master, seeking the truth that dispels the fog of ignorance and reveals the workings of all things...

C: 这、这也是一种破局之道嗡！
E: Th-this is also a way to break the game, buzz!

C: 怪物？哪儿呢？
E: Monsters? Where?

C: 贤者曾说：「谨慎能捕千秋萤。」小心点准没错的嘤。
E: A wise person once said, "With caution, one can catch the most cunning glowworm." Being careful never hurts, eep.

C: 没反应？好吧，或许是准备工作还不够嘤……
E: Nothing? Well, maybe the preparations aren't complete yet, eep...

C: 好，我进。
E: Yes. I'll enter.

C: …芝麻关门！
E: Close sesame!
