C: 可是…速度再快，又怎么能逃得过命运呢……
E: But... no matter how fast I am, can I really outrun fate...?

C: 命运如同吾主大大的绳结，又像吾主太太的丝线，它们缠绕编织，勾画出我们一生的脉络。
E: Fate is like the knot tied by my master, or the thread spun by my lady. They entwine and weave to illustrate the paths of our lives.

C: 习惯了就不会失望了。
E: If you are accustomed to something, you won't be disappointed.

C: 你怎么这么扫兴！我俩独处的时候，你这双眼睛…还有这张嘴，都只属于我。
E: You are such a bummer! While the two of us are alone, your eyes... and your mouth belong to me.

C: 你好像是看错了，这明明是一只小小的机巧鸟，但看上去它就像是一只巨大的飞龙，守着洞穴中成山的财富。
E: You must have seen something else. This is obviously a cycrane, but it looks just like a huge dragon — one that hoards a lair of treasure.

C: 救救，救救……
E: H—help...

C: 太好了，多亏了你，我说话稍微顺畅了一些，没有那么卡顿了。
E: Great. Thanks to you, my speech flows better now without stuttering out all the time.

C: 你是不相信我吗？人类。你还不知道我的信念吧，告诉你好了。
E: Do you not trust me? Human, you have no idea of my conviction, so let me tell you.

C: 我虽然没有未来，但是我可以会保护好你的未来，这就是我的信念。
E: I may not have any future, but I can still protect your future. This is my conviction.

C: 我是小帅，<color=#dbc291ff>我给一个花盆翻土只需要5分钟，而小美需要<unbreak>10</unbreak>分钟。</color>
E: I'm Little Johnny. <color=#dbc291ff>It takes me five minutes and Little Susie ten minutes to till the soil for one pot.</color>

C: 怎么就不公平了？
E: How so?

C: 走过路过，不要错过！
E: Come one, come all, and don't miss out!

C: 「外交」是什么？！
E: What is Diplomacy?

C: …有点意思，就这么说定了。
E: ...Interesting. I'll take that deal.

C: 没问题，你有多少喝多少——
E: No problem. You gulp down as much water as you can...

C: 你吃，你吃！你就这样吃，不停地吃，拼命地吃，吃到昏天黑地，吃到海枯石烂……
E: You eat and eat! You keep on eating, ceaselessly eating, desperately eating, eating until the darkness engulfs you, eating until the end of space and time...

C: 高同步率的人来了。
E: Here comes a high resonator.

C: 请速速让我来接入！
E: Well then, chop-chop, let me in!

C: 唉，果然还是不行吗？
E: Yikes, still not working?

C: 你坐在父亲宽厚的肩膀上看向玉界门…舌尖滑过母亲烹制的鸣藕糕熟悉的滋味…你接到云骑讣告的那天，泪如雨下……
E: You stared at the Jade Gate as you sat upon your father's wide shoulders... Your tongue tasted the familiar songlotus cake that your mother made... The day you received the Cloud Knights' obituary notice, your tears flowed down like rain...

C: 别客气，应该的！非要感谢就去感谢持明族的人吧——感谢他们没来找你麻烦。
E: You're welcome. It's nothing! If you really want to thank someone, go thank the Vidyadhara — thank them for not having a bone to pick with you.

C: 所以你都说了些什么呢？
E: So what did you say?

C: 我估摸着…他俩八成是被单双号分开在两艘星槎上，所以才见不着咯。
E: I'm guessing... they must've been separated on two starskiffs by the odd-even plate restriction, so they couldn't meet up.

C: 视野绝佳的观景台，几乎能将整个筑梦边境的景色尽收眼底。
E: The observation deck with breathtaking views. You can almost see the entire Dream's Edge at a glance.

C: 《寻星顽童》，艺术鉴赏家百大必看之一。如果想衡量一位导演的艺术水准，只需要看他如何评价这部作品就够了。
E: Urchin Starhunters is a must-see masterpiece for serious aficionados. If you want the measure of a director's talent, all you need to know is how they rate this work.

C: 哈努兄弟在盯着你……
E: Hanu is staring at you...

C: 已经有段年岁的电影海报，在艺术风格上颇具匹诺康尼特色。
E: The aged movie poster has some classic Penaconian characteristics in terms of its art style.

C: 家族很快就要崩溃了！
E: The Family is about to fall apart!

C: 一轮满月悬浮于美梦的倒影中，一位稚子在虚假的月光沐浴下安眠。
E: A full moon cycle hovers over the dream's reflection, a child slumbering beneath the false moonlight.

C: 你抬起头，只看得见书脊的颜色，完全看不清上面写了些什么。
E: You look up, but all you can see is the color of the book's spine. The text is a blur to you.

C: 我照看着你呢~
E: I'll take care of you!

C: 风景果然不一般啊。
E: What an incredible view.

C: 我们曾经有过故事…
E: We had a history once...

C: 塔兰顿永远公正…
E: Talanton's justice is eternal...

C: 这次一定能通过！
E: I'm going to make it this time!

C: 圣女的记载好少啊…
E: We have so few records about the Maiden...

C: 信仰先于理解，我的孩子。
E: Faith comes before understanding, my child.

C: 还是我们的票选更多。
E: Our votes are more.

C: 敢来就尝尝我的拳头。
E: Come closer, and I'll introduce you to my fists.

C: 无论发生什么……
E: No matter what happens...

C: 扎格列斯老爷…
E: O great Zagreus...

C: 行。那这笔罚款我就收下了啊。往玦轮里面扔东西是非常危险的，下次请您做事之前三思而行。
E: Okay, I'll take that then. It's incredibly dangerous to throw objects into a jade wheel. Please, think twice before you act.

C: …哎，怎么说您好呢。您好歹也是景元将军的客人，我也不好真给您抓起来。这次就这么算了吧……
E: *sigh* How should I drill this into your brain... It's a good thing you're a guest of General Jing Yuan, otherwise you'd be arrested already. You're off the hook this time...

C: （讲述你在仙舟作战的英勇事迹）
E: (You describe your heroic deeds aboard the Xianzhou)

C: 至于你提到的那几位朋友，帕姆觉得人都蛮不错的，有空的话你可以喊他们到列车上坐坐。
E: As for those friends you mentioned, Pom-Pom thinks they're pretty neat people. If you get the chance, invite them to come aboard the Express.

C: 帕姆怎么可能只有一分呢，一定是哪里搞错了！
E: How can Pom-Pom only get one out of ten. There must be a mistake!

C: （应该是某位乘客带上来的，不是「莓莓果汁」的配方。再在附近找找吧！）
E: (This isn't the Berry Juice recipe but probably something left behind by another passenger. Keep looking nearby!)

C: 虽说知道是地板的划痕，而不是脚印，那我就不用再扫一遍。
E: Since it isn't a footprint, I don't have to mop the floor again.

C: 会变成黑米团子的。
E: You'll turn into a chocolate doughnut.

C: 哈…医疗补给申请需要静候三到五个工作日，我们会以邮件的形式进行答复……
E: Ha... The application for medical supplies needs to wait for three to five working days, and we will contact you through mail...

C: 必要时，连休息时间都要贡献出来，得有这样的觉悟才行。
E: When necessary, you need to contribute even your rest time. This kind of awareness is required.

C: 救救…
E: Save me...

C: 久仰大名！今日一见，倍感荣幸！哈！哈！哈！
E: We finally meet! It's an honor to see you today. Bwahaha!

C: （这下就能从背后突袭了。去拿到他身上的密钥吧。）
E: (Now we can launch a surprise attack from behind. Let's go get his key.)

C: 这些东西你拿去吧，就当是我雇你干这趟苦差的报酬。保重，{NICKNAME}！
E: These are for you. You can treat them as my rewards for you. Take care, {NICKNAME}!

C: 请问，就在当下，你的心中是否产生了一丝不忍的情绪？或者说你早已经习惯了心如寒铁，没有任何事情能够让你动摇？
E: At this moment, are you feeling any trace of pity for this poor creature? Or has your heart become as cold as iron, impervious to any emotion?

C: 如果您有心帮忙到底的话，我也会在丹鼎司等您的。拿着吧，这是您应得的酬劳，感谢您协助地衡司完成了本次调查。
E: Meet me at the Alchemy Commission if you're willing to help us all the way. But for now, please take this reward as a token of appreciation for all you've done.

C: 好的，祝您度过愉快的一天。
E: All right, have a nice day.

C: 你的视线已经几乎无法从它身上移开了。
E: You find yourself unable to pry your eyes from it.

C: 合着「拳斗」是猜拳啊？
E: Wait, so the "brawl" is just rock-paper-scissors?

C: 什么？！玛丽竟然被{NICKNAME}击败了…！
E: Oh no, {NICKNAME} has beaten Mary...!

C: 摊牌了！我就是公物破坏狂！
E: Fine. I admit I'm a repeat offender.

C: …咳，我第一次碰见道歉态度这么诚恳的家伙…看来你还算明辨是非。那这次…这次就…呃…放过你吧。
E: ...Ahem, you're the first one to apologize so sincerely. I guess I, uh... can let you go this time.

C: …但是，但是！你得给我时刻记住——破坏公物者，虽远必诛！
E: ...But know this — no vandals will be tolerated!

C: 等等，你听到了吗？有个声音正在接近——咔嗒，咔嗒……
E: Wait, did you hear that? A sound is closing in. Click, click....

C: 唔…我进来了哦？
E: Um... I'm gonna come in now, okay?

C: 呃…那个「恶魔」似乎丢下了什么东西。拿着吧，别客气——就把它当作对你英勇行径的奖赏。
E: Um... That devil seems to have left something behind. Take it as your reward for your intrepidity.

C: 感觉…也没那么狂野吧。可你和佩拉都这么说，难道确实是我画得不好看……
E: It feels... not that wild at all. But both you and Pela have said that. Am I really a bad painter...

C: 不过，你们已经证明了自己的清白，通缉一事也就到此为止了。先前给你们添了不少麻烦…还得再向你们说声抱歉。
E: But you've already proved your innocence, and so that's the end of this Wanted matter. I'm sorry for causing you so much trouble before... I owe you another apology.

C: 太棒了！我最讨厌的就是地理。
E: Ugh, great. I hate geography the most.

C: 于是，你将手伸向了那仿佛掩藏了贝洛伯格一切秘密的柜门……
E: So, you reach out to the handle of the closet that seemingly contains every single secret in all of Belobog...

C: 哎，不管怎么样，它的训练也算上有所成果——谢谢你，{NICKNAME}！
E: Ah, its training has paid off in any case — thank you, {NICKNAME}!

C: ——算了，别把话说的太死。也许下一秒你就改主意了呢？
E: Come on, don't be too sure of it. You could be having a change of heart the next second.

C: 在下「罐中仙」，住在这罐子中，避世隐居数千载。今日若不是遇到你这么个愣头青，我还能再消停个几千年。
E: I'm the Immortal in a Vase, and I've lived in this vase in seclusion for thousands of years. And if it weren't for a klutz like you today, I'd probably have chilled out another few millennia more.

C: 你将一袋垃圾塞进罐子，它本应落入罐底，但你没听到任何声响。接着，你塞进了剩下几袋。它们就这样无声无息地消失了。
E: You stuff one bag into the vase. It should drop down to the bottom, but you don't hear any sound. Then, you shove in the remaining trash. They disappear without a sound.

C: 「困惑。我将在信中列举本人……」
E: "...confusion. In this letter, I'll list..."

C: 我就喜欢助人为乐。
E: I love helping people.

C: 不得不说，您的表现真是远超预期。不但找到了遗失的货物，还顺便找到了一只遗失的机巧鸟…您果然值得信任。
E: I gotta say, your performance far exceeded expectations. Not only did you find the lost cargo, but you also happened to find a lost cycrane... You truly are trustworthy.

C: 他们应该是把栖木改造一番，发射了某种特定频率的信号，引来丰饶孽物。
E: I suppose they have modified the roost to emit a signal of a specific frequency to attract the Abominations of Abundance.

C: 我喜好收集，会放在背包里。
E: I like to collect them for my inventory.

C: 不，我必须以牙还牙，以眼还眼。
E: No, I must have a tooth for a tooth, an eye for an eye.

C: 你需要这个铁盒吗？
E: Do you need this iron box?

C: 为什么没有我最喜欢的歼星舰大战？为什么不把更有趣的玩法拿出来？你们在害怕什么？！
E: Why isn't my favorite, Starnought Wars, here? Why not make the gameplay more fun? What are you cowards afraid of!?

C: 看着就吓人，我们离他远点…
E: He looks freaky. Let's get away from him...

C: 我好像…陷得更深了，稍微有点透不过气。真希望有谁能来拉我一把……
E: It seems like... my flaws are getting worse. I feel like I'm suffocating. I really hope someone can give me a hand...

C: 无论如何，我都该好好感谢您才行…不单单是因为您救了我，更因为您对我…对我们的包容和理解。
E: In any case, I should be thanking you... Not just for saving me, but also... because of your understanding and putting up with me.

C: 我已经快要找不到方向了…已经快要找不到「我」了，我不想再做梦了……
E: I'm almost completely lost and disoriented... I can barely find "me" anymore. I don't want to dream anymore...

C: 阿然女士身上的沉稳气质稍稍褪去，流露出了些许属于少女的活泼。
E: Miss Ran's calm demeanor fades ever-so-slightly, revealing a glimpse of the lively spirit of a young girl.

C: 所以你这是在休假？
E: So, are you here on vacation?

C: 只可怜我被她牵连，不得不留在这个吵闹的梦里。哎，做梦有什么好呢？我一点都不喜欢什么美梦，我只想踏踏实实地睡上一觉。
E: It's just a pity that I got roped in by her and had to stay here in this noisy dream. *sigh* What good are dreams? I don't care in the slightest for sweet dreams. I just want a solid night's sleep.

C: 您好，请问有什么需要吗？
E: Greetings. Is there something you need?

C: 实在是抱歉，我妹妹性格比较直率，心智也不够成熟。如果她不小心冒犯了您，请允许我这个做姐姐的代她向您赔礼……
E: I'm really sorry. My sister can be blunt and isn't always the most mature. If she has accidentally offended you, then please allow me — as her sister — to make it up to on her behalf...

C: 我*这辈子*都在想方设法摆脱她造就的阴影，而她则是这个世界上…最希望我这个负担彻底消失的人。
E: I've spent my *entire life* trying to get out from under her shadow. She's the one person in this world... who hopes that this burden — me — one day disappears forever.

C: 也许吧，不过相比之下，我更不希望这里的故事被永远埋没。
E: Maybe. But in comparison, I'd rather this story wasn't buried forever.

C: 大概十个琥珀纪前，星际间还流传着「机械海盗王」韦兰的臭名……
E: About <unbreak>10</unbreak> Amber Eras or so back, the notorious "Mechanical Pirate King" Wyland roamed the galaxies...

C: 我改日再听。
E: I'll listen another day.

C: 这一工作实在太繁琐，太漫长…究竟是怎样坚定的意志在支撑他们做完这一切？我不知道，但他们的成果无疑铸就了母星文明的丰碑。
E: This work looks truly tedious and boring... What kind of firm resolve supported their completion? I don't know, but their achievements have no doubt left a monument for their home planet and civilization.

C: 当然，一脚油门的事而已。
E: Of course, just gotta put that pedal to the metal.

C: 不设限的旅行的确给我带来了许多见闻，但传说中众人齐心共进的景象，我终究是没有看到…也许那只存在于遥远的过去吧。
E: This free-roaming lifestyle brought me a wealth of experience, but I never got to see the legendary spectacle of a group of people working together as one... Maybe it only ever existed in the remote reaches of the past.

C: 现在我意识到，不能再这样下去了。倘若一直不付诸行动，等我老死那天都见不到真正的无名客！
E: I now realize that I can't keep going on like this. If I don't take action, I won't be able to see the truest of the Nameless there ever was!

C: 也许是你们认错了？
E: Perhaps you've got the wrong person?

C: 数目确认无误…居然真能一下子掏出这么多钱来。
E: The amount is right... You have that much money on hand?

C: 算了算了，这事我们兄弟俩不管了。走！
E: Fine, fine! Just forget about everything that happened here. We're leaving!

C: 你还好吗？
E: Are you okay?

C: 于是我对同伴说，我们应该把它当成智慧生物、当作有思想的人来对待。大家都觉得我不可理喻。
E: So I told my companions that we should view it as an intelligent species and a sentient person. Everyone thought that I was being unreasonable.

C: 那肉估计确实好吃…
E: I bet it tasted really good though...

C: 不对，不能高兴得太早，万一敌人趁松懈的时候打上门就糟了……
E: No, it's too early to gloat now. I'd be doomed if my enemies strike when I let down my guard...

C: 我还记得，《末世班尼：烈火英雄》——我们的上一款虚拟现实模拟器——刚上线的时候简直就是灾难。那回我们都挺过来了，还有什么可怕的？
E: The launch of our last virtual reality simulator, Apocalyptic Benny: Hero Baptised In Fire, was a disaster in the beginning, but we managed to pull through. What's there to be afraid of this time?

C: …嗯，企划书？这玩意你还留着呢？之前给你的只是份副本，不用还给我了。
E: ...My proposal? I'm surprised you still have it. It's just a copy, so you don't have to give it back to me.

C: 你将刚刚发生的事情一五一十地告知波奇。
E: You tell Bocchi what truly happened.

C: 可惜呀，可惜…怪我刚来这梦境都市的时候缺少维权意识，让别人把我的好点子全都偷了去。
E: But what a shame... I blame my lack of awareness of rights when I first came here, letting others steal all my splendid ideas.

C: 让博识学会的庸才全都见鬼去吧！满脑子「方法论」和「产品观」的家伙，根本创造不出有灵魂的发明！
E: To hell with the mediocrity of the Intelligentsia Guild! Those guys who know nothing other than so-called "methodology" and "product ideas" will never create anything with a soul!

C: 同情？遗憾？
E: Sorry? Sympathy?

C: 我愤怒！我不甘！我毅然决定离开，开始寻找我的下一个二十分之一……
E: I was so furious, so devastated! I decided to leave and start looking for my next one-twentieth...

C: 你真是个好人。
E: You're such a good person.

C: 到时候，我就有权力去改变鸢尾花家系了…然后我会从匹诺康尼开始，慢慢改变娱乐行业的状况，让所有人的梦想都有展示的舞台……我会成为偶像们的偶像，被宇宙铭记……
E: When the time comes, I'll have the authority to bring changes to the Iris Family... Then, starting from Penacony, I'll slowly change the entertainment industry and provide a platform for everyone to realize their dreams... I'll be idolized by idols and etch my name in the history of the universe...

C: （大家似乎对拉洛丝的音乐不太满意……）
E: (People don't seem impressed by Larose's music...)

C: 为了让「纯美之歌」继续在银河中传唱，还请您多多支持我的演出。
E: Please support my performances so that the "Song of Beauty" will continue resonating in the cosmos.

C: 一定能大受欢迎！
E: It's destined to succeed!

C: 哦，随便吧…
E: Sure. Whatever...

C: 不过现在，我也该在酒吧关门后找点其他的去处了。
E: I should probably find somewhere else to go after the bar closes.

C: 卢•阿彻咂了咂嘴，先前的悲痛似乎被替换成了一股…渴望。
E: Lew Archer smacks her lips. Her previous grief seems to have turned into some sort of... desire.

C: 我投了那么多钱…那么多钱！结果呢？连本都没回！
E: I invested so much money... So much! But how did it end? I didn't even get my capital back!

C: 每个鸟语花香的天堂都值得珍惜，无论它是虚幻亦或现实。
E: Every gorgeous paradise should be cherished, whether it is imaginary or real.

C: 人总得面对生命中那些破事。
E: We all have to face down bad things in life.

C: 纵使无法阻止战争的发生，但至少能减轻它带来的创伤，让财富发挥它真正的作用。
E: Even if we have no way of stopping war from happening, we can at least mitigate the trauma caused by letting wealth play out its true purpose.

C: 准备分我股份？
E: Are you cutting me in on some company stock?

C: 玩具？——嗐，我这不是想塑造点氛围感嘛。
E: Toys? ... Hey, I'm just trying to create a little atmosphere here, right?

C: 孩子，梦境外的世界哪来你这种邪啊正的，有钱赚、有命花才是唯一的真理。
E: Kid, there's no such thing as right and wrong in the world outside the Dreamscape. Having money, and staying alive so you can spend the money — that's the only truth there is.

C: 你说什么，我没听清。
E: What's that you said? I can't hear you.

C: 就这？太保守了！
E: That's all? Your measures do not go far enough!

C: 我会好好监督这帮黑衣人的。
E: I'll keep a close eye on these people in black.

C: 这里不需要订位的啾，你是要吃饭吗？那我还是不打扰你了，再见啾！
E: Anyway, you don't need a reservation to dine here. I'll stop bothering you if you're here for a meal. Bye, tweet!

C: 干嘛把我拽出来呀，人家正听到故事发展的关键时刻呢！
E: Why did you pull me out? I just got to the good part of the story!

C: …你跳，那我也跳……
E: ...If you jump, I jump.

C: 哇咔咔？你连本天才都不记得啦？那个…我的曾用名是…「芝士流心」！
E: Mwahaha? You forgot about a pure genius, like me? Well then... people used to call me... "Molten Cheese Tart"!

C: 反重力引擎。
E: An anti-grav engine.

C: 到那时候，机兵就不再需要武器了。它们会参与更多劳动，以工人而非战士的身份与我们共存。
E: When that time comes, automatons will no longer need weapons. They will join in with labor and live alongside us as not warriors, but workers.

C: 等你给这座「要塞」补充能量时就笑不出来了。
E: You won't be laughing when you have to charge this "fortress."

C: 必须让他们意识到一钢一瓦来之不易——想不想赚点外快？
E: We need to teach them how difficult it was for these materials to come by. You want to make some cash on the side?

C: 我们会按照公司的《环境保护守则》，把这些废料统一熔化回收，之后可能拿去做点栏杆、路灯什么的。
E: We will burn down and recycle this scrap in accordance with the IPC's "Environmental Protection Code." Then, they will likely be used to make things like railings and streetlamps.

C: 啾~客官想邀请人家共饮啾？
E: Tweet~ Would you like to invite me to drink with you, customer?

C: 难道说——
E: Unless...

C: 里面好闷啊啾…是你救了我吗？
E: It's so stuffy in here, tweet... Are you here to save me?

C: 啾啾…
E: Tweet tweet...

C: 真的假的？
E: Seriously!?

C: 没问题。
E: No problem.

C: 危险分子随时可能出没，需要时刻警惕啾——下次再来找我比试吧！
E: Dangerous elements could appear at any time, so we have to be alert always, tweet. Come challenge me again next time!

C: 美梦小镇不是一个十全十美的地方啾…有时候大风把枝条吹走，或者坏人过来破坏巢穴、抢占大树…
E: Dreamville is not a perfect utopia, tweet... Sometimes, huge gusts of wind will blow the branches away, or baddies will come and destroy our nests and take over the Great Tree...

C: 其实我就是哈努兄弟！
E: Actually, I am Brother Hanu!

C: 你扣动了扳机。什么事都没有发生。
E: You pulled the trigger. Nothing happened.

C: 钟表小子的朋友，谢谢你的热心！但筑巢和做事都要一步一步来啾——
E: Clockie's friend, thank you for your enthusiasm! But it takes time to build the nest and keep on working, tweet.

C: 关于猫头鹰教授…
E: About Professor Owl...

C: 有点难听。
E: It's pretty awful.

C: 那些坏小鸟一定是骗了我们，看看这遍地的荒草，连搭建巢穴的石头都找不到啾。
E: Those bad birdies must've duped us. Just look at this barren wasteland — not even a pebble for nest-building to be found, tweet.

C: 虽然它是只恐龙，经常做坏事，但它还是我的好义弟啾。
E: It may just be a dinosaur that does bad stuff, but it's still my dear sworn brother, tweet.

C: 虽然表情依旧淡定，但她明显是在嘲讽你的幼稚行为。
E: Though her expression is as calm as ever, she is clearly mocking you for your childish actions.

C: 谢谢你，好心人，记得要注意，别被落下来的东西砸到头啾。
E: Thank you, kind soul, do be careful and don't get hit by falling objects, tweet.

C: 我就是美梦小镇最厉害的鸟啾！
E: I'm the best bird in Dreamville, tweet!

C: 那只恐龙真的好可惜…
E: That dinosaur really got the short end of the stick...

C: 啾啾，我飞不高…
E: Tweet tweet, I can't fly too high...

C: 我这就申请返回总部，进行高阶战斗深造...等我回来，我会变得更强！
E: I am going to apply to return to headquarters and undertake high-level combat studies... When I return, I will be even stronger!

C: ...既然你这样薄情，就请别再打扰我了......
E: ...I see you are a fickle person. Please do not disturb me any further...

C: <size=36>唔啊啊啊啊啊啊！</size>
E: <size=36>Waaaaaaah!</size>

C: 尽管科员们暂时撤离了这里，但放任杂草长满实验田也不好。你热心地伸出双手，就地开始拔草。
E: The researchers may have been evacuated from here, but ignoring weeds in the experimental plant nurseries is no good. You enthusiastically reach out both hands to get started on the weeding process.

C: 唉…说到底，这就只是心态的改变。也许这比他抽到吉签要幸运得多。
E: In the end, it's just a change in his attitude towards life. Maybe this result is even better than him getting a "Weal".

C: 反正我钱多，直接转账吧！
E: Anyway, I've got plenty of money, so let's just do a transfer!

C: 呃…很机智！但必须提醒你一件事——如果选择「我预习一下吧。」那个选项，你同样可以用你那超维度的手机把唱本制作成小抄，还不用花费崇高道德的赞许。
E: Er... That's smart! But I have to remind you about one thing: Even if you choose "Rehearse beforehand," you can use your extra-dimensional phone to make a cheatsheet of the libretto, without consuming your Praise of High Morals.

C: 朱唇如血肤如霜。
E: To be known by you, my love, in return.

C: 我怕自己被你打死啊！
E: I was afraid you're going to beat me to death!

C: 这节课先到这里，你好好消化一下本堂课的内容。下节课，咱们实战演练。
E: That's all for today's class, then. Why don't you mull over what we covered today. Next time, we'll do our practical training.

C: 如果要让说书的人下次别再讲别人说过的故事，那他或许会伤心难过、怀疑自己。
E: If you tell storytellers not to tell any stories that someone else has told before, they would feel hurt — or start to doubt themselves.

C: 我原本还准备了<unbreak>900</unbreak>个谜题给你的，但是我有些累了……
E: I had over <unbreak>900</unbreak> puzzles prepared for you, but I'm getting tired...

C: …其实我疲惫了。
E: ...Actually, I'm exhausted.

C: 你真的是正常行驶吗？
E: Were you really just driving normally?

C: 为了这趟旅行，爸爸他几乎花光了所有的积蓄。他年纪大了，我不能再看着他为了这个小家透支自己了。
E: My father spent almost all of his savings on this trip. He's getting old now. I can't just sit and watch him working himself into the ground for the sake of our family.

C: 再来一个就好。
E: Just one more...

C: 好了！取钞机完好如初！
E: Done! The machine is as good as new!

C: 我知道水晶杯该选谁了。
E: I know which wine the crystal chalice should choose now.

C: …多么危险的信号。或许你该离开了…假装自己从没来过。
E: ...That's not a positive sign. Perhaps, it's time for you to go and pretend you have never been there.

C: 红色的葡萄酒瓶躺在地上，瓶身上出现了许多裂痕——它瓶中的液体有一大半已经渗流出来，被染成深色的地砖缝隙勾勒出一片悲惨的事故现场。
E: The bottle of red wine lies on the floor, its body full of cracks. Most of the liquid has flowed out, staining the cracks between the tiles and outlining the scene of a tragic accident.

C: 哦，是您啊……
E: Oh, it's you...

C: 在绿色酒瓶把你也当成威胁之前，你最好还是快点离开这里。
E: You'd better leave the place before the rum sees you as a threat.

C: 哎呀，现在扯那些都没用，赶紧想想怎么离开这里吧。
E: There's no point in dwelling on that now. We need to find a way to get out of here ASAP.

C: 大计已成！
E: Mission complete!

C: 啊！这酒高雅非凡，口感柔顺，像一股暖流涌上心头，真乃绝世罕有。
E: Ah! This wine has an incomparable elegance. Its flavor is smooth, like a warm current that rushes over my heart. Truly, a unique and rare sample!

C: 你这一说那我更咽不下这气了，横竖得过去踹他小子两下。
E: Now you've wound me up again saying that! I should head over there and give him a good kicking!

C: 邀请星核猎手？这可真是个绝妙的主意。
E: Invite a Stellaron Hunter? That's an amazing idea!

C: 阮•梅…
E: Ruan Mei...

C: （大家都回去了…和朋友们偶尔这样聚一聚也不错嘛。）
E: (Everyone has gone back... It's nice to get together with friends like this now and then, isn't it?)

C: 搁这儿卖偶像呢。
E: You sound like you're advertising for an idol.

C: 上次打劫后，我们学习了同行的先进经验，对单次额度进行了一定的上调。
E: After the last robbery, we learned from the experience of our peers n' increased our quota by a set value.

C: 长官，走这边！
E: Right this way, captain!

C: 我一直都是你的粉丝！
E: I've always been your fan!

C: 请容我为您介绍一下——这台放映机与一般的放映机不同。它不是用来放电影的，而是用来播放使用者的「回忆片段」的。
E: Allow me to explain: This device here isn't your average projector. It doesn't play movies. Instead, it displays a segment of the user's memories.

C: 在思忖片刻后，你想起现在正身处匹诺康尼的朋友们…你决定——
E: After giving it some thought, you think of your friends in Penacony. You decide to...

C: 现在我可以带走它了吗？
E: So I can take it with me now?

C: 根据监控显示，他们并没有在骚动发生后离开幽囚狱，如今更是没有机会离开。按道理来说他们应该藏在幽囚狱某处，只是我们还没有找到……
E: According to surveillance, they did not leave The Shackling Prison after the disturbance, and chances of succeeding will be even slimmer now. Practically speaking, they should be hiding somewhere in The Shackling Prison, it's just that we haven't found them...

C: 危险程度，极低。寻找难度，不明。继续这样找下去，只是在浪费幽囚狱人力。
E: Danger level, extremely low. Search difficulty, unknown. We'll just exhaust the prison's manpower if we keep hunting for them like this.

C: 就让我银河球棒侠来会会你。
E: Allow me, the Galactic Baseballer, to face off against you.

C: 是在下小看你了。
E: I have underestimated you.

C: 别让十王司的人知道。
E: Don't let the Ten-Lords Commission find out.

C: 好的剧本都是有艺术共性的，我已经决定叫它「幽囚狱的救赎」了。
E: Good scripts often have high degrees of artistic commonality. I have decided to call this film "The Shackling Prison Redemption."

C: 没了你，谛听也做不了饭。你们俩是一心同体的金人巷大厨。
E: Without you, the Diting can't make food either. Together, the two of you make the great chef of Aurum Alley.

C: 我们还有几天就要离开罗浮了，但还有好多美食没吃到，得加把劲了。
E: We only have a few days left before we have to leave the Luofu, but there's still so much that we haven't eaten. It seems like we will have to pick up our pace.

C: 我不管你灵感是什么，梦境游客想看的还是鬼魂啊！
E: I don't care what ideas you're forming. What the guests of the Dreamscape want to see are actual ghosts!

C: 再解释一下密文和密钥！
E: Can you tell me about the cipher and encryption key again?

C: 首先声明，我不帮人跑腿！
E: Before you start, I don't run errands.

C: 总之还请您务必守住这扇门，如果劫匪想要破门转移，也请帮我拖延一下时间。我去去就回！
E: Anyway, please stay here and keep a close eye on this door. If the kidnapper tries to break the door down or make a move, please try to buy us some time. I'll be right back!

C: 不必，我一人足矣。
E: There is no need. I can handle this alone.

C: 好吧，还真能…说实在的，已经过去两节课了，你早就该学聪明了不是吗？不如看看你邻座的同学吧，说不定又是个可以相谈甚欢的……
E: All right, it really is a challenge... Honestly, two classes have come and gone — you should already have learned how to be smart, right? Why not take a gander at your neighbor instead? You might have another great conversation...

C: 咳、咳咳…咳咳…我的头很难受……
E: *cough* *cough cough* ...My head hurts...

C: 但任凭你重燃多少次，你脚下也不见异动传来，你与烛光面面相觑，只有脚下的大地传来切实感，将你从种种浮想中拉回现实。
E: But no matter how many times you rekindle the candle, you can't find any strange movements beneath your feet. You face the candlelight and feel only the substance of the ground beneath your feet drawing you back from the depths of imagination.

C: 浴场的工作人员或许是工作疏忽，竟没有给你准备高温浴池区的器材使用说明。
E: The workers at the baths might have neglected their duties and didn't offer you any instructions on how to operate the equipment in the hot bath.

C: 这、这关我什么事？我家里还等着用呢，老板你通融下嘛……
E: Wh—What does this have to do with me? I still have people at home who need this. Come on. Just be flexible for once...

C: 这根本不是颜色的问题吧！
E: It's not about color at all!

C: 抵抗酸麻感。
E: Resist the tingling.

C: 来吧！让你考考我。
E: Alright! Let's do this.

C: 本狮毫不怀疑万敌阁下的勇气，嘿嘿，可惜可惜，这不是正确答案。
E: I do not doubt Lord Mydei's courage one bit, hehe. Alas, it is a wrong answer.

C: 试着自己想想。
E: Try thinking about it yourself.

C: 吼吼吼！瞧瞧，是谁又来拜访本狮了？是异乡的勇士啊。
E: Ho-ho-ho! Let's see, who has come to visit my majestic self again? A warrior from outlands!

C: 正是银河球棒侠的武器！打倒过的对手不计其数，但…谁会有办法让球棒站起来？恐怕连那位以欺诈与鬼把戏闻名的{RUBY_B#扎格列斯}神{RUBY_E#}也做不到。
E: It's none other than the Galactic Baseballer's weapon itself! It has beaten down countless opponents, but... who can let a ball bat stand on its own? Even {RUBY_B#Zagreus}the Titan{RUBY_E#} renowned for their cunning and trickery would be hard-pressed to achieve this.

C: 元老院。
E: The Council of Elders.

C: （把手伸进狮子嘴里）
E: (Put your hand into the lion's mouth)

C: 要不问问万敌吧？
E: Why not ask Mydei?

C: 沉重的石料让桥梁的负载大增，造价也让民众苦不堪言，无数谏言都没能唤醒城主的固执愚昧。
E: The heavy stonework greatly increased the bridge's load, while their cost also left the citizens flabbergasted. Countless remonstrations failed to waken the lord from his pigheadedness.

C: 删些视频文件。
E: Delete some video files.

C: …这个是可燃的吗？要是烧不起来的话，呼呼，给我再多也没用！
E: ...Is this flammable? If it doesn't burn, it's useless! *crackle*

C: 呼呼。有的，别担心，小火苗不会骗你，小火苗会在黑夜里守护你。
E: *crackle* Yes, worry not. The dim flame does not lie. The dim flame will protect you at night.

C: 呼呼。我不是害怕高的地方，只是这里风有点大，吹得我的有些头晕。
E: *crackle* I am not afraid of heights, but it is windy here, and I am a little dizzy.

C: 但智慧的考验可不会如此轻松——桶有五吨，问题有三个，现在你要回答第二个。
E: But the test of wisdom won't be so simple: There are three questions in total, and now it's time for the second one.

C: 没错！垃圾是放错了地方的资源。而对于垃圾桶来说，它总是可爱又迷人。
E: Exactly! Trash is a misplaced resource, and it is always endearing and charming in the eyes of trashcans.

C: 如果我是废桶，是垃圾，那我不就成了最有价值的东西了吗？哈哈哈哈！
E: If I'm a piece of trash, wouldn't that make me the most valuable thing? Hahaha!

C: 再看看这里的天空，空旷得要死，一点设计都没有。你有什么好的建议吗？
E: Look at the sky here. It's so plain and has nothing on it. Do you have any suggestions?

C: 你们为什么有俩？
E: Why are there two of you?

C: 我违反了，有事吗？
E: I violated them. Will I be all right?

C: 为了拯救他们，必须要有一位钢铁的君王挺身而出，缔造一个秩序井然的乌托邦。
E: In order to save them, a king of steel must emerge, forging a utopia where order reigns.

C: （…之前写了什么来着？）
E: (...What did I write last time?)

C: 然后是中间…咪发迷想知道怎么做饼干。吃了睡睡了吃，小妖精的生活就是这么简单。
E: Now for the middle part... Mifamem wants to know how to make cookies. Eat, nap, eat again... that's just how fairies live their best lives.

C: 这只小海豹孤独地划着水，仿佛一尾游鱼，甚是自在。
E: This baby seal paddles along all on its own, like a fish in the water, calm and carefree.

C: 这是一只小奇美拉。或许你在哪里见过它。
E: It's a little chimera. Maybe you've run into it somewhere before?

C: 你一伸手，小奇美拉便轻易地躲开了。
E: The moment you reach out, the little chimera dodges with ease.

C: 悄悄告诉你，哀丽秘榭的鱼儿都会读心魔法，除非心甘情愿，不然绝对不会上钩。
E: Wanna know a secret? The fish in Aedes Elysiae can read minds. Unless they're totally willing, they won't bite no matter what.

C: 它总能提醒我，这个世界依然热热闹闹。有许多人在努力地生活。
E: They remind me that the world's still bustling, still full of people doing their best to live.

C: 那么，作为输家的惩罚就是…要是有朝一日人家消失了，你也要相信我会回到你的身边，不可以轻言放弃哦？
E: As a loser, your punishment is... If someday I were to disappear, you have to believe that I'll return to your side, don't give up on that thought easily!

C: 这片麦田可是我们的宝贝，不能随便踩进去哦。会把希望踩坏的。
E: This wheat field is our baby! You can't just stomp on it willy-nilly. You'll stomp all over our hopes.

C: 人家也觉得不可思议。就像做了一场长长的梦，昔涟的记忆、迷迷的记忆，交织在一起…醒来后，只剩下零星片段。
E: It's pretty unbelievable for me too. It's like I had a long, long dream. Cyrene's memories... and Mem's memories... they're all tangled together. But when I woke up... there were only broken fragments left.

C: 汹涌而来的困意包裹了你，就连受塞纳托斯赐福的永眠都不可能有如此地甜美，你…安安稳稳地在木马肚子里睡了个好觉。
E: A torrent of drowsiness washes over you. Not even an eternal sleep gifted by Thanatos could feel this sweet. You... drift into a deep and peaceful slumber inside the belly of the wooden horse.

C: 他们说不准随意改变外观。
E: They've forbidden any changes to the appearance.

C: 柴…火柴……
E: Matches... Fire matches...

C: 它看上去似乎有些累了，今天就玩到这里吧！
E: It seems pretty tired. Let's just stop here for today!

C: 你我之间，无需称呼，我不必向你告知我的姓名。因为…我在你的生命里，只是一个路人。
E: There's no need for names between you and me, and I don't have to tell you mine. Because... I'm just another passerby in the story of your life.

C: 那是当然。
E: Of course.

C: 我需要尽可能快地拿到奇物相关的损伤判定资料，最全面的那种。
E: I need a comprehensive damage evaluation of the Curios as soon as possible.

C: 还希望你可以不要前往那边，以免发生意外。
E: Please don't go there in case it gets dangerous.

C: 今天的湿度还不错，比较适合散步。
E: The humidity is just right today. It's perfect for a walk.

C: 不瞒小友，方才明德正在为奇物收容小队的人手苦恼。
E: Allow me to be frank. I am currently troubled by the lack of human resources available for the Curio Collection Squad.

C: 如何保障非人生物权益？
E: How can you protect the rights and interests of non-human creatures?

C: 我叫卢卡奇，目前是拟态保护协会会长、法政科科员。
E: My name is Lukacs. I am currently the president of the Mimicry Protection Association and a researcher at the Department of Galactic Geopolitics.

C: 只可惜，我还没有正式完成对她的告白。
E: Unfortunately, I haven't officially confessed my love for her.

C: 咳咳，世玲的意思是，你的科员等级过低，目前无法申请奇物作为研究。其他的事，你就少打听啦！
E: Ehem, I mean, your researcher level is too low. You can't apply for a Curio for your research at the moment. Anything else is none of your business!

C: 不对，我好像还有什么事情要做来着……
E: Hold on, I think I've got something to do...

C: 你最近都在忙什么呢。
E: What have you been working on?

C: 那个臭小子，又开始在那里折腾那些破石头，真不知道把自己的前途放到哪儿去！
E: That boy is playing with his stupid rocks again. I have no idea what he wants to do with his future!

C: 而且现如今人力也还算充足。我还有一些老朋友可以为我提供援助。
E: We've got enough people. A few of my old friends are willing to help.

C: 除了工作你都不休息吗？
E: Do you ever have any personal time?

C: …那件事还是别提了。黑塔女士…她做事自有她的主张。
E: ...I don't really want to talk about it. Madam Herta does things her own way. I'll say that much.

C: 噢…答应过你的事我可没忘，但真的很抱歉……
E: Oh, of course I remember that. But I'm afraid you'll have to be more patient...

C: 「萍萍姐」是谁？
E: Who is this Wenfry?

C: 听说空间站就在我们头顶上，不知道空间站的生活会是什么样的呢？真想和萍萍姐一起去看看……
E: I heard the space station is just above us, I wonder what life there is like? I really wanna go take a look with Wenfry...

C: 不用多礼，我只是来随便逛逛。
E: Don't stand on ceremony. I'm just here for a casual visit.

C: 它一直在跟着一段重复的旋律轻声哼唱，但你觉得听多了似乎还挺悦耳的。
E: It has been humming the same tune over and over again, and it starts to grow on you over time.

C: 你一直在等她？
E: Have you been waiting for her?

C: 至少现在，它的眼泪不会再淹没这附近的无辜植物了。
E: At least its tears no longer drown the innocent plants nearby now.

C: 好哦，那我先挂了。
E: Alright. I'm hanging up.

C: 滴…滴…通话已挂断。
E: Beep... beep... The call has ended.

C: （尝试按下通讯I键。）
E: (Press the Communication I button.)

C: 瞧一瞧，看一看，这些盾牌都是千载难逢的稀世珍品，错过可就没有了啊！
E: Have a look, take a gander, these shields are rare treasures hard to come by! Don't miss out! You snooze, you lose!

C: 你这家伙，刚才还高谈阔论的，现在就不吭声了？
E: You, you were just spewing nonsense. What, cat got your tongue now?

C: 我还是不掺和了。
E: I'd better not get involved.

C: 让我再来试试！
E: Let me try again!

C: 洞见真相前，轻举妄动，切勿。
E: Act in haste, do not, before truth you see.

C: 再——来！
E: Agaaain!

C: 你打开箱子往里翻了翻，里面似乎只有一些垃圾。
E: You open the box and rummage around inside. Looks like there is just trash in here.

C: 教师的名头太过响亮，我倒不喜欢。人们总以为能从我这学到些什么，可我能教给他们的，无非是些思考与谈话的技巧。这算得了什么？
E: I find the title of "teacher" overly flashy. I do not enjoy it, personally. People always think that I can teach them something, but all I can teach them are the skills of reflection and debate. Does this really count as anything?

C: 阿卡索斯的帕门弥德，如你所见，是位修辞学方面的教师。
E: Parmenides of Icatus. As you can see, I am a teacher in the study of rhetoric.

C: 谢谢、谢谢…谢谢你们…路上请务必小心，我等你们回来…等你们回来……
E: Thank you, thank you... Thank you... Please be careful out there. Come back safely... I'll be waiting...

C: 哈德斯见事情败露，所以干脆一不做二不休……
E: Hadez realized the game was up, so he decided to just go whole hog...

C: 走，我们回市集，掘地三尺我要找到她。
E: Come, let's go back to the market. I will tear this place apart to find her.

C: 这…恐怕办不到。奥赫玛外面是很危险的。
E: I... don't think you'll be able to. It's really dangerous outside Okhema.

C: 那…之后呢？
E: Oh... Then what?

C: 不过，稳妥起见，我还是希望您能详细地为我描述一下…发现这些遗物的地点…还有具体的情景。
E: To be sure, could you describe in detail the locations where these relics were found and the specific events you witnessed?

C: 可她们每次回来，和我聊起在树庭的生活，说的却净是些乱七八糟的玩意…什么「偷读课外读物的小技巧」啊、什么「如何替人签到赚外快」啊……
E: But every time they came home and told me about life in the Grove, it was nothing but crazy stories... about "secretly reading forbidden books" or "getting paid to fake attendance"...

C: 我是来找你的。
E: I'm here to find you.

C: …那你要吃蒜香还是椒盐的？我帮你叫点餐机器人过来。
E: ... So do you want garlic salt, or salt & pepper? I'll call the robot waiter over.

C: 哎，这事说来话长。
E: Ack, it's a long story.

C: 哼，一码归一码，我说的是科研能力，不是做实验的动手能力。
E: Hmph, that's not the same. I'm talking about their scientific research capacity, not their dexterity in manual operations.

C: 所以我是被大地兽撞了？
E: So I got hit by a dromas?

C: 啊，我的脚步跌跌撞撞，只为奔向你——
E: Ah, my steps stumble and stagger to run towards you—

C: 先就事论事吧。殿下的朋友，自然也是我们的朋友。别失了礼数，让异乡客人以为我们是只懂得作战的莽夫。
E: Let's focus on the matter at hand. A friend of His Highness is naturally our friend as well. Don't lose your manners, or the foreign guest might think we're nothing but brutes who only know how to fight.

C: 要不…再想想？返乡的路途遥远，城外还有游荡的怪物，我担心你们的安全。
E: Maybe... think it over again? The journey home is long, and there are monsters outside the city. I'm worried about your safety.

C: 在黑夜的纷乱中，我杀死了一位瘦削的老妇！
E: In the chaos of the night, I killed a frail old woman!

C: 你想嘛，「我」在戏中不是被命运左右，失去了至亲血肉，对神明感到了失望，对吗？
E: Think about it: In the play, "I" am manipulated by fate, losing my blood relations and loved ones. Disillusioned with the gods, isn't that right?

C: 双方就位，请为自己辩护吧。
E: Both sides are now ready. Present your cases.

C: 神明的职责各不相同，你的罪过与其他泰坦无关。
E: Each deity has its own responsibilities. Your sins don't concern the others.

C: 我不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 可是，大家平常都不容易，如果还要花钱买供奉……
E: But everyone already struggles day to day — now they'd have to spend money on an offering...?

C: 那姑娘总是能碰上好心人…
E: That kid's luck is something else... always meeting kind people.

C: 呵呵，讨打！我们会像掷链球一样把怪物抛进水沟，对不对，{NICKNAME}？
E: Hehe, time for a beating! We'll toss these monsters into the ditch like we're throwing a hammer, right, {NICKNAME}?

C: 恐怕他们只是觉得好玩而已…
E: I think they just did it for the thrill...

C: 商贩汇聚，征战不休的城邦也放下兵戈。
E: The merchants convene, and constantly warring city-states pause their conflicts.

C: 咳，你看着很面生啊！
E: Ahem. You don't look like you're from around here!

C: 嗯…如果我说，我假扮了刻法勒，你信不信？
E: Hm... If I said I impersonated Kephale, would you believe me?

C: 我受过那么多人的照顾，也想照顾照顾比我小的两个小鬼。
E: So many people have looked after me, so I wanted to look after two kids who were even smaller than me too.

C: …总之，贵客，真的拜托你了。
E: ...Anyway, esteemed guest, I'm really counting on you.

C: 你…真的是阿波罗尼？
E: Are you... really Apollonius?

C: 再来一次！
E: One more time!

C: 或许可以找海瑟音？
E: Maybe Hysilens could help with this?

C: 晶紫色液体在空中划出流线，随即收入瓶中——一罐蜜酿悄然封装。
E: Glimmering streaks of purple liquid swirled through the air and flowed into the vessel in waiting, a flask of honey brew now sealed and ready.

C: 陷入僵局了。
E: So we're at a dead end.

C: 也就是说……
E: Are you saying...

C: 粗制蜜酿，就像是各个城邦市场售卖的，需要自己带个小碗去盛的那种便宜货一样——还怪好喝的。
E: Crude honey brew, the kind sold in every city-state marketplace. Cheap enough you have to bring your own bowl to scoop it. Honestly? Kinda tasty.

C: 是呀。之前苦思冥想不得其法，一登上列车，想法就接二连三地冒出来，灵感真是折磨人的小妖怪。
E: Sure do! Y'know, I was racking my brains before I boarded the Express, but now I've got more ideas than I know what to do with. Inspiration is a fickle mistress.

C: 好歹还能用。
E: It's aged well.

C: 以前列车停靠在空间站月台的时候，我来拜访过不少次。
E: Y'know, whenever the Express stops at the station platform, I make a point of getting a few visits in.

C: 不介意的话，我会经常过来坐坐。
E: I'll come and have a seat here more often, if you don't mind.

C: …啊，是{NICKNAME}呀。不好意思，我看那舷窗外的风景有些出神，没能注意到你。
E: Oh, it's you, {NICKNAME}. Sorry, I was lost in the view — I didn't realize you were here.

C: 瓦赫他…生前总是执着于借医学突破血肉之躯的极限，最后不得已含恨而终……
E: Vache spent his life looking for ways to push past the limits of the human body... but he met a bitter end.

C: 我很期待与你们同行。我想看看别的星球、别的文明是如何战胜疾病的，我们贝洛伯格又是否可以效仿。
E: I'm looking forward to the day I can join the crew. I'd like to see how other civilizations fight diseases and what Belobog could learn.

C: 唔…目、目前只有虎克一个人！
E: Well... A—At the moment, it's just you and me.

C: 嘿，荣誉队员！快看，三月七姐姐给了我一个趴趴玩偶，和你长得好像哦！
E: Look, honorary member! March 7th gave me a doll. It looks just like you!

C: 克拉拉在想…要是给史瓦罗先生安装一副翅膀的话，是不是也可以像故事里一样，飞到宇宙里了呢？
E: I'm thinking... If I put a pair of wings on Mr. Svarog, would he be able to fly around the universe like in the movies?

C: 你们从哪弄来的好宝贝？
E: I'd love to know where you picked this thing up.

C: 没关系，我可以陪你。
E: No problem, it'd be nice to hang out.

C: 咦？那看来你还不知道他的另一面……
E: Oh? Seems you haven't seen his other side...

C: 哎…最近手头清闲了些，就想着也该写新歌了。结果我思来想去，始终没个能用的灵感……
E: *sigh* I've had a lot of free time recently, so I was thinking about writing some new songs. Sadly, that's about as far as I got...

C: 嗯…最令我震惊的果然还是「星神」了。
E: Well, the part that shocked me the most was about the Aeons.

C: 购入什么新设备？
E: Security equipment...?

C: 没想到在参观列车的时候还能帮上大家的忙……
E: Who'd have thought I'd get ideas for office furniture while sightseeing on the Express...

C: 那我也爱莫能助了。
E: Well, in that case there is little I can do.

C: 真希望有机会能去空间站看看啊。
E: I really hope I get the chance to look around the space station.

C: 她伸手戳了戳你的腹部，手指径直消失在了衣服表面。
E: She poked your stomach. The part of her finger that touched your clothes disappeared.

C: 离开朋克洛德前，我也曾梦想过当个无名客——乘着列车离开星球，等待着我的将是新手村外广阔无垠的冒险。
E: Before I left Punklorde, I also dreamed of joining the Nameless and hopping on the Express to travel between worlds — beyond the village of newbies back home, a vast and endless adventure awaited me.

C: 其实列车上有。
E: We have our own stocks.

C: 有姬子的咖啡。
E: We've got Himeko's coffee.

C: 来，给你拿着～
E: Here, take these~

C: 所以，我更要坚定自我的职责——成为她们的引路明灯！
E: Therefore, I need to remain steadfast in my duty, and become their guiding light!

C: 不过最近，我在打扫后院时，在朔雪以前住的兽栏中翻出了这些漂亮的石头…想来是朔雪当年藏在那里的吧？
E: Still, when I was clearing out the rear courtyard recently, I found these beautiful stones buried in the pen where Snowmoon used to live... I guess Snowmoon must've buried them there.

C: 啊呀，你来了呀？
E: Aha, it's you!

C: 诶，还好还好啦。托你的福，进度还行啦。
E: It goes, it goes. It's going alright. Thanks for asking.

C: 我有一些问题想要问你…
E: I've got something to ask you.

C: 既然你知道这事，就别跟我搭话了，我得休息会儿……
E: If you knew this, then just leave me alone. I need to rest...

C: 先前向丹恒请教了许多知识……
E: I learned a lot from Dan Heng...

C: 没想到，贝洛伯格以外的天地居然这么广阔……
E: I never thought the world beyond Belobog could be so huge...

C: 没有…
E: No...

C: 能跟这么有趣的人一起旅行，真是让人羡慕！
E: I'm jealous that you get to travel with such interesting people!

C: 游云天君的传说……
E: Tales about the Cloudstrider...

C: 杰奇，能听见吗？帮我打电话给理事长……
E: Jackie, can you hear me? I need you to call the chairman for me...

C: 别有负担，这都是最寻常的礼节，算不上卖人情。公司也不是人人都那么功利啦~
E: That's what friends are for — don't be a stranger. Not everyone in the IPC is driven by pure ambition, y'know⁓

C: …好吧，那我再做做心理准备。
E: *sigh* Alright then, give me a moment to mentally prepare myself.

C: 不知道在过去的这<unbreak>700</unbreak>年里，「存护」克里珀有没有看过我们一眼呢……
E: I wonder if Qlipoth, the Preservation, has ever glanced at us in the past <unbreak>700</unbreak> years — even for a second.

C: 帕姆，到底是……
E: What exactly is Pom-Pom...

C: 它好软，好——咳咳，没什么，你别介意……
E: Pom-Pom's so soft, and fluffy, and... Ahem! What were you saying?

C: 谢谢你，我好像有所收获……
E: Thank you, things are a little clearer now...

C: 能考虑到岁阳的口味，准备好相位灵火的烧灰作为茶点，你们的列车长还算有些经验。
E: The fact that your conductor knew to cater to the heliobus' tastes with Phase Flame ash says a lot about their experience.

C: 希望你拿着转运道具能有好运。
E: May these charms bring you good luck.

C: 可以制作干花。
E: Why not produce some dried flowers?

C: 仔细想想，你的自我是否也是如此。
E: Upon reflection, does this also apply to you?

C: 看到列车上有客房车厢，星穹列车也会像白日梦酒店一样迎接很多客人吗？
E: Oh, hey! I noticed there are Passenger Cabins on the Express. Does the Express welcome many guests, too, like The Reverie?

C: {NICKNAME}，列车上有螺丝吗？最普通的那种就行。
E: {NICKNAME}, are there any screws on the Express? The most common ones will do.

C: 玩偶…会说话……
E: The doll... can speak...

C: 这只像小兔子一样的玩偶…会说话……
E: This doll that looks like a rabbit... can speak...

C: 虽然做了很多「相互保证毁灭」按钮，但也不是见到什么都想炸上天的~
E: Although I've made quite a few "Mutually Assured Destruction" Buttons, it's not like I'm going to blow up everything I see...

C: 是对列车的祝福？
E: Would that be a blessing for the Express?

C: 纯美骑士团中的一名单臂骑士，为追寻「纯美」道途而陨落。
E: A one-armed knight from the Knights of Beauty passed away in his pursuit of Beauty.

C: 你你你你在跟谁说话！
E: Wh—Who are you talking to?

C: 能媲美帕姆帕姆派的巨无霸谢礼…「巨无霸烟熏枣糕」，就是你啦！
E: A gift comparable to Pom-Pom Pie... Giant Smoked Jujube Cake it is then!

C: 看来也如过去相识之人所说，我有些经商的天赋呢。
E: It seems like I do have some natural talent in business, just like my past acquaintances said.

C: 听说你找我有事…
E: I heard you have something to tell me...

C: 有个叫莉拉的动物学家，学识渊博，了解很多新奇的东西，和我应该很谈得来。请你帮我问问，她愿不愿意和我做朋友？
E: There's an erudite zoologist named Lila who understands all manner of novel things. I think we would get along splendidly. Would you mind asking on my behalf whether she's willing to be my friend?

C: 不是。
E: No.

C: 华劳斯想和你做朋友。
E: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

C: 在克里珀堡二楼<unbreak>236</unbreak>号柜台填写申请表格。然后去克里珀堡三楼<unbreak>35</unbreak>号窗口找工作人员确认盖章。
E: Please fill out a form at counter <unbreak>236</unbreak> on the second floor of Qlipoth Fort. Then have a staff member stamp it at window <unbreak>35</unbreak> on the third floor.

C: 关于美食…
E: About food...

C: 不过如果你是外地人…那倒是可以试试夕红鱼。
E: But if you are not from around here, Redsunset Salmon might be worth trying.

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all questions I have.

C: 可靠渠道告诉我，下一任大守护者布洛妮娅大人是个温和中立派，所以有超过七成的概率会支持开发新城区的战略，而我是行政区唯一的地产中介……
E: I've learned from reliable sources that the next Supreme Guardian Lady Bronya is a moderate centrist. There's a seventy percent chance that she will be in favor of developing new districts. Combine that with the fact that I am the only property agent in the Administrative District...

C: 你说的这些我没读过。
E: I haven't read either.

C: …如果我能争取到投资的话。
E: ...If I can get the funding I need.

C: …啊！不好意思，我完全沉浸在乡愁之中了。我记得你，好心人。你怎么来了？
E: Oh, don't mind me. I was completely lost in that sense of belonging. I remember you, friend. What brings you here?

C: 我沿用了《雪国冒险奇谭》系列的角色，但讲的故事不一样。这是一部…呃…外传，讲的是达米尔和阿尔乔姆在「熔岩之国」探险的故事——
E: I used the characters from the Tale of the Winterlands series, but it's a different story. It's a kind of... spin-off novel that depicts Dalmir and Artem's adventure in the Lava Kingdom.

C: 其他的……
E: Other ones, please...

C: 我的话…就还挺好的？花店最近稍微忙了些，留给我看书的时间没以前多，让我有点头疼。
E: I guess... I've been doing alright? The florist has been a bit busier these days, so I haven't had as much time to read as before. It's been a headache.

C: 「大守护者布洛妮娅将于近日筹建壁外调查团队，是为历时七百余年首次踏入雪原」——
E: "Supreme Guardian Bronya to organize survey team for exploration beyond the walls: First explorers on the Snow Plains in <unbreak>700</unbreak> years."

C: 什么大案子？
E: What's this case you're talking about?

C: 祝你成功。
E: Here's to your success.

C: 你知道上面的事？
E: You know about up there?

C: 那当然！大守护者高瞻远瞩，人家哪样不比我们普通人强。可惜啊，之前镇子上还有些人一直在诋毁大守护者——
E: Of course, it is! The Supreme Guardian is far-sighted, and more powerful than us commoners in every way. It's a pity then that some villagers have taken to slandering the name of the Supreme Guardian...

C: 没看见我在忙吗？有话快说，没事别烦我……
E: Can't you see I'm busy? Spit it out and stop bothering me...

C: 嗯？你想问什么？商业机密的话免谈！门儿都没有！
E: Hmm? What do you want to know? If you want to know my business secrets, then I'll have to tell you to go away.

C: 偷偷告诉你哦，有些时候，还会有小朋友为了送人家礼物吵架，甚至打起来…
E: You know what? Sometimes kids even fight over giving me gifts...

C: 等会儿，我睡觉流口水了吗？你怎么用这种眼神看着我…还是说你有什么事想问我？
E: Wait a minute. Why are you looking at me like that...? Was I drooling in my sleep or do you have something to ask me?

C: 「魔法」？怎么可能，那种东西根本不存在的啦。我的伪装靠的都是纯纯的手艺跟技术！
E: Magic? No. Magic doesn't exist. My disguise is based on pure craftsmanship and skill!

C: 话说回来…当时好像都没问姐姐叫什么名字呢。
E: ...I didn't even ask her name.

C: 有几道甜品，整个行政区里就我们家能做得出来，在外面你压根吃不到。每到节假日，就有不少年轻人特意过来，人多的时候还要排队呢。
E: There are a few desserts that only we can make. You can't eat them anywhere else in the Administrative District. Many young people visit us during holidays. Sometimes people have to line up.

C: 欸！矿坑里挖出了大活人？我可没听说有这种事啊…你不介意让我贴近点看看吧？
E: What? Living humans from the mine? I've never heard of that... Do you mind if I take a closer look?

C: 或许有那么一天…人们也能坦然地接受那个真相。
E: Perhaps, one day... people will also be able to calmly accept "that truth."

C: 但…只要娜塔觉得「地火」还有存在的必要，那我就不会摘掉这条红绸带。
E: But... if Nat thinks there's still a need for Wildfire, then who am I to disagree?

C: 但现在不一样了——多亏了你和老弟的支持，我终于下定决心改变自己了。
E: But everything's different now — thanks to you and my bro's support, I've finally made the decision to make myself better.

C: 听说你也玩摇滚？
E: I heard you also do a bit of rock and roll?

C: 那能请你别悄无声息地站在人身后，然后又冷不丁吓人一跳吗？
E: Could you not stand behind people so quietly like that? It's kinda creepy!

C: 腐败铁卫的事情处理得如何？
E: How's the matter regarding the corrupt guards?

C: 唔…当然可以。{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}想聊什么呢？
E: Oh... of course, {F#Miss}{M#Sir}. What do you wish to talk about?

C: 怎、这怎么行呢…！这样的话，小家伙也太可怜了……
E: Th—That won't do...! That poor little fella...

C: 科学考察基地「炉心」由地髓开拓团初代团长阿尔纳•萨科努塞姆牵头建立，并在第四任团长克列诺娃的指导下结束了其历史使命。
E: The science expedition base, the Furnace Core, was built by the Geomarrow Development Group's first Head, Aierna Sakonusm. After which, under instructions from the fourth Head Klenova, it was shut down.
Uhh...

C: 现在的加入条件是…没有跟老巫婆和希儿姐姐告过状，外加十包雪地跳跳糖！
E: The rules for joining now are... You've never tattled to the old witch and Seele, plus ten bags of snow-white popping candy!
...Yeah.

C: 伊妮丝的…呃…「表演」，结束了。
E: Eunice's err... "performance" ends.

C: 用激动人心的演说，释放封存已久的喜乐
E: Revolutionizing a new world that's super dope

C: 这台机器这么巨大…而且构造这么复杂…就算大家拼了命地干，也不是一天两天就能把它修好的。
E: As you see, this machine is massive... and its composition is complicated... Even with our best efforts, there's no way we can fix it in just a day or two.

C: 再见，记得留心那些黑衣人。
E: See you next time. And watch out for those shady guys in black.

C: 要说原因…除了这游戏本身足够有趣，又能保证长期更新，我想更多还是因为情怀加成……
E: As for why... I think the game itself is fascinating and has consistent updates, but more importantly, it holds sentimental value and that's what makes it special to me...

C: 猪猪乖~
E: Good piggy~

C: 讲个职场笑话。
E: Tell a joke about work.

C: …那铁球呢？钢球呢？锇合金球呢？
E: ...What about iron balls? Or steel balls? Or osmium alloy balls?

C: 咳…咳咳……
E: Cough... Cough cough!

C: …咕！咕呜！
E: ...Groo! Groohoo!

C: 说来听听？
E: Like what?

C: 品质配方，全新升级！
E: Our new, upgraded quality formula!

C: 爸爸，我和他是真心相爱的……
E: Daddy, I really love him...

C: 您需要帮助吗？
E: Do you need a hand?

C: 不可能吧？
E: No way?

C: 好了，妈，咱们走吧。
E: Alright, mom. Let's go.

C: 那个蓝头发的，居然还做这种生意吗……
E: Can't believe that blue-haired guy is doing this line of work...

C: 哼，我就知道……
E: Hmph, I knew it...

C: 再讲一个，再讲一个！
E: Another, another!

C: 二十八、二十九……
E: Twenty-eight, twenty-nine...

C: 什么时候有空呢……
E: When would she have time...

C: 结果，正如你所能想到的——我四处屡屡碰壁，活成了小说里艺术家该有的样子…怀才不遇、穷困潦倒，连自己的温饱都解决不了，更别提梦想了。
E: Well, you can guess the rest... Everywhere I go, I faced rejection. I became the stereotypical image of an artist... No opportunities, poor, starving, all of those. I could barely handle basic necessities like food and shelter, let alone my dreams.

C: 呵呵，慢走。祝你享受这趟历史文化之旅。
E: Hehe, take care now. I hope you enjoy this historical cultural tour.

C: 这里的藏书远不如学院…
E: This place doesn't have as many books as the academy...

C: 仙舟人喜新厌旧？
E: Do the Xianzhou people only like new things?

C: 关于最近的畅销书…
E: About recent bestsellers...

C: 哎…说了半天，你是有什么事吗？
E: *sigh* ...Anyways, do you need anything?

C: 没别的事了。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 是的。
E: Yes.

C: 结果我还没来得及做什么坏事呢，那艘兽舰就被击落了…醒来的时候，我已经成了幽囚狱里的战犯，这一关就是几百年。
E: Before I could do anything bad, the beast ship was shot down. By the time I woke up, I was already a war criminal in The Shackling Prison. It's been hundreds of years since then.

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}你这话就说得不对了，至少净砚执事是在好好做事的。只要净砚执事还在这里一天，这里就还是名副其实的地衡司。
E: {F#Young lady}{M#Young man}, that remark is uncalled for. At least Officer Jingyan is doing her work. As long as Officer Jingyan is here, then the Realm-Keeping Commission lives up to its name.

C: 您答对了，很多仙舟人自己根本就没有意识到健身拳法的重要性。
E: That's right. Many Xianzhou people don't even realize the importance of boxing exercises.

C: 长此以往，我再出摊还有什么意思？可假使我不出摊，那便是彻底与他断了联系，恐怕此生再没有相见的机会……
E: If things keep on like this, what's the point of me showing up to work again? But then again, if I don't show up, I'll be cut off from him entirely and I'm afraid I'll never get the chance to see him again...

C: 没想到，这一交手便是两百年！我们捉对厮杀至今，斗得难舍难分。可我们两人都乐在其中——我们都明白，自己与对方产生了灵魂的共鸣！
E: I never thought this game would last for <unbreak>200</unbreak> years! We've been going at it the whole time, but we both enjoyed it — we both knew that we had a special connection with each other!

C: 广大啊广大，我何时才能与你再度交手呢……
E: Guangda, o Guangda... When will we be able to duke it out once again...

C: 使用「冥想遗忘治疗仪」，可以遗忘掉那些多余的负面情绪，让自己的精神摆脱负担，以达到延年益寿的目的。
E: With this amnesic meditation therapy device, you can forget all of those excess negative emotions and liberate your soul from all of these burdens. You, too, can achieve the goal of living out a long life.

C: 那最简单的法子嘛，莫过于给自己树立个与众不同的形象——您想想啊，还有比罗浮将军亲戚更唬人的名头吗？反正我是想不出来。
E: And the easiest way to do that is to create a different brand for yourself — think about it: Is there anyone that could possibly be more intimidating than the family member of the Luofu's greatest general? Well, that's what I came up with in any case.

C: 卑职是神策府与景元将军的侍卫总长。久仰大名，今日幸会！
E: I've been humbly appointed as chief guard for the Seat of Divine Foresight and General Jing Yuan, and I've heard much about your pursuits. Pleasure to make your acquaintance!

C: 你们继续，我先走了。
E: You guys go on, then. I better get out of your hair.

C: 灾难过后你们还忙吗？
E: The disaster is over, are you guys still busy?

C: 您若是实在对这案牍库有所好奇…不妨直接问我吧！我在案牍库干了几百年，只要是不那么涉密的内容，我都能满足您的好奇心。
E: If you're really curious about the document office... Then why don't you just ask me! I've worked here for centuries. As long as the information isn't classified, I'll be able to satisfy your curiosity.

C: 老夫号称「镕金铄铁第一巧手」，这名号可不是自己吹出来的。那日常的工作，自然就是镕金铄铁。
E: They call me "the Smelter Extraordinaire," but I didn't come up with that nickname. As for our day-to-day work, we forge metals here.

C: 而设计和迭代这些「极繁主义」的外观，可能已经耗费了老夫数百年的时光。
E: Designing and iterating all of these different maximalist looks has already taken up hundreds of years of my life.

C: 三人行必有一人偷懒。只要我抢先偷懒，他们两个就没有机会偷懒了。
E: There's a saying. "Of three people, one will be a slacker." If I call dibs on slacking off, then the other two can't.

C: 地衡司是仙舟罗浮的庶务管理机构，也是罗浮老百姓接触机会最多的机构。为了方便管理、服务于民，不同地区都有各自的地衡司公廨。
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission is the general affairs organization of the Xianzhou Luofu, and also the institution that engages with the public of Luofu most often. Every zone has its own Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery to keep up with the needs of citizens.

C: 想问你点事。
E: I'd like to ask you something.

C: 好说。我这里囤积的过期货物可不少呢～希望您这次运气不错。
E: Not a problem. I've got loads of abandoned goods here~ Hope you strike it lucky this time.

C: 我还有事，先走了。
E: I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.

C: 我看你什么都不懂，只知道在这里瞎凑热闹。
E: You don't understand anything, do you? You just came here to rubberneck.

C: 要是按照我们「埃伊加文明」家乡的习惯，我本应该向她发起「决斗」，用拳头来彰显自身尊严。可惜这里是仙舟，你懂的，讲文明讲礼貌不能动拳脚……
E: If we followed the Aigaian Customs of my homeworld, I would have challenged her to a "duel" and fought for dignity with my fists. A shame we're on the Xianzhou. Know what I'm saying? All uppity and civilized, can't get into a scrap here...

C: 我们现在「决斗」的传统，就是来自普朗克可汗。他觉得人类的尊严就应该在一个人与另一个人公平的「决斗」中彰显。
E: Our modern tradition of "dueling" comes from Planck Khan. He felt that human dignity should be demonstrated via a fair "duel" between two individuals.

C: 您请问吧。
E: Ask away.

C: 那当然，平时流云渡的货运量大，竞争也大，要讨口饭吃可没这么容易。
E: Sure is. Cloudford is a high traffic port but it's very competitive, so it's tough to make a living here.

C: 我刚来这边例行检修穷观阵的时候，某位卜官一会儿问我「认不认识明阅」，一会儿又问我「你和绘星大人是什么关系」。
E: When I first came here for a routine inspection on the Matrix of Prescience, a managing diviner here asked me, "Do you know Mingyue?" Then asked me again, "What is your relationship with Huixing?"!

C: 我正好路过，想跟你聊聊…
E: I was just passing by and wanted to stop in for a chat with you...

C: 还是不打扰你了。
E: I'd better leave you to it.

C: 附近还有药王秘传残党？
E: Are there still remnants of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus nearby?

C: 做我们这行的——客人要是想买药，来之前心里多半就计划好要买什么，强行推销只会惹人烦，还是清净点好。
E: In our line of work, a patient who needs medicine will have already planned out what they need to buy. People find a hard sell annoying, so some peace and quiet is probably better.

C: 能给我推荐点必备良药吗？
E: Can you recommend some good essential medicines for me?

C: 还是不打扰你了。
E: I'd better leave you to it.

C: 强求那些富贵做什么，出来贩药，迟早要还的…我只想做个普通的…哎……
E: Pursuing greed in medicine will eventually come back to bite you, sooner or later... I just want to live out an ordinary life... *Sigh*...

C: 你好像在一直盯着外面看？
E: Why do you always seem to be peering outside?

C: 鳞渊境便是其一，其中承载的古海之水，与罗浮持明的血脉紧密相连。无论是龙师长老、或是持明黎庶，都会在寿尽之日，踏入海中化为持明卵蜕生。
E: One of which is Scalegorge Waterscape, and the waters of the ancient sea it sustains are intimately connected to the blood of the Vidyadhara aboard the Luofu. Be they the Preceptors or the regular Vidyadhara folk, all will step into the waters at their end to be transformed into Vidyadhara eggs and undergo their hatching rebirth.

C: 你现在明白它在我们心目中的地位了？
E: Do you understand now the significant of this place in our hearts?

C: 因而在仙舟「方壶」，护珠人基本上代替了云骑的岗位，是那里的精锐部队。
E: That's why the Pearlkeepers aboard the Xianzhou Fanghu formed an elite force that have basically replaced the role of Cloud Knights there.

C: 然后我就看到三人正在围攻一个落单的云骑，那三个叛匪竟然都是我的同族，只是外形生就了令人憎恶的变异……
E: Then I saw three Sanctus Medicus devils surrounding a lone Cloud Knight. The three disciples were fellows of my own race, but had somehow been mutated into horrific forms...

C: 结果几个月前联系不上了…等我到了罗浮，去她家问她的下落，她家人也说，这孩子下落不明了。
E: I lost contact with her a few months ago... It was only when I was back at the Luofu and visited her home when her family told me that she had gone missing.

C: 丹枢大人她真是…世事难料啊……
E: About Lady Dan Shu... Life truly is unpredictable...

C: 那你要聊什么呢？若是和卜算一道有关，我自然是欢迎的，闲聊的话还是免了。
E: What do you want to talk about? If it's about divination, I'd be happy to have the conversation. Count me out if you just want to chitchat.

C: 说得好听，不就是对第一次占卜结果产生了怀疑了吗？
E: It's just a nice way to put it. Doesn't it show that they have doubts about the first result?

C: 太卜司的职场环境好像有点…
E: The Divination Commission as a workplace is so...

C: 慢走啊，希望日后有机会与您合作。
E: Take your time. I hope we'll get to work together in the future.

C: 生意做久了，总能遇上些不怕死的家伙。
E: When you've been in the business as long as me, you'll eventually run across daredevils who do not fear death.

C: 你放生过什么东西？
E: What have you released so far?

C: 我想问…
E: I'd like to ask...

C: 怎么说呢，来这里的都是本地人为多，我看他们几家店的老板伙计好像都互相认识。除了游客没星槎海多，乍一眼看好像没什么特别的。
E: Well, how should I put it... Aurum Alley is frequented by locals. I swear some store owners and staff even know each other. Sure, it doesn't have as many tourists as Starskiff Haven, and looks pretty ordinary at first glance.

C: 对，这里就是陈机铺，是我从师父那里继承来的门店。这些年他临近蜕生，便将这些差事一五一十全部交付于我，现在我是这里的店主。
E: Yes. This is Oldies Depot, the store I inherited from my master. He entrusted this business to me when he was about to undergo hatching rebirth a few years ago, and now I'm the owner of this store.

C: 哼～下次搞不好我都逃出幽囚狱了～
E: Hmph! Maybe I'll have escaped by then~

C: 谢谢光临！
E: Thank you for stopping by!

C: 那是越来越顺了啊！金人巷的游客越来越多，我们家地道的罗浮小吃，现在可是卖得越来越好了啊！
E: My business is booming! More and more tourists are flocking the Aurum Alley, and our authentic Luofu snacks are selling like hotcakes!

C: 我不打扰了，请继续演奏。
E: I won't bother you any further. Keep on playing.

C: 说实话，我现在反倒是有些羡慕老师了…像我这种庸才，这辈子或许都只能远远地望着「智识」的大门却无法靠近半步……
E: To be honest, his fate is enviable to me... Will a mediocrity like me ever achieve anything as he did? Maybe I won't even have a chance to approach the threshold of "Erudition" in my life...

C: 没别的事了。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 此象得主是好多管闲事，易卷入纷争之中。对于你所问之事——此事毫无转圜余地，破镜难圆，你注定要见证这分离与破碎之景。需知大难临头各自飞是人之常情，勿要沉溺于往事之中。
E: The bearer of this sign is a busybody who always gets themselves into strife. As for the question in your mind — there is no turning back, and separation is inevitable. Please understand that it is common for people to abandon others just to find a way to keep themselves alive in the face of disaster. Don't dwell too much on your past.

C: 他这倔强不听劝的脾气，想来是耳朵被咬的后遗症了。
E: That boy's stubborn refusal to take advice is probably a result of his ears getting bitten.

C: 我该走了。
E: I've got to go.

C: {NICKNAME}，一早便算到你要来了。从卦象上看，你不过想找本座通疑解惑。
E: {NICKNAME}, I already foresaw your visit. From the hexagram, you have some questions for me.

C: 穷观阵还能算到这些？
E: Did you derive that from the Matrix of Prescience?

C: 「多见者博，多闻者智，拒谏者塞，专己者孤」，多读书、多思考、多观察世间万物，学养自然会积少成多。
E: "Seeing Is Learning, Reading Is Growing. Isolation Is Desolation, Self-Full Is Self-Dull." Read more, think more, and observe more, and you'll naturally become knowledgeable along the way.

C: 毕竟太卜大人只消发条消息，我就得即刻动身…实在是不敢随便上牌桌。
E: After all, I've got to go at the drop of the hat as soon as the master diviner sends me a message... I can't take the risk to actually play.

C: 推测：因为「我们」的发展独立于银河，所以「我们」未能及时察觉自己的载体已经大幅落后。补充：量子矩阵计算机。
E: Conjecture: As our evolution is independent of the cosmos, we neglected to notice that we, as a repository, have become grossly obsolete. Addendum: We are a quantum matrix computer.

C: 不聊了，拜拜。
E: That's it for today. Bye.

C: 你这么说确实没错。如果我现在离开这里，肯定没人能顾得上我。
E: I do. But if I go now, I'm sure no one will be able to figure out where I went.

C: 不打扰你了。
E: I won't bother you.

C: 我是站岗的啊！不然呢！…呃，具体来说，我是十王司的武弁。
E: I'm a guard, of course! ...Uh, specifically, I'm a warden in the Ten-Lords Commission.

C: 至于武弁是什么职位…你简单理解成十王麾下的云骑好了。
E: As for what a warden is... Just think of it as a Cloud Knight under the Ten Lords.

C: 那我们聊聊天吧。
E: Then let's have a chat.

C: 我饮下忘川酒，以梦占之术参详仙舟人因缘业报湍流，推占魔阴出现的时机；而姐姐则换得了不坏的偃偶身，勾摄邪魔。
E: I drank the wine of oblivion, using oneiromancy to understand Xianzhou people's flow of karma and calculate mara's next appearance. On the other hand, my sister was given an indestructible puppet body to capture evils.

C: 唉…是啊。跟您说个规律：每次罗浮遇到什么危机，最受影响的就是我们高端消费品。
E: Indeed... Let me tell you a pattern: Every time a crisis takes place on the Luofu, it's the high-end consumer goods like us that always bear the brunt.

C: 看来亲亲已经有决定了，那我就长话短说。如果亲亲是第一次买玉兆，或者说只是想换新，体验最前端的玉兆科技，那么买「瑞兆<unbreak>15</unbreak>」准没有问题。
E: It looks like you've already made a decision, babe, so let me keep it short: If you're buying your first jade abacus or upgrading to a new one to experience the latest in cutting-edge tech, then the Auspicious XV is a great choice.

C: 哈哈哈，现在最时尚的店主都是做视频的，只有那些老古董店主还心存侥幸，盼着顾客路过…
E: Haha, all the hottest shopkeepers are making videos these days. Only old antique dealers leave things up to luck, desperate for passers-by to notice them...

C: 仙舟是不允许长生种的永久迁徙舟外的，好像是生态灾难之类的说法，我也不懂…所以，想要出门远行，就必须找到一份可以合法外驻的工作。
E: Xianzhou prohibits long-life species from dwelling beyond the ship. Something about ecological disasters, I'm not too sure either... So if you want to embark on a voyage, you need to find interstellar work.

C: 轨道迫降，这种事情应该没人想来第二次。落地时我几乎四分五裂，如果是短生种，当场丧命那是确定无疑了…仙舟人的身体还真是强韧。
E: I had to force a landing from the orbit, an experience I bet no one would ever wish to have twice. I was almost smashed to bits when I landed. If I were a short-life species, I'd definitely have been killed on the spot... Good thing us Xianzhou physiques are quite tough.

C: 你好像很喜欢仙舟文化。
E: You must be quite a fan of the Xianzhou culture.

C: 神仙姐姐就是…就是那个特别特别神、特别特别仙的大姐姐。
E: She is... a lady who is both heavenly and celestial.

C: 当天晚上，有两个金甲门神突然出现在县衙前，轰隆隆转眼就把监狱给整个拆掉了！那些卫兵看到这一幕，根本不敢上前阻拦！
E: And that very night, two golden-armored door guardians suddenly appeared in front of the magistrate's court, and tore apart the entire jail! The guards who saw this were too scared to do anything!

C: 您好，鹤运速递为您服务，请问您预约了寄件吗？
E: Heron Express, at your service! Have you made a delivery booking with us?

C: 我是鹤运物流专员，梓桥。
E: I'm Ziqiao, a logistics specialist from Heron Express.

C: 您如果有要寄送的货品，请提前在智能终端上打开鹤运物流的应用，输入寄件信息。上门收件的话等物流机巧鸟通知，出门寄件的话就带着货品来这里。
E: If you've got a delivery to send, please enter your shipping info via our Heron Express app. If you're waiting to receive a delivery, please wait for our courier cycranes' notification. If you'd like to send a delivery, please bring it to our office.

C: 话又说回来，我其实还在工作呢。您要是没什么想要寄的，就记得咱们鹤运物流的服务啊。我们的口号是「鹤运速递，啥都能寄」。
E: But then again, I'm still on the clock right now. If you don't have anything to send right now, keep Heron Express in mind for next time. Our slogan is: Heron Express — We Mail Anything.

C: 测速员平时都做些什么？
E: What do speed testers usually do?

C: 没什么事了…
E: I have nothing else...

C: 不过，这也不算是什么不为人知的秘密。你知道这建木是有多引人注目吗？在「罗浮」仙舟上，任何人找一个高处便能清晰地望见它。
E: Then again, this isn't some clandestine secret. Do you realize how much of an eyecatcher the Ambrosial Arbor is? Anyone can find high ground on the Xianzhou Luofu and see it clear as day.

C: 你拿着别人的笔记本？
E: You took someone else's notebook?

C: 这是凌解记在笔记上的内容，看得出来她真的很喜欢持明时调。
E: That's what Ling Jie wrote down for me in her notebook. I can tell that she really loved these Vidyadhara elegies.

C: 但是我可以告诉你一个我的工作准则：准时下班。该做的工作都高效率地完成，然后到了下班时间后，我的努力就到此为止。
E: But I'll tell you a principle I stick to at work: Leaving work on time. Work with maximum efficiency while at work, but the moment I punch out, I turn work mode off.

C: 小朋友，你在干什么呢？这是你该动的东西吗？
E: Little one, what are you doing here? Is this something you're allowed to touch?

C: 我又不拿走…
E: I didn't take anything though...

C: 「顺颂商祺…」
E: Best regards...

C: 嗯，是你呀。怎么了，有什么不懂的想要问我吗？
E: It's you. Is there anything you'd like to ask me?

C: 关于比赛的选手…
E: About the contestants...

C: 仙舟可真是自私呀。
E: Xianzhou is truly selfish.

C: 不肯提供「息壤」技术，也不肯采买筑城者的防御武器，更不肯让筑城者的部队驻扎…仙舟也太过自信了，迟早是会吃亏的。
E: They're too arrogant to supply the Fallow Earth technology, purchase the Architects' fortifications, or let Architects garrison there... Xianzhou is too confident, and that's going to cause them big problems.

C: 艾丝妲做了一个错误的决定。
E: Asta made an egregious call.

C: 据说我现在上了什么黑名单…真是搞笑，我根本不在乎好吧！
E: Apparently, I'm on some blacklist right now... What a joke. I don't care about that!

C: {F#小姐姐}{M#小哥哥}想喝苏乐达的话，可以找我打声招呼。
E: Well, if you ever feel like a bottle of SoulGlad, just let me know, {F#miss}{M#mister}!

C: 新款旧款？
E: Is that a new model?

C: 从你的角度看，那群步离人为什么会登上竞锋舰？
E: Why do you think the borisin boarded the Skysplitter?

C: 是啊，尤其是在罗浮上出了这等乱子以后…
E: Yeah, especially after all the trouble aboard the Luofu...

C: 我也是来偷闲的，放心放心。
E: Relax! I came here to slack off too.

C: 太好了，自从成为星舰工程师之后，我的人生梦想第二名就是向别人解释引擎的工作原理——
E: Wonderful! Since I became an interstellar ship engineer, the second item on my lifelong wish list has been to regale another person with the fundamentals about engine functionality...

C: 要是有才华横溢的工程师来跟我换班就好了，哈哈，现在我还站好这班岗吧。
E: If only there's a talented engineer who can swap shifts with me, that would be great. Haha, for now I'll just hold down the fort!

C: 大人应该给小孩讲故事，没想到这也能颠倒…行吧，我给你讲一个。
E: It should be adults telling stories to children, not the other way around... Fine, here's one.

C: 我瞧见了…我瞧见你的未来了。
E: I saw it... I saw your future.

C: 有一位异星的选手，倒是让人家印象深刻。虽然不知道他的名字，但那头红发…尤其那壮硕的金属义肢让人家铭心刻骨。
E: There is an otherworld fighter who left a deep impression on me. I don't know his name, but that head of red hair... and especially that rock-hard arm of metal are seared in my mind.

C: 不过说起来，上一世的「我」虽强为武学大家，但是根据记录来看，他在演武仪典上遇到了一位红发化外民的选手，好像叫「伊戈尔」？
E: Speaking of which, while the previous "me" was an exceptional martial artist, but according to my records, he encountered a red-haired outworlder contestant in the Wardance, I think his name was Igor?

C: 移交、转交、销毁…
E: Giveaways, transference to other departments, or outright destruction...

C: 你干嘛非得吃那个啊。
E: Why are you so insistent on having that?

C: 金人巷能真的有金人？
E: Is it true that there are aurumatons in the Aurum Alley?

C: 这就是你不懂了…
E: Tell you what...
*sigh*

C: 哎，上次来的时候我还是个小孩子，也就是几十年前的事吧。
E: Well, I was still a kid when I was here last time. It was a few decades ago.

C: 你就当是为了他吧——他肯定也不想看到你现在这样，你得坚强一点。
E: Just do it for his sake. I'm sure he wouldn't want to see you in this state. You need to be strong.

C: 冒昧请教一下，是这样的，这个「奠仪」…其实我还从未参加过，我听说你们一族对此颇有经验，能否指点我一下？
E: In fact, I've never participated in this ceremony before, and I heard that your clan is quite experienced in it. Could you give me some advice?

C: 无罪囚记录…安全。
E: Acquitted records, none... Entity safe.

C: 哎呀，人子唷，身为神悟树庭教授，可不能将求知若渴者拒之门外啊…小姑娘，过来吧，汝大可相信多嘴多舌之神，吾来答疑解惑。
E: Oh my, child of humanity! As a professor of the Grove of Epiphany, I simply cannot turn away those who thirst for knowledge... Come closer, young lady. You can trust this chatty God. I shall answer all your questions and clear your doubts.

C: 呵…希望卡吕普索那家伙管好话匣子，不要跟我姐姐说一些无趣的往事。
E: Heh... I hope that Calypso keeps her mouth shut and doesn't bore my sister with stories from the past.

C: 你姐姐叫你小夏也不生气？
E: You don't mind your sister calling you Naxy?

C: 小小灰，我知道你很饿，但*我们*不能吃啦！
E: Little Gray, I know you're hungry, but we aren't edible!

C: *我们*明白你在想什么，小灰。
E: We know what you're thinking, Little Gray.

C: 你不去讲两句吗？
E: Aren't you going to chat with them?

C: 我考虑再三，觉得还是「主爵」这个头衔最适合你。
E: After careful consideration, I think the title "Dux Primarius" suits you best.

C: 白厄…你…你长高了。
E: Phainon... you... you've grown taller.

C: 皮西厄斯老师冤枉人，我哪有！
E: Mrs. Pythias, that's not true. I didn't say any of that!

C: 我来喊加油吧。
E: I'll cheer you guys on.

C: 但我仍旧相信，万物终归有走到尽头之时。那尽头可能是死亡，也可能是遗忘。但在那之前……
E: But I still believe that all things must come to an end. That end might be death, or to be forgotten. But until then...

C: 看到了凯撒的另一面呢。
E: Wow, this is another side of the Imperator.

C: 咦，是不是「理智」的碎片还没有拼回来？本大爷帮你去找找？
E: Aww, is your "Reason" fragment still wandering out there? Need me to go find it for you?

C: 桀桀，不说这些，小波吕茜亚。把姐姐送向来世，这手真是巧妙呀，颇得我的真传！
E: Hehehe. Enough about that. Little Polyxia, sending your dear sister to the next life was indeed genius. You surely learned from the best!

C: 那时候我还很瘦。
E: Back then, I was still very skinny.

C: 你们对「速成」两字有误解！
E: You people don't understand what "crash" means at all!

C: 我说我永远永远永远爱你，我亲爱的老婆！
E: I—I said I love you forever and ever and ever, my dearest wife!

C: 咱俩一个师傅教的。
E: We share a master!

C: 选择摘星，观赛舒心。
E: Star-Picking Tours is all you need.

C: 贝洛伯格野人。
E: Belobog Caveman.

C: 离间盟约，颠覆仙舟，跪缚于此，遭万人唾弃，纵千年万年，永不可恕。
E: Sewing discord among the alliance, subversion of the Xianzhou, they are fated to be bound here for millennia and hated by all, never to be forgiven.

C: 关于竞锋舰引擎运作的原理，不同人有过不同的猜想：中子碰撞、反物质、黑洞坍塌、虚数弹…或许，这些你熟悉的技术名词都无法解释它的科技。
E: Different people have various guesses about how the Skysplitter's engine operates: Neutron collisions, antimatter, collapsing black holes, Imaginary Bombs... Maybe even these familiar technical terms can't even explain its technology.

C: 引擎停止运行，竞锋舰速度低于一定程度，定时炸弹就会爆炸；可要是定时炸弹到了一定时间，它也会爆炸，你会怎么做呢？
E: The engine has stopped functioning, and once the Skysplitter's speed drops below a certain threshold, the time bomb will explode. But it will also explode once it reaches a certain time. What will you do?

C: 一只快递箱，以不太体面的方式出现在了地面上。原本尖尖的边角瘪了进去。
E: There is a courier package in a pathetic state on the ground. The edges of the package are all indented.

C: 大家相信你的专业水平，欢迎{NICKNAME}莅临指导！
E: Everyone trusts your professionalism, welcome {NICKNAME}, please lead them!

C: 那边的那个，注意手上动作！
E: That one, over there! Watch how you move your hands!

C: 年纪不大，拳法却很老练。
E: Young in age, but seasoned in boxing.

C: 纯美永驻！
E: May the Beauty remain eternal!

C: 你们懂什么！
E: What do you guys know!

C: 火花四溅的硬碰硬啊！
E: This is an unprecedented clash with sparks aplenty!

C: 据说是货运星槎，但似乎运力有限。
E: It is said to be a freight starskiff, but with a limited capacity.

C: 「在造翼者文化中，不具备飞行能力的陆行生物均被称为『尘民』，而他们则自诩『云君』，奴役其他智慧种族为其生产、修葺穹桑。」
E: "In the culture of wingweavers, terrestrial animals that cannot fly are called 'Residents of Dirt,' while they call themselves the 'Cloudlords.' They enslave other intelligent races and make them produce resources and work on Muldrasil."

C: 这是神策府的石狮子，时速高达每时辰一千二百里，喜欢浸过猫草汤的毛线团。但最好不要带这东西来神策府，你有一定概率被它撞去异世界。
E: This is a stone lion from the Seat of Divine Foresight which can run as fast as <unbreak>600</unbreak> miles per dual-hour. Skeins soaked in catgrass soup are their favorite. Do not bring one to the Seat of Divine Foresight, or the stone lion will ram into you and send you to the otherworld.

C: 你把目光上移，在信息栏里看到了「机巧人偶，陪伴型」。箱子上坑坑洼洼的砸痕证明了收货人的愤怒。
E: You move your eyes up at the information column and see a phrase that reads, "Ingenium Puppet, designed for companionship" The battered condition of the package indicates that it has been smashed repeatedly by its angry recipient.

C: 不管里面装了什么，毫无疑问它都不是你的财产。你守住了你心中的道德准则，可喜可贺。
E: No matter what's inside, it's undoubtedly not yours. Congratulations on holding fast to your moral code.

C: 你轻触这颗珍珠般的持明卵，恐惧如一只巨掌捏紧了你的心脏。「将这些枝条送去丹鼎司？」你很清楚，你手中器皿里封存的乃是仙舟绝对禁忌之物。
E: You gently touch the Vidyadhara egg that looks like a pearl. Fear squeezes your heart like a giant hand. "Send these branches to the Alchemy Commission?" It is clear to you that the vessel you are holding contains a strictly forbidden object on the Xianzhou.

C: 罗浮仙舟随处可见摆放在地上的快递箱——鹤运物流到底是知道，还是假装不知道。
E: Courier packages are everywhere on the Xianzhou Luofu... Does Heron Express know about this or not?

C: 「桃儿：人类自数万年前便将培育出蓝色玫瑰视为生物学上的一项挑战。」
E: "Dearest Peach: For tens of thousands of years, humans have considered the cultivation of blue roses a scientific challenge."

C: 是不是吉他手跑路了？
E: Their guitarist left them high and dry?

C: 没人知道「午夜谜箱」是否满意你的供奉，但每天趁着夜色回收箱中财物的那小子应该挺满意的。
E: No one knows if the Midnight Mystery Boxes are satisfied with your offerings, but the man that comes to collect all the treasures under the cover of night every day must be very satisfied.

C: 驭空屏息凝神…
E: Yukong held her breath...

C: 最近有帮人自称是我的信徒…
E: Lately, there's a gang of people claiming to be my followers...

C: 出奇豪华的餐厅。在梦中用餐不会有饱腹感，却能完整体验食物的美味——真是一举两得。
E: An astoundingly luxurious restaurant. You'll never feel full when you eat in the dream, yet you can fully experience the flavors of food — it kills two birds with one stone.

C: 过去的某个时刻，这里应该发生了什么事情。可能是一场离别，亦或别的什么催人泪下的场合。
E: In some past moment, something must have happened here. Perhaps a separation, or some other tragically tearful scene.

C: 查德威克的房间，也是他人生中曾经历过的众多监牢之一。
E: Chadwick's room. It is also one of the many prisons he's lived in his lifetime.

C: 「呐…我想您呀，您听见了吗？」
E: "Hey... I miss you. Can you hear me?"

C: 「闭店期间，我会照顾怪物们。别担心。」
E: "I'll look after the monsters while the bar is closed. Don't worry."

C: 酒柜的装饰极为考究，每个细节都经过精心设计。那位店主的品味想必很不错。
E: The decoration on the liquor cabinet is exquisitely made. Every detail of the cabinet is well-designed. The bar owner must have great taste.

C: 那道冰冷的视线彻底消失，你如释重负——这座金色的美梦里再也不会有猎犬踽踽独行的身影了。
E: The disturbing sight finally fades away, bringing you a sense of relief: The Hound no longer wanders around in this sweet dream.

C: 这种「制裁」不是对现实中刑罚的直接映射，家族不会把施加痛苦当作制裁的手段——那会吓跑不少宾客。
E: This kind of sanction isn't a direct reflection of punishments in the real world. The Family doesn't inflict pain as sanction - that will drive many guests away.

C: 他们抛下了自己享有的一切既得利益来到这里——这种选择的背后一定蕴含某种共性，某种逻辑。
E: Yet they leave behind the comforts of their lives to come here — there must be some underlying commonality and reasoning behind this choice.

C: 惠特克爵士面无表情，炽热的目光穿透了你的脸庞。
E: Sir Whittaker's visage is expressionless, his burning gaze piercing through your face.

C: 呃，或许是…具体情况，得等我回去查查资料。您知道的，我们的客户很多，总会有那么些人缺少上进心，最后落得穷困潦倒。谁也救不了他们。
E: Er, perhaps... I'll have to check the files for details. As you already know, we have a lot of clients, some of whom may be more laissez-faire in the attitudes and end up in poverty. No one can save them.

C: 我还想知道……
E: I still want to know...

C: 呼，和你聊天真开心，好久没人仔细听我说话了。我要给你颁发我制作的证书，称号就叫…就叫——”笨罐之友“！怎么样，是不是特气派！
E: Phew, it was fun talking to you. It's been a long time since anyone really listened to me so earnestly. I hereby award you with a certificate I created. It's called... Let's just call it "Piggy Bank's Friend"! How's that for a stylish name!

C: 你呢？我的心灵之友。你和我聊天，该不会也是……
E: What about you? My kindred friend. You chatting with me, are you also...

C: 我是家族的宾客。
E: I am a guest of The Family's.

C: 那可是个好地方，能体验到形形色色、在现实中绝对没法接触的生活。
E: That's a good place. You can get to experience the vibrant sights, and revel in a lifestyle you wouldn't otherwise have in real life.

C: 原来如此…我明白了。
E: I see... I get it.

C: 万一被预料之外的人给翻找出来，那场面可能会很难堪哦。
E: If someone you least expect uncovers them, it'll be an awkward sight.

C: 梦里的世界如此美妙，可这不该是真的。完美背后总有代价。
E: The world in the dream is splendid indeed, but none of it is real. There is always a price behind such beauty.

C: 收集这些有什么用呢？
E: What's the point of collecting these?

C: 只是一些很小众的冒险小说罢了。其实我更想投身于民俗与怪谈的创作…只是笔力与阅历都尚浅，还需多加磨砺。
E: Just some mildly popular adventure novels. I wanted to dive into folklore and supernatural themes... But my wordsmithing and experiences lack substance, and require more practice.

C: 确实不太了解…
E: I don't really understand...

C: 这就是无名客吗…能这般随心所欲地遨游星空，听起来可真浪漫。
E: So these are Nameless... To travel the stars to your hearts' desire, it sounds rather romantic.

C: 为什么啊…为什么我的文字总是不够恐怖呢？
E: Why is that... Why can't my words evoke terror?

C: 明明、明明其它题材就没问题…明明就连以哥哥们为原型写的那些——唔，小说——都能大卖……
E: I—I obviously don't have problems with other themes... Even those novels written based *hic* on my older brothers' drafts were major hits...

C: 汪，汪汪！
E: Woof, ruff ruff!

C: 汪汪…汪…汪……
E: Woof woof... woof.. ruff...

C: 看到远处那座宏伟的建筑了吗？那是匹诺康尼大歌剧院，十二个梦境时分的中轴，也是我曾经献声的舞台。
E: See that magnificent building off in the distance? That's the Penacony's grand theater, the central axis of the twelve dreamscape hours. It's also where I once used to take the stage and sing.

C: 可由于「万界之癌」的影响，我只能留在梦境里，帮助家族文过饰非。我一直追求的真相反倒成了最无所谓的东西。
E: But thanks to the Cancer of All Worlds, all I can do is remain here in the dreamscape and help The Family smooth over their misdeeds. The very truth that I wanted to pursue has turned out to be the most insignificant thing of all.

C: 我当然知道这是必要的，是维系梦境稳定的手段，但……
E: I know all of this is necessary and a means to maintaining stability in the dreamscape. However...

C: 我认识那么几个驯物师同僚，工作得都有些魔怔了，居然会把物品当作自己的伙伴…简直失了分寸！
E: I know of a few props masters who went nuts from their work and treated these items as their partners... They have gone overboard!

C: 咳，这是因为路灯小姐打招呼的方式…非常吉利。
E: Ahem, that's because the way Miss Street Lamp greets others looks like... a very good sign.

C: 「脆筒舞者」仿佛化作了奶油身躯的战士，蛋筒底座的巨碑。它的不屈精神是草莓味的——*吸溜*。
E: The Cone Dancer seems to have transformed into a cream-bodied warrior, a giant monument at the base of the egg cone. Its indomitable fighting spirit is strawberry-flavored — *slurp*

C: 话说回来，那个脆筒的味道怎么样？
E: By the way, how does the cone taste?

C: 只要这些道具还能动，它们就该拿出全部的力气取悦观众，为我赚钱！除非它们能凭空变出信用点来——那倒是能省去中间那么多费力不讨好的步骤。
E: As long as they can still move, they should do their best to entertain the audience and make money for me! Unless they can magically conjure up some credits — that would save so many tedious steps in between.

C: …唉，你能问出这个问题，说明我还是太失败了。
E: ...Well, the fact that you can ask me this question shows that I'm still a total failure.

C: 为什么爱一定要成为枷锁呢？为什么爱总要把人们捆绑在一起，逼迫他们互相依赖，一生一世都不能将视线从对方身上移开？
E: Why must love become a shackle? Why must love bundle people together, forcing them to depend on each other so that they can never take their eyes off each other for the rest of their lives?

C: 再见，陌生人。
E: Goodbye, stranger.

C: 哦，这位{F#美丽的小姐}{M#英俊的先生}，欢迎来到匹诺康尼——恕我冒昧，请问您见过我的爱人吗？
E: Ah, {F#beautiful lady}{M#handsome gentleman}, welcome to Penacony! Excuse my boldness, but have you seen my love around here?

C: 广告牌上的画面随着它的语气变暗了，看起来居然有些可怜。
E: The screen of the billboard grows dim as its tone changes. You actually start to feel a little pity.

C: 只可惜她离开得太快了，我还没来得及和她问好。为了不错过下一次相遇，我决定变成{RUBY_B#她的样子}她的专属广告牌{RUBY_E#}！
E: Unfortunately, she left so quickly that I didn't have time to greet her. I decided that I would become a billboard {RUBY_B#In Her Image}solely dedicated to her{RUBY_E#}!

C: 她的名字是？
E: What's her name?

C: 呀！我还不知道她的名字呢！
E: Oh no! I don't even know her name yet!

C: 就这样吧，拜拜。
E: That's all. Bye-bye.

C: 我、我实在太害怕了……
E: I... I'm just so scared...

C: 我、我实在太害怕了……
E: I... I'm just so scared...

C: 从柜台后面走出来，我才注意到这个拿刀的劫匪，他说「你好，打劫！」，我说「呃，你这样也没法威胁我啊」，他说「有道理，我得找个能直接伤害你的位置」。
E: I didn't even notice the robber holding a knife until I stepped out from behind the counter. He said, "Good afternoon, give me all your money!" So, I replied, "Uh, you don't really look intimidating, though." He agreed and said, "You're right. I should find a place where I can actually harm you."

C: 你就是个天生的脱口秀演员！
E: You've got some natural comedic talent!

C: 完了…全完了……
E: I'm busted... I'm totally busted...

C: 哈哈，我倒是很乐意为贡献自己的一份力量。
E: Haha, I'm more than happy to lend a hand.

C: 这毫无灵魂的杂音…真是让人心烦意乱！我再也不能忍受这些的冰冷的魔鬼在街头啸叫了！
E: This soulless cacophony... It's getting on my nerves! I can't stand these cold devils howling down the streets any longer!

C: 没什么想知道的了。
E: Nothing further.

C: 而我，就是这里最逍遥的派对客，丹西！
E: As for me, I'm the most legendary partygoer here, Dancy!

C: 有什么好玩的推荐吗？
E: Do you have any fun recommendations?

C: 好啊。也许和你聊聊，也能帮我拓宽一些思路，走出泥沼。
E: Alright. Perhaps through talking with you I will be able to expand my thinking and escape this slump.

C: 可随着时间的推移，我们的创作越来越故步自封，创作者对着所谓「模板」，不敢越雷池一步。
E: However, as time has progressed, our works have become more and more stale and creators are reluctant to step outside of this so-called "template."

C: 嘎鲁酋长设计「泰科铵大球馆」时，引经据典去诠释她的艺术思想——
E: When Chief Gru designed the Taikiyan Stadium, she quoted classic architectural works to explain her artistic thought process.

C: 头儿怎么总是把这种麻烦的活派给我啊……
E: Why does the boss keep giving me the worst gigs...

C: 有什么推荐饮品？
E: Any recommended beverage?

C: 还有其他想说的吗？
E: Anything else you'd like to add?

C: 想当年， 我可是第一个乘坐动力炮椅飞上天空、然后又安全着陆的家伙。公司的高个子都说我是航天英雄。
E: I was the first to fly in a Kinetic Propulsion Chair and land safely. The tall guys in IPC even call me a space hero!

C: 我确实很想。
