E: I do want to try it.

C: 对我的驾驶技术这么有信心？
E: Do you have that much confidence in my driving skills?

C: 我的引擎技术来自追逐萨尔索图晨昏线的浮空城市，急刹工艺师从机动球场最尖端的漂移战靴，窗玻璃是塔利亚闪亮的沙砾，就连喷漆都是公司的旗舰新款。
E: My engine technology originates from a floating city on the terminator line in Salsotto. The craftsmanship of my emergency brake is inspired by the cutting-edge drift boots used in the Roboball court. My window panes are made of the shiny sand from Talia, and even my paint is the latest flagship model from the IPC.

C: 汗流浃背了吧？要是你够识相的话，就打消驾驶我的念头，赶快离开。
E: Impressive, right? If you have enough sense, drop the idea of driving me now and make yourself scarce.

C: 随着最后一个脆筒下肚，一股若有若无的空虚从你心底泛起…难道是吃得太快了？
E: As you finish the last of the cone, a faint sense of emptiness sets in... Is it because you've eaten the cones too quickly?

C: 来自内心的声音还告诉你——那张黑卡就是打开这扇门的钥匙。
E: Your intuition tells you the Lucky Guy's Black Card is the key to this door.

C: 来看看吧，客人，包您满意！
E: Dear guest, come in and take a look, there will definitely be something you like!
Eek!

C: 好不容易上岸一个清闲又稳定的岗位——没想到居然要我之后去「安谧的时刻」轮岗！
E: I worked so hard to get myself into this nice, stable, leisurely position... Then I find out that they wanna reassign me to shifts in the "Moment of Serenity!"

C: 美梦…我个人倒是没什么不满。不过倾听的告解多了，难免会被某些负面情绪影响。
E: Dreams... I personally have no qualms against them, but one can't avoid the effects of certain negative emotions after listening to so many confessions.

C: 康娜的脸上横添了一抹怒纹，额头紧皱成一团——这是洁癖者看到一地垃圾时的正常反应。
E: An angry frown streaks across Conna's face, her forehead scrunched up into wrinkly folds — that is the default reaction of someone obsessed with cleanliness who sees trash strewn all about.

C: 这是个夕阳产业，趁早转行吧。
E: It's a dying industry. Better jump ship early.

C: 男人痴痴地望着墙上的仓鼠球骑士海报，咧开的嘴角挂着餍足的笑意。
E: The man gazes, entranced, at the Hamster Ball Knight's poster on the wall. His lips are parted into a contented grin.

C: 你思索半晌，突然意识到，那是「孤独」。
E: After contemplating for a while, it suddenly occurs to you that this aura is "loneliness."

C: 这里的工作？说实话，不算刺激。
E: My job here? Frankly speaking, it isn't the most interesting thing.

C: 我拥有的这份工作是多么美妙啊——不用东跑西颠，不会感到劳累，下班后还能回家照看我的小狗。
E: It just dawned on me how perfect my job actually was — I don't have to run errands at different places. It's not too tiring, and I still have time to take care of my dogs after work.

C: 滴答？美梦小镇是钟表小子的家，钟表小子当然会在这里啦！
E: Tick-tock? Dreamville is Clockie's home, of course Clockie would be here!

C: 钟表小子为你服务，滴答！你想听我介绍一下我的朋友们吗，滴答！
E: Clockie is here to serve you, tick-tock! Would you like to hear me introduce my friends, tick-tock?

C: 但无论如何，你的选择里绝对不会有——「和这群怪物成为朋友」。
E: No matter what you answer, I doubt "become friends with these monsters" would've been on the list.

C: 自愿放弃肉身？
E: They volunteered to give up their own bodies?

C: 对对，就是这个银河球棒侠！{F#她}{M#他}还潜入过星穹列车，打算要刺杀阿基维利来着。
E: Yes yes, it's this Galactic Baseballer! {F#She}{M#He} even infiltrated the Astral Express before, and plotted to assassinate Akivili.

C: 呵…什么盛会巨星，根本就是个噱头！
E: Ha... what do you mean by "Festive Superstar"? That's just a gimmick!

C: 我觉得很好。
E: I think that would be nice.

C: 这个题材太冷门，所以我没什么读者。不过，凡是因为我的作品聚在一起的朋友们都有共同话题——我们都成了好朋友。
E: This kind of stuff is not in high demand, so I don't have many readers. Although, friends who gather around my work all share a common topic.... We've all become very close.

C: 迷因怪物也是我的取材对象，所以先前我一直在探听「死亡」的都市传说…然后就误打误撞来到这儿了。
E: Memetic monsters are also a source of inspiration for me. I've been looking into an urban legend about "Death"... That search brought me stumbling here.

C: 还真是…巧啊。
E: That is... a coincidence.

C: 很稀奇吗？家族还能在梦里盖楼呢。
E: Is it that strange? The Family builds buildings in the dream.

C: 可惜，工厂终究不像田里那样令人安心。我加入公司、来到宇宙，就是为了找到可以平静生活的地方……
E: Unfortunately, factories are nowhere near as comforting to work in as the fields. I joined the IPC and travelled the universe just so that I could find a place to live a quiet life...

C: 忆质的流动速度变得越来越快，越来越快……
E: The speed of the memoria flow is growing faster...

C: 况且，我也不是完全做了妥协。他们曾经的对话，那些被我记录在册的故事，我把它们处理后掰碎了一点点地塞进作品里。
E: Besides, I didn't completely compromise. The conversation they had and the stories I documented in the book were processed and broken into digestible chunks before being entered into the work.

C: 当你希望从音乐中汲取欢乐的时候，欢迎再来这里转转。
E: Come back and take a look around next time you feel like you need the joy of music.

C: 我理应…也必须能尽己所能，为我的「家人」做些什么…对吧？
E: I should... no, I MUST do everything I can for my "kinsmen"... right?

C: 对于现在的我来说，美梦太喧闹，这里却正好。
E: At this age I find the sweet dreams too noisy. Things are perfect where I am now.

C: 它们生长的土壤不含有有害的情绪，亦不掺杂消极与负面的记忆，所以由它们制作的精神食粮尝起来口味温和醇厚，回味甘甜。
E: The soil they grow in is devoid of harmful emotions and negative memories, so the spirit fuel it produces has this mild and mellow taste with a lingering sweet aftertaste.

C: 我不是智械。
E: I am not an Intellitron.

C: 现在的智械已经这么先进了吗…你们智械应该会喜欢能源类的食物吧，下次我会试着研究电池和机油套餐的。
E: Modern day Intellitrons are so advanced... You should like energy for food, right? I'll try to look into a battery and machine oil combo for next time.

C: 也行，别忘了找找这里的折纸小鸟——赶紧让我的戏份杀青吧。
E: That works too, don't forget to look for the origami birds here. Hurry up and let me wrap my scene up.

C: 怎么样啾，听起来是个很有趣的地方吧？
E: How about it, tweet? Sounds like a fun place, no?

C: 这是来自本鸟最后的谢礼。拿好，慢走不送啾。
E: This is the final gift from me. Take it, and don't let me keep you, tweet.

C: 以后再说吧。
E: Catch you next time.

C: 你好，无名客。希望你还习惯在流梦礁的生活。
E: Hello, Nameless. I hope life at the Dreamflux Reef hasn't been too jarring for you.

C: 快增加投放奖励！
E: You need to add more rewards!

C: 男人沉默地望向窗外，冷硬的玻璃平面倒映出他嘴角冷硬的弧度。
E: The man silently gazes outside, the chilly surface of the window's glass reflecting his stiff smile.

C: 至于其它的…餐厅？大剧院？影视乐园或者…算了，这些都过于普通，他们一定不会喜欢。
E: Apart from that... How about a restaurant? Or the Grand Theater? Or Clock Studios Theme Park? Or... forget it. They wouldn't like these places since they're so ordinary.

C: 怎么还没辞职？
E: Why haven't you resigned yet?

C: 好消息是，她能够就此过上平凡的生活，用无尽的生命，品味凡俗的快乐。
E: The good news was she could now use her infinite lifespan to experience a happy and ordinary life.

C: 一场美食之旅，怎么变成这样……
E: How did a culinary journey take such a tragic turn?

C: 我得…利用这个机会。要是运气好，说不定我也能靠着这次旅行出名？
E: I need to... really capitalize on this opportunity. Who knows, if I'm lucky, I might even become famous after this journey!

C: 我那点垃圾音乐，怎么可能会有歌迷？这种事…呵呵，我还是有自知之明的～
E: There's no way I'd get any fans for my music — it's garbage! Haha, I know where I stand.

C: 好了，不逗你了，我们回头再聊。姐姐我要去参加下一场派对了，看我这身限量版…哼哼，不把其他住客迷死！
E: Haha, enough teasing. Catch you later! I've got another party to hit. Heh, all the other guests are totally going to go gaga over my limited-edition gown!

C: 叶子店长？
E: Shopkeeper Leaf?

C: 客官果然是大好人啾！人家的心跳都忍不住快了好几拍啾……
E: You're a nice person indeed! My heart couldn't help but beat faster at your response, tweet...

C: 说实话，感谢船长您对我的信任。相信您也看到了，目前空艇上的每一项运作都还有进步的空间，我会继续努力的！
E: If I may be honest, I'd like to thank you for showing such trust in me, Captain. As you may already be aware, there's still room for further enhancements for everything on this airship. I'll keep doing my best!

C: 相比之下，我的「品德良好，成绩优异」看起来就和没气的苏乐达一样没劲。
E: Compared to them, my "outstanding work ethic and excellent grades" is like a bottle of flat SoulGlad.

C: 很多人都称赞我的努力。但他们不知道…那只是因为我一无所有。
E: Many people praise my hard work. But, what they don't know is... it is all because I have nothing.

C: 只有这样，我才能留在这里，从无数学生中脱颖而出，有机会实现自己的梦想。
E: That is the only way that I will be able to stay here, stand out amongst the countless other students, and have a chance to achieve my dreams.

C: 更好笑的还在后面呢——我尝试通过各种渠道向校方反映这件事，最终全都石沉大海，连个正经的回应都没有。
E: That's not even the most ridiculous part... I have tried to report this to the university through various channels and yet it's been completely swept under the rug! They haven't even given me a decent reply!

C: 对了，你要是知道些什么，记得情报共享啊。我请你吃恰丽卡学姐的点心，那个现在可是很难抢到的！
E: Oh, and if you find out anything else, then make sure to come and share intel with me. I'll treat you to some of senior Chaletka's homemade snacks. They're not easy to get hold of nowadays!

C: 不过…这个你倒是可以看看——答应我，如果遇到了和「锈墨」电台有关的事情，一定要及时离得远远的，好吗？
E: Although... you can keep an eye out for something for me... Promise me, if you come across anything related to Rusty Ink Radio Station, you stay well away, okay?

C: 理想和现实只能二选一吗……
E: Are ideals and reality mutually exclusive...?

C: 演出结束后，乱破忍首曾经拜托工作人员将乐器都搬到这里，但我和艾尔菲同学把各自的乐器带回了家…重要的物品，放在教室里不太放心。
E: After the show ended, Head Ninja Rappa asked a staff member to move the instruments here, but Arfey and I brought ours home... It's not safe to leave important stuff in the classroom.

C: 蒙塔娜同学负责管理，我们没事的时候也会去看看。
E: Montana's in charge of that. We can go take a look when we're free.

C: 当然，必须要感谢经理的帮助——如果那个时候你没有来劝我，或许我早就离开了乐队，此刻正在学院的教室里后悔吧。
E: Of course, this is all thanks to you, Manager — if you hadn't persuaded me back then, I might've left the band already. I'd be sulking in regret back at the classroom right now.

C: 毕业出路有着落了吗？
E: Did she figure out what she wants to do after graduation?

C: 说实话，经历了这些事，我算是想通了很多事儿。
E: Honestly, after going through so much, I've come to realize many things.

C: 但…但没关系，或许他们只是希望我过得更幸福，那我的选择一定会比现在幸福……又或者他们其实没那么重视我，或许只会因为我的选择轻叹一口气，然后第二天就抛到脑后。
E: But... But it's fine, perhaps they just wish for me to find happiness. Then my choice will surely lead to more happiness than now... Or maybe they actually aren't really paying attention to me, and will only heave a sigh because of my choice, and then shove it to the back of their minds the next day.

C: 您是否熟悉「仙舟联盟」？不如听一个关于他们的笑话吧。这是我的得意之作。
E: Are you familiar with the "Xianzhou Alliance"? How about a joke about them? This is one of my finest creations.

C: 只是随便聊聊。
E: Just a casual chat.

C: 好在某位开拓者{F#女士}{M#先生}常来探望，时时展现{F#她}{M#他}的鲜活，才不至于让一位搭车的女士向隅独泣。
E: Luckily, a certain {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} Trailblazer often stops by, bringing {F#her}{M#his} vibrant energy to lift the spirits of this lonely passenger.

C: 最新款超级弹药，加量不加价，一颗更比七颗强，把敌人统统炸回老家。
E: The latest pattern of high-grade ammunition. With its quantity far outweighing the price, as a single shot from this can outdo seven of its competitors and send all your enemies to kingdom come.

C: 船长…那个，请您注意！您在泳池边这样跑…影响不太好！
E: Captain... Umm, please be careful! It's not a good look... to run around the swimming pool like this!

C: 裂隙在虚空中闪烁，以不同振幅的波形流溢出寒意与热浪。
E: The fissure flickers in the void, spilling chills and heat in shifting waves of amplitude.

C: 要来共舞一曲吗？
E: Would you like to dance together?

C: 钟表匠加「死亡」，王炸！
E: The Watchmaker and Death. Big checkmate!

C: 在我看来，如今的筑梦艺术正在被一种无比荒谬、简单且粗糙的方式构建。就像潜藏在我们意识深层中的、原始的社会需求——换言之，亲密关系——被一种残忍又暴力的方式异化、统治，进而摧毁……
E: It seems to me that the art of dream-building today is being constructed in an incredibly absurd, simple, and crude way. It's as if our primal social need — in other words, intimate relationships — that lurks in the depths of our consciousness is being alienated, dominated, and destroyed in a cruel and violent way...

C: 公司那边又在催了…
E: The IPC is pushing again...

C: 不会是假配方吧？
E: They better not be using some fake recipe...

C: 好不容易有个没堵的！
E: Finally, an unblocked path!

C: 给皮皮西卖增高垫？
E: How about selling height-increase shoe insoles for Pepeshi?

C: 这就是艾迪恩公园…
E: So, this is Aideen Park...

C: 你看，我说什么来着。
E: See! What did I tell you?

C: 晖长石号以后就不是晖长石号了。
E: The Radiant Feldspar won't be called the Radiant Feldspar in the future.

C: 我们已经破产了！
E: We are bankrupt!

C: 我看了下入住记录——这么说来，你们应该都知道了吧，公司的人都到了。
E: I checked the check-in log. Which means, you all should already know by now that the IPC's people have all arrived.

C: 你还是成了诗人…
E: So you're a poet now...

C: 我是说知更鸟的演出！
E: I meant Robin's performance!

C: 小伙子弹得挺好的。
E: The young man plays pretty well.

C: 目前的排期很紧张。
E: The current schedule is really tight.

C: 哼哼，连对方的名字都说不出来，就别再虚构朋友啦。
E: Hmph, you can't even tell me the recipient's name. Stop making up fake friends.

C: 快瞧瞧那几面还空着的墙，你就不觉得手痒吗？
E: Quick, look at those blank walls. Don't you feel even a little antsy?

C: 不知为何，书架上放着一本《钟表小子与左轮队长》。最有可能的解释是，这是学院从某个开小差的学生手中收缴来的。
E: For some reason, there is a Clockie and Captain Revolver book on the bookshelf. The most rational explanation is it was taken from an errant student.

C: 说起来，你到底算不算「超智能病毒」的家人？一想到开挂的狗东西总会被问候家人，你就觉得有些不安…希望它没开挂！
E: So, do you consider yourself family to the Supersmart Virus? Just thinking about how cheaters always get a bad rap makes you a bit uneasy... Let's hope it's not cheating!

C: 垃圾糕正在你的房间里休息。看到你来了，它向你友好地道了一声「喵」。
E: The trash cake is resting in your room. Upon seeing you, it greets you with a friendly "Meow."

C: 你的目光扫过收藏架上的藏品，最后停留在「垃圾桶摆件」上。
E: As you cast your gaze across the collectibles on the display shelf, it lands on the "Trashcan ornament."

C: 咕咚咕咚…秘酿全部下肚，你无法用任何词汇描述它的口感，因为它令你的大脑一片空白，眼前也出现了渐入的白……
E: Bloop bloop... the ambrosia goes down in one go, and you can't describe its taste with any words, because it leaves your mind completely blank, and your vision starts to fade into a whit-

C: 你当时叫嚷着「我好想吃红土饲料啊」，就跑出浴场了，十个人也拉不住你。
E: You yelled "I want to eat Redsoil Feed!" and ran off the bath. Many people tried to stop you but couldn't hold you back.

C: 天杀的原始博士还在追我。
E: That blasted Dr. Primitive is still chasing me!

C: 很享受这里的生活！
E: Living here is a real bliss!

C: 又见面了，年轻人。要来看看今天新采的水果吗？
E: Here we meet again, young one. Interested in checking out the fresh fruits picked today?

C: 我没有办法知道真正的塞纳托斯是什么样，但我可以和你说说我知道的塞纳托斯。
E: Well, I may not know what Thanatos is truly like, but I can share how I see Thanatos.

C: 啊，说起来…您与黄金裔英雄们的故事着实波澜壮阔，所以利波就擅自将它们记录下来啦。请来听听利波为您写的诗吧，希望您能喜欢——
E: Ah, speaking of that... your epic journey with the Chrysos Heirs has inspired me. Here's a poem I've composed just for you. May it resonate deeply with you...

C: 「光历会籍」
E: Light Calendar Membership

C: 如果您有意成为浴场的常客，那么办个付费会籍绝对是不二之选。
E: If you intend to be a regular at our baths, a membership is surely the wisest choice.

C: 有何不可呢？但我希望自己的造物能有与之相称的主人。
E: Why not? But I do hope there would be people that befit my works.

C: 唔，可爱…谢谢。
E: Oh, cute... Thank you.

C: 如今，浴场精灵们所讲述的翁法罗斯创世神话，或许是目前最符合阁下想要的「正史」了。
E: Perhaps the story that best fits the description of "a formal historical account" is the myth of Amphoreus' creation that the bath sprites have been telling.

C: 在我老家有句话：「塞纳托斯要带走的人，任何神都强留不得。」我时常会拿这句话安慰自己，往事已矣，生者还要好好活下去。
E: There is a saying where I come from: "There is no god powerful enough to hold onto those that Thanatos must take away." I often use this phrase to comfort myself. The past is in the past, and the living must make the most of their lives.

C: 我需要支付什么代价？
E: What's the price I have to pay?

C: 有空聊两句吗？
E: Got time for a quick chat?

C: 最后再次回归平静，侍者像什么都没发生一样回来了。
E: After everything returns to quiet, the attendant returns as if nothing had happened.

C: 欧洛尼斯的信者提示过我另一个思路，便是将污渍布置为艺术，令其与环境融为一体——但说实话，我至今也无法赞同。
E: Those who believe in Oronyx have suggested another way of thinking to me previously. That is, to see the stain as a form of art and allow it to blend into the surroundings... To be honest, I have never accepted that view.

C: 没什么能比掌握住自己的命运更加重要——{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}一定会赞赏你的。
E: Nothing is more important than being the master of your own fate... {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} would surely admire you.

C: 今天学的够多了。
E: That's enough learning for today.

C: 别笑话我。虽然悬锋城盾的质量远胜其他城邦，但制作方式早已失传，现存的每一面都是上古遗物，经不起折腾。
E: You might think it a joke, but while the quality of Castrum Kremnos shields far surpasses the smithing capabilities of other cities, their methods of production are long lost. Every shield in existence is an ancient heirloom, and can't withstand much roughhousing.

C: 小宝贝儿…带秘酿来了吗？快点~
E: My dear... Did you bring me ambrosia? Hurry...

C: 我也觉得自己很美。
E: I think I'm very pretty too.

C: 见鬼。
E: Heinous.

C: 当然，最后这分成能不能到手，还得看兄弟们的意愿…正可谓高风险高回报。可惜可惜，没多久，这行业就被塔兰顿的腿子们一锅端了。
E: Of course, whether the commission would be gained was still at our fellows' whims in the end... With high risks come rich rewards, as they say. A pity though that soon this industry was shut down by Talanton's thugs.

C: 这位客人，在浴场购买秘酿的免责协议签署了吗？
E: Hello, did you sign the liability waiver for purchasing ambrosia at the bath?

C: 当面对峙！
E: Confrontation time!

C: 自「黄金战争」至今的漫长岁月里，我一直担任着传达欧洛尼斯神谕的职责。
E: In the long while between the Chrysos War and now, I have been tasked with delivering Oronyx's prophecies.

C: {NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}记得我便好。
E: I'm glad that you remember me, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.

C: 话归正题吧。今日重逢，亦可说是命运的安排，我特意提前推去了其它居民的邀约。若阁下有兴趣，我们可以再多聊几句。
E: Let's get back on topic. Our reunion today could be fate's design. I even specifically declined invitations from the other residents beforehand. We can chat a bit more if you are interested.

C: 可那与我又有何干？我出生时「黄金战争」已经打响，乱世之中，再伟大的城邦都免不了衰落，雅努萨波利斯的平民不得不在饥荒中嚼土充饥……
E: But I could not experience any of that. When I was born, the Chrysos War had already begun. In times of chaos, even the grandest cities cannot escape decline. Janusopolis' people had to eat dirt to stave off hunger during the famine...

C: 聆听灾难的逼近。
E: Listen to the encroaching disaster.

C: 这天外之音来自欧洛尼斯映照出的可怖景色，纷争掀翻大地，天帷遮蔽天空，一切沦于死亡。这命运一次又一次在翁法罗斯重演，受命运守护的城邦也难幸免……
E: This celestial echo comes from the horrific scene reflected by Oronyx. Strife split the earth, the veil blanketed the sky, and all floundered in death. This fate has been played out in Amphoreus time and time again — even the city protected by destiny itself cannot escape misfortune...

C: 奥赫玛识字的公民都知道，阿卡索斯早已在黑潮中覆灭。你如何从一座不存在的城邦来？
E: As all who can read in Okhema know that Icatus was long since destroyed by the black tide. How could you have come from a city that does not exist?

C: 我们双方都阐述了各自的立场。那么，这位智者，你要选择为哪方辩护？
E: We have both stated our view points. So, wise one, which side would you like to debate for?

C: 哦，这个不瘆人，是件挺好的事。
E: Oh, this one's not spooky at all. It's actually a pretty uplifting story.

C: 我带你去高温浴池。
E: I'll take you to the high-temperature bath.

C: 可以聊聊吗？
E: Are you up for a chat?

C: 什——你怎么敢如此污蔑我，是不是想打架！
E: What—? How dare you slander me like that? Are you looking for a fight?!

C: 诶呀，我就喜欢你这样的聪明人！你也觉得他们有点吵了对不对，那不如我们来聊点别的吧。
E: Ah, I just love smart people like you! You think they're a bit noisy too, don't you?

C: 我知道的，那肯定是某种崭新的艺术形式，我只是暂且用「雕像」称呼它。
E: I knew it! It must be some cutting-edge form of artistic expression. I just called it a "statue" as a placeholder.

C: …细说心血？
E: ...What effort?

C: 都是些很无聊的内容，最近讨论的主题是：由古生物的生命信息拼合得到的奇美拉，算是新物种吗？你说，是不是没事找事？
E: It's all really boring stuff. The recent topic was: Are chimeras, created from the combined life information of ancient creatures, a new species? Don't you think that's just making a problem out of nothing?

C: 我听到了你的「忧愁」。
E: I can hear your sorrow.

C: 感兴趣的话，可以常来生命花园逛逛。这里是奇美拉的培育场所和栖息地，保不准多接触个几次，你就彻底爱上它们了呢！
E: If you're interested, you can visit the Garden of Life more often. This is the chimeras' breeding center and habitat. You might just fall in love with them with a few more visits!

C: 击倒…
E: Felling...

C: 喔，你说维普萨尼娅？她现在管财务方面的事，我和她的理念完全不合，待在家里只会天天吵架。
E: Oh, you mean Vipsania? She manages the financial stuff, and our ideals couldn't be farther apart. We'll just bicker every day if we're both home.

C: 真是可惜，这么好的机会居然没做成生意。哎，都怪我没做好准备……
E: What a pity, such a great opportunity yet I failed to close a deal. Ah, it's all on me for not preparing...

C: 不过我得提前跟你打声招呼，可能是之前销量太好，树庭那边的传信石版有点问题，我现在还没联系上我的师门。
E: But I have to let you know in advance — there might be problems with the Grove's teleslate, perhaps due to how good sales were previously. I can't get in touch with my school.

C: 我有些问题想问…
E: I still have some more questions...

C: 「什么？不卖啊，这小机器人说自己是非卖品，真的假的？算了，不说这个了，跟你说个正经儿的，雷金兄弟的成果被教育部那边否定了，我觉得他们真没眼光，申报了几个奖项也没有入围。」
E: "What? Not for sale? This little robot claims it's not for sale, is that for real? Anyway, forget about that, let me tell you something serious. Regin's project was turned down by the Ministry of Education. They just don't recognize talent, missing the cut for every award he applied for."

C: 虔诚之心…？我、我为了求取神谕，只身从奥德斯特里斯城邦来此，独自在大地兽背上辗转了二十个日夜，这样能够证明我的虔诚吗……
E: My spirit of piety...? I—I traveled to this place all the way from Odestris atop a dromas for twenty days and nights just to seek this prophecy. Is this enough to prove my piety?

C: 塔拉萨波利斯唷，命运只如无足之鸟，唯有三相所在之处方为归巢。
E: Oh, Thalassopolis! Fate is like a bird with no legs. It can only nest in the land of the Three Fates.

C: 噢噢，没问题，那就不打扰你啦。
E: Oh, sure thing. I won't bother you any further.

C: 没什么想聊的了。
E: I have nothing more to chat about.

C: 如今我身负神权，隐隐能感觉到…你们对翁法罗斯的未来重要非凡。
E: Now that I bear the divine within me, I can get the vague feeling that... that you have a great significance for the future of Amphoreus.

C: …不过小灰只是看几眼就能学会欧洛尼斯奇迹，听上去也是一件不可能的事情…难道，小灰真的是天才？
E: ...That being said, you took one look at Oronyx's Miracle and learned how to use it. That should've been equally impossible... Could Tribbie be wrong and you are a genius all along, Little Gray?

C: 是「翻飞之币」的火种令她不堪重负，还是厌倦了黄金裔的使命，抑或是…我不知何时犯下的无名罪愆，无可挽回地惹恼了她……
E: Was it the Coreflame of the Coin of Whimsy that became too much for her, or did she simply grow weary of the Chrysos Heirs' mission? Or perhaps... it was some nameless fault of mine, some mistake that irreparably angered her...

C: 无需替我担心。都已捱过那么久的岁月了，至少，我该能见证逐火之旅结束的那一天……
E: Don't worry about me. After all these years, at least I should be able to witness the day the Flame-Chase Journey comes to an end...

C: 对一名志在抹去患者伤痛的医师来说，最让人开心的事情莫过于此啦。
E: For a healer determined to erase their patients' pain, nothing makes me happier than hearing that!

C: 鉴宝？好出戏的爱好。
E: Treasure appraisal? Really didn't expect that one from you.

C: 没错，看来我已经很有名了。
E: That's right. Seems I've made quite a name for myself.

C: 每当我和家里抱怨这些的时候，他们就会说「你看看外面都怎样了，你有这么一份工作就很了不起了」…他们说的没错，我会继续干下去。
E: Every time I complain about this to my family, they just say, "Look at the world out there — having a job like yours is already remarkable." They're not wrong. So, I'll stick with it.

C: 故乡，那座看不见的城市，正在我的思绪中逐渐成型。想必与您交谈一番，我还会有所收获吧，怎么样，打算再聊聊吗？
E: My homeland — that unseen city — is gradually taking shape in my mind. I believe that by talking with you, I'll find even more inspiration. So, what do you say? Shall we continue this conversation?

C: 哎，是你啊，年轻人，你来找我是有什么事吗？
E: Ah, it's you, young one. What brings you here?

C: 嗯…有位织者蒙受召唤。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>描绘着多目的盲者的壁画上</color>，为纹饰增添光彩呢。
E: Hmm... A weaver has been summoned. The golden thread brings news that it is adding luster to the patterns on <color=#dbc291ff>the mural that portrays the many-eyed blind one</color>.

C: 嗯…有位织者笃信宿命。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>高悬旗帜的石柱上</color>，等待命定之人找到它呢。
E: Hmm... A weaver believes in destiny. The golden thread brings news that it is waiting for its destined one to find it on <color=#dbc291ff>a flag-bearing pillar</color>.

C: 提供「记忆残晶」。
E: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

C: 你好啊贵客…啊嘞？已经没有更多若虫了。
E: Hello, honored guest... Huh? There are no more nymphs here.

C: 其他山之民的状况如何？
E: How are the other Mountain Dwellers doing?

C: 毕竟，再创世只是一个期许。在那之前，我们还是得过好自己的生活。
E: After all, Era Nova is merely a hope. Until that day comes, we must still live our lives as best we can.

C: 再见，可爱的{F#女士}{M#先生}，愿命运指引我们再次相遇！
E: Goodbye, dear {F#miss}{M#sir}, may fate guide us to meet again!

C: 真希望不是他…一定是他们搞错了…我要继续找他。无论如何，他救了我，我不能丢下他不管。
E: I pray it's not him... It must be a mistake... I'll keep searching. Regardless, he saved me — I can't abandon him now.

C: 嘿嘿，被{F#女士}{M#先生}你这么称呼，还有点不好意思。
E: Hehe, {F#miss}{M#mister}, that title makes me blush!

C: 你怎么在这里？
E: Why are you here?

C: 你好好休息吧。
E: You should get some good rest.

C: 你不相信再创世吗？
E: You don't believe in the Era Nova?

C: 或许…我应当赶到黎明机器照拂不及的偏远城邦，将宝物埋在那里。
E: Maybe... I should head to a remote city, far from the Dawn Device's reach, and bury the treasures there.

C: 对了，若遇见白厄阁下，也请将我的祝福带给他。
E: By the way, if you happen to see Lord Phainon, please give him my regards.

C: 还有什么我能帮上忙的吗？
E: Is there anything else I can help you with?

C: 当然！也别搞什么随机秘酿了，我给老顾客备了最好的。
E: Of course! And don't go for the random ambrosia. I've got the best reserved for regulars.

C: 来试试这瓶千年的陈酿，从法吉娜最后的庆典上保存至今，我一直没舍得动。
E: Come, try this bottle of millennium-aged brew. It's been preserved since the last celebration of Phagousa. I haven't been able to bring myself to open it until now.

C: 你已经身负找寻一只若虫的使命了，先专心完成它吧。
E: You're already tasked with finding a nymph. Focus on completing that first.

C: 嗯…有位织者刚刚启程。金丝带来消息，它被压在<color=#dbc291ff>一堆落下的瓦砾中</color>，但愿它不要因此受挫。
E: Hmm... There was a weaver who had just set out on their journey. The golden threads brought news, it's trapped under <color=#dbc291ff>a pile of fallen rubble</color>. Let's hope this doesn't discourage them.

C: 我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
E: I've found all the nymphs here.

C: 或许，你也该跑起来了，贵客。
E: Perhaps it's your turn to start running, honored guest.

C: 结果…结果因为稍微旷了那么几节课，皮西厄斯老师找上门了……
E: But... but I skipped a few classes to do it, and now Miss Pythias is on my tail...

C: 你知道白厄小时候什么样吗？
E: Do you remember what Phainon was like as a kid?

C: 行，我过会就去把他逮回来，谢了啊。
E: Got it. I'll go drag him back in a bit. Thanks for the heads-up.

C: 就知道你想吃这个。要是交了朋友，也别忘了领回家看看，咱们和村里人一定摆场宴会，好好招待。
E: Knew you'd say that. And if you make any friends, bring them home. The whole village will throw a proper feast to welcome them.

C: 不知过去了多久，村落渐渐越来越繁盛，也不知从哪天起，呵呵…孩子们便开始称呼我为「村长」了。
E: I don't know how long it's been. But little by little, the village grew more lively. And then, one day — hehe... the children just started calling me "Chief."

C: 每次飞过远方的麦田，看着农民伯伯们辛勤劳作，人家就不由得去想……
E: Every time I glide over the wheat fields and watch the farmers toiling away. I can't help but think...

C: 萝卜可不会开口说话。
E: And radishes certainly don't talk.

C: 等她醒。
E: Wait until she wakes.

C: 别担心，人家可没有乱摘花哦？只是用了一些小小的魔法。收集掉落的花瓣，让它们重新绽放……
E: Don't worry, I'm not just plucking flowers willy-nilly! I just used a bit of magic, collecting fallen petals and allowing them to bloom again...

C: 小奇美拉，怎么小小一只呢？快快长大，让我看看你会变得多可爱吧。
E: Little Chimera, Little Chimera, why are you so small? Hurry up and grow up, so I can see how cute you'll be!

C: 「海洋」力量塑造的幻境中，浮现着半神醉梦中的泡影……
E: In the illusion sculpted by the authority of Ocean, a bubble of a drunken demigod emerged...

C: 直到…直到最后…在她歌声中长醉不醒的我…留在了这场宴会里……
E: Until... at last... I remain in this banquet, forever drunk on her melody...

C: 吼~吼哎，怎么有根石柱子插我前面了？谁啊，这么没，没公德心啊……
E: Roooar, why is there a stone pillar in front of me? Who did this, how inconsiderate...

C: 「但我绝不会『消失』。我们曾在哀丽秘榭共同收获的回忆会代替我，继续陪伴着你……」
E: "But I will never 'disappear.' The memories we shared in Aedes Elysiae will stay with you in my place..."

C: 我给它们加油鼓劲，是有原因的迷！
E: There's a reason I'm cheering them on, mem!

C: 看来这次是那位更谨慎的主厨掌勺迷。
E: Looks like it's the more cautious chef handling the kitchen this time, mem.

C: 只要想去做，你肯定，也能做到。
E: If you want it enough, you will, definitely do it.

C: 我家老伴还反复叮嘱我，要多带点纪念品回去呢。
E: My husband repeatedly asked me to bring back more souvenirs.

C: 奥赫玛的剧作家们会在这个节日上展示他们的新作品，而观众会评选最佳剧本和表演者。
E: The playwrights of Okhema will showcase their new works during this program, and the audience will decide the best script and performers.

C: …我也一定会紧紧地、紧紧地抱住你。
E: ...I will still hold you tightly in my arms, just like what I did when we were born.

C: 真是搞不懂你们年轻人…
E: I simply cannot understand you youngsters at all...

C: 塞纳托斯，您会记得…
E: Thanatos, you'll remember...

C: 睡个懒觉。哈——
E: Time for a nap. *yawn*

C: 想泡澡~想去市集里玩！
E: I want a bath, I want to visit the market!

C: 日后，明德也还要多多仰仗小友。
E: In the future, there is much I must rely on you for.

C: 而且，我的技术也得到了进步，现在的雕刻，越来越像她本人啦！
E: My craftmanship has been improved. My carvings look more and more like her!

C: 他们啊？一帮来找麻烦的流氓而已！
E: Those people? They are just a bunch of hooligans looking for trouble!

C: 你…你怎么知道？难道说你已经听说了那个女人的故事？
E: How... How did you know that? Have you heard about the story of that woman?

C: 和你扯闲篇，够劲儿，开心！年轻人，下次有空再来，我老温有的是好酒招待你！
E: It was such fun chatting with you. I like it! Kiddo, come here when you have time. I'll treat you to some good wine!

C: 讲讲你和荒笛的相遇吧…
E: Tell me about how you met Terravox...

C: 之后再见吧。
E: See you later, then.

C: 嗯…有位织者正在为自己充电。金丝带来消息，它正依附在<color=#dbc291ff>流光溢彩的电路板上</color>，感叹生活的舒适呢。
E: Hmm... There's a weaver who is charging itself up. The golden thread brings tidings: It's clinging to a <color=#dbc291ff>gleaming circuit board</color>, basking in the comfort of life.

C: 就照着这个做，我们能改变翁法罗斯航空界，价钱好商量！
E: Just follow this plan, and we can revolutionize the Amphorean aviation industry! Price negotiable!

C: 瞧一瞧，看一看喽——蝉联三届「奥凯纳斯运动会」冠军使用的的同款铁饼！
E: Step right up, folks! Get a look at this. The very same discus used by the three-time champion of the Okeanas Games!

C: 别惦记了，你买不起授权。
E: Forget about it. You can't afford the license.

C: 嗯，听说克瑞斯开了家主题餐厅，能同时吃到奥赫玛和悬锋城的特色菜……
E: Hmm, I heard Kyros opened a themed restaurant where you can try specialties from both Okhema and Castrum Kremnos...

C: 你还挺有远见。
E: Good foresight.

C: 总算让我见到活的了！
E: The real deal! In the flesh!

C: 这场是熟人局啊…
E: Looks like everyone here already knows each other.

C: 你、你们认识？这…不行，谁能保证{F#她}{M#他}不会有所偏颇……
E: Y-You know each other? This... changes everything. Who's to say {F#she}{M#he} wouldn't take sides...

C: 嗯…有位织者正在因恐高瑟瑟发抖。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>高处的数据流附近</color>，发誓永远陪伴它爱的电路板呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is trembling with fear of heights. The golden thread brings tidings: They're near the <color=#dbc291ff>data streams high above</color>, vowing to forever stay with the circuit board they love.

C: 小心，不要触碰那块羽珀，否则「毁灭」的力量会将你一并浸染！
E: Watch out! Don't touch that feather-shaped amber, or the power of Destruction will consume you!

C: 刚遇见瓦尔特的时候，他和同伴在太空里漂流，列车把他俩捞了上来。
E: When we first met Welt, he and his friend were drifting through space. The Express saved the two of them.

C: 关于银河…
E: About the galaxy...

C: 按照《列车安全手册》的标准，对于明显危险的信号来源应当不予理睬。因为你不知道发信的一方究竟是落难者还是准备好陷阱的强盗……
E: Based on the Express Safety Manual, such an obviously dangerous signal should be ignored. You have no idea whether the party sending the signal is a victim needing rescue, or a bandit lurking behind a trap...

C: 只要旅行的时间够久，你一定会遇上其中一两个种族。到时候你就会明白，很多事情并非靠和平交涉就能解决的。
E: Travel for long enough, and you'll be sure to bump into an alien species or two. That's when you'll understand many things cannot be resolved through peaceful negotiations.

C: 真抱歉，帕姆又在催我干活了。
E: I'm so sorry, but Pom-Pom is cracking the whip again.

C: 好了…小子，站过来！看见这片场地了吗？
E: All ready... Hey kid, come over here! Do you see what's in front of you?

C: 之后呢，已经连通的轨道上的地髓灯就会亮起来。你可以根据这个来判断矿车会往哪个方向走。
E: After that, the Geomarrow light on the connected track will light up. You can then use this to judge which direction the mine cart will go.

C: 嗯？你来得挺早嘛。不过我还在想新的谜题，你之后再过来看看吧。
E: Hmm? You're early. I'm still working on a new puzzle, so you'll have to come back later.

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all the questions I have.

C: 为了达成这一目标，迷钟部门会与其他美梦剧团成员深度共建、形成组合拳，对宾客、逐梦客、家族三方输出，反哺内容生态，为梦境旅游业全面赋能！
E: In order to achieve this goal, the Dream Ticker department works closely with the Sweet Dreams Troupe to form a double-whammy that outputs to visitors, Dreamchasers, and The Family. This feedback creates an ecology of content that we can use to fully empower the Dreamscape tourism market!

C: 其中还有个超级黑客，我看过她的资料，竟然能和天才俱乐部的成员打个平手，厉害啊…如果真的是她，能轻松绕过空间站的监控也不奇怪。
E: One of them is a genius hacker. I've read her profile, and she's right up there with the members of the Genius Society. Just incredible... If it really is her, then it's no surprise that the space station's surveillance systems were bypassed.

C: 是的，就是你收到的那条短信。
E: Yeah, that's the text message you got.

C: 谁啊？
E: Who?

C: 于尔丹那个老东西肯定没给你跑腿费吧？听我的，以后就别替他到处催稿了……
E: That old fossil Uldan never paid you, right? Listen. You shouldn't chase up artists for him anymore in the future...

C: 不管怎么样，这幅画现在是你的了。名字嘛，我暂时还没想好——但既然你是它的主人，你想起什么名字就起什么吧。
E: In any case, the painting is yours now. As for the name, I haven't settled on one yet — but seeing as it's yours now, you can name it whatever you like.

C: 任务很简单：你只要带着这台记录仪器前往下层区，与<color=#dbc291ff>「自动机兵•战犬」</color>战斗一次就好。
E: This is a simple job: Just take this recording device down to the Underworld and get into a fight with an <color=#dbc291ff>Automaton Hound</color> — that's all.

C: 请你拍完之后把照片给我看看吧，拍<color=#dbc291ff>一张照片</color>应该就够用了。
E: Please show me the photo once you've taken it. <color=#dbc291ff>One photo</color> should be enough.

C: {NICKNAME}，你觉得…这样描述是否合适？
E: Do you think this description is appropriate, {NICKNAME}?

C: 就到这里吧。
E: That's it for now.

C: 一幅摄影作品，记录了贝洛伯格下层区街景一隅。
E: A work of photography that captures a corner of the Belobogian Underworld.

C: 昏暗的街道上空无一人，令这幅作品缺少了下层区聚落特有的亲切感。
E: The dim, empty street on the piece lacks the unique hospitality of the Underworld settlements.

C: 一幅摄影作品，记录了永冬岭上的星核拘束装置。
E: A work of photography that captures the Stellaron Imprisonment Device atop Everwinter Hill.

C: 然而，「星核」的伟力是恩赐，更是灾难。为了令寒潮退却，无数位大守护者与科研人员前赴后继，矢志究明天外来物的作用原理。
E: However, the power of the Stellaron was a blessing but also a curse. In trying to quell the Eternal Freeze, countless Supreme Guardians and researchers devoted their lives to understand how the extraterrestrial object works.

C: …这就像是被岁阳附身了一样。
E: ...Sounds like she is being possessed by a heliobus.

C: 蛊惑人心的幽灵星槎…
E: A phantom starskiff that puts a spell on people's hearts...

C: 我们先行一步了。
E: We'll take our leave first.

C: 那这些照片就拜托你啦，拍完就用短信发给我吧，我会准备谢礼的！
E: Then I'll leave these photos to you. Send me them via message when you're done, and I'll give you a present~

C: 真、真的吗？请一定要多分我一些版面！终于熬出头了！
E: R—Really? Please give me a centerfold spread! I've finally hit the big time!

C: （亲手从它身上找照片）
E: (Shake it down for the photo with your own two hands)

C: 最上等的食材往往不需要复杂的烹饪工序…就算你的拍照技术还差点火候，凭咱这张脸也足以拯救这张照片啦！
E: The finest ingredients don't require complex recipes... Even if your photography skills leave a lot to be desired, at least my beautiful face was enough to save this photo!

C: 我最懂你啦。
E: I just know you that well.

C: 公司的人和码头工人们吵起来了。
E: Some of the dock workers got into an argument with the IPC folks.

C: 我叫明曦，是金人巷商会的秘书，大家平时叫我「小秘书」。这金人巷码头的事，原本是商会与公司之间的纠纷，不该牵连各位的。
E: My name is Mingxi. I'm the secretary of Aurum Alley Merchant Guild — most people just call me Miss Secretary. This leasing dispute is between the IPC and the Merchant Guild — you shouldn't have been dragged into it.

C: 你从哪儿诊断出我有脑子的？
E: When did you convince yourself I was smart?

C: 姑娘担心的是，确认安全的工作交给我们好了。
E: Don't worry, our motto is "safety first."

C: 所以，我谨代表商会正式向你们发出邀请，希望你们能作为<color=#dbc291ff>「商业顾问」</color>参与到拯救金人巷的计划中。
E: Therefore, on behalf of the Merchant Guild, I would like to formally extend an invitation to you all to serve as <color=#dbc291ff>"business advisors"</color> in the plan to save Aurum Alley.

C: 垣风大哥担忧地注视着金人巷，他比看上去更加心思细腻。
E: Yuanfeng gazes at Aurum Alley anxiously. Seems like he's actually more meticulous than he appears.

C: 这些收入是有些可疑。
E: Suspicious...

C: 还是这个临时被你们拉来，一脸别人欠了{F#她}{M#他}五十信用点的{F#小妞}{M#小子}？
E: Or how about that kid who got dragged into this fiasco at the last minute, walking around like {F#she}{M#he} owes someone <unbreak>50</unbreak> credits?

C: 不过，明曦要将自己的决策在所有商铺面前公之于众，说服我，也赢得商铺的认可。你既然有信心，那这点应该能做到吧？
E: However, Mingxi must make her decision public, and win the approval of both myself and all the merchants. Since you have shown confidence, those terms should be acceptable to you?

C: 在正式交涉前，我们要确认一下手头的「材料」。
E: Before we start, let's review the documents we have.

C: 比起害怕，我更感觉到奇怪。
E: More surprised than afraid.

C: 你们想要的繁荣会消灭金人巷的传统与个性，那是我们承受不起的繁荣。
E: The prosperity under your proposal means diminishing the Alley's tradition and personality — we can afford neither.

C: 这只是个例，还不足以说服我。
E: The sample size is too small. I'm not convinced.

C: 难道尚滋味不打算做外卖？
E: Huh? They don't do takeout?

C: 啊，尚滋味的外卖！
E: Ah! There's finally hope for Spices Supreme takeout!

C: 除此以外，还有几率获得「金人巷推广大使」白露的绘影图形！
E: Aaaand in addition to the coupons, you can get a visiograph of Bailu, our Alley ambassador!

C: 白露逃出丹鼎司的目的竟是…？
E: The shocking truth behind Bailu's escape is...?

C: 我不会怪你的。我用我漫长生命见证过无数像你这样寿数短暂的人类做出的奇迹。即便失败，我也会牢牢铭记你，{NICKNAME}。
E: I won't. I've seen enough miracles in all the years I've lived — miracles achieved by short-life species. Even if you fail, you still have my gratitude, {NICKNAME}.

C: 别再煽情了，再讲下去会输的。
E: Don't go getting mushy on us.

C: 要不是你的嗓门比较大…
E: All thanks to your shouting match with Skott...

C: 第二位客人点的是肉桂香排盖饭，还有份什么来着？
E: The second diner wanted cinnamon pork ribs on rice, and — what else?

C: 我请求在接下来<unbreak>10</unbreak>天内请假，以便我能够全面恢复并回到工作中。我保证尽快恢复健康，并在回到工作时，尽力补偿请假期间的工作进度。
E: I am requesting a leave of absence for the next ten days so that I may fully recuperate and return to work duties. I pledge to recover as soon as possible and will do my best to make up for lost progress once I return to work.

C: 这是我为了自己方便而整理的笔记，上面记录着大量闻所未闻的奇难怪病。
E: These are the notes I listed for my own convenience. I recorded a lot of strange and unheard-of ailments within them.

C: 看来这个证据也不合适，我们换个别的证据吧。
E: Looks like this piece of evidence doesn't work either. Let's try something else.

C: 没有拒绝？那我问问你们，现在有几家商铺加入到你们的物流网络里了？
E: Never refused? Then let me ask you — how many shops are currently in your logistics network?

C: 公司业务员要求商铺们保证8小时工作。看来，公司缺乏调研……
E: IPC sales reps are telling the shops to stay open for at least eight hours a day. They should take a look around them...

C: 原来「尚滋味」就在这旁边，我们走——
E: So the Spices Supreme is right next door. Let's go!

C: 「同功坊」？那你们没走错啊，接着往下走就到啦。
E: Artistry Hardware? Then you're on the right path. Keep going and it's right there.

C: 哎，忙不开身了。
E: Eh, all this work is making my head spin.

C: 要我说你还是别认错鸟，别冤枉我们好鸟呀。
E: Anyway, I'm not slacking off. Call out slackers if you must, but don't falsely accuse an honest, hard-working cycrane.

C: 放心，那些岁阳都在十王司看管之中。
E: Don't worry. Those heliobi are under the control of the Ten-Lords Commission.

C: （先右勾拳，再左勾拳）
E: (Right hook, then left)

C: 此外，我们还为不同实力的选手分别设置了不同的赛事，难度由低到高依次为——
E: Side note, we've also prepared different leagues for participants of different strengths, and they are, in order...

C: 我…我没做白日梦！我刚才那是…学台词呢！
E: I—I'm not daydreaming! I was just... practicing lines!

C: 实验助手的工作…
E: Lab assistant work...

C: 嘿嘿，不知道独立实验的资金什么时候发放呢。
E: Hehehe, I wonder when the funding for my independent research is gonna come through.

C: 至于感应仪的事儿…哎！说来我就一肚子气！
E: As for the sensor... I'm so mad!

C: 很久很久以前，有个小女孩靠卖酸梦糖维持生计。她每天都站在广场附近叫卖：「便宜好吃的酸梦糖，一颗就能忘记饥饿。快来买呀，快来买呀——」
E: Once upon a time, there was a young girl who made a living by selling Sour Dream soft candies. Each day, she would stand near the square, hawking, "Affordable and scrumptious Sour Dream soft candies, one bite and hunger fades away. Come and get 'em, come and get 'em—"

C: 浓郁的奶油草莓味瞬间在你口中爆开，过于馥郁的甜味几乎让思绪都停摆一秒。
E: The rich and creamy strawberry flavor instantly bursts in your mouth, and the exceptionally sweet taste nearly causes your mind to pause for a moment.

C: 从那时起，咱们就计划好要给他们一个教训了。现在正是难得的机会。
E: We decided to teach them a lesson at that time. Now, the best opportunity has come.

C: 那群狱卒的手段肯定不止这些，前面还会有更多障碍的。
E: I bet those prison guards have more tricks up their sleeves. There will be more obstacles waiting for us ahead.

C: 我不好说，等个DLC先。
E: It's hard to say. I'll wait for the upcoming DLC.

C: 虽然后面的关卡没有太多剧情内容作为串联，但我们的梦泡玩法制作组依然为您准备了丰厚的挑战和对应的奖励——您千万不能错过！
E: There will be fewer plot elements in this stage, but the developers have prepared various challenges that come with amazing rewards! Don't miss it!

C: 家族一定早就发现了在酒店内发生的异常现象，这些画作只是其中比较显眼的一例。
E: The Family must already know about the strange happenings in the hotel. These paintings are just one of the more explicit examples.

C: 但从笔记里能看出汉密尔顿对那个女人的崇拜——如果真的和他说的那样，这位舒翁在鸢尾花中的地位仅次于家主……
E: But in the journal, it's pretty obvious that Hamilton admires that woman. If it is as he said, this Siobhan wields authority second only to the head in the Iris Family...

C: 把我喊出来就为了说这个啊？
E: Did you ask me out just to tell me that?

C: 难道我真是个天才？
E: Am I really a genius?

C: 交给我的麻烦事真多啊。
E: Sounds like I'm taking up quite an onerous task.

C: 从现在起，我将成为所有狗狗的守护者，绝不让它们掉眼泪，至、至死方休！
E: From this moment on, I will be the protector of all dogs! I will make sure no dog ever cries and will do so until the day I die!

C: 去吧去吧。
E: Go ahead.

C: 还有别的事。
E: Nah, I've got better stuff to do.

C: 「开拓」就像是发令枪一样，等我听到「开拓」一声令下时，自己早就已经行动起来了。相信我，你也会明白那种感受。
E: Trailblaze is like the sound of the starting pistol. Once I hear the word "Trailblaze," I am already on the move. Trust me, you'll feel that way too someday.

C: 现在有了你的帮助，叛徒的伎俩再厉害，也挡不住猎犬的脚步。让我们去到画里，为匹诺康尼伸张正义！
E: Now, with your help, those traitors won't be able to stop the Hounds no matter how crafty they are. Let's step into the painting and carry out justice for Penacony!

C: 天呐，我的钢铁鳄鱼！是我这张关不上的嘴巴害了你！
E: Oh dear! My Steely Gator! It's my yapping mouth that got you into trouble!

C: 猫头鹰老师准备的烟花耗尽了，这样是无法击败钢铁鳄鱼的……
E: The fireworks prepared by Professor Owl are all used up. We can't beat Steely Gator this way...

C: 一看到您，我就好像鱼看到了水，鸟儿看见了天空，蜜蜂看到了花朵，顿时感到了生活充满希望，工作充满干劲…如果我猜的没错——
E: Ever since I set eyes on you, it's like I'm a fish finding water, a bird taking flight, and a bee savoring nectar. It's as if my life had been bathed in light and hope, fueling my drive to excel at what I do... If I'm not mistaken...

C: 祝您好运！
E: Good luck!

C: 先生，别这么激动，我是代表鸢尾花家系来帮你们的。
E: Sir, please calm down. I'm here to help you on behalf of the Iris Family.

C: 这位大亨一直在幕后指导影业的发展。多亏了他的商业智慧与天马行空的创意，《钟表小子》才能有今天。
E: The tycoon has been at the helm of the company's development behind the scenes. Clockie only gets to see its success today thanks to his business acumen and wild imagination.

C: 谢谢您的祝福，宾客，我们一定会尽力拯救钟表小子的！
E: Thanks for your wish! We'll give it our all to rescue Clockie!

C: 但在克劳克影业，我们的动画分镜都是「钟表匠」先生手工绘制，他也要求我们的动画师亲手创作每一帧的内容。
E: But here at Clock Studios, our storyboards are all hand-drawn by Mr. Watchmaker. He insists that our animators create the content for each frame themselves by hand.

C: 下次再说。
E: Maybe next time.

C: 影城的质量真差。
E: The theme park is such a jerry-built project.

C: 导演，请先去拍摄美梦剧团的<color=#dbc291ff>广告短片</color>吧，一定能学到许多「导演技巧」。
E: Director, please go shoot the Sweet Dreams Troupe's <color=#dbc291ff>commercial short</color> first, and you'll be sure to learn plenty of Directorial Skills.

C: 真是可恶…他们肯定是知道「钟表匠」先生现在没法露面，故意提出这样的要求来为难我们！
E: It's a dirty move... I'm sure they're deliberately making things difficult for us knowing Mr. Watchmaker isn't around.

C: 你还好吗？
E: Are you okay?

C: 「假如未来的某天，一切历史被颂歌覆盖，一切来日被欢笑掩埋，人们再也无法醒来，钟表小子的故事或许能成为唤醒人们的存在……」
E: "If sometime in the future when all histories are covered in carols and all coming days are buried in laughter, and people can never wake up again, Clockie might be the wake-up call to their existence..."

C: 哈哈，我明白导演你的顾虑——之前过来的孩子刚接手相关的工作，可能没传递清楚我们的意思。我替那孩子道歉，也请相信我们的诚意。
E: Haha, I understand your concern — the kid that just came earlier was a newbie and may not have conveyed our message clearly. Please accept my apologies on behalf of the kid. I want to convey our utmost sincerity.

C: 之前已经有人问过了…
E: Someone already asked me before...

C: 「他们愿意将魔法让给钟表小子，帮钟表小子回家。」
E: "They are willing to gift this magic to Clockie, to help Clockie get home."

C: 对了，记住我们的要求——需要拍摄<color=#dbc291ff>所有演员</color>。
E: Oh right, don't forget our criterion: <color=#dbc291ff>Everyone</color> has to be in the shot.

C: 这个钟表小子只能重复固定的台词，应该是鸢尾花制造的*道具*。
E: This Clockie can only repeat fixed lines. It might be a *prop* made by the Iris Family.

C: 感谢你的帮助，小助手，这下《美梦仙踪》算是基本杀青了——嗯，虽<color=#dbc291ff>有些不足</color>，但也算是圆满完成。
E: Thank you for your help, trusty assistant. We can wrap up the Dreamjoy Ascension filming now... Mm, some parts can be better, but at least we got the job done.

C: 好嘞，我去通知广告商。
E: Alright, I'll let the advertisers know.

C: 赚一笔大钱。
E: Make a huge sum of money.

C: 「哈努兄弟和钟表小子特别喜欢汽水先生制造的饮料，他们与汽水先生成了伙伴，一起对抗石头老板。」
E: "Brother Hanu and Clockie loved Mr. Soda's drink, and they teamed up with him to fight together against Boss Stone."

C: 要我说啊，历史上可能根本不存在石头老板，只是钟表小子的故事里必须有一个反派而已。
E: If you ask me, there might not have ever been a Boss Stone in history — the Clockie stories just needed a villain, that's all.

C: 呵呵，这还真是个危险的主题，但这的确是客观事实。从最初的援助者到如今的统治者，无论是好是坏，匹诺康尼已经被他们改变了太多。
E: Ha, well that's a touchy theme, but it sure is the truth of it. From the initial aid providers to the current rulers, Penacony has changed an awful lot — for better or for worse.

C: 反正钟表匠也已经…
E: In any case, the Watchmaker is already...

C: 我还是喜欢看大屏幕…
E: I still prefer seeing things on the big screen...

C: 不如垃圾桶有趣。
E: Trashcans are more interesting than this.

C: 请先别急，听我慢慢道来。
E: Patience, please. I'll explain everything in detail.

C: 谁说不是呢，梦里的怪事可太多了。
E: Ain't that right? So many shenanigans in dreams.

C: 一卷散发金属光泽的录像带，封面刻着古怪的图案，像是一只两栖动物的眼睛——它正在注视着你。
E: A gleaming tape, metallic in its luster, adorned with a peculiar design on its cover — like some kind of amphibian's eye, fixated upon you.

C: （发生了什么…我已经来到影片里了吗？）
E: (What happened... Am I already in the film?)

C: 前方一共有三座舞台。在每座舞台上，你们都能拿到一份剧本梗概。这三份剧本均出自电影大亨「钟表匠」之手，描绘了匹诺康尼拓荒时代的种种逸闻。
E: There are three stages up ahead. On each, you will find an outline of a script. These three scripts were written by the legendary filmmaker, the Watchmaker, and depict various stories from Penacony's era of pioneering.

C: 我生活平凡，她穷困潦倒。
E: I'm leading a normal life, but she ended up destitute.

C: <size=36>不像演的！</size>
E: <size=36>Beautiful!</size>

C: 在生命落幕后，他们才能摆脱庸俗的剧本…但退场后，演员往往会面临比「死亡」更悲惨的结局——被{RUBY_B#世人}观众{RUBY_E#}遗忘。
E: Only when the curtain falls upon life can they shed the tackiness of this script... But after leaving the stage, actors will often face an end worse than "death"... Being forgotten by {RUBY_B#World}the audience{RUBY_E#}.

C: 没别的想问了。
E: No other questions.

C: 总之，恭喜你又一次夺得了热砂盛典的冠军。
E: In any case, congrats on clinching the Scorchsand Festival trophy yet again.

C: †加拉赫†
E: †Gallagher†

C: 这人我认识吗？
E: Do I know this scholar?

C: 爱测，多测！
E: I'm ready for more tests!

C: 对面场上有五个就已是极限了。
E: Having five enemies on the other side of the battlefield is the limit.

C: 一身转战三千里，一剑曾当百万师。
E: The soldier marched alone for three thousand miles, his blade besting a million warriors along his path.

C: （抡起袖子准备开干。）
E: (Let's just give him a good beating.)

C: 我懂！幻戏里徒弟与师父那是一荣俱荣一损俱损。徒弟落败，丢的是师父的脸。
E: I understand! In the immersia, the disciple and the master share both honor and disgrace. If the apprentice fails, the master loses face, too.

C: 正式学剑之前，{NICKNAME}，我看你没怎么说话，你有什么建议吗？
E: You haven't said much, {NICKNAME}. Any suggestions before we officially start training?

C: 是啊，要是幻戏里的反派就这点追求，我肯定是要退票的。
E: Yeah, if that's all a villain did in an immersia, I'd definitely be asking for a refund.

C: 斯科特专员，你清醒一点啊！
E: Specialist Skott, snap out of it!

C: 三月小姐…你在写什么呢？
E: What are you writing... Miss March?

C: 不愧是咱的助教，你说的不错，要是尾巴大爷一走，我一无所获，这可就违背了学剑的初衷了。
E: That's our tutor for you! You're spot on, when Mr. Tail leaves me, I'll be left with nothing. That goes against the fundamentals of swordplay training.

C: 「牺牲感情」？天真！「感情」有什么用？「感情」能变成我餐盘里的火腿吗？能变成我酒杯里的红酒吗？能变成我开的星舰、住的豪宅吗？
E: Sacrificing my emotions? Hah, what a joke! What good do my emotions do me? Can they turn into a delicious meal or a glass of wine? Can they pilot a starship or buy me a mansion?

C: 尊敬的三月七小姐，现在，开战吧。
E: Now, it is time to fight, dear Miss March.

C: 劝斯科特离职。
E: Convince Skott to quit his job.

C: 你默契地看向了唇枪舌剑的攻坚主力——青雀，她立刻明白了你的意思。
E: You cast a knowing glance at Qingque, the main force in this war of words, who immediately caught your drift.

C: 算了吧，斯科特已经在反思了。
E: Drop it, Skott is in the midst of introspection.

C: 这个也是假的。
E: This is also false.

C: *饥饿的声音*咕噜咕噜咕——
E: (tummy growls)

C: 是医士！不想当医士的厨子算不上好的将军幕僚…我给你解释这些干嘛呢？
E: I'm a healer! Chefs who don't want to be doctors aren't fit to be a general's loyal retainer... Wait, why am I even explaining this to you?
A... snake?

C: 服食珍奇药物的赤龙？<color=#dbc291ff>下次再来丹鼎司里问问吧。</color>
E: A Crimson Dragon that has been fed rare herbs? <color=#dbc291ff>Let's ask around at the Alchemy Commission next time.</color>

C: 我又不练剑，还是让三月喝吧。
E: I'm not the one training to be a swordsman, let March drink it instead.

C: 正～是～老～夫～
E: Yes, it is I.

C: …青雀肯定是去打帝垣琼玉牌了吧。<color=#dbc291ff>下次再来太卜司看看吧。</color>
E: ...She must be going to play celestial jade.... <color=#dbc291ff>Let's come and check out the Divination Commission again another time.</color>

C: …可要是完全没有任何代价，听上去就很廉价。
E: ...Well, if it has no cost, it sounds like it will be pretty worthless?

C: 垃圾桶？
E: Trashcans?

C: 好吧，如果还需要补拍，欢迎随时过来。
E: Alright. If you need to retake any pictures, you can come back anytime.

C: 好吧，如果还需要补拍，欢迎随时过来。
E: Alright. If you need to retake any pictures, you can come back anytime.

C: 都对人家做了那样的事情，还装作不认识？你可真无情～
E: Are you really going to pretend that you don't know me after what you did to me? So cruel~

C: 哟，我们开始吧！
E: Alright, let's get started!

C: 一人一桶聊得热火朝天，你很好奇这桶能与铁卫情报官有什么共同语言……
E: Seeing this human and trashcan engaged in heated conversation, you can't help but be curious about what common language a trashcan could have with a Silvermane Guard Intelligence Officer.

C: 朋友，做好事要留名！大方承认吧，你根本就是个责任心爆棚的人！
E: My friend, it is okay to take credit for good deeds! Just admit that you are the kind of person that is extremely concerned for others!

C: 这样的战斗方式……没想到，我居然还有这么激进的一面吗。
E: This fighting style... I never imagined that I would have such an extreme side.

C: 多亏了你与贝洛伯格人之间坚不可摧的友谊，这些家伙已经被「友谊魔法」闪瞎眼了！现在，它们正躲在「夹层世界」里痛哭流涕，学习重新做人呢。
E: Thanks to your unbreakable friendship with the people of Belobog, these lots have been blinded by the Magic of Friendship! Now, they have retreated back into hiding in the "Betweenwhere," weeping as they reflect once more on how to behave properly.

C: …对不起，请继续。
E: ...Sorry, please continue.

C: 听到了吗，各位？现在在观众席的某处，小桂子正在看着我们。弟兄们，不能让小桂子失望！
E: Hear that, everyone? Lil Gui is somewhere in the audience watching us. Brothers, we mustn't disappoint our Lil Gui!

C: 我可是拳击手啊！不是每天都会撞到头吗？
E: I'm a boxer! My head gets hit every other day!

C: 我并没有瞧不起您的意思。我明白，努力活下去的人，都很了不起。
E: It wasn't my intent to look down on you. I believe anyone striving to survive is truly remarkable.

C: 而且，梦貘还偏爱那些「重口味」的忆质，你越是焦虑，它吃得越开心。对不对呀，小家伙？
E: And, the tuskpir loves "strong" memoria: The more depressed you are, the more happy it'll be. Isn't that right, little fella?

C: 你们先去忙你们的事情，我正要回竞锋舰给队员们送药…我呢，身为云骑，急人所急，日行一善，这只梦貘，我可以帮你们抱回休息室！我就抱一抱，绝对不会据为己有的！
E: You all go take care of your stuff. I'm about to head back to the Skysplitter to deliver some meds to the team... As a Cloud Knight, I always help out and do at least one good deed a day. I can take this tuskpir to the lounge for you! I'll just hold it for a bit, I swear I won't steal it!

C: 你…不会也是参加演武仪典的选手吧？你也是来挑战那位叫彦卿的选手吗？
E: You're... also here to compete in the Wardance? Are you also here to challenge the one named Yanqing?

C: 谢谢你，卢卡。时候不早了，我该去为擂赛做准备了。
E: Thank you, Luka. It's late. I have to go prepare for my match.

C: 没想到，在天舶司办理入境手续的时候，我们又遇到了意料之外的情况……
E: I never thought that, while we were processing our entry papers at the Sky-Faring Commission, we would run into another surprise...

C: 他只是和公司有私仇罢了。
E: He's just got a grudge against the IPC, that's all.

C: 老子对大惊小怪已经见怪不怪了。
E: Good thing I'm already used to such reactions.

C: 他倒是不耽误干饭。
E: At least his appetite hasn't changed.

C: 卢卡，那小女孩是谁啊？
E: Luka, who is that little girl?

C: 不管怎么说，这都已经是过去很久的事了。
E: Hey, it happened a long time ago.

C: 诶哟，你们来看我比赛啦？可惜，公司的小可爱盯上我了，我得赶紧撤了。
E: Well, I'll be hornswoggled, you all come to see my match? Too bad. Those lil' IPC fudglings are on my tail. I gotta hightail it outta here.

C: 烈就对了！我们成熟男人就他宝贝的要烈！劲！
E: Fiery, just the way we like it! Us grown men need it strong and kickin'! Fudge yeah!

C: 那么，您会派遣军队收复那个快要沦陷的「市场」吗？易卜拉欣先生？
E: So, will you deploy your army to take over the collapsing market, Mr. Abraham?

C: 卢卡选手，感谢你出手相助。那个叫奢摩的步离人逃犯和她的智械同伙已经被我们控制住了，否则不知道得出多大的乱子。
E: Thank you for your help, Contestant Luka. The borisin fugitive named Samatha and her Intellitron accomplice are now under our control. Who knows how big of a mess they would have caused otherwise?

C: 谢谢你，队长。我这就出发。
E: Thank you, captain. I'll head there right now.

C: 现在，这个「童话故事」因你而破灭了，奢摩。步离人终究不可能改变嗜血的本性。就算你伪装成狐人的模样，你也无法成为我们。
E: Now, this fairy tale has been destroyed because of you, Samatha. The borisin can never change their bloodthirsty nature. Even if you're disguised as a foxian, you'll never become one of us.

C: 鲁珀特的怪物，还有步离人，多少世界因你们毁灭？！在老子面前装什么好人，你们以为这样做过去的一切就能一笔勾销？
E: Rubert's monster, and you borisin — how many worlds have been destroyed by your race!? Stop pretending to be saints in front of me. You think acting this way will erase all your sins?

C: 我于空寂中来，为众生而生，故，不害亦不衍。
E: I am born of the void, born in servitude to all beings, thus I shall neither harm nor transgress.

C: 不要再说了……
E: Please, don't talk about this anymore...

C: 等等再试吧。
E: Let's try it later.

C: 你抱起梦貘，席地而坐，闭上双眼，准备体验一下这传说中的「梦境战斗训练」。
E: You pick up the tuskpir, sit on the floor, and close your eyes — you are ready to experience this fabled Dreamscape Combat Training.

C: 不对劲…一阵困意突然袭来，你的意识缓缓远去。梦貘…真是神奇的动物啊……
E: Something's off... A sudden wave of drowsiness hits you, and your consciousness starts drifting away. The tuskpir... sure is a wondrous creature...

C: 好了，这次提问就到这里了。
E: All right. That's it for your questions.

C: 谢谢。
E: Thank you.

C: 你说的是虎克吧，那不是卢卡的「雅利洛•Ⅵ」亲友团吗？
E: You mean Hook? Isn't she a friend of Luka's from Jarilo-VI?

C: 找你玩…{NICKNAME}教练，你怎么跟谁都那么熟？
E: Hang out with... Coach {NICKNAME}, why do you know everyone?

C: 是我出现幻觉了，还是你真的拿着银鬃铁卫的盾牌？
E: Am I hallucinating, or are you really carrying a shield from the Silvermane Guards?

C: 确实，不管对手是谁，都不应该轻敌。
E: That's right. Never underestimate your opponent, no matter who they are.

C: 亲爱的观众朋友们，欢迎回到星天演武仪典叩关赛的擂台！
E: Dear spectators, welcome back to the Luminary Wardance Knockout Match Arena!

C: 打得过我吗？
E: Can they beat me?

C: 开始比赛。
E: Begin competition.

C: 亲爱的观众朋友们，欢迎回到星天演武仪典叩关赛的擂台！
E: Dear spectators, welcome back to the Luminary Wardance Knockout Match Arena!

C: 怪我，我没管理好卢卡选手的饮食，让他吃了不干净的训练餐。
E: I am to blame. I didn't watch Luka's diet properly, and he ate some bad food during training.

C: 喂！别说的就像老爹不在了一样啊！
E: Hey! Stop talking like the old man's left this world!

C: 请问{NICKNAME}教练如何评价网上的这种观点？
E: Might I ask what Coach {NICKNAME} has to say about such opinions on the internet?

C: 如果完全遵循原教旨主义，那参赛选手要被筛掉一大半喽。
E: If we completely stick to the fundamentals, half the contestants would be deemed ineligible.

C: {NICKNAME}教练你好，我是来自《武林风云》的记者。我们是一档专业武术点评栏目，我的名字不重要，您可以叫我「专业记者」。
E: Hello, Coach {NICKNAME}. I'm from the Martial Herald. We are a professional martial arts commentary column. My name isn't important, and you can just call me "Professional Journalist."

C: 网友当裁判组是摆设？要是史瓦罗选手真的放水，裁判组能看不出来？
E: They think the judges are window dressing? If Svarog were really trying to throw the match, you think the judges wouldn't notice?

C: 不过是卢卡选手的手下败将，心有不甘却胆小如鼠，有本事在网上发发脾气，没有本事上擂台耍耍把式。
E: They are nothing more than fighters who lost to Luka — sore about their defeat but too cowardly to admit it. All they can do is vent their frustrations online since they lack the caliber in the ring.

C: 现在的卢卡与过去的卢卡已经不一样了，这就是成长的力量。
E: Luka as he is now is different from that Luka of past. This is the power of growth.

C: 面对波提欧选手的枪口，卢卡选手要做何选择！
E: Just what will Luka do in the face of Boothill's muzzle?

C: 铄金还想骗我们，赶紧滚蛋！
E: Shuojin is still trying to fool us, scram!

C: 你饿了吗？啊！对了，你稍等我一会儿！我去给你煮一碗牛肉面！
E: Are you hungry? Ah! Wait here! I'll make you a bowl of beef noodles!

C: 有空搞这些，不如多拨点预算。
E: The time spent on this rubbish could've been better used to raise more funds.

C: 啊，这段对话已经快<unbreak>800</unbreak>字了。超过<unbreak>1000</unbreak>字，「虚拟陪玩」就要加收服务器运营费了。
E: Ah, this conversation has almost reached <unbreak>800</unbreak> words. The virtual NPC is going to start charging additional server operational fees if you exceed <unbreak>1,000</unbreak> words.

C: 和你的对话超过<unbreak>1000</unbreak>字，那就要付费了。
E: It'll cost us if our conversation exceeds <unbreak>1,000</unbreak> words.

C: 你要是剩余价值太多，不如让我榨取一下，别浪费在这种垃圾小游戏上。
E: If you've got value to spare, why not let me squeeze the rest out of you. Don't waste your time on this trash game.

C: 不行，再说下去要超过<unbreak>800</unbreak>字了，再见！
E: Nope, we're almost at the <unbreak>800</unbreak>-word limit. Goodbye!

C: 烂游戏？不，这些小游戏有不少可圈可点的设计。
E: Bad game? Not really. These mini-games actually have quite a few design aspects worth noting.

C: 会花落谁家呢？好期待呀！
E: Who will it be? So exciting!

C: 这精美的画质，创新的玩法，精妙的关卡！
E: Such exquisite graphics, innovative gameplay, and clever level design!

C: 这个游戏到底是谁在赢啊！
E: Who is winning in this game!?

C: 哎呀，这就是个最近流行的梗而已啦，别太较真。
E: Sheesh, it's just a recently trending meme. Stop being such a stickler.

C: 繁荣、稳定、充满生机的梦境才能吸引全银河的投资者，名义上由学生主办的活动无疑是最好的展示窗口。我们不能错过这个机会。
E: Only a prosperous, stable and vibrant Dreamscape can attract investors from all over the cosmos. An event ostensibly organized by students is indubitably the greatest exhibition showcase. We cannot miss this opportunity.

C: 那么…本次音乐派对的演出乐队，乐队经理由来自星穹列车的无名客——{NICKNAME}担任，核心则是这位乱破小姐。
E: Then... For this music party's performing band, the band manager shall be the Astral Express' Nameless — {NICKNAME}. The band leader shall be Ms. Rappa.

C: 好像…不能用。按校规，音乐派对的乐队…只能演奏自己创作的曲子。
E: It's probably... unusable. According to school regulations, the music party bands... must play their own original songs.

C: 新创音律的忍道极为艰辛，忍首更应以身作则。故——编制音谱之责，就由在下完成！
E: The newly-formed way of the sound ninja's tenets may be arduous, which is why the Head Ninja must rise to the occasion. Therefore, the task of creating the composition has befallen me!

C: 我觉得挺好，玩乐队就要有个亮眼的样子！乱破小姐，你的设计真是太棒了！
E: I think it's fine. A band needs to look snappy! Ms. Rappa, your design is most excellent!

C: 阁下，村中看似平静，实则暗潮涌动，贼人勾心斗角，切不可放松警惕，疏于提防。
E: The town may seem serene, but dark tides threaten to surge forth. Scoundrels bicker among themselves, and we mustn't lower our guard, oblivious to the surrounding dangers.

C: 到我们出场的时候了！
E: It is time for us to make our entrance!

C: 高端乐队就是不一样！这个「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」的演出确实啊，旋律正劲头足，听起来真爽！
E: Now that's the caliber of a great band! This performance by Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party is truly head-banging! It was a delight to listen to!

C: 据说它是下期《逐梦客时讯》的封面，好多学生都想爬上去和大鸟合影呢。
E: I hear that it'll be on the cover page of the next issue of Dreamchaser Bulletin. Many students want to climb up and take a selfie with the bird!

C: 汪！汪汪！
E: Woof! Woof woof!

C: 喜闻乐见的情节。
E: What a dramatic and fun twist.

C: 你沉浸在现场的喧闹气氛中，度过了一段轻松的时光。
E: You lose yourself in the bustling atmosphere of the crowd and enjoy a moment of relaxation.

C: 咦咦，我记得乐队不是有四个人吗，怎么少了一个？该不会是退出了吧？
E: Eh? Didn't you have four members in your band? One's gone missing? They left?

C: 我要DISS你们！
E: I'm gonna diss 'em!

C: 猎物既定，来整理目前需完成的试炼吧。
E: We have determined our prey — let us review the trials that still need to be undertaken.

C: 话虽如此…呃，台上那两个学生是你们乐队的成员吧，为什么在说脱口秀啊？
E: That being said... Err, those two students are your band members, no? Why're they doing crosstalk?

C: 我允许你挑战我了吗？
E: Did I agree to your challenge?

C: …虽然听不懂它们在说什么，但那只毛绒玩具好像被同伴嫌弃了，有点可怜。
E: ...I don't understand what they are saying, but that stuffed toy looks like it's being rejected by its companion. I feel pity for it.

C: 选拔就要开始了，做好准备。
E: The selection is about to start. Get ready.

C: …嗯，确实。只要努力提升自己的水平，就不用害怕任何议论。
E: ...Yes, that's true. As long as you work hard to improve yourself, there's no need to fear any gossip.

C: 另类，不羁，充满激情，活力四射，像极了我年轻时候的样子啊。我喜欢你们的演奏！
E: Unique, unconventional, full of passion, bursting with energy, a spitting image of my younger days. I liked your performance plenty!

C: （陪这只扑满玩会）
E: (Play with the trotter for a bit)

C: 这只扑满缩起了身子，对你即将实施的行为表现出强烈的抵触，还是放弃吧。
E: This trotter curls up, showing great resistance to what you're about to do. Best give up.

C: 哼，哼哼！
E: Oink, oink oink!

C: 这不是表演乐队的经理吗，怎么还和这些垃圾桶有关系？
E: Isn't this the performing band's manager? How does the manager know these trashcans?

C: 副导演
E: Assistant Director

C: 他给我讲了个征服雷电的故事。说是一位科学家，想验证闪电与静电同出一源，挑了个雷电交加的日子去放风筝。
E: He told me a story about conquering the lightning. Said it was a scientist who wanted to verify that the sources of lightning and static electricity are the same, and chose a stormy day to fly a kite.

C: 家人慢走，明天还来啊！
E: Take care, friend. Come back tomorrow!

C: 大喇叭。
E: A huge megaphone.

C: 偷偷联系银狼代打。
E: Secretly contact Silver Wolf to stand in for you.

C: 看来，只能再试一次云吟术了……
E: Looks like I'll just have to try cloudhymn magic again...

C: 姬子乘客！
E: Himeko!

C: 唔，原来如此…难怪这些绿植越来越茁壮了，一定是这些肥料的缘故帕。
E: Oh, I see... No wonder the plants are growing more verdantly these days. It must be because of this fertilizer.

C: 主厨的尊严要求你独立完成！
E: The chef's dignity requires that you finish this alone!

C: 发生甚么事了？
E: What happened?

C: 瓦尔特面不改色地说出一连串精妙的谎言，席间无人能分辨其真假。直到最后，狐人被尽数狩猎，独留下三月七一人。
E: Without batting an eyelid, Welt spins a brilliant lie. None of the players can discern its veracity. Until the end, almost all the foxians have been hunted, save for March 7th.

C: 加油啊，手指！狂点啊！
E: C'mon, fingers! Don't stop tapping!

C: 不管是真是假，总之先试试传说中的云骑老办法吧！丹恒敲晕三月，我再敲晕丹恒。
E: Doesn't matter if it's authentic — let's just try out the legendary Cloud Knight method first! Dan Heng will knock March out, and I'll knock Dan Heng out.

C: 的确。为了保护「星空生态」，我们还是得接下这一单。
E: That's true. We have to take this request to protect the Astral Ecology.

C: 但他们给的酬劳是真多啊…唉，原谅他们5秒钟吧。
E: But they were really generous with their payment... *sigh* I'll forgive them for five seconds.

C: 「摄影课题将在每天早上公布，届时请关注摄影展线上页面。」
E: "Photography tasks will be announced every morning. Please take note of the photography exhibition's online page during that time."

C: 「呵呵，『盛会巨星』的即兴台词，总是那么出人意料。此刻与你对话的并非副导演，而是远在他处的导演本人。」
E: "Heh-heh, ad-libbed dialogue from the Festive Superstar never fails to surprise. It is not the assistant director who is talking to you now, but the director himself, who is in a distant place."

C: 教授，可以戴上石膏头套吗？
E: Prof, can you wear the plaster headpiece?

C: 这是我们店的地盘！
E: This is our shop's turf!

C: 还有其他的附赠品吗？
E: Any other freebies for us?

C: 知更鸟正在录制节目中…原来这就是她工作时的状态。
E: Robin is recording a show right now... So this is what she's like in work mode.

C: 汪！好多掌声…都是给我的吗？我是一只幸福到要爆炸的糖浆汽水捏！
E: Woof! Such thunderous applause... Is it all for me? I'm a syrupy soda about to burst with happiness!

C: 就叫「请勿登高」吧。
E: "Please Do Not Climb" it is.

C: 凭着三月的灵心慧性，拿奖一定是手到拈来啦。
E: March's smart and talented. She's a shoo-in for a prize.

C: 我感觉你在埋汰我…
E: Feels like you're throwing mad shade...

C: 卷轴上的符文亮起，回应着你的来意；信徒们齐声念诵，赞词在你的脑海中回响——
E: The runes on the scroll are glowing, responding to your intent. Disciples chant in unison, their praises echoing in your mind...

C: …不对，我见过你，想想…哟，这不是伟大的黄金裔嘛？对，你们是奥赫玛的领导者，高所有人一等，当然有资格教我做事。
E: ...Hang on, I've seen you before. Wait... Oh, if it isn't a great Chrysos Heir? Ah yes, leaders of Okhema, and an echelon higher than the rest — of course you are qualified to tell me how to do my job.

C: 我就是最友善的动物朋友！
E: I am the friendliest friend to animals!

C: 呀，通报批评…我在树庭求学的时候，都没有被那刻夏老师这么处罚过。对、对不起……
E: Ah, a memo of criticism... I was never punished so harshly by Professor Anaxa even when I was studying back at the Grove. S—Sorry...
...Heh.

C: 谈话间，你似乎看到这只自称为领队的奇美拉，嘴角露出了难以察觉的笑容。
E: In the midst of the conversation, you seem to notice a barely perceptible smile flash across this self-proclaimed Alpha Chimera.

C: …不就是只奇美拉吗，我还不稀罕！我退出，我不玩了，你们自个去卷吧！
E: ...Bah, they're just some chimeras, think I would care? I'm out, done! You lot can compete amongst yourselves!

C: 应该不是。近期奥赫玛要处理的事情确实很多，只能辛苦小奇美拉了……
E: Probably not. There've been plenty of happenings that needed to be settled in Okhema, but that's just more effort on the chimeras' part...

C: 正好，园丁小姐也在问，是否需要派些更厉害的奇美拉来支援我们。
E: And it's been good timing that Miss Gardener has also been asking us if she needs to dispatch stronger chimeras our way.

C: 呀，这样的话，成员数量会不会有点太多了，灰宝管理起来也很费劲呢。
E: Ah, if that's the case, wouldn't we have too many members? It's also going to be hard on you, Grayie.

C: 如果我始终占据领队位置，其余成员将永远无法得到成长。后退，是为了共同前进。
E: If I continue to hog the leader role, the other members will never be able to grow. Taking a step back is so that everyone can move forward.

C: 缇宝老师还没回来，估计也在什么地方忙着吧。
E: Tribbie isn't back yet. She's probably busy somewhere else.

C: 原本的钱没挣到，现在还要倒赔一笔。这下可亏大了啊。
E: I didn't make any of the expected money, and now I have to pay a fine. This has been a huge loss.

C: 最重要的…别忘了多陪陪这些小家伙呀。
E: Just remember... don't forget to spend more time with these little ones.

C: 泰坦神迹？泰坦科技！
E: Titan Miracle? Titan technology!

C: 没问题，先来点简单的练练手，我们切磋一下。
E: No problem. Let's start with something easy to warm up. We'll have a friendly match.

C: （阿波菲斯已经在等着了，去找他吧……）
E: (Apophis is already waiting. I should go find him...)

C: 咳咳…大概这就是奥赫玛运动精神吧！简称，奥运精神。
E: *cough* This must be what they call the Okheman athletic spirit! Some also call it the Okhemic spirit.

C: 不要再增加悬锋城刻板印象了。
E: Please don't reinforce the stereotypes about Castrum Kremnos.

C: 如此无所不吞的力量，和我的内心深处的贪婪多么相配，怎么会一败涂地？
E: A power that swallows everything, one that mirrors my bottomless greed... how could it crumble so pathetically?

C: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o「丹恒，该是偿还代价的时候了！时候到了~~」)∋
E: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o "Dan Heng, It's time to pay the price! It's time!!!~~")∋

C: 那就是，<color=#dbc291ff>不是一直赢才叫追求「胜利」</color>！
E: That is, <color=#dbc291ff>pursuing "victory" doesn't mean always winning</color>!

C: 我赢了，该把奖杯还我了吧？
E: I won, so it's time for you to return my trophy, right?

C: 一点心意，只能算是东道主的薄礼。
E: It's a small token. Just a humble gesture from the host.

C: 说吧，有什么事找我？
E: Speak, what's the matter?

C: 嗷呜~居然看扁泡泡，小海豹能行，泡泡怎么不行！
E: Awooo~ You look down on Bubbles! Anything the baby seals can do, Bubbles can do better!

C: 我希望出战选手，<color=#dbc291ff>更换为巴特鲁斯</color>。
E: I'd like to substitute the contestant, <color=#dbc291ff>replace with Bartholos</color>.

C: 她编出了「三大灾厄」的预言，并将谎言藏在真言之中，让它们传播开来。
E: She fabricated a prophecy of "three great calamities," then hid lies among truths to let them spread.

C: 随后又假装成「识破谎言」的好伙伴，让你们亲手将她偷不走的奖杯交给了她。
E: Then she pretended to be an ally who could "see through lies," tricking you into handing her the trophy she couldn't otherwise steal.

C: 无妨，先以筹备比赛要紧。若因为奖杯失窃办不成比赛，就顾此失彼了。
E: No worries. Our first priority is getting ready for the match. If we can't hold the match because the trophy's stolen, that'd be a total loss.

C: 你打开箱盖，箱子内的屏幕也一并亮起。
E: When you lift the lid, a screen inside flickers to life.

C: 若能借此机会重启「开拓」庆典，倒也是一件妙事。
E: If we can take this opportunity to restart the Trailblaze Ceremony, that'll be wonderful.

C: 等做完手头的工作，我会把这部作品分享给更多人。之后只需要静待反响就好了。
E: Once I finish the work on hand, I'll share this creation with more people. All I need to do next is to patiently wait for reactions.

C: 好的，我的投影会一直在这里，有问题可以随时来找我。
E: Alright, my projection will be here. If you have any questions, feel free to come find me.

C: 嘁，还以为是什么厉害对手，原来是只小浣熊。
E: Tch. And I thought it was some powerful opponent. It's just a little raccoon.

C: 你就只有这么点能耐吗，简直自寻死路！
E: Is this all you can do? You're just gonna die!

C: 呵。就到这吧，属于这个舞台的时间已经到了。
E: Heh. Let's call it a day here. This stage's time is up.

C: 太棒了！您的驾驶天赋真是令人惊叹，完全不像是第一次驾驶球笼赛车。
E: Amazing! Your driving skills are impressive — this doesn't feel like your first time driving a Spheroid racer.

C: 总之…出门在外，还是保护好自己。实在不行，就跟我们一起回空间站吧。
E: Look... Just stay sharp out there. If things go south, bail and come back to the space station with us.

C: 您这么有信心，那我就放心了。
E: Since you're so confident, I feel reassured.

C: 「我决定，让我的好朋友——青雀，变成折纸小鸟……」
E: "I've made up my mind... I'm turning my dear friend Qingque into an Origami Bird..."

C: 啾啾！啾啾！
E: Tweet tweet! Tweet tweet!

C: 时候不早了，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，想必你还有比同一位无趣的老人闲聊更重要的事吧？
E: It's getting late, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}. I'm sure you've got better things to do than chat with a boring old man like me.

C: 辛苦你了，下回来庇尔波因特，我请咖啡。
E: Thank you for your effort. Next time you visit Pier Point, I'll buy you coffee.

C: 前有*宝箱怪*。
E: A *Mimic* coming right up.

C: 嗷！你他呜呜伯的干什么！
E: Ouch! What the fudge are you doing!?

C: 别灰心，账账，幻想有天也能变成现实的。
E: Chin up, Numby. One day, dreams might just come true.

C: 你受到的教育难道告诉你，客人面前的吧台空空荡荡时，身为调饮师只要束手旁观就行了吗？
E: Did your training teach you to stand idle while the countertop in front of a guest stays empty?

C: （是…是素裳！）
E: (Isn't that... Sushang!?)

C: 嗜睡的病理症状并非凭意志力就能克服。但也不必忧虑，这类疾病人群发病率低于<unbreak>0.02%</unbreak>，临床上需要病情持续三个月以上才能诊断。你更大概率只是精力不足……
E: Such pathological sleepiness isn't something you can will your way through. But no need to worry, the incidence rate is below <unbreak>0.02%</unbreak>, and clinical diagnosis requires symptoms to persist for more than three months. It's far more likely you're just low on energy...

C: 「提高一分干掉千人」。
E: "One Extra Point Wipes Out a Thousand Competitors."

C: 哼哼，黑塔女士把玩整个宇宙，就像孩子把玩它的玩具！
E: Hehe. Madam Herta toys with the cosmos like a child with playthings.

C: 咳…「人格映射」模块的赞美算法有些过拟合了。别在意，老毛病了。
E: Ahem... the sycophant algorithm in the "Replica Personality" module seems a bit overfitted. Don't mind it. Long-standing bug.

C: 可以摸会儿鱼了…
E: Guess that means it's chill time...

C: 此次征讨的并非宵小之辈，而是弹指间能碾碎星辰的一方绝灭大君……
E: We're not up against some petty thug this time. This is a Lord Ravager. It could crush the stars in the blink of an eye...

C: 把本将军的竞锋舰炮拉过来！
E: Get me my Skysplitter cannons!

C: 我立志不喝饮料，目前已经坚持了整整半个系统时。
E: I swore off drinks. Haven't had one for half a system hour.

C: 不战斗就无法生存！
E: You fight to survive!

C: 舒翁女士临行前念念有词，我依稀听见她说「眠眠还留在热砂会场，得接它回家」…恐怕的确是非去不可的要事。
E: Before leaving, Miss Siobhan was muttering to herself. I faintly heard her say, "Sleepie is still at the Scorchsand Hall. I need to bring it home." Seems like it was something truly urgent.

C: 实至名归的奖项！
E: A well-deserved award!

C: 呵，虚名浮利，不必在意。是我的哪项研究入选了？
E: Hah, just some vain fame and fleeting gains, nothing worth celebrating. Which of my papers was selected?

C: 谢谢你的褒奖喽。
E: Thanks for your praise.

C: 等我拿笔记一下…
E: Hold on, let me take some notes...

C: 当然，下面的宝贝多着呢，咱俩一起发财！
E: Great. There're troves and troves of treasure down there. Let's get rich together!

C: 进入古代遗迹。
E: Enter the ancient ruins.

C: 我咋变成鸟了？
E: Did I just turn into a bird!? This is not funny!!!

C: 嗐，这您有所不知，在咱们编剧行业，最难写的莫过于主角的成长…主角的成长有了着落，要多来几场血战还不简单！
E: Ah, you don't understand. The most difficult thing for us screenwriters is the protagonist's development... Once the protagonist's character is settled, it's gonna be so easy to just write in as many battles as you want!

C: 再等我一下。
E: Hang on a minute.

C: 龙尊MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>型
E: High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>

C: 「当此之时，正乃罗浮仙舟危急存亡之秋，绝灭大君幻胧率烬灭匪兵杀到，誓要将这罗浮搅个天翻地覆！」
E: "This was a time when Xianzhou Luofu fell into crisis, with the Lord Ravager Phantylia leading the forces of the Ruin Author on a rampage as they vowed to destroy the Luofu!"

C: 「{NICKNAME}横刀立马，挡在幻胧身前，大喝一声：『妖孽，今时此处，便是你埋骨之时、葬身之处！』」
E: "{NICKNAME}, with weapon in hand, stood before Phantylia, bellowing out: 'Beast! Right here, right now: This will be your final resting place!'"

C: 啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊！
E: Aaaaaaaaaargh!!

C: 也就是说先注入<color=#dbc291ff>「无根纯水」</color>，再加入<color=#dbc291ff>「天火熔金」</color>，等到它将纯水全部蒸发，就加入<color=#dbc291ff>「冷却液」</color>。完全冷却之后，将<color=#dbc291ff>「建木柄材」</color>放入，再加入<color=#dbc291ff>「无根纯水」</color>，剑材与剑柄连为一体，宛如天成。
E: What that means is, first add the <color=#dbc291ff>Bona Aqua</color>, then add the <color=#dbc291ff>Ignis Aureliae</color>. When the Bona Aqua has completely evaporated, add <color=#dbc291ff>coolant</color>. After it has completely cooled, put in the <color=#dbc291ff>hilt-wood from the Arbor</color>, then add more <color=#dbc291ff>Bona Aqua</color> to fuse the hilt with the metal into a single instrument, as though they have always been one.

C: 放入「天火熔金」
E: Put in the Ignis Aureliae

C: 你怎么标题剧透！
E: Hey, that title is a spoiler!

C: 原来如此，好说好说。我原本就给「不夜侯」准备了些话本，你们那边想用尽管录就是了。
E: I see your point. Actually I've prepared some shows for the Sleepless Earl. Feel free to record them if you want.

C: 那你还不赶紧答应。
E: Then what are we waiting for?

C: 没错，就是这个，既然高阿姨都这么说了，那就麻烦{NICKNAME}将「小吃铺」纳入到物流规划之中吧，这样码头就会有新的运单了。
E: Yeah, that's the thing. Since Tall Auntie already mentioned it, then {NICKNAME}, please add the Food Stall into the logistics plan. This way, the docks can get some new orders soon.

C: 这个你不用担心，都包在我身上，我从库房里整理了一堆库存出来，有古董也有普通文玩，我们家多少年的积累了，量大管饱！
E: No need to worry about that. I've brought out a whole bunch of antiques and ordinary fandangles from my family's warehouse, so you'll have plenty to smash at the upcoming show!

C: 也给你个建议，如果不想发生对战，就躲着点其他玩家吧。
E: Let me give you a suggestion: If you don't want to battle, you should try and avoid other players.

C: 忘记自我介绍了——鄙人名叫乔瓦尼•迪•乔尔吉奥•达•艾普瑟隆——来自艾普瑟隆的小小私商，本届「星际决胜庆典」的全权赞助人……
E: My name is Giovanni di Giorgio da Epsilon, a humble private trader from Epsilon, and the sole sponsor of this year's Interastral Tournament Festival...

C: 哈哈哈，您果然很幽默！但很可惜，这副面具事关我的生命安全——就让我们为彼此留些私人空间，好吗？
E: Hahaha, how humorous! As much as I'd like to oblige, this mask is a necessary precaution for me. Let's leave something to the imagination, shall we?

C: ——哦，抱歉，我的失误。本次赛事由于众所周知的星核问题，许多玩家将无法实地到场…所以，你恐怕只能见到些熟悉面孔了。
E: Ah yes, my apologies. I should have mentioned this earlier, but because of the well-known Stellaron problem, many players won't be able to attend in person... So, it's likely you'll mostly encounter familiar faces during the event.

C: 你这小屁孩，从小手脚就不干净，长大后还得了？
E: You little brat — who said you could touch this?

C: 哼，哼哼……
E: Oink! Oink, oink...

C: 咦？这里的氛围感觉有些不一样…好热闹呀。
E: The atmosphere here is so different now... It's so lively!

C: 真是个怪人……
E: Okay, that's weird...

C: 今晚先好好休息一下。
E: Let's get a good night's rest.

C: 出发——这次也要拿到资格徽章！
E: Here we go! We'll have another Mastery Mark in no time!

C: 必须把它搞到手！你们根本不懂职场人士的辛酸！
E: Just hand them over already and save us the hassle! We're just doing our job!

C: 你到底有什么企图？
E: What exactly are you up to?

C: 毕竟…谁知道那个面具男在打什么主意呢？
E: Honestly, though... I wonder what that mask-guy is up to?

C: 那倒未必——但我必须提醒你，跟假面愚者打交道一定要留个心眼。
E: Not necessarily, but when you're dealing with someone wearing a mask, you gotta keep your wits about you. Common sense.

C: 看来次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神也已经准备好了。
E: Looks like Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord is also ready.

C: 你赢了，你真棒，再见
E: You won. Good job. Bye.

C: 别抱太大期望啊，这公司对员工都这么抠门，对玩家更不用说了，让我看看……
E: Don't get your hopes up too high! The IPC is stingy with their employees, I can only imagine how they are with players. Let me see...

C: 距离比赛还有一段时间，两位可以利用这段时间好好准备一下——祝二位旗开得胜！
E: You still have some time before the competition starts, so why not make the most of it to prepare yourselves? I wish you all the best!

C: 哟，{NICKNAME}！你们是来看比赛的吗？
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}! Here to watch the competition?

C: 我会在观众席好好看着你们的——千万别输了呀！
E: I'll be rooting for you in the stands! Don't go losing on me now!

C: 可惜，我身为戍卫官有要务在身，无法与各位同乐。不过我给佩拉情报官放了假——她平时工作压力太大，正好可以趁这个机会放松放松。
E: Unfortunately, my duty as Captain comes with pressing tasks — I'm afraid I can't partake in the fun... but I have given Officer Pela a well-deserved day off. She's normally swamped with work, so this is the perfect chance for her to relax.

C: 哼哼，气势不错……
E: I'm liking the energy...

C: 只要沿着这台阶拾级而上，你们便能与那位神秘的玩家面对面，得到你们热烈渴望的、有关庆典的真相……
E: All you need to do is climb these stairs, and you'll come face to face with her... and the truth you've been eagerly seeking...

C: 很好，很好！真是令人「欢愉」的决定！整个星系的玩家都将通过转播目睹你们的对决——这可不是谁都能拥有的待遇！
E: Excellent! A splendid decision! All gamers in the galaxy will be tuning in to the livestream to watch your showdown! What a privilege!

C: 多谢两位！嘿嘿。
E: Thanks, guys!

C: 真是的，跟我还客气什么～
E: Oh stop, there's no need to be so polite with me~

C: 嗯～这个纹样也被我们搞定了。
E: Another one down!

C: 我们能有什么问题。
E: We got this.

C: 嗯，龙女凭空消失，他们想必也是一筹莫展。不过，咱们打听消息时，最好别透露身份，也别提岁阳附身的事情…搞不好会造成恐慌……
E: Lady Bailu disappeared into thin air — they must be pretty confused. Remember, we have to keep our identities secret when we interview them... and don't mention anything about the heliobi — people might start panicking...

C: 我这么有名的吗？
E: Am I that famous?

C: 是啊，我们本来已经抓到了龙女大人，嘿，没想到她砰地不见了。
E: Uh yeah, just when we had her cornered, the Dragon Lady disappeared with a "bang."

C: 那就是工作太累了…丹鼎司医士救死扶伤，每天操劳过度，很容易产生幻觉的。作为仙舟行业道德的表率，您哥俩可得保重身体啊。
E: Hmm, maybe you're overworked. Alchemy Commission healers are saving people <unbreak>24</unbreak>/7 — I'd start seeing things too if I were that busy. As the face of medicinal mastery on the Xianzhou, you two need to be living healthier lifestyles.

C: 交给我吧。
E: Doors are my specialty.

C: 啊，就是那位长乐天著名的牌手！我每次执行任务经过那儿，总能见到她雷打不动地和牌友们围城大战。
E: That's the Celestial Jade player over at Exalting Sanctum! Whenever I pass through on official business, I always see her with loads of other players.

C: 哈哈哈，你们人类脑壳里装的那坨蛋白质，计算效率实在太低，你们对命运的猜测只是类比和错觉罢了。
E: Hahaha, that pile of protein in your human skull is computationally inefficient — your conjectures on destiny are little more than analogies and illusions...

C: 岁阳…就是你们所说的危险吗？
E: A heliobus... is that the danger you were talking about?

C: 如果眼前有个必输之局，我在牌桌上的「选择」就没有任何意义吗？不对，选择就是意义本身。
E: Do my "choices" at the game table mean nothing if I have a sure loss in front of me? No — the choices are what make the game meaningful in the first place.

C: 我也好奇。搬来救兵最多也只用得上一个人，你该把{NICKNAME}这样的战力留在那儿帮你一把才对。
E: Come to think of it... we only needed one person to fetch reinforcements... Why didn't we get {NICKNAME} to stay behind with you...? And why didn't you ask!?

C: 何况，它似乎来者不拒，欢迎所有想要追求更高境界的人前来一窥。
E: And better yet, they welcome those who wish to pursue higher realms with open arms.

C: 少年，有我在，一切便不同了。
E: Young one, with me, everything will be different.

C: 自从成为判官起，藿藿时不时萌生出想要退却离职的意思。她或许认为自己配不上判官的职务。
E: Since becoming a judge, Huohuo has often thought about resigning. She thinks she might not be cut out for the task.

C: 藿藿大人，咱们开始行动吧？
E: Captain Huohuo, should we start the ghost hunt now?

C: 谢谢你们，是你们把尾巴带回来了吗？
E: Thank you, all of you. Are you the ones who brought Tail back?

C: 比如什么《阿芬探灵：云骑美少女夜路遇鬼，只用三秒钟她让妖魔后悔》。
E: Like: "Little Gui Investigates: Ghost Tries to Scare Young Cloud Knight Girl on Creepy Road — Gets Owned..." Y'know?

C: 桂小姐……
E: Miss Gui...

C: 不必担心，彦卿有分寸。
E: Don't worry, I got this.

C: 守灵还有事需要与大人详谈，不过守灵可以等到大人处理完毕之后。在下先告退了……
E: There is more that I wish to discuss with you in detail, but I can wait until you are finished. I shall take my leave for now...

C: 别以为有十王司的判官，我就怕了！我们郎才女貌，天生一对，轮到你这个妖怪来反对？
E: Don't think I'll just be scared off by a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission! We're a capable couple and we're made for each other. What kind of monster are you to disagree?

C: 尊重他们的选择吗……
E: Do you respect their choice...?

C: …我从未在别的人类身上品尝过如此复杂的情绪。在失去他之后，其他人的情感在我看来太过寡淡，我…一时间居然失去了身为岁阳的感触，堕入了名为「人」的幻觉里。
E: ...I've never experienced such complex emotions in any other human before. After losing him, other people's emotions just seem too bland to me. I... I lost all feeling of being a heliobus for a moment, and fell into this illusion called "being human."

C: 如此捉鬼流程不符合十王司的规范，请你就把它当成你和我之间的秘密吧。
E: This ghost-hunting mission does not comply with the rules of the Ten Lords. Please keep this a secret just between you and me.

C: 你是…真太卜！
E: You're... the real master diviner!

C: 不，我的商业版图…
E: No, my business plans...

C: …{NICKNAME}说的对，还得实际走访之后才能有结论。
E: ...{NICKNAME} is right. We'll need to visit personally to reach a proper conclusion.

C: 虚弱的声音戛然而止。
E: The weakened voice comes to an abrupt halt.

C: 从「4」开始…
E: Start from "4"...

C: 她说的那句话已经是明示了吧。
E: That last line of hers was a clear indication.

C: 还不错，{M#小子}{F#丫头}，这是我出逃以来玩得最开心的一次。
E: Not bad, {M#boy}{F#girl}. This is the most exciting adventure I've ever had.

C: 你担心自己限制了尾巴的自由？
E: Are you worried that you've restrained Tail's freedom?

C: 请、请放过我！
E: P—Please spare my life!

C: 带着遗憾被封印的话，我就再也燃不起来啦！
E: If I'm sealed with my regrets, I won't be able to burn brightly anymore!

C: 最喜欢仙舟上的什么？
E: What's your favorite thing about the Xianzhou culture?

C: 啊？你还真脸红了，嘿，还挺可爱的。
E: Huh? You really are blushing now. Ha, that's pretty cute.

C: 看来是好事，我们走吧。
E: Looks like good news. Let's go.

C: 素裳和藿藿还没到？
E: Sushang and Huohuo are still on their way?

C: 对粉丝这么严厉，真的好吗？
E: Is it really wise to be so tough on your fans?
