C: 等我拆一下看看里面是什么…啊…原来是她寄的！
E: Let's rip it open and see what's inside... Ahh... it's from her!

C: 科员们尽可能多地收集到了「小怪物」们所分泌的气味，他们在云端上操纵特定的气味分子，将这些味道一一模拟了出来。
E: Our researchers then gather as much of these smell secretions from the critters, and then simulate each of these smells in the cloud by manipulating specific molecules.

C: 通过激活不同的味道插件，测试者的感知会发生变化，大脑的回忆区域会激活，见到各种惊险的幻象……
E: Activating different scent plug-ins will change the test subject's perceptions, activating the memory domains of the brain and causing various thrilling hallucinations to be experienced...

C: 我见过一些造物，身躯特征和大部分造物明显不同。它们游离在各个角落，你要是有机会，说不定能碰到它们。
E: I have seen some creations whose physical traits greatly differ from most of the others. They drift around all over the place. If you get the chance, you might just run into one of them.

C: {NICKNAME}，你来啦！
E: {NICKNAME}, you're here!

C: 我们想请你拍几张照片，再把照片发给她。
E: We'd like you to take some photos and send them to her.

C: 不记得就对了，这应该是它编出来的吧。游辞讲的故事都有些不着四六，怎么听都不像是真的发生过。
E: It's normal that you don't remember, because it just cut that story out of whole cloth, right? Youci's stories are all a bit zany and never sound as though they really happened.

C: 「这是一枚梦泡。」
E: "This is a dream bubble."

C: 哈哈哈，当然可以，你可以随时去做你想做的任何事，不用受任何人的限制，也不会再有人借着管教的名义欺负你们。我不会允许之前的情况再次发生。
E: Hahaha, of course you can. You can do whatever you want without any restrictions, and there won't be any bullying in the name of discipline. I won't allow what happened before to happen again.

C: 从现在起，这家酒吧就叫做「惊梦酒吧」。
E: From now on, this lounge will be called Dreamjolt Hostelry.

C: ——噼啪！荷官为你表演了一段踢踏舞，骰子转动随脚步的变换越来越快，当你的视线逐渐变得模糊时，它却忽然疯狂挥拳捶击起表面来。
E: *crack* The dealer starts to tap dance for you, and the dice roll faster and faster, keeping in time with the performance. When your vision gradually becomes blurred, the dealer suddenly starts striking the surface wildly.

C: 我是临时过来帮忙的。
E: I'm just here to lend a hand.

C: 思来想去，还是只有酒店深处的最适合了…稍微走远点，应该不会有事吧？
E: After some thoughts, the depths of this hotel seem like the best option... as long as I don't go too far, right?

C: 你是要和谁约会？
E: Who's the lucky person you're dating?

C: 你是要和舒翁约会吗？
E: Are you dating Siobhan?

C: 没有，是你记错了。
E: No, you remembered it wrong.

C: 直到倒闭的那天吧。
E: Until the day this lounge shuts down.

C: 哈哈哈哈，我说吧，稍微难点的事就做不好，你也就这点能耐了。
E: Hahahaha, just as I thought! You can't handle anything slightly challenging! That's all you're capable of.

C: （它对我的态度还是这么蛮横啊。）
E: (It's still being so rude to me.)

C: 要是没兴趣的话，那就算了吧。
E: Well, if you're not interested, then forget it.

C: 嘻嘻，当然是所有人都会感兴趣的那种秘密啦。
E: Hee-hee, the kind of secret that would pique anyone's interest, of course.

C: 还是麻烦您调杯饮料吧，想要<color=#dbc291ff>小杯，微微苦的，味道要特别特别柔和，稍微放些冰块就好。</color>就像人家现在的心情，烦闷呀。
E: I'd like to bother you to make a drink that is <color=#dbc291ff>very slightly bitter in a small glass, and it has to taste really mellow. Just a little ice will do</color>. Just like my current mood: Upset.

C: 我很清楚自己是什么，不需要你来提醒。
E: I know exactly what I am, and I don't need you to remind me.

C: 先从制作冰块开始。
E: Let's start by making ice cubes.

C: 你记错了。
E: You've got it all mixed up.

C: …装饰物？
E: ...Decorations?

C: 你其实…没有发狂吧？
E: Actually, you... didn't go frenzied back then, right?

C: 你没有伤害那些怪物。
E: You didn't harm those monsters.

C: 你是想要吓我离开。
E: You were trying to scare me into leaving.

C: 这些怪物在平时没有表现出攻击性，是因为有你为它们调制饮料的缘故。酒吧提供的饮料对它们而言会有稳定情绪的功效，能在一定程度上抵抗噩梦的侵袭。
E: Those monsters don't show aggression most of the time because of your drinks. The drinks offered here can stabilize their emotions, helping them resist the nightmare corruption to some extent.

C: 你曾经是它们的管理员。
E: You used to be their administrator.

C: 我是给所有人带来幸福的汽水狗——再见！
E: I am the Soda Dog that brings happiness to everyone. Goodbye!

C: 劝你——那就是条自私又嘴臭的狗，最好离它远点，别没事自找苦头吃！
E: Let me tell you — it's a selfish, bad-mouthed dog. It's best if you keep your distance. Don't give yourself unnecessary headaches!

C: 是我，你哪位？
E: That's me. Who are you?

C: 汪
E: Woof

C: 汪      汪
E: Woof      Woof

C: 不<rhythm>用<rhythm>惊<rhythm>讶
E: No <rhythm>need <rhythm>to <rhythm>gasp

C: 准备开始正式拍摄吧！
E: Prepare to begin the photography proper!

C: 在没有提示的情况下试试吧。
E: Now try without any hints.

C: 来的就您一个人，还面什么试啊？直接上吧。
E: You're the only one here. Let's just get started.

C: 您看，这儿还有批给找回这份文件的经费呢——什么？二十万！
E: Look at this, the document reveals the reward amount for those who retrieve it... Wait, WHAT!? <unbreak>200,000</unbreak> credits!?

C: 唉，说到这个我就郁闷，怎么最近每次度假都跟仙舟话本里的渡劫似的……
E: *sigh* Talking about it is making me all depressed. Why are our vacations all ending in trials and tribulations lately? It's like we're in one of those Xianzhou stories!

C: 可恶，美少女永不认输！不行——再和我来一局！
E: Darn it! No, a pretty girl never gives up! Again! One more round!

C: 当然没问题！
E: Of course!

C: 你也喜欢玩游戏？
E: You like playing video games too?

C: 哇，有这种好事{NICKNAME}你竟然不叫我！我也想和知更鸟小姐一起玩…所以你们谁赢了？
E: Wha... I can't believe you didn't tell me about this, {NICKNAME}! I want to play the game with Miss Robin too... So, who won in the end?

C: 这位小姐，可以请你替我陪他们玩一局吗？
E: Miss, would you play a match on my behalf?

C: 噢？噢…理解，理解。那么，除了翡翠女士以外的各位，请移步这边……
E: Oh? Oh... I see. In that case, apart from Madam Jade, would everybody come over to this side...

C: 怎么样？心情好些了吗？好些了就赶紧回去准备比赛吧！
E: How are you feeling now? Better? Get back and prepare for the match if you are feeling better!

C: 以及仙舟古武术的传承人——铄金！
E: And I'll introduce the inheritor of Xianzhou ancient martial arts — Shuojin!

C: 所以，你现在到底为什么站在这儿啊？要是被绑架了你就快眨眨眼啊，铄金先生！
E: Why are you standing there? If you're being coerced, just blink quickly, Mr. Shuojin!

C: 「铁拳卢卡！无敌拳法！」
E: Iron Fist Luka! Iron Fist Fury!

C: 你是说…「次世代动力战斗装甲ARMS」。哈哈，那不过是一点滞销的旧型号存货罢了。
E: You mean... Advanced Reinforced Mechanized Suit (ARMS)? That's just some old unsold stock.

C: 黑塔直勾勾地望着你，多半不打算给你选择的权利。不过仔细想想，这可是和黑塔女士一起做研究的宝贵机会，你真的想拒绝吗？
E: Herta stares at you intently, likely not intending to offer you a choice. But, after careful thought, this is a precious opportunity to work with Madam Herta on a research project — do you really want to decline?

C: 来临了——「派对时刻」！
E: It's Party Time!

C: 拿好你桌上这份「星穹列车值日排班表」～接下来，{NICKNAME}乘客要好好参加值日，赚取「列车基金」，把这个房间建设成自己想要的样子吧！
E: Take this Astral Express Duty Roster on your desk~ Next, Passenger {NICKNAME}, make sure to participate in the duties well, earn the Express fund, and turn this room into the way you want it!

C: 提问：怎么会发生这样的惨剧呢？
E: Question: How did such a tragic event happen?

C: 很好的回答！美观度，一百分！
E: Excellent answer! Aesthetics: <unbreak>100</unbreak>!

C: 丹恒老师，蝉联三届的列车「卫生之星」！今天请你过来，就是为了向你请教收纳的秘诀！
E: Master Dan Heng, three-time reigning Hygiene Star of the Express! I asked you here today to learn your secrets for organization!

C: 就像「星空生态学派」主张根据特征的相似和演化，绘制宇宙生命演化的总表图。而「烛墨学派」则主张按照首字母，将一切知识编入百科全书。
E: Just like how the Astral Ecology School advocates creating a comprehensive chart of the evolution of cosmic life based on similarities and evolution of characteristics. In contrast, the Candelagraphos advocates organizing all knowledge into an encyclopedia according to the initial letters.

C: 我认识一位年轻的无名客，他早睡早起，坚持锻炼，严格规划热量摄取，拒绝了我的每一条建议。至于夜宵…在他眼中简直是毒药。
E: I once knew a young Nameless who was both early to bed and early to rise. He had a regular exercise routine and strictly regulated his caloric intake, rejecting every suggestion that I ever gave him. To him, midnight snacks were no different from poison.

C: 暂时驳回！目前看来，还是这个地方最合适。
E: Rejected for now! For the moment, this spot still seems the most suitable.

C: 我已经去踩点好几次了，一个怪物都没有…就是个别防御措施还没失效。
E: I've checked out the site a dozen times now and I haven't seen a single monster! ...Maybe except for a few of their defense mechanisms that are still functioning.

C: 这地方好像不能直接通过…有什么办法吗？
E: It looks like we can't pass through this area directly... Do you have any ideas?

C: 致可能到来的某人：你会来到这里，要么是外面的封印已经失效，要么是你亲手解开了它们——这证明了你的幸运或智慧。
E: To the person who manages to reach this place: The fact that you're here means that either the seals outside are no longer active or that you broke the seals yourself. Therefore, you're either very lucky or extremely intelligent.

C: 然后当晚蛋就自己孵化了？
E: And then the egg just hatched by itself that night?

C: 小编也不知道为什么。
E: I honestly have no clue why.

C: 那么，灰宝，我们该怎么称呼这孩子呢?
E: So, Grayie, what should we name this little one?

C: 我再想想。
E: I'm having second thoughts.

C: 听起来…有点拗口呢，可能会引起误解。不过{NICKNAME}喜欢就好。
E: That's... hard to say out loud. Might be confusing for others. But if that's how you like it...

C: 从来没有怕过。
E: Never have, never will.

C: 话题转得略显生硬，看来，想要解开驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大的秘密，还需要一段时间。
E: Bit of an abrupt topic shift there. Looks like it'll take more time to unravel the mystery of Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas.

C: 需要我帮忙吗？
E: Do you need any help?

C: 孩子没事老变小，多半是废了。
E: A kid who keeps shrinking probably doesn't have much of a future.

C: 呜嗡…（别骂了，再骂就变得更小了…）
E: Grumph... (Stop scolding me. I'll shrink even smaller if you keep going...)

C: 呜…（就像{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}你看到的那样，我其实没有彻底掌握欧洛尼斯祷言。）
E: *sniff* (As you can see, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}, I haven't really mastered Oronyx's Prayer.)

C: 吃掉！
E: Eat it up!

C: 你感受到了！那份心意是如此甜蜜——呃，好像有点甜过头了。
E: You felt it! That was so sweet. Ugh, maybe a bit too sweet.

C: 嗯，明天也要来进修啊。
E: And yes, come for more training tomorrow.

C: 若生物有生长痕迹，证明它由幼体发育而来；若它生来就是成熟的模样，则是神的原初造物，例如没有纹路的贝壳、见不到年轮的树木，都受到某些人的追捧。
E: If an organism bears marks of growth, it's a sign that it evolved from a youthful form. Conversely, if it's mature from its inception, it's regarded as a divine creation, like seamless shells or ageless trees — objects of desire for many.

C: 有需要随时回来。
E: Come back anytime you need something.

C: 待会再来找你们玩吧。
E: I'll come hang out with you later.

C: 这批数据，和您的匹配度为<unbreak>100%</unbreak>，看着就像是…为您量身定做的。
E: This batch of data is a perfect <unbreak>100%</unbreak> match for you. It looks like... it was made just for you.

C: 星琼与车票。
E: Stellar Jades and Boarding Passes.

C: 赐我「均衡」的审判吧。
E: Grant me the Judgment of the Equilibrium.

C: 在一场盛大的战斗后，王子终于把尖刀刺进了大臣的胸膛。他向百姓指认弑君者的罪行，却被石子与怒骂声包围。
E: After an epic battle, the prince finally plunged his dagger into the Minister's chest. When he revealed the regicide to his people, he was only to be met with a barrage of stones and angry curses.

C: 这两位的设定也在意料之中…
E: Those two... exactly what I expected.

C: 那刻夏老师，缺少光照的问题真能解决吗？
E: Professor Anaxa, can you truly solve the limited sunlight problem?

C: （好像除了这两道沙拉，餐馆也没别的菜可选了……）
E: (Well, these two salads are the only menu options here...)

C: 支持白厄主厨的，请举手！
E: Anyone in favor of Chef Phainon's proposal, raise your hand!

C: 嗯？只要吃掉所有的饵料就好吧？
E: Hmm? So I just need to eat every bait, right?

C: 好呀，祝你做个甜甜的梦。明天见！
E: You got it. Sweet dreams! See you then!

C: 哈哈哈哈。这便是所谓的乐极生悲吧。
E: Hahaha. This is what they call "too much of a good thing," I suppose.

C: 都忙完了的话，就快出发吧。要是我们迟迟不到，妖精们就只能眼巴巴地等着啦。
E: If we're all set, we should get going. We don't want to keep all those fairies waiting for us.

C: 不对不对！*我们*才是前辈，这种时候该由*我们*来提问！
E: No, no! We are the seniors here. At a time like this, we should be asking the questions!

C: 咳。得听好啦，我有…关于那刻夏老师的、很重要的秘密要公布！
E: Everyone, listen up. I'm going to reveal... a very important secret about Professor Anaxa!

C: 如此反复逼问，反倒显得有些刻意了。
E: All this repeated questioning is making things rather exhausting.

C: 以及，亲手为{NICKNAME}阁下颁发奖章。
E: As well as personally awarding {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME} a medal.

C: 但我相信，在每一个随涟漪散去的故事里，都有着同样幸福的守候。
E: Yet I'm certain that within every story carried away by the ripples, the same joyful anticipation remains.

C: 星级提升固然值得庆祝，但后续需处理的事务也会增加。机遇同样是考验。
E: Increasing our star rank is worth celebrating, sure, but our responsibilities will also increase. Opportunity is also a test.

C: 餐馆获得迷其林认证后，来用餐的顾客也会变多。得着手研发些新菜品了。
E: With the "Memchelin" seal of approval, we'll see more customers flowing in. Time to whip up some new dishes.

C: 小灰鱼儿有空在此逡巡，不如多花些时间，与同伴享受难得的欢宴时光。
E: Little Gray Fry, if you have time to wander around, you should spend more of it enjoying this rare celebration with your companions.

C: 这是宇宙碎片。
E: Here are some Cosmic Fragments.

E: Elusive Bird

E: Salesperson

E: Alfalfa Family Youth

E: Strange Plant

E: Pillar of Stone, Dan Heng

C: 「这样都能活下来…连死神都抛弃了他啊。」
E: "Huh, he managed to survive all of that..." "Even the god of death turned him away."

C: 野史之所以为野史，\n是因为悬锋城消失已久。
E: The reason it's called a wild tale,\nis because Castrum Kremnos has long vanished.

C: 无人敢与他握手致意。
E: None dare to shake his hand in greeting.

C:
可那目光如炬，
至死不熄，
贯穿盗火的身影，
直达迢遥的天际。
E:
But that gaze, fierce as flame,
Never dimmed, not even in death,
Looking beyond those flame-seeking figures
Reaching far toward the endless horizon.

C: 末日如覆巢，\n圣城的居民也常被忧愁笼罩。
E: The end times looms like a dark cloud,\nhanging over the holy city's residents and shrouding them with worry.

C: 那人撕开黑潮封锁，\n直指天穹，\n欲以剑鞘承装火种。
E: That person tears open the barricade of the black tide,\nAims at the sky,\nWanting to contain the Coreflame in a sheath.

C: 仅余的孩童牵着手，\n决定将这座美丽的城殿，\n作为又一段旅途的起点。
E: The remaining children link their hands,\nAnd decide to make this beautiful city,\nThe beginning of yet another journey.

C: 「吾师，请不要踌躇。」 黄金的织者为她拂去泪水。 「世界仍走在你指明的路上。」 物是人非，神谕仍在：
E: "Teacher, do not hesitate." The Weaver of Gold brushes aside the child's tears. "The world still walks on the path you indicate." The prophecy still stands, even if the actors now different faces wear:

C:
在少女轻触死亡的幻景中，
她看到漆黑瀑布浪潮滔滔，

从天帷的豁口喷涌而下，淹没一切，
只剩一座高塔，立在汹涌浪间。
E:
In the mirages when the girl petted death,
She sees black waterfalls foaming and bellow,

Pouring down from a chasm in the sky,
Where a solitary tower withstands torrents sallow.

C: 人们以为这是谎言，\n但女孩知道，祖母不善欺骗。\n就像她谈及父母的去向——
E: People thought this to be a lie,\nBut the girl knows her grandmother cannot deceive.\nJust like how she always glossed over questions about parents and kin —

C: 「别跑，停下脚步…狡诈恶徒！」\n「跑吧，跑得快些…赛法利娅。」
E: "Stop! Stop right there, you thief!"\n"Run. Run as fast as you can... Cifera."

C: 「那你瞧好，这最华美的衣裳……」\n「将会永远留在我的宝库里！」
E: "Then, just you watch..."\nThis wondrous dress will forever remain in my own gallery.

C: 这是最坏的时代——\n黄金战争再度开启，\n扎格列斯的嘲笑满城飘摇。
E: This is an age of ruin—\nThe Chrysos War ignites once more,\nWhile Zagreus's taunts ripple through the city streets.

C: 「落败的泰坦，已沦为野鬼孤魂……」
E: "The defeated Titan is now naught but a wandering soul..."

C: 是贪图它许下的财宝，\n还是隐隐预见<color=#9e5738>形单影只的宿命</color>？
E: Was it greed for the treasure they promised,\nOr had she vaguely perceived their <color=#9e5738>lonely fate</color>?

C: 记忆的花朵凋落，\n长出一枚心形的果实。
E: As the memory's flower withers,\nit bears a fruit shaped like a heart.

C: 每天清晨，列车组都会一块吃早餐，\n但…不是每次都能准时。
E: Every morning, the Express Crew has breakfast together,\nbut... they're not always on time.

C: 而她记得怪人所言：\n——我出身不祥，\n切莫向外宣称<color=#9e5738>「师者」</color>的由来。
E: But she still recalled what the stranger said:\n...My origins bring dark omens,\nSo never tell others where your <color=#9e5738>teacher</color> is from.

C: ——「海洋」的末嗣，\n孤身奏浪的海列屈拉，\n如是说。
E: ...Helektra, the last heir of the "Ocean,"\nWho played music on the waves alone,\nSpoke thus.

C: 「你已知晓，世界只是梦幻泡影。」
E: "You already know that the world is just an illusion."

C: 「你们要带着新的太阳，\n游向远方。」
E: "You must carry the new sun,\nAnd swim toward the distant horizon."

C: 智种学派贤人坦言。
E: The Nousporism Sage says in admission.

C: 少女含糊回应，\n心中澄澈如镜——
E: The girl muddles her answers,\nYet her heart knows in full admission —

C: 少女孤身留在战场。\n无暇避及炙热的黄金，\n也无心展露惯常的笑意。
E: Alone, the girl remained upon the battlefield.\nNo time to shy from the searing gold,\nNo will to wear her usual smile.

C: 「多亏他的胡子，我明白了一个道理。」\n人们屏息，等待他的深思，\n然而他只给出一句结论。
E: "I understood something thanks to his beard."\nThe others hold their breath, waiting for his thoughts,\nBut he only gives out one response.

C: 「那就向着罪恶怒吼，\n和它一同燃尽！」
E: "Then I shall roar at evil,\nAnd together with it, burn!"

C: 远见者必须远虑，\n他的教诲像是预言，\n但他却与预言为敌。
E: The far-seeing must be far in thought.\nHis teachings are like prophetic delight,\nYet he opposes prophecies with all his might.

C: 「揭破神的面目，应是生前之举。」\n或许，这便是他的孤傲之处。
E: "Unveiling the countenance of the gods is a task for the living."\nPerhaps that is his haughty position.

C: 炉火在壁炉里跳动，发出噼里啪啦的响声。
E: Fire crackles and dances in the hearth.

C: 突然一阵风卷起了涟漪，原本就要落下出水口的月桂叶，在众目睽睽下凭空消失了。同时，赛法利娅也出现在阿格莱雅面前，带着戏谑的笑意。
E: A sudden gust of wind stirred up ripples, and the laurel leaf that was about to fall into the drain vanished into thin air before everyone's eyes. At the same time, Cifera appeared in front of Aglaea with a playful smirk.

C: 「侵晨！」白厄笑着说。他看见天边的碎浪愈发接近。「我正是用它从黑潮手里一次又一次地保护着哀丽秘榭。」
E: "Dawnmaker!" Phainon said with a laugh. He watched as the fragmented waves drew closer to the edge of the sky. "With it, I've been protecting Aedes Elysiae from the black tide, time and time again."

C: 「遐蝶女士的冥信片…还是一如既往地沉甸甸呢。对了，这次要给遐蝶女士的回信只有一封，麻烦玻吕茜亚小姐收好啦。」
E: "Miss Castorice's letter from the netherworld... still as weighty as ever, I see. Oh right, there's only one reply letter for Miss Castorice this time, please keep it safe, Miss Polyxia."

C: 卫士将精致的信笺塞至死龙颈后。死龙温柔地蹭了蹭两位卫士，随后缓缓振翅起飞，在云石市集上空盘旋一会儿，旋即向斯缇科西亚飞去。
E: The guards tucked the delicate letter behind the neck of Netherwing, who gently nuzzled the two before slowly taking flight, circling above the Marmoreal Market for a moment, before flying off toward Styxia.

C:
以十二组因子为原型创造出的电信号。泰坦与黄金裔，即为对星神与命途行者的共轭模拟。通过让黄金裔继承泰坦的火种，在竞争与继承中，实现电信号的迭代升级。
【逻辑：应明确电信号间的权限分配，作为「神权」参与实验。】

【记录更新：特定电信号通过「毁灭」命途力量实现的破坏行为，将导致对应路径产生逻辑漏洞。该现象符合迭代进程。产生逻辑漏洞时，可由满足实验条件的数据信号递补。该流程独立于泰坦/黄金裔的继承。】
E:
Electrical signals created from the basis of the twelve factors. The Titans and the Chrysos Heirs are conjugate constructs mirroring the Aeons and the Pathstriders. By having Chrysos Heirs inheriting the Titans' Coreflames, the electrical signals will iterate and improve through rivalry and inheritance.
[Logic: Authority distribution between electrical signals must be clearly defined, serving as "divine authority" in the experiment.]

[Record Update: Destructive actions carried out by a specific electrical signal via the power of the Path of Destruction will result in a logical loophole in the corresponding path. This phenomenon is consistent with the iterative process. When a logical loophole occurs, a data signal that meets the experimental conditions can serve as a substitute. This process is independent of the inheritance of the Titans/Chrysos Heirs.]

C: 口蜜腹剑的公司代表向你提出了一笔交易。\n而你恰好是个天生的赌徒——最重要的是汲取游戏过程中产生的乐趣，输赢与否并不重要。\n你在任何境遇下都能笑出声来，这很好。毕竟在某些特定的场合，入局与否和你自身的意愿无关……
E: The silver-tongued IPC spokesperson has offered you a deal.\nAnd you happened to be a natural gambler — The most important thing is to absorb the joy generated through the course of the game, instead of being obsessed over victory.\nYou can laugh under any circumstances, which is a good thing. After all, sometimes it's not up to you whether you will join a game...

C: ——在遗迹中，你好像看到了熟悉的身影……

E: — The Trotter has noticed you from afar and prepares to escape, seemingly carrying an ancient bomb...

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「四面受敌」</color>开始探索时，将直接出现敌人。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Ambushed</color>: At the start of the exploration, enemies will appear immediately.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「遗物宝库」</color>开始探索时，将直接翻出古代遗物。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Relic Vault</color>: At the start of the exploration, immediately obtain an Ancient Relic.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「集结号令」</color>具有「召唤」能力的敌人，会根据你的行动在空白区域召唤同伴。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Rallying Call</color>: Enemies with the Summoning ability will summon their comrades on blank areas according to your actions.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「遗物扑满」</color>携带古代遗物的序列扑满出现！
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Relic Trotter</color> A Sequence Trotter carrying an ancient relic appears!

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「突出重围」</color>击败所有敌人后，将激活可传送门。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Siege Breaker</color>: After defeating all enemies, you can activate the teleporter.

C: 精英•藏宝能力•门卡
E: Elite: Treasure Ability — Door Card

C: 3个相同星级的角色可以自动<color=#f29e38ff>升星</color>，大幅提升其战斗能力。\n<color=#f29e38ff>3星</color>通常是角色的最强形态。
E: 3 characters of the same star rating can be automatically <color=#f29e38ff>upgraded</color>, greatly boosting their combat power.\n<color=#f29e38ff>3-star</color> is typically a character's most powerful form.

C: 稀有的合成材料，可用于：\n合成各羁绊星徽，增加羁绊人员数量。\n合成财富宝钻，增加团队规模上限。
E: Rare synthesis material, usable for:\nSynthesizing various Bond Emblems to increase the number of members in a Bond.\nSynthesizing Wealth Gems to increase the team size limit.

C: 使用<color=#f29e38ff>雷属性</color>造成弱点击破时，会立即造成<color=#f29e38ff>雷属性击破伤害</color>，并施加<color=#f29e38ff>触电</color>状态。<color=#f29e38ff>触电</color>会在敌方目标<color=#f29e38ff>回合开始时</color>，造成雷属性持续伤害。
E: Using <color=#f29e38ff>Lightning</color> attacks to trigger Weakness Break will immediately deal <color=#f29e38ff>Lightning Break DMG</color> and apply the <color=#f29e38ff>Shock</color> effect. <color=#f29e38ff>Shock</color> will cause enemies to take Lightning DoT <color=#f29e38ff>at the start of their turn</color>.

C: 使用<color=#f29e38ff>二倍速</color>功能，可以体验更快节奏的战斗，但在某些特殊战斗时会暂时关闭二倍速功能。
E: Use <color=#f29e38ff>2× speed</color> to experience quicker battles. However, 2× speed will be temporarily turned off in some special combat situations.

C: 此外，还有一面<color=#f29e38ff>可移动</color>的<color=#f29e38ff>幻梦之镜</color>，可以<color=#f29e38ff>复制</color>已有的通路。当通往齿轮的道路形成后，钟表小子会<color=#f29e38ff>自动收集</color>齿轮，依次收集全部齿轮即可完成修复。
E: In addition, there is a <color=#f29e38ff>movable</color> <color=#f29e38ff>Dream Mirror</color> that <color=#f29e38ff>replicates</color> existing paths. Once a pathway to a gear is complete, Clockie will <color=#f29e38ff>automatically collect</color> the gear. Collect all the gears to complete the repair.

C: 与<color=#f29e38ff>「筑梦遥眼」</color>交互可以<color=#f29e38ff>进入</color>或<color=#f29e38ff>退出</color>筑梦师视角。
E: Interact with the <color=#f29e38ff>Dream's Eye</color> to <color=#f29e38ff>enter</color> or <color=#f29e38ff>exit</color> the Dreamweaver's View.

C: 梦泡桥梁分为<color=#f29e38ff>「内转角」</color>和<color=#f29e38ff>「外转角」</color>两种形态。
E: Bubble Bridges have two forms: <color=#f29e38ff>Concave Corner</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>Protruding Corner</color>.

C: 带锁压力桩可在机巧经过两次后升起。
E: Locked pressure pillars can be raised after ingenia pass over them two times.

C: 无论当前处于哪个时空，宝珠的光芒都将持续<color=#f29e38ff>反转出另一个时空</color>。
E: No matter which space-time you're currently in, the orb's light will continuously <color=#f29e38ff>reveal the other space-time</color>.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>妖火</color>每隔一定回合会出现在<color=#f29e38ff>行动序列</color>上。\n<color=#f29e38ff>任意回合结束</color>时，都会使<color=#f29e38ff>妖火</color>向行动序列顶部<color=#f29e38ff>移动</color>。\n当<color=#f29e38ff>妖火</color>到达行动序列<color=#f29e38ff>顶部</color>时，会对<color=#f29e38ff>当前行动</color>单位<color=#f29e38ff>生效</color>。
E: Every few turns, <color=#f29e38ff>Fiendfire</color> will appear in the <color=#f29e38ff>Action Order</color>.\nWhen <color=#f29e38ff>any turn ends</color>, it will cause the <color=#f29e38ff>Fiendfire</color> to <color=#f29e38ff>shift</color> towards the top of the Action Order.\nWhen <color=#f29e38ff>Fiendfire</color> reaches the <color=#f29e38ff>top</color> of the Action Order, it <color=#f29e38ff>takes effect</color> on the unit that is <color=#f29e38ff>currently taking action</color>.

C: 入侵电视机的敌人都有独特的<color=#f29e38ff>「异变机制」</color>，需要利用<color=#f29e38ff>「异变机制」</color>击败敌人获取更多的<color=#f29e38ff>「关卡增益」</color>，使用增益击败更多敌人获取积分奖励。
E: All enemies hacking the TV screens have their own unique <color=#f29e38ff>Mutation Mechanics</color>. You need to exploit these <color=#f29e38ff>Mutation Mechanics</color> to defeat the enemies and gain more potent <color=#f29e38ff>Stage Buffs</color>, which allows you to effectively take down more enemies and earn more points.

C: 三月七可以通过学习剑招来提升战斗能力。学习剑招需要满足对应的属性与进境要求。
E: March 7th can improve her combat prowess by learning Sword Moves. To learn Sword Moves, specific stat and ascension requirements must be met.

C: 通关全部<color=#f29e38ff>骑士关卡</color>后，失去护卫的王棋将被削弱。
E: After clearing all <color=#f29e38ff>Knight Stages</color>, the King will be weakened without its guards.

C: 在加班模式中，你的队伍需要完成<color=#f29e38ff>多轮</color>工作。
E: In Overtime Mode, your squad needs to complete <color=#f29e38ff>multiple rounds</color> of tasks.

C: 若未在行动轮数结束前消灭所有敌人，则视为战斗失败，战斗失败会使自己受到伤害
E: If all enemies are not defeated before the Action Cycles end, it will be considered a battle failure. Battle failure will cause you to take DMG.

C:
来处蒙尘已久。
如那以悬锋为名的险城，男人的一切尽皆藏于迷雾，唯有弑王者的恶名为人所闻。
他那不死不伤的身躯，既能阻绝刀剑，亦能喝退探究者的目光。
那便看向他的道途，唯此可以一窥那争斗着的心。他用烈火烧焚前路，而归途……
归途以血作辙。
E:
His home had long been covered in dust.
Like that perilous city named Kremnos, the man's past is equally veiled in shadows. Only his infamy as the King-Slayer is recounted in echoes.
His immortal and woundless body barred all swords and blades, and also dispelled curiosity and peeking gaze.
Instead, look at his road, for that is the only way to scry into his fighting heart. He inflamed the path ahead with fire, and his road home...
Shall be paved in blood.

C: 看我的绝招！
E: Now watch this!

C: 失误啦，刚刚那是个失误！
E: That was just a small setback, nothing more!

C: 这样就万无一失了。
E: This will strengthen our position.

C: 非常感谢。
E: Much obliged.

C: 过去与未来如此相似，我却对此无动于衷。
E: The past and the future are so similar to each other. I'm indifferent towards them.

C: 说好等手伤痊愈了就一起打游戏，结果他的手就一直没好过。
E: He said he'd game with me once his hand healed up, but it seems like it still isn't any better.

C: 我们早已踏入风暴。
E: We've entered the storm.

C: 找他办事还行，但谁要想和他做朋友，就是和自己过不去。
E: If you need something done, he might be your man. But if you feel like befriending him, do yourself a favor: Don't.

C: 你说我的胜负心太强？呵，那是你还没见过卢卡。
E: You think I'm too competitive? Ha, guess you haven't met Luka.

C: 我是贝洛伯格的银鬃铁卫戍卫官，杰帕德•朗道。如果你在城中发现任何异常，都可向我报告。
E: My name is Gepard Landau, I'm a captain of the Silvermane Guards. If you discover anything suspicious in the city, you can always report it to me.

C: 杰帕德戍卫官内外如一，十分可靠。对于他养花的兴趣…我姑且只能表示尊重与祝福。
E: Captain Gepard is an honorable man and very reliable. But when it comes to his horticultural skills... all I can say is I respect his effort and wish him the best of luck.

C: 大家都说虎克淘气过头了，但我反而觉得她是个能干的好孩子。呃…证据嘛，没有——纯凭感觉，毕竟我也是鼹鼠党荣誉队员啊！
E: Everyone says Hook is too naughty, but I think she's a good kid. An example? Uh... guess I don't have any — just my gut feeling. Tsk, what do you mean "spoken like a true honorary member of The Moles"!?

C: 前方那位，你也要咨询债务问题？
E: Hey, you! Time to check your books.

C: 不慌~
E: Stay calm~

C: 各地的人情风土，读到的总和看到的不太一样，分辨其中差异，便是乐趣所在。
E: There are always differences between what I hear about a place and seeing it with my own eyes. Finding out the differences between these perceptions is my joy.

C: 往事已毕。但此情此景，难免令人感时伤怀。
E: Bygones are bygones... but sometimes I wish things had turned out differently.

C: 手不疼吗？
E: Don't your hands hurt?

C: 仙舟需要手持干戈的雄赳武夫，也要依赖她这样游弋自如的无常之水。
E: The Xianzhou need brawny warriors with their swords and spears, as well as unpredictable waters like her who travels freely and unrestrained.

C: 多加练习，方可更加熟练。
E: Practice is the key to increasing proficiency.

C: 我的剑术，是否足以再请赐教了？
E: Is my swordplay good enough to learn from a master like him?

C: 哎呀，演砸了…
E: Uh-oh, dropped the ball...

C: 哦哟哟，还有意外收获！
E: Ooh, extra tips!

C: 是丹恒先生啊，要不要教我些新的龙尊术法？
E: Dan Heng! Teach me some more high elder magic!

C: 把头埋入水中，不过也就一方小小的天地，却感觉可以比平时更加自由地呼吸，超脱了水的边界……
E: Putting my head in the water, and though it is a small area, I feel I can breathe freer than before, far beyond the boundaries of the water...

C: 也算是上品。
E: A fine piece.

C: 十王座下，拘魂判官，奉谕还阳行事。
E: Serving under the Ten Lords, as a judge of souls, I come to the world of the living to enforce their will.

C: 藿藿：太、太好了！雪衣大人也在！\n尾巴：一点都不好！
E: Huohuo: M—Madam Xueyi! You're here too!\nTail: Not good! Not good!

C: 藿藿：又要拖后腿了…
E: Huohuo: I'm gonna hold everyone back again...

C: 云璃小姐，这儿危险，你离远点、再远点…我要叫你爷爷过来了……
E: Miss Yunli, it's dangerous here. Just keep your distance, alright... I'm going to call your grandfather over...

C: 先等待，然后给他们当头一棒，就这么做。
E: We'll wait for the right moment, then hit them hard on the head with a stick.

C: 攻其一点。
E: Attack a single point.

C: 这儿热热闹闹的，真好。
E: It's so bustling here. Good.

C: 我偏爱厚重硬质的长棍面包，只需以长枪切片便能储存及随身携带，是长途旅程必不可缺的佳品。
E: I have a preference for thick, crusty baguettes. Slice them thinly so they're easier to store — a crucial snack for extended voyages.

C: 放心布局，忆者。我会将自己置于你的计谋之中。
E: Lay out your plans, Memokeeper. I will find my place in the web of your schemes.

C: 小心，这位女士的好意可都是暗里标好了价格，我可是领教过好多次，早就习惯了。
E: Be careful, our lady's kindness always comes with a price. I've received it many times, so I'm already used to it.

C: 毫无风险的回报，还算不错。
E: A reward with no risk? I'll take it.

C: 零分，下一个！
E: Zero points... Next!

C: 哪里还会需要我呢？
E: Wonder where I'm needed this time?

C: 哈哈，好枪法……
E: Haha, great marksmanship...

C: 别看我兜里的钱大都来路不正，但我很有自己的原则！第一、绝对不用抢来的钱享乐。第二、信用点不配称作「钱」。第三、小乐一下不算「享乐」。就这三点，我绝不打破！
E: Might be that my pockets are filled with ill-gotten gains, but I stick to my principles! Rule one: never use dirty money for indulgence. Rule two: credit ain't the same as cash. And rule three: havin' a lil' fun every now and again don't count as indulgence. I never break these rules!

C: 这里有什么值得你好奇的？不会是我吧？
E: What could possibly pique your curiosity here? Don't tell me... it's me?

C: 细针密缕，万无一失。
E: Intricate weaving, nothing left to chance.

C: 缇宝：送温暖啦~\n缇宁：嗯！
E: Tribbie: Delivering warmth~\nTrinnon: Hum.

C: 哼…品味不错，我收下了。
E: Hmm... Not bad, I'll accept it.

C: 与族人共饮蜜酿时，痛饮的是故土，是鲜红色的回忆。但若是加入些许干酪…你的身体就会更健康。
E: Whenever I drink honey brew with my people, I am drinking in our homeland and our bright red memories. But if you add a little cheese... your body will be healthier.

C: 赛法利娅？你认识我啊…不过，现在很少有人提起这个名字了。你叫我赛飞儿吧，听起来就比风还快，侠盗得很，对吧？
E: Cifera? Ah, so you've heard of me... But few call me by that name these days. Call me Cipher. It's sharper and swifter, like the wind itself. A perfect name for a master thief, don't you think?

C: 那些历史舞台上的「演员」讨人喜欢，可不仅是因为他们光鲜亮丽…观众可是更期待着，他们从舞台上跌落的那一刻。
E: Those "actors" on the grand stage of history aren't adored just for their dazzling brilliance... What the audience truly anticipates is the moment of their fall.

C: 别人喊他什么来着，「穿着华服的大地兽」？他还欣然接受——取绰号的人有没有水平另说，被取绰号的人一定很有水平……
E: What did they call him? "A dromas draped in finery"? And he took it just like that? Leaving aside the question of the nickname-giver's own credentials, Anaxa is undoubtedly an impressive individual...

C: 万敌阁下，我们各司其职吧。
E: Lord Mydei, let's each do our duty.

C: 赛飞儿大人，若是情况危急，还请您出手相助，我会付钱的……
E: Lady Cipher, please help us if we get into a dire situation. I can pay...!

C: 海瑟音女士，让我们一同谱写更美的歌曲吧。
E: Let's compose prettier songs together, Lady Hysilens.

C: 我没事。
E: I'm okay.

C: 她告诉我们，死亡可以是温暖的，优美的，亲切的…那么，生命不更应如此么？
E: She taught us that death can be warm, graceful, and kind... Shouldn't life, then, be even more so?

C: 我欣赏她的语调，既非奉承，亦非戏谑…认真说来，似乎更贴近你们常说的…友情？
E: I admire the way she speaks: not with sycophancy, nor with jest... In truth, it feels more like what you would call... friendship?

C: 无论何种场合，我的御座高度必须始终如一。只是厚度合适的大部头典籍，搬动起来也着实沉重。
E: No matter the occasion, the height of my throne's base must never change. But I must admit... those great heavy tomes, chosen for just the right thickness, are terribly cumbersome to carry.

C: 乖一点~
E: Play nice~

C: 要合影么？我当然不会拒绝♭
E: You want a photo together? Of course I won't say no ♭

C: 过曝的照片就像坏掉的果汁，无论曾经多么美妙，都只能将其丢弃。
E: An overexposed photo is like spoiled juice. No matter how wonderful it once was, you can only throw it away.

C: 对不起呀……
E: I'm sorry...

C: 放心，你可以的。
E: Trust me, you can do it.

C: 「存护」的种子一直都在贝洛伯格，我只是重新唤起了这座城市生存的意志…即使微弱，它也未到熄灭的时刻。
E: The seed of Preservation has always been within Belobog, and I simply re-ignited this city's will to live... That will may be weak, but this was not the time for it to go out.

C: 退出
E: Exit

C: 长按降落
E: {LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#Press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#Click} and hold to land

C: 哪怕一切为时已晚，我们还是能去唱，自己能唱的歌\n<color=#8790abff>※见证逐梦者的谐乐大典</color>
E: Even if it's too late, we still have the choice to sing whatever we can\n<color=#8790abff>※ Witness the Charmony Festival of Dreamchasers</color>

C: 组建战队，成为奇美拉大师！
E: Build your team, become a chimera Master!

E: Cristina Vee

C: 每个波次开始时，为我方恢复<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>个战技点，我方目标施放战技或消耗战技点时，为【记忆紊流】增加<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>段攻击段数，最多叠加<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>段。\n每个轮开始时，【记忆紊流】的每段攻击对随机敌方目标造成1次真实伤害。
E: At the start of each wave, recovers <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Skill Point(s) for allies. When ally targets use Skills or consume Skill Points, add <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> hits to "Memory Turbulence," stacking up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> hits.\nAt the start of each Cycle, each hit of "Memory Turbulence" deals True DMG once to a random enemy target.

E: Complete the Easy difficulty challenge

C: 生命因何而沉睡？
E: Why does life slumber?

C: 在接下来的长夜里，你恐怕会遭遇许多挫折，见证众多悲剧。
E: In the coming long nights, I'm afraid you will face many setbacks and witness many tragedies.

C: 而你，要仔细咀嚼其意义……
E: What you must do now is ponder its significance.

C: 好前辈
E: Good Senpai

C: 商店中会出现遐蝶用心制作的<color=#f29e38ff>特殊道具</color>！
E: The store will feature <color=#f29e38ff>special items</color>, made with love by Castorice!

C: 对战开始时：召唤<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>只<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>级受气包
E: At the start of battle: Summons <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Level <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Suffermaxxer(s).

C: 前1格同伴受到伤害时：与其交换位置，使自身<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>，<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>。若受伤者为呜利呜，则提升双倍属性
E: When the companion 1 tile ahead takes DMG: Swaps positions with the companion, and its <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> and <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP increases by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>. If the hurt unit is Wooreo, doubles the stat bonuses.

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的蝶糕糕为<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力</color>最高的我方奇美拉施加【祝福】。拥有【祝福】的奇美拉被击倒时会以<color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>点<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值</color>重新对战，最多生效1次
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Butterfly Cake in the team grants "Blessing" to the ally chimera with the highest <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK</color>. When a chimera with "Blessing" is defeated, it will rejoin the battle with <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP</color>. This effect can trigger up to 1 time.

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的暖龙龙获得自身当前<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>的<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>攻击力</color>。攻击时，额外对目标后方最近的奇美拉发动1次等同于<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=2 width=1 height=1>攻击力<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>的追加攻击
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Toasty Dragon in the team gains <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK</color> equal to <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the current <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP</color>. When attacking, additionally performs an attack on the nearest chimera behind the target, dealing 1 instance of DMG equal to <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=2 width=1 height=1>ATK</color>.

C: 自身攻击时：有<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>的概率使攻击目标<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力-<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>，最低至1
E: When this unit attacks: There is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> chance to reduce target's <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>, to a minimum of 1

C: 对战开始时：对所有对手造成<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>的伤害，至少造成1点伤害，随后离场
E: When the battle begins: Deals DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of its <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK to all opponents (minimum 1 DMG), and then departs from the field.

C: 同伴被召唤时：使其<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: When a companion is summoned: Increases <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>.

C: 自身受到伤害时：召唤<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>只<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>级压力怪，单场对战最多触发<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>次
E: When this unit takes DMG: Summons <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Level <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Pressure Monster(s), which can be triggered up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> time(s) per battle.

C: 回合开始时：对所有<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值小于等于<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点的对手造成<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>点伤害
E: At the start of turn: Deals <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> DMG to all opponents with <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP or below.

C: 胶糖卷不能陷入【忘却】状态。回合开始时：队伍中最强的胶糖卷使随机<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>名对手陷入【忘却】状态。同伴攻击/追加攻击时：若攻击目标处于【忘却】状态，则立即对其造成<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>点伤害
E: Gummy Roll cannot enter the "Oblivion" state. At the start of turn: The strongest Gummy Roll in the team inflicts "Oblivion" on <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> random opponent(s). When companions use attack/Follow-Up ATK: If the attacked targets are affected by "Oblivion," immediately deals <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> DMG to them.

C: 即使结局已经注定，但过程，我们还是可以自己决定。
E: Even if the ending is predetermined, we can still decide how we get there.

E: The dreamers will learn that the power to destroy their own lives comes from the Harmony, but that it is ultimately the worst option.

E: Just so you know, I'm here to deliver punishment, and you're the guilty one.

E: Let the Propagation rain down heavenly fire once more, heralding the mournful cry of "death."

E: Let me point out two mistakes. One of them... is yours.

C: 寰宇蝗灾曾经是如何结束，现在也将如何结束。「锤音」将响彻阿斯德纳，从命途层面夺取「秩序」的力量，进行反击，让{RUBY_B#太一}星期日{RUBY_E#}无力顾及你们的行动。
E: The new Swarm Disaster will end in the same way as it ended before. The Hammer Strike will echo throughout Asdana, seizing the Order's powers on the level of Paths to launch our counter-attack, leaving {RUBY_B#Ena}Sunday{RUBY_E#} powerless to interfere with your actions.

C: 只是一会儿吗……

E: The answer wasn't what I initially had in mind. Originally, I wanted to sing because of something specific that I experienced...

C: 刚才的那些是……

E: I think... that's not entirely true. I wish people could find happiness, but I've been tainted by too much nihilism... Sometimes I can't help but think...

E: Mr. Sunday, it's time for you to wake up from your dream. The future of Penacony won't belong to the Order... but will be determined by human will!
